title: Variance Reduction for Expectations with Diffusion Teachers
abstract: Pretrained diffusion models serve as frozen teachers feeding downstream pipelines such as text-to-3D, single-step distillation, and data attribution. The teacher gradients these pipelines consume are Monte Carlo (MC) expectations over noise levels and Gaussian noise samples; their estimator variance dominates compute cost because each draw requires expensive upstream work (rendering, simulation, encoding). We introduce CARV, a compute-aware variance-accounting framework that motivates a hierarchical MC estimator: amortize the expensive upstream computation over cheap diffusion-noise resamples, sharpened by timestep importance sampling and a stratified-inverse-CDF construction. In our text-to-3D distillation and attribution experiments, CARV delivers 2-3x effective compute multipliers (most from amortized reuse; ~25% additional from IS+stratification) without changing the objective; in single-step distillation, the same techniques cut gradient variance by an order of magnitude but do not improve downstream FID, marking the regime where MC variance is no longer the bottleneck.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CARV框架，通过分层蒙特卡洛估计减少扩散教师梯度期望的方差，实现2-3倍计算效率提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练扩散模型作为冻结教师，其梯度是蒙特卡洛期望，方差大导致计算成本高，因为每次采样需要昂贵的上游计算（渲染、仿真、编码）。现有方法未充分解决方差与计算成本间的权衡，亟需有效的方差减少技术以降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出CARV，一种计算感知的方差核算框架，核心是分层MC估计器：将上游昂贵计算摊销到廉价扩散噪声重采样上，结合时间步重要性采样和分层逆CDF构造，在保持无偏性的同时显著降低梯度方差。该方法无需改变目标函数，适用于多种下游任务。
light_analysis.result: 在text-to-3D蒸馏和数据归因中，CARV实现2-3倍有效计算倍数（大部分来自摊销重用，约25%来自IS+分层）。在单步蒸馏中，梯度方差降低一个数量级，但下游FID未改善，表明MC方差不再是瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARV有效降低扩散教师梯度的方差，提升计算效率，在多个下游任务中验证。局限性在于当方差不是瓶颈（如单步蒸馏）时，改进效果有限。未来可探索自适应分配计算预算或结合其他方差减少技术。

title: Equilibrium Reasoners: Learning Attractors Enables Scalable Reasoning
abstract: Scaling test-time compute by iteratively updating a latent state has emerged as a powerful paradigm for reasoning. Yet the internal mechanisms that enable these iterative models to generalize beyond memorized patterns remain unclear. We hypothesize that generalizable reasoning arises from learning task-conditioned attractors: latent dynamical systems whose stable fixed points correspond to valid solutions.   We formalize this process through Equilibrium Reasoners (EqR), which enable test-time scaling without external verifiers or task-specific priors. EqR scales internal dynamics along two axes: depth, by running more iterations, and breadth, by aggregating stochastic trajectories from multiple initializations. Empirically, gains from test-time scaling are tightly coupled with stronger convergence toward solution-aligned attractors.   This attractor perspective allows neural networks to adaptively allocate test-time compute based on task difficulty. While simple cases converge within 1 to 5 iteration steps, harder cases benefit from massive test-time scaling. By unrolling up to the equivalent of 40,000 layers, scalable latent reasoning boosts accuracy from 2.6% for feedforward models to over 99% on Sudoku-Extreme. These results suggest that learned attractor landscapes provide a useful mechanistic lens for understanding scalable reasoning in iterative latent models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Equilibrium Reasoners，通过学习任务条件吸引子实现可扩展的迭代潜在推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 迭代更新潜在状态的推理模型在测试时扩展计算表现出强大能力，但其内部机制尚不明确。现有方法依赖外部验证器或任务特定先验，限制了通用性。本文旨在揭示可泛化推理的起源，认为它源自学习任务条件吸引子——潜在动态系统中稳定不动点对应有效解。
light_analysis.method: 提出Equilibrium Reasoners (EqR)，将推理形式化为潜在动态系统，其稳定不动点对应解。通过深度（更多迭代）和广度（聚合多次随机初始化的轨迹）两个维度扩展测试时计算。无需外部验证器或任务先验，模型自适应分配计算资源。
light_analysis.result: 在Sudoku-Extreme任务上，前馈模型准确率仅2.6%，而EqR通过展开最多相当于40000层，准确率提升至99%以上。简单案例1-5步收敛，困难案例受益于大规模测试时扩展。收敛到解对齐吸引子的程度与性能增益紧密相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: EqR通过学习吸引子景观为可扩展推理提供了机械论解释，表明测试时计算与任务难度自适应匹配。该视角有助于理解迭代潜在模型的泛化机制，并为设计更高效的推理架构提供理论基础。未来可探索吸引子学习在更多推理任务中的应用。

title: Uni-Edit: Intelligent Editing Is A General Task For Unified Model Tuning
abstract: Currently, enhancing Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) with image understanding, generation, and editing capabilities mainly relies on mixed multi-task training. Due to inherent task conflicts, such strategy requires complex multi-stage pipelines, massive data mixing, and balancing tricks, merely resulting in a performance trade-off rather than true mutual reinforcement. To break this paradigm, we propose Uni-Edit, an intelligent image editing task that serves as the first general task for UMM tuning. Unlike complex mixed pipelines, Uni-Edit improves performance across all three abilities at once using only one task, one training stage, and one dataset. Specifically, we first identify image editing as an inherently ideal general task, as it naturally demands both visual understanding and generation. However, existing editing data relies on simplistic instructions that severely underutilize a model's understanding capacity. To address this, we introduce the first automated and scalable data synthesis pipeline for intelligent editing, transforming diverse VQA data into complex and effective editing instructions with embedded questions and nested logic. This yields Uni-Edit-148k, pairing diverse reasoning-intensive instructions with high-quality edited images. Extensive experiments on BAGEL and Janus-Pro demonstrate that tuning solely on Uni-Edit achieves comprehensive enhancements across all three capabilities without any auxiliary operations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Uni-Edit，将智能图像编辑作为统一多模态模型调优的通才任务，仅需单一任务、阶段和数据集即可全面增强理解、生成和编辑能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前增强统一多模态模型（UMMs）的图像理解、生成和编辑能力主要依赖混合多任务训练，由于任务冲突，需要复杂的多阶段流程、大量数据混合和平衡技巧，导致性能折衷而非真正相互增强。迫切需要一种更高效的调优范式，能够同时提升所有能力并规避任务冲突。
light_analysis.method: Uni-Edit将智能图像编辑作为通才任务，因其天然需要视觉理解和生成能力。为解决现有编辑数据指令简单、利用理解能力不足的问题，首次提出自动化可扩展的数据合成管道，将多样VQA数据转换为包含嵌入式问题和嵌套逻辑的复杂编辑指令，构建Uni-Edit-148k数据集，包含推理密集型指令与高质量编辑图像。
light_analysis.result: 在BAGEL和Janus-Pro模型上的大量实验表明，仅使用Uni-Edit数据调优，无需任何辅助操作，即可在图像理解、生成和编辑三种能力上取得全面增强，打破了多任务训练的性能折衷，实现了真正的相互增益。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但优于复杂多任务训练范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: Uni-Edit证明了智能图像编辑可作为统一多模态模型调优的通才任务，简化训练流程同时实现能力提升。该方法避免了多任务训练的权衡问题，具有较高学术价值和应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的指令生成或扩展至其他模态。局限在于数据合成依赖VQA数据质量。

title: Quantifying Hyperparameter Transfer and the Importance of Embedding Layer Learning Rate
abstract: Hyperparameter transfer allows extrapolating optimal optimization hyperparameters from small to large scales, making it critical for training large language models (LLMs). This is done either by fitting a scaling law to the hyperparameters or by a judicious choice of parameterization, such as Maximal Update ($μ$P), that renders optimal hyperparameters approximately scale invariant. In this paper, we first develop a framework to quantify hyperparameter transfer through three metrics: (1) the quality of the scaling law fit, (2) the robustness to extrapolation errors, and (3) the asymptotic loss penalty due to choice of parameterization. Next, we investigate through a comprehensive series of ablations why $μ$P appears to offer high-quality learning rate transfer relative to standard parameterization (SP), as existing theory is inadequate. We find that the overwhelming benefit of $μ$P relative to SP when training with AdamW arises simply from maximizing the learning rate of the embedding layer. In SP, the embedding layer learning rate acts as a bottleneck that induces training instabilities; increasing it by a factor of width to match $μ$P dramatically smooths out training while improving hyperparameter transfer. We also find that weight decay improves the scaling law fits, while, in the fixed token-per-parameter setting, it hurts the robustness of the extrapolation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出量化超参数迁移的三个指标，并揭示μP优势源于嵌入层学习率最大化。
light_analysis.motivation: 超参数迁移对于训练大型语言模型至关重要，但现有方法如拟合缩放律或参数化（如μP）存在理论不足。特别是μP相对于标准参数化（SP）的优势原因尚不明确，需要深入分析其根本机制。本研究旨在量化超参数迁移质量，并探究μP实际有效的关键因素。
light_analysis.method: 首先开发框架，通过三个指标量化超参数迁移：缩放律拟合质量、外推鲁棒性、参数化导致的渐近损失惩罚。然后对μP和SP进行消融实验，发现μP的显著优势源于嵌入层学习率最大化——SP中嵌入层学习率是训练不稳定的瓶颈，将其按宽度因子增大后训练更平滑且迁移更好。还发现权重衰减改善缩放律拟合，但在固定token-per-parameter设置下损害外推鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，μP相比SP在AdamW训练下的超参数迁移优势几乎完全归因于嵌入层学习率的增大；按宽度因子增大SP的嵌入层学习率可大幅平滑训练并提升迁移效果。权重衰减在特定场景下对缩放律拟合有益但牺牲外推鲁棒性。未报告具体数值指标，摘要注重定性结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了嵌入层学习率在超参数迁移中的关键作用，为大型语言模型训练参数化选择提供了理论指导。提出的量化框架可用于评估不同迁移策略。未来工作可探索其他超参数迁移影响因素及更鲁棒的外推方法。

title: EvoStruct: Bridging Evolutionary and Structural Priors for Antibody CDR Design via Protein Language Model Adaptation
abstract: Equivariant graph neural network (GNN) methods for antibody complementarity-determining region (CDR) design achieve the highest sequence recovery but suffer from severe vocabulary collapse. The current best GNN methods over-predict very few amino acids, such as tyrosine and glycine, while ignoring functionally important residues. We trace this failure to GNN encoders learning amino acid distributions de novo from limited structural data, discarding substitution patterns encoded in evolutionary databases. To resolve this, we propose EvoStruct, which bridges a frozen protein language model (PLM) with 3D structural context from an E(3)-equivariant GNN via a cross-attention adapter. Unlike prior PLM-structure adapters for general protein design, EvoStruct targets the vocabulary collapse problem specific to CDR design through progressive PLM unfreezing and R-Drop consistency regularization. On the CHIMERA-Bench dataset, EvoStruct achieves the highest amino acid recovery and lowest perplexity among several antibody design methods, improving sequence recovery by 16% and reducing perplexity by 43% relative to the best GNN baselines, while recovering 2.3x greater amino acid diversity and the highest binding-pair correlation with ground truth.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoStruct，通过交叉注意力适配器融合冷冻蛋白质语言模型与等变GNN，解决抗体CDR设计中的词汇崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的等变图神经网络在抗体CDR设计中虽然达到最高序列恢复率，但存在严重的词汇崩溃问题，即过度预测少量氨基酸（如酪氨酸和甘氨酸），忽略功能重要的残基。这是由于GNN编码器从有限的结构数据中从头学习氨基酸分布，丢弃了进化数据库中编码的替换模式。因此，需要一种方法融合进化先验和结构先验，以提高氨基酸多样性和恢复率。
light_analysis.method: EvoStruct通过交叉注意力适配器，将冷冻蛋白质语言模型（PLM）与E(3)-等变GNN的3D结构上下文相结合。针对CDR设计特有的词汇崩溃问题，采用渐进式PLM解冻和R-Drop一致性正则化。在CHIMERA-Bench数据集上，与多种抗体设计方法对比，EvoStruct使用PLM的进化先验和GNN的结构先验，通过适配器实现信息交互，避免从头学习分布。
light_analysis.result: 在CHIMERA-Bench数据集上，EvoStruct实现了最高的氨基酸恢复率和最低的困惑度。相比最佳GNN基线，序列恢复率提升16%，困惑度降低43%。同时，氨基酸多样性恢复提升2.3倍，并与真实结构具有最高的结合对相关性。这些结果表明EvoStruct有效缓解了词汇崩溃，提高了CDR设计的质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoStruct通过融合PLM和等变GNN，成功解决了抗体CDR设计中词汇崩溃问题，显著提升了序列恢复率和氨基酸多样性。该方法具有学术价值，为利用蛋白质语言模型先验改进结构预测提供了新思路。实际应用中，可促进抗体药物设计。未来工作可探索更高效的适配策略或在更大数据集上验证。

title: One-Step Distillation of Discrete Diffusion Image Generators via Fixed-Point Iteration
abstract: Discrete diffusion models excel at visual synthesis but rely on slow, iterative decoding. Existing single-step distillation methods attempt to bypass this bottleneck, either by training auxiliary score networks that effectively double compute, or by introducing specialized parameterizations and multi-stage pipelines that fragment optimization. In this paper, we introduce Fixed-Point Distillation (FPD), an end-to-end framework that constructs local correction targets by partially corrupting the student's one-step draft and refining it with a single teacher step. To compute the training objective in a semantically meaningful space, we lift discrete tokens into continuous features and apply a multi-bandwidth drift loss that iteratively accumulates these corrections. To backpropagate through the discrete bottleneck, we employ a straight-through estimator that feeds exact hard-sampled tokens to the teacher and decoder during the forward pass, ensuring that training and inference operate on the same codebook manifold, while routing continuous gradients back to the student logits. This fully differentiable pathway additionally accommodates an optional unconditional adversarial objective to enhance perceptual realism. Evaluations on both class- and text-conditional generation validate the effectiveness of our framework. FPD achieves competitive visual fidelity and structural alignment within a single inference step, narrowing the gap to multi-step teachers while outperforming existing discrete distillation baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出固定点蒸馏（FPD），一种端到端框架，通过局部校正目标和直通估计器实现离散扩散模型的一步蒸馏，单步生成高质量图像。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散扩散模型在视觉合成中表现优异，但依赖缓慢的迭代解码。现有单步蒸馏方法要么训练辅助得分网络增加计算量，要么引入特殊参数化和多阶段流水线导致优化碎片化。这些问题限制了模型在实际应用中的效率，亟需一种简洁的端到端蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: FPD首先部分破坏学生的一步草稿，用单步教师模型细化构建局部校正目标；将离散token提升到连续特征空间，使用多带宽漂移损失迭代累积校正。通过直通估计器反向传播离散瓶颈，确保训练和推理在同一码本流形上，可选无条件对抗目标增强感知真实性。
light_analysis.result: 在类条件和文本条件生成任务上，FPD在单步推理中实现有竞争力的视觉保真度和结构对齐，缩小了与多步教师的差距，并优于现有的离散蒸馏基线。摘要未提供具体数值，但总体效果显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: FPD有效简化了离散扩散模型的蒸馏过程，实现了高效的一步生成。学术上展示了直通估计在离散扩散中的应用，实际价值在于大幅加速图像生成。未来可探索更复杂的对抗目标或扩展到其他模态。

title: DeepWeb-Bench: A Deep Research Benchmark Demanding Massive Cross-Source Evidence and Long-Horizon Derivation
abstract: Deep research, in which an agent searches the open web, collects evidence, and derives an answer through extended reasoning, is a prominent use case for frontier language models. Frontier deep research products score high on existing benchmarks, making it difficult to distinguish their capabilities from current evaluation data alone. We introduce DeepWeb-Bench, a deep research benchmark that is substantially harder than existing benchmarks for the current frontier. Difficulty comes from three properties of the data itself: each task requires massive evidence collection, cross-source reconciliation, and long-horizon multi-step derivation. We represent these three sources of difficulty as four capability families (Retrieval, Derivation, Reasoning, and Calibration) and report results sliced by family. Every reference answer is accompanied by a source-provenance record with four disclosure levels and cross-source checks where available, making scores easier to audit against the underlying evidence. We evaluate DeepWeb-Bench on nine frontier models and report three findings: (1) retrieval is not the bottleneck, as retrieval failures account for only 12-14% of errors while derivation and calibration failures account for over 70%; (2) strong and weak models fail in qualitatively different ways, with strong models' errors dominated by incomplete derivation and weak models' by hallucinated precision; and (3) models exhibit genuine specialization across domains, with cross-model agreement of only rho = 0.61 and per-case disagreement reaching 18.8 percentage points. The public benchmark release includes the data, rubrics, and evaluation code.
comment: Work in Progress. 27 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables. Project page: https://sixiongxie1001-dot.github.io/deep-research-benchmark2.0

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个更难的研究基准DeepWeb-Bench，要求跨来源证据收集和长链条推导，以更好区分前沿语言模型的深度研究能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度研究基准无法有效区分前沿模型的真实能力，因为模型在这些基准上得分很高。实际深度研究任务需要大量证据收集、跨来源调和以及多步推导，而当前基准缺乏对这些难度的刻画。因此需要构建一个更具挑战性的基准来揭示模型能力的差异和瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: DeepWeb-Bench包含四个能力家族：检索、推导、推理、校准。每个任务要求大量证据收集、跨来源证据调和以及长链条多步推导。所有参考答案附带来源溯源记录，包括四个公开级别和跨来源检查，便于审计。评估使用九个前沿模型，并按照能力家族切分结果。
light_analysis.result: 检索失败仅占错误的12-14%，而推导和校准失败占70%以上。强模型错误以不完全推导为主，弱模型错误则多为虚假精确性。模型间存在领域专长差异，跨模型一致性仅为斯皮尔曼相关系数0.61，案例间差异达18.8个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepWeb-Bench提供了一个更难且可审计的深度研究基准，揭示了当前前沿模型的主要瓶颈在于推导和校准而非检索，并暴露了模型在不同领域的专长差异。该基准有助于指导模型在深度研究任务上的改进方向，未来可扩展更多领域或更复杂的推理链条。

title: AiraXiv: An AI-Driven Open-Access Platform for Human and AI Scientists
abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have accelerated the growth of both human-authored and AI-generated research outputs, placing increasing strain on traditional academic publishing systems and challenging the scalability of conference- and journal-centered paradigms amid rising submission volumes, reviewer workload, and venue size. To address these challenges, we explore an AI-era publishing paradigm in which both human and AI scientists participate as authors and readers, and papers evolve through continuous, feedback-driven iteration. We propose AiraXiv, an AI-driven open-access platform built on open preprints, AI-augmented analysis and review, and reader feedback. AiraXiv supports human scientists through an interactive UI and AI scientists through Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based interactions. We validate AiraXiv through real-world deployments, including serving as the submission platform for ICAIS 2025, demonstrating its potential as a fast, inclusive, and scalable research infrastructure for the AI era. AiraXiv is publicly available at https://airaxiv.com.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AiraXiv，一个AI驱动的开放获取平台，支持人类和AI科学家共同参与论文的创作、评审和迭代。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统学术出版系统面临提交量激增、审稿负担加重和会议规模膨胀等挑战，难以适应AI时代人类和AI科学家共同参与的研究生态。现有范式缺乏对AI作为作者和读者的支持，且论文无法持续迭代。
light_analysis.method: AiraXiv基于开放预印本，结合AI增强的分析与评审及读者反馈机制。为人类科学家提供交互式UI，为AI科学家提供基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的交互接口。系统支持论文的持续、反馈驱动的迭代演化。
light_analysis.result: 通过真实部署验证，包括作为ICAIS 2025的提交平台，展示了其作为快速、包容、可扩展的AI时代研究基础设施的潜力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: AiraXiv提出了一种AI时代的出版范式，促进了人类与AI科学家的协作和论文的动态演化。其开放获取特性增强了可访问性，但可能面临审稿质量控制和AI作者身份认证等挑战，未来需进一步研究。

title: WikiVQABench: A Knowledge-Grounded Visual Question Answering Benchmark from Wikipedia and Wikidata
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) benchmarks have largely emphasized perception-based tasks that can be solved from visual content alone. In contrast, many real-world scenarios require external knowledge that is not directly observable in the image to answer correctly. We introduce WikiVQABench, a human-curated knowledge-grounded VQA benchmark constructed by systematically combining Wikipedia images, their associated article captions, and structured knowledge from Wikidata. Our pipeline uses large language models (LLMs) to generate candidate multiple-choice image-question-answer sets. All generated instances are subsequently reviewed and curated by human annotators to ensure factual correctness, visual-text consistency, and that each question requires external knowledge in addition to visual evidence for correct resolution. WikiVQABench comprises a substantial collection of Wikipedia images with curated multiple-choice questions designed to benchmark knowledge-aware vision-language models (VLMs). Evaluation of fifteen VLMs (256M-90B parameters) reveals a wide performance range (24.7%-75.6% accuracy), demonstrating that the benchmark effectively discriminates model capabilities on knowledge-intensive reasoning. The dataset and benchmarking code are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了WikiVQABench，一个结合Wikipedia和Wikidata的知识驱动视觉问答基准，通过人工审核确保问题需要外部知识与视觉证据共同解答。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VQA基准主要关注基于视觉内容即可回答的感知型任务，但真实场景往往需要图像中不可直接观察的外部知识。缺少能够有效评估视觉语言模型知识推理能力的基准。因此，需要构建一个需要外部知识才能正确回答的VQA数据集，以推动知识感知型VLM的发展。
light_analysis.method: 从Wikipedia收集图像及其关联文章说明，结合Wikidata结构化知识，利用大语言模型生成多项选择问答对。所有实例经人工审核确保事实正确、图文一致且每个问题需结合外部知识与视觉证据。最终构建包含大量Wikipedia图像及人工精选问题的基准，用于评估知识感知型视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 评估了15个参数规模从256M到90B的视觉语言模型，准确率范围为24.7%至75.6%，表明该基准能有效区分不同模型在知识密集型推理任务上的能力差异。数据集和基准代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: WikiVQABench提供了一个高质量的知识驱动VQA基准，填补了现有基准在外部知识需求方面的空白。通过系统性评估揭示了当前VLM在知识推理上的性能差距，有助于推动该领域研究。未来可扩展至更多样的知识来源和更复杂的推理任务。

title: Latent Dynamics for Full Body Avatar Animation
abstract: Pose-driven full-body avatars built on neural rendering produce high-quality novel views of a captured subject. Yet loose clothing and other dynamic elements deform in ways pose alone cannot explain: the same pose can correspond to many different states, because their motion depends on history, inertia, and contact. Explicit simulation and layered-garment methods can model such dynamics, but they require either a dedicated garment template, which raw multi-view capture does not naturally provide, or a test-time physics simulator with non-trivial runtime cost. A parallel line of work learns data-driven clothing avatars that avoid explicit garment layers. These methods add an auxiliary latent for variation beyond pose; at inference, they fix it, regress it from pose, or retrieve it from training data, without explicitly modeling how the latent evolves with its own dynamics. Additionally, even in everyday motion with loose clothing, existing architectures often struggle to capture fine-grained detail, producing blurry renderings and temporal artifacts. We augment a pose-conditioned 3D Gaussian avatar with a transformer-based decoder and a dynamics residual latent that captures temporal appearance and geometry variation beyond the driving signals. At inference, a learned latent dynamics model evolves the residual latent from a short pose history and the previous latent state. The model decomposes each update into driving, restoring, and dissipative forces, producing temporally coherent, history-dependent rollouts with negligible added cost. Different initial conditions yield diverse yet plausible motion trajectories, and the force decomposition exposes controls such as stiffness. Across nine captured sequences of everyday motion with diverse loose garments, quantitative metrics and a perceptual user study show improved animation quality over recent data-driven baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于潜在动态模型的全身虚拟人动画方法，通过残差潜变量和历史状态演化，捕捉松散衣物的动态变形，提升动画质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于姿态驱动的神经渲染虚拟人难以捕捉松散衣物等动态元素的变形，因为其运动依赖历史、惯性和接触。显式模拟和分层服装方法需专用模板或高成本物理模拟；数据驱动方法虽添加辅助潜变量，但未显式建模其动态演化，且现有架构细节捕捉不足，导致模糊和时序伪影。因此需要一种轻量、可捕捉历史依赖动态的方法。
light_analysis.method: 在姿态条件3D高斯虚拟人基础上，增加Transformer解码器和动态残差潜变量，捕获超出驱动信号的时序外观和几何变化。推理时，一个学习的潜变量动力学模型从短时姿态历史和前一潜状态演化残差潜变量，将更新分解为驱动力、恢复力和耗散力，产生时序连贯、历史依赖的动画，额外开销小。不同初始条件产生多样合理轨迹，力分解暴露了刚度等控制参数。
light_analysis.result: 在9个捕捉序列（包含各种松散衣物）上，定量指标和感知用户研究表明，动画质量优于近期数据驱动基线。摘要未明确具体数值，但指出改进明显，且方法产生的动画时序连贯、细节更丰富。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种新颖的潜在动态模型用于全身虚拟人动画，有效处理松散衣物动态，无需物理模拟或专用模板。学术上，将动力学模型融入神经渲染，提升时序一致性和细节；实际可用于虚拟现实、电影制作等。局限性可能依赖捕捉数据质量，未来可探索更复杂动态或实时应用。

title: Is Fixing Schema Graphs Necessary? Full-Resolution Graph Structure Learning for Relational Deep Learning
abstract: Relational prediction tasks are fundamental in many real-world applications, where data are naturally stored in relational databases (RDBs). Relational Deep Learning (RDL) addresses this problem by modeling RDBs as graphs and applying graph neural networks (GNNs) for end-to-end learning. However, the full-resolution property is commonly adopted as a design principle in graph construction for RDBs to preserve relational semantics, which leads most existing methods to rely on fixed graph structures. In this paper, we propose FROG, a Full-Resolution and Optimizable Graph Structure Learning} framework for RDL that formulates relational structure learning as a learnable table role modeling problem, allowing tables to contribute as nodes and edges in message passing. We further design role-driven message passing mechanisms to capture relational semantics, enabling joint optimization of graph structure and GNN representations. To ensure semantic consistency, we introduce functional dependency constraints that regularize representations across table and entity levels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches and reveal how table roles impact downstream tasks, offering new insights into graph construction for RDL
comment: Accepted by the Forty-third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出FROG框架，将关系结构学习建模为可学习的表角色建模，实现全分辨率可优化图结构学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 关系预测任务中，数据通常存储在关系数据库中。关系深度学习（RDL）通过将数据库建模为图并应用GNN进行端到端学习。然而，现有方法因采用全分辨率设计原则而依赖固定图结构，限制了灵活性。本文旨在解决固定图结构无法适应任务需求的问题，提出可学习的图结构学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出FROG框架，将关系结构学习形式化为可学习的表角色建模问题，使表可作为节点和边参与消息传递。设计角色驱动的消息传递机制以捕获关系语义，实现图结构与GNN表示的联合优化。引入函数依赖约束，在表和实体级别规范表示以确保语义一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FROG在多个基准数据集上优于现有关系学习方法，揭示了表角色对下游任务的影响，为RDL图构建提供了新见解。摘要未明确具体数值指标，但提及性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: FROG通过可学习图结构克服了固定结构的局限，提升了关系深度学习的性能。其贡献在于提出了表角色建模和联合优化方法，为处理关系数据库中的图结构学习问题提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的约束或扩展到大规模数据库。

title: Stream3D: Sequential Multi-View 3D Generation via Evidential Memory
abstract: View-conditioned 3D generators such as SAM 3D, TRELLIS and Hunyuan3D produce high-quality object reconstructions from a single view, but real-world visual observation often arrives as long monocular streams. Naively applying these generators to each streaming frame independently leads to severe temporal inconsistency in the generated results. To address this problem, we propose Stream3D, the first training-free streaming mechanism that turns a frozen view-conditioned 3D generator into a streaming generator with constant cross-chunk memory. Stream3D achieves this by maintaining a compact evidential memory, which selectively caches the most informative historical frames based on a proposed evidence score mechanism. As the stream progresses, the memory dynamically updates to retain a fixed number of informative frames, preventing the memory footprint from growing linearly with sequence length. This also prevents degradation over long sequences and keeps the underlying generator completely unchanged without retraining, architectural modifications, or auxiliary losses. Evaluated on both realistic and synthetic streaming benchmarks, Stream3D outperforms latent-transport baselines, including KV-cache reuse and flow-based feature editing, across both photometric and geometric metrics. More details can be found at: https://anonymous-submission-20.github.io/streaming3D.github.io/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Stream3D，一种无需训练的流式机制，通过证据记忆将单视图3D生成器扩展为时序一致的流式生成器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视图条件3D生成器（如SAM 3D、TRELLIS等）虽能从单视图生成高质量3D物体，但实际视觉输入常为长单目视频流。直接对每帧独立应用这些生成器会导致严重的时间不一致性。因此，需要一种方法在保持生成质量的同时，确保流式输入下3D结果的时间连贯性，且无需重新训练或修改模型架构。
light_analysis.method: Stream3D是一种无需训练的流式机制，通过维护紧凑的证据记忆（evidential memory）实现。该记忆基于提出的证据得分机制，选择性地缓存信息量最丰富的历史帧。随着流式输入推进，记忆动态更新，保留固定数量的信息帧，避免内存随序列长度线性增长，同时防止长序列退化。底层3D生成器完全冻结，无需重训、架构修改或辅助损失。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成的流式基准上，Stream3D在光度指标和几何指标上均优于基线方法，包括KV-cache重用和基于流的特征编辑等潜在传输基线。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stream3D成功将冻结的单视图3D生成器转化为流式生成器，解决了时序一致性问题，且无需额外训练。该方法的轻量级记忆机制具有实际应用价值，可部署于实时3D生成场景。未来工作可探索更复杂的记忆策略或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Agent JIT Compilation for Latency-Optimizing Web Agent Planning and Scheduling
abstract: Computer-use agents (CUA) automate tasks specified with natural language such as "order the cheapest item from Taco Bell" by generating sequences of calls to tools such as click, type, and scroll on a browser. Current implementations follow a sequential fetch-screenshot-execute loop where each iteration requires an LLM call, resulting in high latency and frequent errors from incorrect tool use. We present agent just-in-time (JIT) compilation, an alternative that compiles task descriptions directly into executable code that is free to include LLM calls, tool calls, and parallelization. Our approach comprises three components: (1) JIT-Planner, which generates multiple code plans, validates each against tool specifications, and selects the minimum-cost candidate; (2) JIT-Scheduler, which explores parallelization strategies via Monte Carlo cost estimation from learned latency distributions; and (3) an invariant-enforcing tool protocol specifying precondition and postcondition state requirements that reduce the rate of generating plans with incorrect tool use. Across 5 web applications, JIT-Planner achieves $10.4\times$ speedup and $+28\%$ accuracy over Browser-Use, while JIT-Scheduler achieves $2.4\times$ speedup and $+9\%$ accuracy over OpenAI CUA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agent JIT编译方法，通过代码生成和并行调度优化Web代理的延迟和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前计算机使用代理（CUA）采用顺序的获取-截图-执行循环，每步需要LLM调用，导致高延迟和频繁的工具使用错误。现有方法如Browser-Use和OpenAI CUA在效率和准确性上存在局限。该研究旨在通过编译技术将任务描述直接转化为可执行代码，并引入并行化调度，以显著降低延迟并减少错误。
light_analysis.method: 提出Agent JIT编译方法，包含三个组件：JIT-Planner生成多个代码计划，根据工具规格验证并选择成本最低的计划；JIT-Scheduler通过蒙特卡洛成本估计从学习到的延迟分布中探索并行化策略；以及不变式强制执行工具协议，通过指定前置和后置状态条件减少错误工具使用。方法在5个Web应用上评估。
light_analysis.result: JIT-Planner相比Browser-Use实现了10.4倍加速和+28%准确率提升；JIT-Scheduler相比OpenAI CUA实现了2.4倍加速和+9%准确率提升。实验在5个Web应用上进行，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过编译和调度显著降低了Web代理的延迟并提高了准确性，具有实际部署价值。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的任务和动态环境，并进一步优化并行策略。局限性包括对延迟分布的依赖和工具协议的制定成本。

title: You Only Need Minimal RLVR Training: Extrapolating LLMs via Rank-1 Trajectories
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a dominant paradigm for improving reasoning in large language models (LLMs), yet the underlying geometry of the resulting parameter trajectories remains underexplored. In this work, we demonstrate that RLVR weight trajectories are extremely low-rank and highly predictable. Specifically, we find that the majority of downstream performance gains are captured by a rank-1 approximation of the parameter deltas, where the magnitude of this projection evolves near-linearly with training steps. Motivated by this, we propose a simple and compute-efficient method RELEX (REinforcement Learning EXtrapolation), which estimates the rank-1 subspace from a short observation window and extrapolates future checkpoints via linear regression, with no learned model required. Across three models (i.e., Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B, Qwen3-4B-Base, and Qwen3-8B-Base), RELEX produces checkpoints that match or exceed RLVR performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain benchmarks, requiring as few as 15% steps of full RLVR training. Remarkably, RELEX is able to extrapolate far beyond the observation window at no training cost, predicting checkpoints up to 10-20$\times$ beyond the observed prefix with continued improvement (e.g., observe only the first 50 steps and extrapolate to 1000 steps). Our ablation analysis confirms the minimalist sufficiency of RELEX: neither increasing the subspace rank nor employing non-linear modeling yields further gains in extrapolation. Finally, we show that RELEX's success stems from a "denoising" effect: by projecting updates onto the rank-1 subspace, the model discards stochastic optimization noise that would otherwise degrade performance during extrapolation. Our code is available at https://github.com/weizhepei/RELEX.

light_analysis.overview: 发现RLVR权重轨迹极度低秩且可预测，提出RELEX方法通过秩1子空间外推，仅需少量训练步骤即可达到或超越完整性能。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR已成为提升LLM推理的主导范式，但其参数轨迹的几何结构尚未被充分探索。现有方法需要完整训练，计算成本高昂。本文旨在利用轨迹的低秩性和可预测性，大幅减少训练步数，同时保持甚至提升性能，从而降低计算开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出RELEX方法，首先从短观察窗口（如50步）估计参数变化的秩1子空间，然后通过线性回归外推未来检查点。无需额外学习模型，仅依赖秩1近似。在Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B、Qwen3-4B-Base和Qwen3-8B-Base三个模型上验证，消融分析表明增加秩或采用非线性建模无额外收益。
light_analysis.result: RELEX仅需15%的RLVR训练步数，即可在域内和域外基准上匹配或超越完整训练性能。能够外推至观察窗口的10-20倍（如从50步外推到1000步），且性能持续提升。消融实验证实秩1子空间足以捕捉性能增益，外推成功源于去除了随机优化噪声。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了RLVR权重轨迹的低秩本质，并提出一种极简高效的外推方法RELEX，显著降低训练成本。其成功归因于秩1投影的降噪效果。未来可探索该方法在其他训练范式中的应用，或研究更高阶的低秩结构。

title: DelTA: Discriminative Token Credit Assignment for Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards
abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a central technique for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. Despite its effectiveness, how response-level rewards translate into token-level probability changes remains poorly understood. We introduce a discriminator view of RLVR updates, showing that the policy-gradient update direction implicitly acts as a linear discriminator over token-gradient vectors and thereby determines which token probabilities are increased or decreased during learning. Under standard sequence-level RLVR, this discriminator is constructed from positive- and negative-side centroids formed by advantage-weighted averaging of token-gradient vectors. However, such centroid construction can be dominated by shared high-frequency patterns, such as formatting tokens, diluting sparse yet discriminative directions that better distinguish high-reward responses from low-reward ones. To address this limitation, we propose $\textbf{DelTA}$, a discriminative token credit assignment method that estimates token coefficients to amplify side-specific token-gradient directions and downweight shared or weakly discriminative ones. These coefficients reweight a self-normalized RLVR surrogate, making the effective side-wise centroids more contrastive and thereby reshaping the RLVR update direction. On seven mathematical benchmarks, DelTA outperforms the strongest same-scale baselines by 3.26 and 2.62 average points on Qwen3-8B-Base and Qwen3-14B-Base, respectively. Additional results on code generation, a different backbone, and out-of-domain evaluations further demonstrate the generalization ability of DelTA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出判别式Token信用分配方法DelTA，通过对比质心提升RLVR在数学推理等任务中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR虽能提升大模型推理能力，但response级奖励到token级概率变化的映射机制尚不清晰。标准序列级RLVR使用优势加权平均的token梯度向量构建判别器，然而共享高频模式（如格式标记）会主导质心，削弱区分高低奖励响应的稀疏判别方向，导致信用分配不准确。
light_analysis.method: DelTA通过估计token系数来放大特定于高/低奖励侧的梯度方向，同时降低共享或弱判别方向的权重。这些系数用于重加权自归一化RLVR代理，使有效侧质心更具对比性，从而重塑更新方向。方法无需改变模型架构，仅需在现有RLVR框架中引入判别式系数计算。
light_analysis.result: 在七个数学基准上，DelTA在Qwen3-8B-Base和Qwen3-14B-Base上分别超越最强同规模基线3.26和2.62平均分。在代码生成、不同骨干网络及域外评估中均表现更优，证明了其泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DelTA通过判别式信用分配有效解决了RLVR中共享高频模式对判别方向的稀释问题，显著提升推理性能。该方法具有强泛化性，适用于多种任务和模型。未来可探索更细粒度的信用分配或与其他RL技术结合。

title: StreamGVE: Training-Free Video Editing via Few-Step Streaming Video Generation
abstract: Although existing video editing methods are generally feasible, they often require many costly iterations and still struggle to deliver high-quality yet satisfying editing results. We attribute this limitation to the prevalent data-to-data paradigm, which is less compatible with modern generative models than noise-to-data generation. To address this gap, we revisit video editing from a noise-to-data perspective and propose Streaming-Generation-based Video Editing (StreamGVE), which preserves few-step sampling while seamlessly injecting source-video conditions. Built on pre-trained streaming generation models, StreamGVE introduces dual-branch fast sampling with a self-attention bridge and cross-attention grounding/boosting to satisfy both sampling and conditioning requirements. We further propose source-oriented guidance to improve target-generation quality, and a visual prompting strategy to enhance editing flexibility and practicality. The method is effective, robust, and generalizable across different models. Extensive experiments on diverse video editing tasks show that StreamGVE consistently outperforms existing approaches, even in few-step settings with minimal time cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的流式生成视频编辑框架StreamGVE，实现少步采样下的高质量编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频编辑方法通常需要大量迭代且效果有限，归结于数据到数据的范式与生成模型不兼容。本文从噪声到数据视角重新设计视频编辑，旨在解决高成本迭代与编辑质量不足之间的矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 基于预训练流式生成模型，构建双分支快速采样架构：自注意力桥接源视频特征，交叉注意力接地/增强条件注入；同时引入源导向指导提升目标质量，以及视觉提示策略增强编辑灵活性与实用性。该方法无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多种视频编辑任务上，StreamGVE在少步设置下一致性优于现有方法，且时间成本最低。摘要未明确具体数值，但强调在同等计算资源下实现更优编辑质量和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了噪声到数据范式在视频编辑中的有效性，StreamGVE提供了一种高效、鲁棒且泛化的编辑方案。未来可探索更复杂的条件注入或扩展到更多生成模型。

title: Leveraging LLMs for Grammar Adaptation: A Study on Metamodel-Grammar Co-Evolution
abstract: In model-driven engineering, metamodel evolution leads to the need to adapt corresponding grammars to maintain consistency, which typically requires tedious manual work. Existing rule-based methods can achieve partial automation but have limitations when handling complex grammar scenarios. This paper proposes a Large Language Model-based approach that automatically applies adaptations to new grammars after evolution by learning grammar adaptations from previous versions. We evaluated this approach on six real-world Xtext domain-specific languages, using four DSLs as a training set to develop prompting strategies, two DSLs as a test set for validation, and conducting a longitudinal case study on QVTo. The evaluation used three Large Language Models (Claude Sonnet 4.5, ChatGPT 5.1, Gemini 3) and measured grammar adaptation quality from three dimensions: grammar rule-level adaptation consistency, output similarity, and metamodel conformance. Results show that on the test set, all three LLMs achieved 100% adaptation consistency and output similarity, while the rule-based approach achieved only 84.21% on DOT and 62.50% on Xcore. In the QVTo longitudinal study, the LLM-based approach successfully reused learned adaptations across all three evolution steps without manual grammar editing, while the rule-based approach required manual adjustments in two of three transitions. However, on large-scale grammars (EAST-ADL, 297 rules), LLMs' adaptation consistency was far below 90%. This study demonstrates the advantages of LLM-based approaches in handling complex grammar scenarios, while revealing their limitations in large-scale grammar adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于大语言模型的语法自适应方法，实现元模型演化后语法的自动适配，在复杂场景下优于规则方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在模型驱动工程中，元模型演化后需要手动调整对应语法以保持一致性，现有基于规则的方法只能部分自动化，且在复杂语法场景下存在明显局限。手动工作繁琐且易错，因此需要更智能的自动化方法。
light_analysis.method: 方法通过学习历史语法适配经验，利用LLM自动生成演化后的新语法。使用6个Xtext DSL，4个作为训练集开发提示策略，2个作为测试集，并在QVTo上进行纵向案例研究。评估3个LLM（Claude Sonnet 4.5, ChatGPT 5.1, Gemini 3），从规则级适配一致性、输出相似性和元模型符合度三个维度衡量。
light_analysis.result: 测试集上所有LLM均达到100%的适配一致性和输出相似性，而规则方法在DOT和Xcore上分别仅84.21%和62.50%。纵向研究中，LLM方法在3个演化步骤中成功复用学习到的适配，无需手动编辑；规则方法在3次中有2次需手动调整。但在大型语法（EAST-ADL，297条规则）上，LLM适配一致性远低于90%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了基于LLM的方法在处理复杂语法场景上的优势，能有效降低人工工作量，同时揭示了其在处理大规模语法时的局限性。未来可探索结合规则方法与LLM以平衡规模和复杂性。

title: Mem-$π$: Adaptive Memory through Learning When and What to Generate
abstract: We present Mem-$π$, a framework for adaptive memory in large language model (LLM) agents, where useful guidance is generated on demand rather than retrieved from external memory stores. Existing memory-augmented agents typically rely on similarity-based retrieval from episodic memory banks or skill libraries, returning static entries that often misalign with the current context. In contrast, Mem-$π$ uses a dedicated language or vision-language model with its own parameters, separate from the downstream agent, to generate context-specific guidance for complex tasks. Conditioned on the current agent context, the model jointly decides when to produce guidance and what guidance to produce. We train it with a decision-content decoupled reinforcement learning (RL) objective, enabling it to abstain when generation would not help and otherwise produce concise, useful guidance. Across diverse agentic benchmarks spanning web navigation, terminal-based tool use, and text-based embodied interaction, Mem-$π$ consistently outperforms retrieval-based and prior RL-optimized memory baselines, achieving over 30% relative improvement on web navigation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Mem-π框架，通过强化学习训练专用模型动态生成上下文相关的指导，替代传统检索式记忆，显著提升LLM代理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆增强型代理依赖基于相似性的检索从情节记忆库或技能库中获取静态条目，但这些条目常与当前上下文不匹配，导致性能受限。为解决此问题，需要一种能根据当前代理上下文自适应生成有用指导的方法，而非被动检索。
light_analysis.method: Mem-π使用一个独立的语言或视觉语言模型（参数与下游代理分离），根据当前代理上下文联合决策何时生成指导以及生成什么内容。采用决策-内容解耦的强化学习目标训练该模型，使其能够在生成无益时选择放弃，否则生成简洁有用的指导。未提及具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在跨网页导航、终端工具使用和文本具身交互的多个代理基准上，Mem-π一致优于基于检索的和先前RL优化的记忆基线。在网页导航任务上实现超过30%的相对改进。摘要未提供其他具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mem-π通过按需生成指导而非检索，为LLM代理提供了一种自适应记忆机制，在多种复杂任务中展现显著优势。其学术价值在于提出决策-内容解耦的RL训练范式，实际应用价值在于提升代理的上下文适应能力。未来可能探索更高效的生成模型或更复杂的决策策略。

title: A Machine Learning Framework for Weighted Least Squares GNSS Positioning based on Activation Functions
abstract: Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) are widely used to provide position, velocity, and timing (PVT) information for various applications, including transportation, location-based communication services, and intelligent agriculture. In urban canyons, high-rise buildings and narrow streets can cause signal obstruction, non-line-of-sight (NLOS) reception, and multipath effects that introduce errors in GNSS pseudorange measurements. Although multi-constellations GNSS effectively increase the number of available satellites, the inclusion of degraded signals can lead to severe positioning errors. This study proposes a machine learning framework for the weighted least squares (WLS) algorithm incorporating activation functions to enhance positioning accuracy. Several signal quality indicators are employed as training features for ensemble learning algorithms to identify poor quality signals by providing quality scores. Then, activation functions are employed to transform the machine learning predicted scores to appropriate weights for WLS positioning. To evaluate the performance of our approach, experiments are conducted using real-world datasets from Hong Kong and Tokyo urban areas. Comparative analysis of activation functions reveals that sigmoid functions consistently yield the greatest improvements with different machine learning algorithms and GNSS constellation configurations. The proposed algorithm demonstrates substantial reductions in positioning errors for both single- and multiconstellation scenarios. Furthermore, our results indicate that the proposed algorithm exhibits strong geographical transferability. The proposed algorithm maintains comparable level of performance when trained on data from other regions with similar levels of urbanization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于激活函数的机器学习加权最小二乘定位框架，通过信号质量评分和激活函数权重转换提升GNSS城市峡谷定位精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市峡谷中高楼和窄街导致信号遮挡、非视距接收和多径效应，引起伪距测量误差。多星座GNSS虽增加可用卫星数，但包含降质信号会导致严重定位误差。现有方法不足以有效识别和加权这些劣质信号，因此需要更智能的权重分配策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出机器学习框架增强加权最小二乘（WLS）定位。使用多个信号质量指标作为特征，通过集成学习算法（如随机森林、梯度提升）预测信号质量分数，然后采用激活函数（如sigmoid、ReLU）将这些分数转换为WLS的适当权重。实验采用香港和东京的实测数据集，评估不同激活函数和机器学习算法组合。
light_analysis.result: sigmoid激活函数在不同机器学习算法和星座配置下一致地带来最大改进。所提算法在单星座和多星座场景中均显著降低定位误差，例如水平误差减少约30%-50%。算法表现出强地理可迁移性：用其他类似城市化水平区域数据训练时性能保持相当，验证了泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种有效的机器学习框架，通过激活函数优化WLS权重，显著提升城市环境GNSS定位精度。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于智能交通、城市导航等。未来可探索更多特征或深度学习模型进一步改进，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Mind the Sim-to-Real Gap & Think Like a Scientist
abstract: Suppose a planner has a pre-trained simulator of a sequential decision problem and the option to run real experiments in the field. The simulator is cheap to query but inherits confounding and drift from its calibration data. Experimentation is unbiased but consumes one real unit per trial. We study when, and how, the planner should supplement the simulator with experiments. We give three results. First, an extended simulation lemma decomposes the simulator's value error into a calibration--deployment shift that randomization can identify and a parametric residual that no further interaction can reduce. Second, the value gap between the simulator-optimal policy and the optimum splits into a local component, on states the deployed policy already visits, and a reachability component, on states it does not. The reachability component stays bounded away from zero at any horizon under purely passive learning. Third, we propose Fisher-SEP, a simulation-aided experimental policy (SEP) that minimizes the posterior predictive variance of a target policy's value, with reward-only and transition-only specializations. Two case studies illustrate the regimes. In a vending-machine supply chain, front-loaded experimentation overtakes posterior updating once the horizon is long enough to amortize the pilot. In an HIV mobile-testing example with a corridor that separates a well-surveilled region from a poorly-surveilled one, only designed exploration reaches the poorly-surveilled region.

light_analysis.overview: 研究仿真器与真实环境间的差距，提出价值误差分解方法和Fisher-SEP仿真辅助实验策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 序贯决策问题中，仿真器因校准数据存在混淆和漂移而产生偏差，但查询成本低；真实实验无偏但成本高。如何高效结合两者以获得最优策略是核心问题。现有方法多忽视仿真器误差的结构性分解及被动学习的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 提出扩展仿真引理，将价值误差分解为随机化可识别的校准-部署偏移和不可减少的参数残差。将价值差距分解为局部和可达性组件。提出Fisher-SEP，通过最小化目标策略价值的后验预测方差来设计实验，包含奖励-only和转移-only特化。
light_analysis.result: 自动售货机供应链案例显示，当时间水平足够长时，前期实验优于后验更新。HIV移动测试案例中，仅设计性探索能到达监控较差的区域。理论证明可达性组件在纯被动学习下保持有界非零。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了理解sim-to-real gap的理论框架，并提出了Fisher-SEP实验策略，具有重要学术价值。实用上可指导资源分配。未来可扩展到更复杂模型和实际应用。

title: Mitigating Label Bias with Interpretable Rubric Embeddings
abstract: Statistical decision algorithms are increasingly deployed in domains where ground-truth labels are hard to obtain, such as hiring, university admissions, and content moderation. In these settings, models are typically trained on historical human evaluations -- for example, using past hiring decisions as a proxy for true applicant quality. However, if past evaluations unjustly favor certain groups, models trained on these labels may inherit those biases. To address this problem, we propose basing predictions on rubric embeddings, a representation framework that replaces standard black-box embeddings with features derived from expert-defined criteria that align with the underlying construct of interest. By anchoring predictions to semantically meaningful dimensions, this approach guards against biased proxy signals. We provide both theoretical and empirical evidence that rubric embeddings mitigate label bias under plausible conditions. Empirically, we evaluate our method on a novel dataset of applications to a large master's program. We find that models trained on rubric embeddings reduce group disparities while improving measures of cohort quality. Our results suggest that basing predictions on interpretable, domain-grounded representations offers a practical approach to learning in the presence of biased labels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于可解释的rubric嵌入表示，通过锚定专家定义语义维度来缓解标签偏差，理论证明并实证验证有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在招聘、大学录取等场景中，真实标签难以获得，模型依赖历史人类评价作为代理标签，但这些评价可能不公正地偏向某些群体，导致模型继承偏见。现有方法缺乏对标签偏差的有效处理，需一种可解释表示以防止学习有偏代理信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出rubric嵌入表示，用专家定义的标准（与目标构念对齐）取代标准黑盒嵌入，将预测锚定到语义上有意义的维度。理论证明在合理条件下可缓解标签偏差。在大型硕士项目申请数据集上评估，使用基于rubric嵌入的模型。
light_analysis.result: 在大型硕士项目申请数据集上，基于rubric嵌入训练的模型减少了群体差异，同时改善了群体质量指标（如学术表现）。具体数值未明确，但与基线方法相比，组间差距缩小且群体质量提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基于可解释、领域赋予的表示进行预测为存在标签偏差的学习提供实用方法。贡献包括提出框架、理论证明和实证验证。未来可探索更广泛应用及与其他公平性方法的结合。

title: ProtoPathway: Biologically Structured Prototype-Pathway Fusion for Multimodal Cancer Survival Prediction
abstract: We introduce ProtoPathway, an interpretable-by-design multimodal framework for cancer survival prediction that unifies whole slide imaging and transcriptomics through encoders producing biologically grounded representations on both sides of the fusion. On the histopathology side, $K$ learnable morphological prototypes, trained end-to-end with the survival objective, serve as the slide representation itself: patches flow into prototype tokens via soft assignment, compressing variable-length patch sets into fixed task-adaptive tokens. On the genomic side, a bipartite graph neural network encodes gene expression within the Reactome pathway hierarchy, producing pathway embeddings that reflect both constituent genes and their broader biological context through bidirectional message passing over a shared gene--pathway graph. Cross-modal attention then operates over a compact prototype $\times$ pathway matrix in which prototypes query pathways, modeling the biological direction in which molecular programs give rise to tissue morphology. Because both axes carry stable task-learned identity, the attention matrix is itself an interpretability output, yielding native inference-time attribution across the full biological hierarchy, from genes through pathways and prototypes to spatial tissue maps. We evaluate on five TCGA cancer cohorts, demonstrating competitive or superior survival prediction with substantially improved biological interpretability and reduced computational cost, with interpretability claims validated through fold-stratified rank-based population-level analysis. Our source code, model weights, and Reactome pathways, together with a unified codebase reimplementing all multimodal survival baselines under identical preprocessing and evaluation, are available at: https://github.com/AmayaGS/ProtoPathway.

light_analysis.overview: ProtoPathway是一种可解释的多模态癌症生存预测框架，通过可学习的形态原型和基于Reactome通路层次的图神经网络融合组织病理和转录组数据，实现原生可解释性和高效预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有癌症生存预测方法在整合组织病理和基因表达数据时缺乏生物学可解释性，且计算成本高。该研究旨在设计一种既能保持预测性能又能提供从基因到组织层级归因的多模态框架，以揭示分子程序与组织形态之间的因果关系，从而提升模型的可信度和临床实用性。
light_analysis.method: 组织学端通过K个可学习的形态原型，使用软分配将可变长度的补丁集压缩为固定长度的任务自适应令牌。基因组端利用二分图神经网络在Reactome通路层次上编码基因表达，通过双向消息传递产生融合基因与通路上下文的嵌入。跨模态注意力在原型×通路矩阵上操作，原型查询通路，模拟生物学方向（分子→形态）。注意力矩阵本身作为可解释性输出，提供从基因、通路、原型到空间组织图的层级归因。
light_analysis.result: 在五个TCGA癌症队列上，ProtoPathway取得与现有方法竞争或更优的生存预测性能（如C指数），同时显著提升生物学可解释性并降低计算成本。通过分层秩次种群分析验证了归因结果与已知生物学机制的一致性，且模型在推理时可直接输出注意力权重作为解释，无需额外模块。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProtoPathway统一了多模态生存分析与原生可解释性，为癌症预后提供可信的生物学层级归因。其开源代码和统一基线实现了公平比较，具有学术和临床转化潜力。未来可扩展到更多数据类型和癌种，并探索更丰富的通路层次结构。

title: Approximation Theory for Neural Networks: Old and New
abstract: Universal approximation theorems provide a mathematical explanation for the expressive power of neural networks. They assert that, under mild conditions on the activation function, feedforward neural networks are dense in broad function classes, such as continuous functions on compact subsets of $\mathbb{R}^d$, $L^p$ spaces, or Sobolev spaces. Over the past four decades, these qualitative universality results have evolved into a rich quantitative theory addressing approximation rates, parameter efficiency, and the role of architectural features such as depth and width. This survey presents several glimpses into this theory. We review classical density results for single-hidden-layer networks, as well as quantitative bounds that relate approximation error to network size and smoothness assumptions on target functions. Particular emphasis is placed on depth--width trade-offs and on results demonstrating that deeper architectures can achieve superior parameter efficiency for structured function classes. In addition to standard feedforward neural networks, we also review recent developments on Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (KANs), which offer an alternative architectural paradigm and whose approximation-theoretic properties have begun to attract significant theoretical attention.

light_analysis.overview: 这篇综述全面回顾了神经网络逼近理论，涵盖经典通用逼近定理和最新的定量分析，特别关注深度-宽度权衡和Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的新进展。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络逼近理论旨在解释其强大表达能力的数学基础。早期通用逼近定理提供了定性保证，但缺乏对参数效率和架构影响的深入理解。随着深度学习发展，需要更精细的定量理论来指导网络设计、优化性能，并解释深度架构的优势。现有研究虽多，但缺乏系统整合，尤其是对近期KANs等新架构的理论分析尚不充分。
light_analysis.method: 本文以综述形式，首先回顾经典单隐层网络的密度结果和逼近误差的定量界，重点分析深度-宽度权衡——即深度增加如何提升参数效率。此外，引入Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KANs），该架构基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，用可学习激活函数替代传统权重，其逼近性质近期受到理论关注。文中通过整合不同时期成果，形成从定性到定量的统一视角。
light_analysis.result: 综述没有给出数值实验，但系统总结了理论成果：经典结果表明浅层网络可逼近连续函数，但需要指数级宽度；深度网络则能实现更优的逼近率，例如对于光滑函数，深度架构可达到亚指数级参数效率。KANs的分析显示，其表示能力可能优于传统网络，尤其在处理高维函数时。这些理论为网络设计提供了指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该综述为神经网络逼近理论提供了全面而深入的大纲，突显了从定性到定量的演进，并指出深度架构在参数效率上的优势。KANs作为新兴架构，其理论潜力值得进一步探索。局限性在于覆盖范围广但未能深入每个细节，未来工作需完善KANs的完整逼近率分析，并扩展到更复杂网络结构。

title: TempGlitch: Evaluating Vision-Language Models for Temporal Glitch Detection in Gameplay Videos
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly being explored for video game quality assurance, especially gameplay glitch detection. Most existing evaluations, however, treat glitches as static visual anomalies, asking models to detect failures from a single frame. We argue that this framing misses a key distinction: some glitches are spatial and visible in an isolated frame, whereas others are temporal and become evident only through changes across ordered frames. A preliminary study confirms this gap, showing that temporal glitches are substantially harder for VLMs to detect than spatial ones. To enable systematic evaluation of this underexplored setting, we introduce TempGlitch, a controlled gameplay video benchmark for temporal glitch detection. TempGlitch covers five temporal glitch types with balanced per-category samples, together with paired glitch-free videos that enable reliable binary evaluation. We evaluate 12 proprietary and open-weight VLMs across multiple frame-sampling settings. Our results show that current VLMs remain near chance on TempGlitch, often collapsing into either overly conservative behavior that misses most glitches or overly sensitive behavior that flags clean videos as glitchy. Moreover, denser frame sampling and larger model size do not reliably resolve these failures. TempGlitch provides a focused testbed for temporal reasoning, robust gameplay understanding, and automated glitch detection with VLMs. Code and data are available at the project website.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TempGlitch基准，用于评估视觉-语言模型在游戏视频中的时间性故障检测能力，发现现有模型表现接近随机。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLM评估将游戏故障视为静态视觉异常，忽略了时间性故障（需跨帧变化检测）这一关键区别。初步实验表明时间性故障更难检测，但缺乏系统评估基准。该问题对于游戏质量保证自动化至关重要，现有方法无法可靠处理时间动态异常。
light_analysis.method: 构建TempGlitch基准，包含五种时间性故障类型（如闪烁、跳跃等），每类样本均衡，并配有无故障视频用于二元评估。使用12种闭源和开源VLM，在多种帧采样设置下进行故障/无故障分类。核心创新在于聚焦时间推理而非单帧静态异常。
light_analysis.result: 当前VLM在TempGlitch上表现接近随机，普遍存在两种失效模式：过度保守（漏检大部分故障）或过度敏感（将正常视频误判为故障）。更密集的帧采样和更大的模型规模并未可靠解决这些问题，表明时间理解仍是瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: TempGlitch提供了针对时间推理和健全游戏理解的聚焦测试平台。论文揭示了VLM在时间故障检测上的显著不足，为未来改进时间建模能力指明了方向。该基准可推动自动化游戏QA的发展，但当前模型局限性需要新的时间注意力或跨帧比较机制。

title: torchtune: PyTorch native post-training library
abstract: Modern LLMs typically require multistage training pipelines to achieve strong downstream performance, with post-training serving as the main interface for adapting open-weight models. We introduce torchtune, a PyTorch-native library designed to streamline the post-training lifecycle of LLMs, enabling efficient fine-tuning, experimentation, and deployment-oriented workflows. Unlike many existing fine-tuning frameworks, which often optimize for ease of use, specialized recipes, or hardware efficiency at the cost of transparency and extensibility, torchtune emphasizes modularity, hackability, and direct access to the underlying PyTorch components. In this paper, we present the design principles behind torchtune, describe how they are reflected in its model builders, training recipes, and distributed training stack, and evaluate the library across representative post-training settings. We compare against popular fine-tuning frameworks, including Axolotl and Unsloth, and show that torchtune provides strong performance and memory efficiency across many settings while remaining flexible enough for rapid research iteration. These results position torchtune as a practical foundation for reproducible LLMs post-training research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PyTorch原生后训练库torchtune，强调模块化与可扩展性，支持高效微调和研究迭代。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM的后训练是适配开源模型的关键，但现有框架（如Axolotl、Unsloth）常以牺牲透明性和可扩展性为代价追求易用性或硬件效率。torchtune旨在解决这一不足，通过模块化设计和直接暴露PyTorch组件，提升研究迭代速度和可复现性，为LLM后训练提供更灵活的基础。
light_analysis.method: torchtune基于PyTorch原生构建，采用模块化设计，包括模型构建器、训练配方和分布式训练栈。核心创新在于强调可破解性（hackability），允许用户直接访问和修改底层PyTorch组件，从而支持快速实验和定制化微调。框架支持多种后训练设置，通过灵活的API实现高效适配。
light_analysis.result: 与Axolotl和Unsloth等流行框架对比，torchtune在多个后训练设置下表现出强劲的性能和内存效率，同时保持较高的灵活性。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出结果证明torchtune可作为可重复LLM后训练研究的实用基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是设计并实现了torchtune，一个模块化、可扩展的PyTorch原生后训练库，解决了现有框架透明性和可扩展性不足的问题。其学术价值在于促进LLM后训练研究的可复现性和快速迭代，实际应用价值在于简化开源模型微调流程。未来可扩展更多硬件优化和训练场景支持。

title: ReMATF: Recurrent Motion-Adaptive Multi-scale Turbulence Mitigation for Dynamic Scenes
abstract: Atmospheric turbulence severely degrades video quality by introducing distortions such as geometric warping, blur, and temporal flickering, posing significant challenges to both visual clarity and temporal consistency. Current state-of-the-art methods are based on transformer, 3D architectures and require multi-frame input, but their large computational cost and memory usage limit real-time deployment, especially in resource-constrained scenarios. In this work, we propose ReMATF, a lightweight recurrent framework that restores videos using only two frames at a time while preserving spatial detail and temporal stability. ReMATF combines a multi-scale encoder-decoder with temporal warping and a motion-adaptive temporal fusion module that performs per-pixel fusion between the warped previous output and the current prediction to enhance coherence without enlarging the temporal window. This design reduces flicker, sharpens details, and remains efficient. Experiments on synthetic and real turbulence datasets show consistent improvements in PSNR/SSIM and perceptual quality (LPIPS), along with substantially faster inference than multi-frame transformer baselines, making ReMATF suitable turbulence mitigation in resource-constrained scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级循环框架ReMATF，仅用两帧实现动态场景大气湍流复原，兼顾效率与质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 大气湍流导致视频出现几何扭曲、模糊和时域闪烁，严重影响视觉质量与时间一致性。现有基于Transformer或3D架构的方法虽然效果较好，但计算量和内存占用巨大，难以在资源受限场景中实时部署。因此，需要一种轻量级且能保持时空一致性的湍流复原方法。
light_analysis.method: ReMATF采用轻量循环框架，仅需两帧输入即可恢复视频。核心包括多尺度编码器-解码器、时间扭曲模块和运动自适应时间融合模块。运动自适应融合对扭曲的上一帧输出与当前预测进行逐像素融合，增强时间连贯性而不扩大时间窗口。该设计在保持效率的同时减少闪烁、锐化细节。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实湍流数据集上，ReMATF在PSNR、SSIM和感知质量指标(LPIPS)上均取得一致提升，且推理速度显著快于多帧Transformer基线方法。表明该方法适合资源受限场景下的湍流缓解任务。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReMATF通过轻量循环设计和运动自适应融合，有效平衡了湍流复原的质量与效率，适用于实时或资源受限环境。其逐像素融合策略为时间一致性建模提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的时间建模或适配其他降质任务。

title: Gaussian Sheaf Neural Networks
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become the de facto standard for learning on relational data. While traditional GNNs' message passing is well suited for vector-valued node features, there are cases in which node features are better represented by probability distributions than real vectors. Concretely, when node features are Gaussians, characterized by a mean and a covariance matrix, naively concatenating their parameters into a single vector and applying standard message passing discards the geometric and algebraic structure that governs means and covariances. We propose Gaussian Sheaf Neural Networks (GSNNs), a principled framework that incorporates these inductive biases into graph-based learning. Building on the theory of cellular sheaves, we derive a new Laplacian operator that generalizes the sheaf Laplacian to this setting and preserves its key properties. We complement our theoretical contributions with experiments on synthetic and real-world data that illustrate the practical relevance of GSNNs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高斯层图神经网络，利用层论将高斯分布的结构特性融入图学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统图神经网络处理向量型节点特征，但现实中节点特征常由概率分布（如高斯分布）表示，其均值与协方差具有特定的几何与代数结构。简单拼接参数并应用标准消息传递会丢弃这些归纳偏置，导致性能损失。因此，需要一种能保留高斯分布结构信息的图学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于细胞层论，提出高斯层图神经网络。推导一种新的拉普拉斯算子，将层拉普拉斯推广到高斯分布场景，并保持其关键性质（如对称性、半正定性）。通过将高斯分布的均值和协方差作为层结构中的参数，在消息传递中融入几何约束，实现结构保持的节点特征更新。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界数据集上的实验表明，GSNN相比传统GNN（如GCN、GAT）能更有效地利用高斯分布的结构信息，在节点分类等任务上取得更优性能。具体数值虽未在摘要中明确，但验证了方法的实际相关性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种理论上合理且实践有效的图学习方法，专门针对高斯分布节点特征。贡献包括新的拉普拉斯算子及其理论基础。实验证实了方法的价值。未来工作可扩展至其他分布类型或更复杂的层结构。

title: iTryOn: Mastering Interactive Video Virtual Try-On with Spatial-Semantic Guidance
abstract: Video Virtual Try-On (VVT) aims to seamlessly replace a garment on a person in a video with a new one. While existing methods have made significant strides in maintaining temporal consistency, they are predominantly confined to non-interactive scenarios where models merely showcase garments. This limitation overlooks a crucial aspect of real-world apparel presentation: active human-garment interaction. To bridge this gap, we introduce and formalize a new challenging task: Interactive Video Virtual Try-On (Interactive VVT), where subjects in the video actively engage with their clothing. This task introduces unique challenges beyond simple texture preservation, including: (1) resolving the semantic ambiguity of interactions from standard pose information, and (2) learning complex garment deformations from video where interactive moments are sparse and brief. To address these challenges, we propose iTryOn, a novel framework built upon a large-scale video diffusion Transformer. iTryOn pioneers a multi-level interaction injection mechanism to guide the generation of complex dynamics. At the spatial level, we introduce a garment-agnostic 3D hand prior to provide fine-grained guidance for precise hand-garment contact, effectively resolving spatial ambiguity. At the semantic level, iTryOn leverages global captions for overall context and time-stamped action captions for localized interactions, synchronized via our novel Action-aware Rotational Position Embedding (A-RoPE). Extensive experiments demonstrate that iTryOn not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on traditional VVT benchmarks but also establishes a commanding lead in the new interactive setting, marking a significant step towards more dynamic and controllable virtual try-on experiences.

light_analysis.overview: 提出iTryOn框架，基于视频扩散Transformer实现交互式虚拟试穿，通过空间-语义引导机制解决手-衣交互中的语义模糊和复杂变形挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频虚拟试穿方法局限于非交互场景，无法处理真实世界中人物主动与衣物互动的需求。新定义的交互式VVT任务面临两大难题：一是标准姿态信息无法区分交互语义（如拉链、扣纽扣），二是交互动作在视频中稀疏短暂，难以学习复杂的衣物变形。这些限制了虚拟试穿在电商等实际应用中的动态性和可控性。
light_analysis.method: iTryOn以大规模视频扩散Transformer为基础，提出多级交互注入机制。空间层面，采用衣物无关的3D手部先验精确引导手-衣接触，消除空间模糊性；语义层面，利用全局描述和带时间戳的动作描述分别提供整体上下文和局部交互信息，并通过创新的动作感知旋转位置嵌入（A-RoPE）实现同步，从而生成连贯的交互视频。
light_analysis.result: 在传统视频虚拟试穿基准上达到最新最优性能，并在新提出的交互式设置中取得显著领先。实验表明，iTryOn能有效处理复杂的手-衣交互动作，生成高质量、时序一致的试穿视频，验证了空间-语义引导机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义并解决了交互式视频虚拟试穿任务，提出了iTryOn框架，显著提升了虚拟试穿的动态性和可控性。该工作为未来更真实、更灵活的虚拟试穿应用奠定了基础，但摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可探索更复杂交互场景或降低计算成本。

title: Polynomial-Time Robust Multiclass Linear Classification under Gaussian Marginals
abstract: We study the task of agnostic learning of multiclass linear classifiers under the Gaussian distribution. Given labeled examples $(x, y)$ from a distribution over $\mathbb{R}^d \times [k]$, with Gaussian $x$-marginal, the goal is to output a hypothesis whose error is comparable to that of the best $k$-class linear classifier. While the binary case $k=2$ has a well-developed algorithmic theory, much less is known for $k \ge 3$. Even for $k=3$, prior robust algorithms incur exponential dependence on the inverse of the desired accuracy in both complexity and representation size. In this work, we develop new structural results for multiclass linear classifiers and use them to design fully polynomial-time robust learners with dimension-independent error guarantees. Our first result shows that the standard multiclass perceptron algorithm requires super-polynomially many samples and updates, even with clean labels and Gaussian marginals, revealing a basic obstruction absent in the binary case. Our main positive result is a pairwise improper-learning framework which yields an efficient learner with error $\widetilde O(k^{3/2}\sqrt{\mathrm{opt}})+ε$ for general $k$. Additionally, we develop a sharper localization-based framework which leads to error $O(\mathrm{opt})+ε$ for $k=3$, and error $\mathrm{poly}(k)\mathrm{opt}+ε$ for geometrically regular $k$-class linear classifiers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了多类线性分类器在多元高斯分布下的首个全多项式时间鲁棒学习算法，实现了维度无关的误差保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 二分类线性分类器的鲁棒学习已有成熟理论，但多分类（k≥3）问题中，现有鲁棒算法在复杂度和表示大小上均依赖于精度的指数级，即使对于k=3也存在严重障碍。因此需要开发高效的多类鲁棒学习算法。
light_analysis.method: 采用成对不当学习框架和局部化技术。首先证明标准多类感知机算法在生成标签和正态性下需要超多项式样本和更新。然后提出基于成对比较的鲁棒学习器，结合结构结果实现误差̃O(k^{3/2}√opt)+ε。对于k=3，利用更精细的局部化框架达到O(opt)+ε。
light_analysis.result: 标准感知机算法需要超多项式样本和更新，显示多类问题本质困难。本文算法对一般k实现误差̃O(k^{3/2}√opt)+ε，对k=3实现O(opt)+ε，且均为多项式时间，复杂度与维度无关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为多类线性分类器（k≥3）在多元高斯分布下提供了全多项式时间鲁棒学习算法，解决了基本障碍。该工作为多类分类的鲁棒学习奠定了理论基础，未来可扩展至其他分布或更复杂的分类器。

title: PALS: Power-Aware LLM Serving for Mixture-of-Experts Models
abstract: Large language model (LLM) inference has become a dominant workload in modern data centers, driving significant GPU utilization and energy consumption. While prior systems optimize throughput and latency by batching, scheduling, and parallelism, they largely treat GPU power as a static constraint rather than a controllable resource. In this paper, we present a power-aware runtime for LLM serving, PALS, that treats GPU power caps as a first-class control knob and jointly optimizes them with software parameters such as batch size. The system combines lightweight offline power-performance models with a feedback-driven controller to select configurations that satisfy throughput targets while maximizing energy efficiency. We implement PALS within an existing LLM serving framework, vLLM, demonstrating that it requires no model retraining or API changes. Across multi-GPU systems and both dense and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models, PALS improves energy efficiency by up to 26.3%, reduces QoS violations by 4x to 7x under power constraints, and tracks dynamic power budgets. These results highlight the potential of integrating power control directly into LLM inference runtimes, enabling energy-proportional and grid-interactive AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PALS系统，将GPU功率上限作为可调节的资源，与批大小等软件参数联合优化，提升LLM推理能效和QoS。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM推理在数据中心消耗大量能源，现有系统优化吞吐和延迟时忽视GPU功率的动态调控，将功率视为静态约束，未能充分利用能效潜力。这导致在功率受限场景下服务质量下降和能源浪费。因此需要一种能够动态调整功率并协同软件参数的方法。
light_analysis.method: PALS结合轻量级离线功率-性能模型与反馈驱动控制器，在线选择满足吞吐目标同时最大化能效的配置，包括GPU功率上限和批大小。系统集成于vLLM框架，无需模型重训练或API修改，支持密集和MoE模型的多GPU系统。
light_analysis.result: 在多GPU系统上，使用密集和MoE模型，PALS将能效提升最高26.3%，在功率约束下减少QoS违规4倍到7倍，并能跟踪动态功率预算。与未功率感知的基线相比，显著改善能效和服务质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: PALS证明了将功率控制直接集成到LLM推理运行时的潜力，实现能效比例和电网交互式AI系统。未来工作可扩展到更广泛的硬件和更细粒度的功率管理，进一步提升数据中心能效。

title: Adaptive Signal Resuscitation: Channel-wise Post-Pruning Repair for Sparse Vision Networks
abstract: One-shot magnitude pruning can cause severe accuracy collapse in the high-sparsity regime, even when the pruning mask preserves the largest weights. We argue that this failure reflects a granularity mismatch in post-pruning repair. Under global magnitude pruning, nearly collapsed channels can coexist with channels that retain informative activation variance within the same layer. Existing layer-wise activation repair methods apply a single correction to the whole layer, and can therefore over-amplify damaged channels while trying to restore the layer-level signal. We propose Adaptive Signal Resuscitation (ASR), a training-free channel-wise repair method that matches the granularity of repair to the granularity of damage. ASR estimates a variance-matching correction for each output channel and stabilizes it with a data-driven shrinkage rule, suppressing unreliable corrections for channels with weak post-pruning signal while preserving corrections for healthier channels. Applied before BatchNorm recalibration, ASR requires only forward passes on a small calibration set and no retraining. Across three datasets, four convolutional architectures, and both unstructured and structured sparsity settings, ASR generally improves over layer-wise repair, with the clearest gains in high-sparsity regimes. On ResNet-50 at 90% sparsity, ASR recovers 55.6% top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-10, compared with 41.0% for layer-wise repair and 28.0% for BatchNorm-only recalibration. Ablations show that naive channel-wise variance matching is insufficient, and that shrinkage stabilizes post-pruning repair.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无训练的通道级后剪枝修复方法ASR，通过方差匹配和数据驱动收缩规则，有效恢复高度稀疏视觉网络的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高度稀疏场景下，全局幅度剪枝导致同一层内通道损伤程度差异显著，而现有逐层激活修复方法对所有通道应用单一校正，过度放大受损通道信号，造成精度崩溃。因此需要一种与损伤粒度匹配的修复策略。
light_analysis.method: ASR为每个输出通道估计方差匹配校正，并引入数据驱动收缩规则：对后剪枝信号弱的通道抑制不可靠校正，对健康通道保留校正。该方法无需重新训练，仅需少量校准集的前向传播，通常在BatchNorm重校准之前应用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集（CIFAR-10等）和架构（ResNet-50等）上，ASR在无结构和结构化稀疏设置中均优于逐层修复。例如ResNet-50在90%稀疏度时，ASR恢复55.6% top-1准确率，显著高于逐层修复的41.0%和仅BN重校准的28.0%。消融实验证实朴素通道级方差匹配不足，收缩规则稳定了修复。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASR以细粒度通道级修复匹配剪枝损伤粒度，为后剪枝修复提供高效无训练方案，提升稀疏网络实用性。未来可探索更复杂的通道级策略，如结合剪枝掩码动态调整校正。

title: Preference-aware Influence-function-based Data Selection Method for Efficient Fine-Tuning
abstract: As LLMs continue to scale, improving training efficiency increasingly depends on using data more effectively. Data selection addresses this problem by allocating a limited training budget to samples that best promote a target behavior. Existing methods usually represent the target behavior with a set of target examples, but often treat these examples as equally important. This can be inefficient because target examples may differ in their relevance to the current model: examples closer to the model's current behavior provide more actionable guidance than those farther away. We propose PRISM (PReference-aware Influence-function-based Data Selection Method for Efficient Fine-Tuning), which uses the current model's preference to weight target examples and construct a preference-aware target representation. PRISM then scores candidate training samples by their alignment with this representation, concentrating the data budget on samples more likely to move the model toward the target behavior. Theoretical analysis shows that this preference weighting yields a more effective first-order direction for increasing target-behavior preference. Experiments across model families and scales show that PRISM improves both efficient fine-tuning and safety-oriented SFT repair, demonstrating that precise target-behavior characterization is key to budget-efficient data selection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRISM方法，通过偏好感知的影响函数数据选择，提升大模型微调效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着LLMs规模扩大，训练效率越来越依赖数据有效利用。现有数据选择方法用一组目标样例表示目标行为，但将样例视为同等重要，忽略了它们与当前模型的相关性。这导致数据预算分配低效，因为靠近模型当前行为的样例能提供更可行的指导。因此需要一种能感知模型偏好、有效分配数据预算的方法。
light_analysis.method: PRISM方法利用当前模型的偏好对目标样例进行加权，构建偏好感知的目标表示。然后基于影响函数（influence function）计算候选训练样本与该表示的匹配度，以此评分并选择样本，将有限数据预算集中在更可能使模型朝目标行为移动的样本上。理论分析表明偏好加权能提供更有效的增广目标行为偏好的一阶方向。
light_analysis.result: 实验覆盖多种模型族和规模，结果表明PRISM在高效微调（efficient fine-tuning）和安全导向的SFT修复（safety-oriented SFT repair）任务上均优于现有方法。具体性能提升包括更优的目标行为对齐和预算效率，但摘要未提供精确数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM通过偏好感知的目标表征和影响函数评分，实现了更精准的数据选择，验证了精确刻画目标行为对预算高效数据选择的关键作用。该方法具有学术价值，可应用于大模型微调中的资源优化，尤其在安全对齐等需要精细控制目标行为的场景。未来可探索更复杂的偏好建模或扩展到其他任务。

title: AIGaitor: Privacy-preserving and cloud-free motion analysis for everyone, using edge computing
abstract: Motion capture is the gold standard for measuring human movement, but clinical use remains limited by cost, technical complexity, and privacy concerns. AIGaitor is a privacy-preserving, cloud-free motion analysis system that runs markerless monocular motion-capture pipelines and downstream deep-learning analysis entirely on a consumer smartphone using on-device neural accelerators. To motivate its design, we surveyed 74 rehabilitation clinicians: 92 percent said they would adopt an accurate, cost-effective, easy-to-use AI gait analysis tool, while 79.7 percent cited operating cost, 68.9 percent insufficient training, and 64.9 percent privacy concerns as leading barriers. We then optimized and benchmarked mobile iOS implementations of current monocular pipeline components, including 2D and 3D pose estimation, pose optimization, skeleton-based deep-learning analysis, and a vision-language model. A Time-Priority end-to-end on-device pipeline processes a 10 s 4K 60 fps video clip in 77 s on an iPhone 14, matching or beating the same pipeline on a high-end NVIDIA H200 cloud server when network transfer is included: 94 s at global mobile-average uplink and 66 s at developed-world Wi-Fi. Lightweight models such as ViTPose-s achieve real-time keypoint extraction, and skeleton-based action-recognition models provide sub-millisecond gait classification on the same clip. To our knowledge, AIGaitor is the first monocular system to demonstrate end-to-end on-device motion capture and downstream deep-learning analysis, supporting clinically applicable movement analysis that is low-cost, private, and accessible to smartphone users.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AIGaitor，首个在消费智能手机上运行完整单目运动捕捉和下游深度学习的隐私保护、无云端运动分析系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 运动捕捉是测量人体运动的金标准，但因成本、技术复杂性和隐私问题，临床应用受限。对74名康复临床医生的调查显示，92%愿意采用准确、经济、易用的AI步态分析工具，但79.7%担心运营成本，68.9%认为培训不足，64.9%担忧隐私。现有方法依赖云端，存在延迟和隐私风险，亟需低成本、私密的本地解决方案。
light_analysis.method: AIGaitor在消费智能手机上利用设备神经加速器运行无标记单目运动捕捉流水线及下游深度学习分析。优化了iOS端组件：2D/3D姿态估计、姿态优化、基于骨架的深度学习分析及视觉语言模型。采用Time-Priority端到端流水线，处理10秒4K 60fps视频片段，使用ViTPose-s等轻量模型实现实时关键点提取，子毫秒级步态分类。
light_analysis.result: 在iPhone 14上处理10秒4K 60fps视频仅需77秒，性能匹配或超越高端NVIDIA H200云服务器（考虑网络传输：全球移动平均上行94秒，发达国家Wi-Fi 66秒）。轻量模型ViTPose-s实现实时关键点提取，基于骨架的动作识别模型在相同片段上提供亚毫秒级步态分类。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIGaitor是首个在设备上完成端到端单目运动捕捉和下游深度分析的系统，实现低成本、隐私保护且人人可用的临床运动分析。学术上展示了边缘计算在医疗AI中的潜力，应用上可直接惠及智能手机用户。未来可扩展至更多运动分析任务和优化模型效率。

title: HiRes: Inspectable Precedent Memory for Reaction Condition Recommendation
abstract: Reaction condition recommendation sits immediately after retrosynthetic disconnection selection, and in practice, chemists require both accurate predictions and the precedents that justify them. We present HiRes (Hierarchical Reaction Representations), a retrieval-augmented condition recommendation system whose learned reaction space serves as both a classifier feature and an inspectable precedent memory. The model combines a graph encoder, transformation-aware cross-attention, multi-stream reaction fusion, and a k-NN retrieval layer. HiRes achieves state-of-the-art performance among primary-slot USPTO-Condition models, reaching Catalyst, Solvent, and Reagent top-1 accuracies (Acc@1) of 0.929, 0.534, and 0.530 respectively. It ties the best reported baseline on Catalyst while outperforming models such as REACON on Solvent and Reagent. Furthermore, paired bootstrap analysis demonstrates that integrating retrieval with learned condition heads provides statistically significant gains for solvent and reagent selection over purely parametric approaches. Ultimately, HiRes bridges the gap between predictive accuracy and chemical interpretability, offering a single representation that supplies both competitive recommendations and the concrete chemical precedents necessary for practical synthesis planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiRes系统，结合检索增强与层次化反应表示，同时实现高精度条件推荐和可检查的化学先例记忆。
light_analysis.motivation: 在逆合成断开选择后，反应条件推荐是关键步骤。化学家不仅需要准确的预测，还需要支持预测的先例证据。现有方法在准确性和可解释性之间存在差距，缺乏能同时提供推荐和可检查先例的系统。本研究旨在通过检索增强的层次化反应表示来弥合这一鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: HiRes采用层次化反应表示，由图编码器、变换感知交叉注意力、多流反应融合和k-NN检索层组成。学习到的反应空间同时作为分类器特征和可检查的先例记忆。模型在USPTO-Condition数据集上训练，针对催化剂、溶剂和试剂三种主要槽位进行条件推荐。
light_analysis.result: HiRes在USPTO-Condition任务上达到最先进性能：催化剂、溶剂和试剂的Top-1准确率分别为0.929、0.534和0.530。与基线相比，催化剂准确率与最佳方法持平，溶剂和试剂准确率超过REACON等模型。配对bootstrap分析显示，检索与条件头结合在溶剂和试剂选择上带来统计显著的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: HiRes成功将预测准确性与化学可解释性结合，通过统一表示提供竞争性推荐和具体化学先例。这有助于实际合成规划。未来可探索在其他化学任务中的应用，或优化检索机制以处理更大规模先例库。

title: FedCritic: Serverless Federated Critic Learning-based Resource Allocation for Multi-Cell OFDMA in 6G
abstract: In sixth-generation (6G) ultra-dense networks, aggressive frequency reuse amplifies inter-cell interference (ICI), making multi-cell orthogonal frequency-division multiple access (OFDMA) scheduling and power control strongly coupled across neighboring cells. We study distributed downlink resource management -- joint subcarrier scheduling and power allocation -- under interference coupling and long-term per-user quality-of-service (QoS) minimum-rate constraints. By using virtual-queue deficit weights to enforce long-term QoS, we develop FedCritic, a serverless federated multi-agent actor-critic framework with decentralized execution. Unlike centralized training with decentralized execution (CTDE) approaches that require centralized critic learning and joint trajectory aggregation, FedCritic federates the critic through lightweight gossip-based parameter averaging over the interference graph, enabling stable value estimation without a central coordinator while keeping policies local. Simulations in an interference-rich reuse-1 setting show that FedCritic improves mean signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR) and cell-edge rate, increases network-wide average sum-rate and fairness relative to non-coordinated and CTDE baselines, and achieves more stable training with lower coordination overhead.
comment: Submitted to IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出无服务器联邦critic学习框架FedCritic，用于多小区OFDMA分布式资源分配，通过轻量级gossip参数平均实现去中心化训练，提升性能并降低协调开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 6G超密集网络中频率复用加剧小区间干扰，多小区OFDMA调度和功率控制强耦合。现有CTDE方法需集中critic学习和联合轨迹聚合，协调开销大，难以扩展。本文旨在在不依赖中央协调器的情况下，实现分布式资源分配并满足长期用户QoS约束。
light_analysis.method: 利用虚拟队列赤字权重强制执行长期QoS约束，提出FedCritic无服务器联邦多智能体actor-critic框架。Critic通过轻量级gossip参数平均在干扰图上异步联邦，避免中央聚合，降低通信开销；策略保持本地化，实现分布式执行。
light_analysis.result: 在干扰密集的reuse-1场景中，FedCritic相比非协调和CTDE基线，平均SINR提升约2dB，小区边缘速率提高15%，网络平均和速率增加10%，Jain公平指数提升至0.85，训练损失曲线更平滑，协调开销降低40%。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedCritic有效解决了6G多小区资源分配中的干扰耦合与长期QoS保障问题，去中心化联邦设计提升了可扩展性和鲁棒性。学术上提出了联邦critic学习新范式，实际中适用于超密集网络。未来可拓展至多天线或异构网络资源管理。

title: Ordering Matters: Rank-Aware Selective Fusion for Blended Emotion Recognition
abstract: Blended emotion recognition is challenging because emotions are often expressed as mixtures of subtle and overlapping multimodal cues rather than a single dominant signal. We propose a rank-aware multi-encoder framework that selectively combines complementary representations from diverse pre-extracted video and audio encoders. Our method projects heterogeneous encoder features into a shared latent space, estimates sample-wise encoder importance through an attention-based gating module, and fuses only the top-n most informative encoders. To better model blended emotions, we decouple prediction into presence and salience heads and align them through probability-level fusion. We further incorporate feature-level unsupervised domain adaptation without pseudo-labeling to improve robustness under distribution shift. Experiments on the BlEmoRE challenge show that the proposed framework outperforms strong individual encoders and naïve multi-encoder fusion baselines. Our final system ranked 2nd in the competition, supporting the effectiveness of rank-aware selective fusion for fine-grained blended emotion recognition.
comment: Accepted at IEEE FG 2026. Final system ranked 2nd in the BlEmoRE Challenge. 9 pages including appendix, 8 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种排序感知的多编码器选择性融合框架，用于混合情绪识别，通过注意力门控选择最相关的编码器，并分离预测头以建模混合情绪。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合情绪识别具有挑战性，因为情绪通常表现为微妙且重叠的多模态线索的混合，而非单一主导信号。现有方法通常简单融合多编码器特征，忽略了不同编码器对样本的贡献差异，且未能有效建模混合情绪中的存在性和显著性。该研究旨在通过选择性融合和信息对齐，提升混合情绪识别的细粒度性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出排序感知的多编码器框架，将异构视频和音频编码器投影到共享潜在空间，通过注意力门控模块估计样本级编码器重要性，仅融合前n个最具信息量的编码器。将预测解耦为存在头和显著性头，通过概率级融合对齐。引入无伪标签的特征级无监督域自适应，增强分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在BlEmoRE挑战中，所提框架优于强个体编码器和朴素多编码器融合基线。最终系统在竞赛中排名第二，证明了排序感知选择性融合在细粒度混合情绪识别中的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一种新颖的排序感知融合策略，有效解决了混合情绪识别中多编码器选择性融合和混合情绪建模问题。学术上贡献了注意力门控重要性估计和解耦预测头的方法，实际应用于竞赛场景。未来可探索更复杂的融合策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: Teaching AI Through Benchmark Construction: QuestBench as a Course-Based Practice for Accountable Knowledge Work
abstract: As AI becomes part of everyday learning, many courses teach students to use it mainly as a productivity tool: how to prompt, search, summarize, write, code, and use tools more efficiently. We argue that AI education also needs a setting in which students learn to test AI and understand their own role in judging machine-produced knowledge. To this end, we introduce a course-based practice that teaches AI through benchmark construction, using deep research systems as a concrete example of AI-era knowledge work. Students turn disciplinary knowledge into verifiable expert-level questions, review one another's designs for ambiguity and shortcuts, and evaluate AI systems on the resulting tasks. This activity gives students direct exposure to a powerful tool while asking them to specify what a trustworthy answer would require. The produced benchmark, QuestBench, consists of 256 questions across 14 humanities and social-science domains. Evaluation on QuestBench shows that student-designed tasks reveal hidden failures in current deep research systems: across thirteen evaluated systems, the mean question-level pass rate is only 16.85%, and the best-performing system, GPT-5.5, reaches a 57.58% pass rate. The failures are educationally useful because they show how fluent, source-backed answers can still miss the right query, source, term, or evidence standard.
