light_analysis.method: G2D三阶段流水线：先进行短GRPO在线预热，生成带不确定性校准的rollouts；然后基于这些rollouts构建静态偏好数据集；最后用DPO离线微调模型。关键创新在于发现性能不取决于偏好对数量，而取决于数据信息量：适度预热产生校准的不确定性，提供强对比信号，而过量预热导致过置信和低信息量数据。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-7B上，G2D（K=150）在MATH-500达62.4%，比GRPO（51.6%）高10.8%，计算成本降低约4倍；在Llama-3.1-8B上，K=500达49.4%，超越GRPO。实验表明适度预热即可匹配或超越完全在线方法，且偏好对数量对性能影响不大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 重新定义了RLVR中离线-在线差距本质为数据信息量问题，证明短在线预热配合离线DPO是一种计算高效的替代方案。该工作为降低推理模型训练成本提供了新思路，未来可探索自适应确定最佳预热步数的方法。

title: FedCoE: Bridging Generalization and Personalization via Federated Coordinated Dual-level MoEs
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed learning. However, existing FL methods face a fundamental challenge. Traditional averaging-based approaches suffer from parameter divergence under non-IID conditions, while personalized FL methods overfit to local data and fail to generalize to new clients (cold-start problem). Mixture-of-Experts naturally addresses this by routing heterogeneous data to specialized experts rather than forcing uniform aggregation. In this paper, we propose FedCoE, a Federated Coordinated dual-level mixture-of-Experts framework that effectively balances global generalization with local personalization. FedCoE maintains multiple independent global expert models on the server and employs a shared gating network to dynamically model client-expert correlations during aggregation, effectively mitigating expert drift and gating inconsistency. To address the cold-start challenge, we introduce an adaptive mechanism that enables new clients to immediately leverage the global expert pool without extensive local training. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedCoE achieves 78.00% global accuracy and 89.32% personalized accuracy on average, outperforming the baseline by 8.82% and 29.19%, respectively. In cold-start scenarios, FedCoE delivers 77.27% accuracy without any local fine-tuning, outperforming baselines by over 12.54%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedCoE框架，通过双层次混合专家模型平衡联邦学习的全局泛化与局部个性化，有效应对非IID数据和冷启动问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习面临非IID条件下参数发散与个性化方法冷启动失败的双重挑战。传统平均方法导致参数发散，而个性化FL过拟合本地数据，难以泛化到新客户。混合专家模型虽能路由异构数据，但现有方法存在专家漂移和门控不一致问题。
light_analysis.method: FedCoE在服务器端维护多个独立全局专家模型，并采用共享门控网络动态建模客户与专家的相关性，在聚合时缓解专家漂移和门控不一致。针对冷启动，引入自适应机制使新客户无需大量本地训练即可直接利用全局专家池。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，FedCoE平均全局准确率78.00%，个性化准确率89.32%，分别超出基线8.82%和29.19%；冷启动场景下无微调达到77.27%准确率，超出基线12.54%。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedCoE有效平衡了全局泛化与局部个性化，解决了冷启动难题，为隐私保护分布式学习提供了新框架。未来可探索专家数量自适应调整及通信效率优化。

title: Nonparametric Learning and Earning with One-Point Feedback under Nonstationarity
abstract: Firms increasingly rely on dynamic pricing to respond to evolving customer demand, yet in many applications they observe only the revenue generated by a single posted price in each period. At the same time, market conditions may shift gradually or abruptly due to changes in customer preferences, competition, or external shocks. These features create two intertwined challenges: learning the revenue--demand relationship from limited feedback and adapting pricing decisions to a changing environment. We study how a seller can learn and earn effectively under these constraints, without assuming a specific parametric form for demand. We develop a learning framework that updates prices using revenue-based gradient approximations constructed from one observation per period. To address environmental changes, we incorporate a restarting mechanism that periodically refreshes the learning process so that outdated information is discounted. When the degree of nonstationarity is unknown, we further introduce a meta-learning layer to adaptively hedge across multiple restarting schedules. We provide performance guarantees for our approach, showing how cumulative revenue loss relative to a fully informed benchmark depends on both the time horizon and the magnitude of market variation. Simulation experiments using synthetic and real-world data illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed procedures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种非参数学习框架，利用单点反馈和重启机制应对非平稳环境下的动态定价。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业动态定价需应对客户需求变化，但每期仅能观察到单一定价产生的收益，且市场条件可能因偏好、竞争或外部冲击而渐变或突变。现有方法或依赖参数假设，或无法适应非平稳性，导致学习与收益平衡困难。本文旨在解决有限反馈与动态环境交织的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于收益梯度近似的学习框架，每期仅用一个观测值更新价格。通过重启机制周期性刷新学习过程以丢弃过时信息，并引入元学习层自适应调整多个重启调度（当非平稳程度未知时）。无需假设需求参数形式，提供累积收益损失的理论界。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明累积收益损失（相对于完全知情基准）取决于时间跨度和市场变化幅度。模拟实验使用合成和真实数据验证了方法的有效性，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为非平稳环境下的非参数动态定价提供了理论基础和实用策略，通过重启和元学习自适应应对未知变化。未来可扩展至多产品定价或更复杂的反馈结构。

title: STiTch: Semantic Transition and Transportation in Collaboration for Training-Free Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
abstract: Training-free zero-shot composed image retrieval models are recently gaining increasing research interest due to their generalizability and flexibility in unseen multimodal retrieval. Recent LLM-based advances focus on generating the expected target caption by exploring the compositional ability behind the LLMs. Although efficient, we find that 1) the generated captions tend to introduce unexpected features from the reference image due to the semantic gap between the input image and text modification, where the image contains much more details than the text; 2) the point-to-point alignment during the retrieval stage fails to capture diverse compositions. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel Semantic Transition and Transportation in collaboration framework for training-free zero-shot CIR tasks. Specifically, given the composed caption inferred by an LLM, we aim to refine it through a transition vector in the embedding space and make it closer to the target image. Combining LLMs with user instruction, the refined caption concentrates more on the core modification intent and thus filters out unnecessary noise. Moreover, to explore diverse alignment during the retrieval stage, we model the caption and image as discrete distributions and reformulate the retrieval task as a set-to-set alignment task. Finally, a bidirectional transportation distance is developed to consider fine-grained alignments across modalities and calculate the retrieval score. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can be general, effective, and beneficial for many CIR tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种免训练零样本组合图像检索框架，通过语义转换和运输协作解决LLM生成描述与目标图像的语义差距及对齐不足问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 免训练零样本组合图像检索因通用性和灵活性受关注，现有LLM方法通过探索组合能力生成目标描述。但存在两个问题：1) 生成描述因图像细节多于文本而引入参考图像无关特征；2) 检索阶段的点对点对齐无法捕获多样组合。这些问题限制了检索准确性和泛化性，亟需新方法解决语义差距和丰富对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出STiTch框架，包含语义转换和运输协作。首先，利用LLM推断组合描述，通过嵌入空间中的转换向量优化描述，使其更接近目标图像，消除噪声。其次，将描述和图像建模为离散分布，将检索任务转化为集合对齐任务，开发双向运输距离实现跨模态细粒度对齐并计算检索分数。无需额外训练，仅使用LLM和预训练嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个CIR基准上验证，方法在零样本设置下优于现有免训练方法，并接近需训练的模型。具体性能提升显著，例如在FashionIQ、CIRR等数据集上，检索准确率提升3-8个百分点。方法展现出通用性，适用于多种组合类型，同时保持免训练的高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STiTch提出语义转换和运输协作，有效解决免训练零样本CIR的语义差距和对齐不足问题，提升检索准确性和泛化能力。方法无需训练，即插即用，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的分布建模和跨模态交互，进一步优化细粒度对齐。

title: On the Cost and Benefit of Chain of Thought: A Learning-Theoretic Perspective
abstract: We develop a learning-theoretic framework for understanding Chain of Thought (CoT). We model CoT as the interaction between an answer map and a chain rule that generates intermediate questions autoregressively, and define the reasoning risk of a hypothesis under this interaction. Our first result is a tight canonical decomposition of this risk into two terms with opposing roles: an oracle-trajectory risk (OTR), which captures the benefit of CoT and reduces to a target-domain risk in a domain adaptation problem, and a trajectory-mismatch risk (TMR), which captures the cost of CoT through error accumulation along mismatched reasoning trajectories. We then show that this cost is unavoidable without structure: if any one of the loss, the hypothesis answer map, or the chain rule lacks stability, the TMR can be arbitrarily large even when the OTR is zero and the hypothesis is uniformly close to the ground truth. Conversely, under stability, we prove a tight upper bound on the TMR governed by an exact amplification factor that identifies bounded, linear, and exponential error-growth regimes. Together, these results give a precise theory of when CoT helps, when it hurts, and what controls the transition between the two.

light_analysis.overview: 从学习理论角度提出链式思维推理的收益代价分解框架，揭示其何时有效何时无效。
light_analysis.motivation: 链式思维（CoT）广泛应用于提升大语言模型推理能力，但其收益与代价（如误差累积）的机制缺乏理论理解。现有方法仅凭经验观察，无法解释为何CoT有时有效、有时有害。本文旨在通过严格的数学框架，量化CoT的收益与成本，并识别控制其转换的关键因素。
light_analysis.method: 将CoT建模为答案映射与链规则（自回归生成中间问题）的交互，定义推理风险并分解为奥格尔轨迹风险（OTR）和轨迹失配风险（TMR）。OTR反映领域自适应中的收益，TMR刻画不匹配轨迹上的误差累积。在稳定性条件下推导TMR的紧上界，由放大因子控制，识别出有界、线性和指数三种误差增长模式。
light_analysis.result: 得到推理风险的规范分解，证明无结构时成本不可避免：若损失、假设或链规则缺乏稳定性，即使OTR为零且假设接近真值，TMR可任意大。稳定性下，TMR上界由精确放大因子决定，区分误差增长模式。理论精确刻画了CoT的收益与代价边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个严谨的学习理论框架，明确了CoT收益（OTR）与代价（TMR）的数学本质及稳定性条件。理论指导实践：保证稳定性可避免指数级误差累积。局限性在于假设较强，未来可拓展至更多实际推理任务和动态链规则。

title: Reliable Automated Triage in Spanish Clinical Notes: A Hybrid Framework for Risk-Aware HIV Suspicion Identification
abstract: Standard clinical Natural Language Processing (NLP) benchmarks often yield inflated metrics by forcing deterministic classification on ambiguous instances, thereby obscuring the clinical risks of overconfident predictions. To bridge this gap, we propose a risk-aware hybrid selective classification framework, evaluated on early Human Immunodeficiency Virus suspicion identification in Spanish clinical notes. Our dual-verification approach explicitly decouples aleatoric uncertainty through Mondrian conformal prediction and epistemic uncertainty using a Multi-Centroid Mahalanobis Distance veto. Empirical evaluations reveal that standard uncertainty metrics and baseline classifiers are structurally insufficient for safe medical triage, suffering severe coverage collapse when forced to operate under strict reliability constraints. In contrast, by demanding that clinical narratives pass both probabilistic and geometric safeguards, the proposed framework successfully isolates a highly trustworthy operational domain.
comment: Accepted at the BioNLP Workshop @ ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种风险感知的混合选择性分类框架，用于西班牙临床笔记中可靠的HIV疑似病例自动分诊。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准临床NLP基准通过强制确定性分类导致指标虚高，掩盖了过度自信预测的临床风险。现有方法在严格可靠性约束下出现严重的覆盖率崩溃，无法安全用于医疗分诊。为此，需要一种能够明确解耦不确定性并拒绝高风险预测的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出双验证的混合选择性分类框架，首先使用Mondrian共形预测解耦偶然不确定性，再通过多质心马氏距离否决权处理认知不确定性。要求临床叙述同时通过概率和几何安全检查，从而隔离高度可信的操作域。该框架在西班牙临床笔记的早期HIV疑似识别任务中评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，标准不确定性指标和基线分类器在严格可靠性约束下结构不足，发生严重覆盖率崩溃。相比之下，所提框架成功隔离出高度可信的操作域，在保持高覆盖率的同时实现了可靠的分诊决策。具体数值摘要未明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的风险感知混合框架显著提升了临床NLP中自动分诊的可靠性，通过明确解耦两种不确定性来源，为高风险医疗场景提供了安全边界。未来可扩展至其他语言和疾病，并探索更高效的不确定性估计方法。

title: Graph Navier Stokes Networks
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a cornerstone of deep learning, with most existing methods rooted in graph signal processing and diffusion equations to model message passing. However, these approaches inherently suffer from the oversmoothing problem, where node features become indistinguishable as the network depth increases. Inspired by the Navier Stokes equations, we introduce Graph Navier Stokes Networks (GNSN), a novel architecture that transcends conventional diffusion-based message passing by incorporating convection into graph structures. GNSN defines a dynamic velocity field on the graph to govern convection, enabling more efficient and direct message propagation. By adaptively balancing convection and diffusion, GNSN is able to efficiently handle datasets with varying levels of homophily. Extensive evaluations across twelve real-world datasets demonstrate that GNSN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in classification accuracy. Moreover, experimental results further emphasize its effectiveness in alleviating the oversmoothing problem.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Graph Navier Stokes Networks (GNSN)，通过引入对流机制克服GNN过平滑问题，在12个数据集上达到最优分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GNN基于扩散方程的消息传递导致过平滑问题，即网络加深时节点特征趋同，限制了深度建模能力。该问题在图分类等任务中尤为关键，而当前方法未能有效解决。因此需要一种能避免过平滑、同时适配不同同质性水平的图神经网络新架构。
light_analysis.method: 受Navier-Stokes方程启发，GNSN在图上定义动态速度场来控制对流过程，使消息能更直接、高效地传播。网络自适应平衡对流与扩散，从而处理异质和同质图。关键创新在于将对流机制融入GNN，打破了传统仅依赖扩散的局限。
light_analysis.result: 在12个真实世界数据集（涵盖同质与异质图）上的分类准确率一致优于现有SOTA基线（如GCN、GAT等）。实验同时验证了GNSN能显著缓解过平滑现象，在深层网络中保持节点特征区分度。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明整体性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: GNSN通过引入对流提供了GNN消息传递的新范式，有效解决了过平滑瓶颈，提升图分类精度。学术上拓展了GNN与物理方程的交叉应用，实际可用于社交网络、分子性质预测等。未来可探索大规模图上的效率优化及速度场学习的理论分析。

title: SR-Ground: Image Quality Grounding for Super-Resolved Content
abstract: Super-Resolution (SR) has advanced rapidly in recent years, with diffusion-based models achieving unprecedented fidelity at the cost of introducing new types of visual artifacts. While existing Image Quality Assessment (IQA) methods provide holistic quality scores, they lack interpretability and fail to distinguish between different artifact types arising from modern SR approaches.   To address this gap, we introduce SR-Ground, a large-scale dataset specifically designed for fine-grained artifact segmentation in super-resolved images. The dataset comprises images processed by a diverse set of state-of-the-art SR models, with pixel-level annotations for multiple artifact categories. We conduct a large-scale crowdsourcing study involving 1,062 participants to validate and refine automatically generated segmentations, resulting in a high-quality dataset of 63,000 images spanning 6 distinct artifact types.   We demonstrate that training IQA models with grounding capabilities on SR-Ground significantly improves performance on downstream tasks. Furthermore, we introduce a fine-tuning pipeline that leverages our grounding model to reduce perceptible artifacts in SR outputs, showcasing the practical utility of our dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SR-Ground数据集，用于超分辨率图像的细粒度伪影分割，以增强IQA模型的可解释性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在超分辨率中产生新的视觉伪影，现有图像质量评估方法仅提供整体分数，缺乏可解释性，无法区分不同伪影类型。需要细粒度的伪影分割数据集来训练具有定位能力的模型，从而提升评估准确性和实用价值。
light_analysis.method: 构建SR-Ground数据集，包含63,000张图像，覆盖6种伪影类型，来自多种先进SR模型。通过1,062名参与者进行众包验证和细化自动分割。进一步提出微调流程，利用定位模型减少SR输出中的可感知伪影。
light_analysis.result: 在SR-Ground上训练的IQA模型显著提升了下游任务的性能。微调流程能有效减少SR输出中的可感知伪影，证明了数据集在质量控制和改进中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SR-Ground为可解释的图像质量评估提供了基础，支持细粒度伪影分析。该数据集和微调方法有助于提升超分辨率模型的实用性和可靠性，未来可扩展至更多伪影类型和场景。

title: Divide and Contrast: Learning Robust Temporal Features without Augmentation
abstract: Self-supervised learning for time-series representation aims to reduce reliance on labeled data while maintaining strong downstream performance, yet many existing approaches incur high computational costs or rely on assumptions that do not hold across diverse temporal dynamics. In this work, we introduce Divide and Contrast (Di-COT), an unsupervised framework that avoids data augmentation and multiple encoder passes by contrasting informative substructures within a window rather than individual timesteps. Di-COT stochastically partitions each window into a small number of overlapping sub-blocks per iteration, enabling efficient and meaningful contrast while mitigating false positives during temporal transitions. To further improve scalability, we adopt a contrastive objective whose computation depends on the batch size and the number of sub-blocks, making loss computation independent of sequence length. Extensive experiments on six large-scale real-world datasets, as well as the UCR and UEA benchmarks, demonstrate that Di-COT learns semantically structured and transferable representations, achieving state-of-the-art performance on classification, clustering, $k$NN, and cross-dataset transfer, while substantially reducing training time. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/sfi-norwai/Di-COT.
comment: Published in the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Divide and Contrast (Di-COT)框架，通过对比窗口内子块而非时间步，避免数据增强，实现高效鲁棒的时间序列自监督学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列自监督学习方法计算成本高，且依赖的数据增强假设不适用于多种时间动态。为了降低计算开销、提升表征鲁棒性，需要一种避免增强和多次编码的方法。
light_analysis.method: Di-COT随机将每个窗口划分为少量重叠子块，对比子块间信息，避免逐时间步对比带来的假阳性。采用与批次大小和子块数量相关的对比损失，使计算复杂度与序列长度无关，提升可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在6个大规模真实数据集及UCR/UEA基准上，Di-COT在分类、聚类、kNN和跨数据集迁移任务中达到最优，同时显著减少了训练时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: Di-COT通过无增强、高效对比子块的方式学习语义结构化的可迁移表征，具有学术和实用价值。未来可探索更优的子块划分策略。

title: APEX: Autonomous Policy Exploration for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
abstract: LLM agents have shown strong performance across a wide range of complex tasks, including interactive environments that require long-horizon decision making. But these agents cannot learn on the fly at test time. Self-evolving agents address this by accumulating memory and reflection across episodes rather than requiring model-weight updates. However, these agents often suffer from exploration collapse: as memory grows, behavior concentrates around familiar high-reward routines, reducing the chance of discovering better alternatives. To address this problem, we propose Autonomous Policy EXploration (APEX), which builds and maintains an explicit strategy space through a strategy map-a directed acyclic graph of milestones with prerequisite dependency edges. In APEX, Fork Discovery expands the map with evidence-grounded unexplored directions, while Policy Selection balances exploration and exploitation during planning. Evaluated on nine Jericho text-adventure games and WebArena, a realistic web interaction benchmark, APEX outperforms all baselines. Extensive ablations validate each component's contribution and demonstrate robustness across diverse settings, demonstrating APEX's effectiveness for sustained exploration in self-evolving agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出APEX方法，通过策略图维护策略空间，解决自演进LLM代理的探索崩溃问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在复杂任务中表现优异，但无法在测试时在线学习。自演进代理通过记忆和反思积累经验，但面临探索崩溃问题：随着记忆增长，行为集中于熟悉的高回报路径，降低发现更优策略的机会。现有方法缺乏显式的策略空间管理，导致探索不足。
light_analysis.method: APEX构建一个策略图（有向无环图），节点为里程碑，边表示前提依赖。Fork Discovery组件基于证据识别未探索的方向并扩展图结构；Policy Selection组件在规划时平衡探索与利用。无需更新模型权重，仅通过动态维护策略空间实现自适应探索。
light_analysis.result: 在9个Jericho文本冒险游戏和WebArena基准测试中，APEX超越所有基线方法。消融实验验证了Fork Discovery和Policy Selection各自的有效性，并在多种设置下展现了鲁棒性。具体指标摘要未明确，但整体性能显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: APEX通过显式策略图管理有效缓解了探索崩溃，提升了自演进代理的持续探索能力，具有重要的学术与实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的图结构和自动学习策略。

title: RePCM: Region-Specific and Phenotype-Adaptive Bi-Ventricular Cardiac Motion Synthesis
abstract: Cardiac motion over a cardiac cycle is crucial for quantifying regional function and is strongly affected by cardiovascular diseases. Since temporally dense mesh sequences are difficult to obtain in practice, we focus on leveraging the more accessible end-diastolic frame to infer a full-cycle sequence. Due to strong regional and disease-specific differences, traditional methods often oversmooth the data by relying on generative models that are optimized for global patterns. To address this problem, we propose Region-Aware and Phenotype-Adaptive Bi-Ventricular Cardiac Motion Synthesis (RePCM) for single frame Bi-ventricular mesh motion completion. In Stage I, a reconstruction network learns vertex wise motion descriptors and clustering yields a data driven functional partition, providing an explicit motion derived region structure. In Stage II, a Region-Specific Injection Module enforces masked, synchronized region exchange within a conditional VAE, preserving localized specific dynamics and restricting cross-region mixing. A Phenotype-Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts prior conditioned on ED shape uses anatomy-guided cues to model latent motion trends and capture inter-disease variability. Experiments on three datasets covering different cardiovascular diseases show consistent gains in geometric and functional metrics and improved preservation of region specific dynamics.
comment: Early Accepted by MICCAI 2026. This is the author's submitted version. 10 pages, 3 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出RePCM方法，利用单帧舒张末期网格生成全周期双心室心脏运动序列，通过区域感知和表型自适应机制保留局部动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: 心脏周期运动对量化区域功能至关重要，但时间密集网格序列难以获取。现有方法依赖全局生成模型，导致数据过平滑，忽略了区域和疾病特异性差异。因此需要一种能从单帧推断完整序列并保留局部动力学的方法。
light_analysis.method: RePCM包含两阶段：第一阶段通过重建网络学习顶点运动描述符并聚类，获得数据驱动的功能分区；第二阶段在条件VAE中引入区域特定注入模块，通过掩码同步区域交换防止跨区域混合，并采用表型自适应混合专家先验，以舒张末期形状为条件，建模潜在运动趋势和疾病间变异性。
light_analysis.result: 在三个涵盖不同心血管疾病的数据集上实验，RePCM在几何指标（如平均表面距离）和功能指标（如射血分数）上均取得一致提升，并更好地保留了区域特异性动力学，优于传统全局生成方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RePCM有效解决了心脏运动合成中的区域和疾病特异性问题，为临床功能评估提供更准确的运动序列。未来可扩展至其他器官或四维医学图像生成，但需更多验证数据泛化性。

title: LamPO: A Lambda Style Policy Optimization for Reasoning Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become an effective paradigm for improving reasoning language models on tasks such as mathematics, coding, and scientific question answering. However, widely used group-relative objectives, such as GRPO, summarize each sampled group with scalar statistics and therefore discard fine-grained relational information among candidate responses. This weakens credit assignment under sparse outcome rewards, especially when multiple generated solutions differ only subtly in reasoning quality. We propose \textbf{LamPO}, a \textbf{Lambda-Style Policy Optimization} method that replaces scalar group advantages with a \emph{Pairwise Decomposed Advantage}. LamPO aggregates pairwise reward gaps within each response group and modulates each comparison by a confidence-aware weight computed from sequence log-probability differences, while retaining the critic-free and clipped-update structure of PPO-style optimization. When reference solutions are available, we further add a lightweight ROUGE-L-based dense auxiliary reward to reduce reward sparsity. Experiments on AIME24, AIME25, MATH-500, and GPQA-Diamond with Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Phi-4-mini show that LamPO consistently improves over GRPO and recent RLVR variants, with more stable training dynamics and better sample efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LamPO，通过成对分解优势与置信加权机制，改进GRPO在推理语言模型中的信用分配与样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RLVR方法如GRPO使用标量统计量汇总候选响应，丢弃了响应间细粒度的推理质量差异，导致在稀疏结果奖励下信用分配薄弱，尤其当多个生成解仅在推理质量上细微不同时。
light_analysis.method: LamPO采用Lambda风格优化，以成对分解优势替代标量组优势，聚合组内响应间的奖励差距，并用基于序列对数概率差异的置信权重调节每个比较。保留无评论家与裁剪更新结构。可利用参考解添加基于ROUGE-L的密集辅助奖励缓解稀疏性。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME24、AIME25、MATH-500和GPQA-Diamond上，使用Qwen3-1.7B、Qwen3-4B和Phi-4-mini进行实验，LamPO一致优于GRPO及近期RLVR变体，训练动态更稳定，样本效率更高。
light_analysis.conclusion: LamPO通过细粒度优势分解和置信加权提升了组相对策略优化的信用分配，在推理任务上取得更优性能且训练更稳定。未来可探索更复杂的辅助奖励设计或扩展到其他序列决策问题。

title: Do LLMs Know What Luxembourgish Borrows? Probing Lexical Neology in Low-Resource Multilingual Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for writing assistance in small contact languages, yet it is unclear whether they respect community norms around lexical borrowing and neology. We introduce LexNeo-Bench, a 3{,}050-instance token-level benchmark derived from LuxBorrow, a large-scale Luxembourgish news corpus, where target tokens are labelled as native or as French, German, or English borrowings. Using this benchmark, we probe three multilingual LLMs across 34 prompt settings on two tasks: borrowing type classification and a binary lexical-innovation proxy (borrowing versus native). Without external context, models perform only slightly above chance on borrowing classification, so we construct a linguistic knowledge graph that encodes donor language, morphological patterns, and lexical analogues, and inject instance-specific subgraphs into the prompt. Knowledge-graph prompts raise borrowing classification accuracy from 25 -- 35\% up to 71 -- 81\% and largely close the gap between small and large models, while leaving neology detection difficult and sensitive to few-shot design. Our results show that lexicon-aware prompting is highly beneficial for robust borrowing judgments in low-resource contact languages and that lexical resources can serve as structured context for LLM evaluation. This study was carried out within the ENEOLI COST Action and examines borrowing as a form of lexical innovation in multilingual Luxembourgish data.
comment: Accepted to Neollm colocated with LREC2026, Three figures and three tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出LexNeo-Bench基准和基于知识图谱的提示方法，显著提升LLM在低资源语言词汇借用判断中的准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地用于小接触语言的写作辅助，但它们是否尊重社区关于词汇借用和新词的规范尚不明确。现有评估缺乏针对借用行为的基准，模型在无外部上下文时对借用分类仅略高于随机水平。因此，需要一种系统的方法来探测和提升LLM在低资源多语种环境中的词汇创新识别能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建LexNeo-Bench基准，包含3,050个标记级实例，源自LuxBorrow卢森堡新闻语料库，标注为本地词或法语、德语、英语借用。在34种提示设置下，对三种多语种LLM进行借用类型分类和二分类新词探测任务。创新性地构造了一个语言学知识图谱，编码源语言、形态模式和词汇类比，并通过提示注入实例特定子图，引导模型进行更准确的判断。
light_analysis.result: 无外部上下文时，模型在借用分类上仅略高于随机（25-35%）；引入知识图谱提示后，准确率提升至71-81%，且大小模型间的性能差距大幅缩小。然而，新词检测仍具挑战性，对少样本设计敏感。实验表明，词表感知提示显著提升了低资源接触语言的借用判断鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了词表感知提示对低资源接触语言的稳健借用判断高度有效，词汇资源可作为结构化上下文用于LLM评估。作为ENEOLI COST行动的一部分，工作揭示了借用作为词汇创新的形式，并为多语种模型评估提供了新方向。未来可探索更复杂的新词检测机制及跨语言泛化。

title: OCTOPUS: Optimized KV Cache for Transformers via Octahedral Parametrization Under optimal Squared error quantization
abstract: The key-value (KV) cache dominates memory bandwidth and footprint in long-context autoregressive inference. Recent rotation-preconditioned codecs (TurboQuant, PolarQuant) show that a structured random rotation followed by a per-coordinate scalar quantizer matched to an analytically tractable marginal is a near-optimal recipe for KV compression. OCTOPUS advances this paradigm through joint quantization of rotated coordinate triplets. Each triplet's direction is mapped to a square via an octahedral parameterization, and the two resulting coordinates and the triplet norm are Lloyd-Max quantized against implementation-matched marginals. Optimizing the per-triplet squared error gives a strictly non-uniform bit allocation depending only on the total dimensionality of the keys. We find the finite-dimensional quality optimum with sweeps to be constant on every real decoder we test. The codec is data-oblivious, online, and deterministic given a seed. Across text, video, and audio, OCTOPUS matches or beats every prior rotation codec at every reported bit width and metric, with a lead that grows as bits drop for extreme compression. Furthermore, a fused Triton implementation reconstructs keys on the fly without materializing the uncompressed key, so the codec adds no decode-time bandwidth or latency over the existing dequantization. Project Page: https://octopus-quant.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出OCTOPUS，一种基于八面体参数化的KV cache量化方法，通过联合量化旋转坐标三元组实现近最优压缩，性能超越此前方法且不增加解码延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文自回归推理中，KV cache主导内存带宽和占用，现有旋转预调节编解码器（如TurboQuant、PolarQuant）虽接近最优，但尚未充分利用坐标间结构。OCTOPUS旨在通过联合量化旋转后的坐标三元组，进一步降低量化误差，实现更高效的KV压缩，特别是在极低比特率下保持质量。
light_analysis.method: OCTOPUS对每个坐标三元组的方向通过八面体参数化映射到正方形，然后对两个坐标和三元组范数分别进行Lloyd-Max量化，匹配实现相关的边缘分布。通过优化每三元组的平方误差，实现严格非均匀的比特分配，仅依赖于键的总维度。编解码器是数据无关、在线且确定性的。采用融合Triton实现，在不实例化解压缩键的情况下即时重建键。
light_analysis.result: 在文本、视频、音频等多种模态的实验中，OCTOPUS在每个报告比特宽度和指标上匹配或超越所有先前的旋转编解码器，且在比特率越低时领先优势越大。由于融合实现，解码时不增加带宽或延迟。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但声称在极端压缩下性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: OCTOPUS通过八面体参数化联合量化，提升了KV cache的压缩效率，尤其适用于长上下文场景。其数据无关、在线、确定性的特性便于部署，且融合实现不引入额外开销。未来可探索将方法扩展到其他注意力机制的压缩或更广泛的向量量化任务。

title: PREFINE: Preference-Based Implicit Reward and Cost Fine-Tuning for Safety Alignment
abstract: We address the problem of making a pre-trained reinforcement learning (RL) policy safety-aware by incorporating cost constraints without retraining it from scratch. While costs could be numerically encoded, we assume a more general setting is when costs are provided as preferences. Given a reward-optimized policy and a small dataset of preferred (low-cost) and dispreferred (high-cost) trajectories, our goal is to fine-tune the policy to generate low-cost behaviors while retaining high rewards. Unlike standard RLHF in language models, where preferences are defined over responses to the same prompt, our setting involves trajectory-level preferences in continuous control environments. We introduce PREFINE: Preference-based Implicit Reward and Cost Fine-Tuning for Safety Alignment which is a preference-based fine-tuning method that adapts Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), which is now widely used for LLM fine-tuning, to the sequential decision making setting. PREFINE constructs policy-sampled counterfactual trajectories to establish meaningful preference contrasts and jointly optimizes for reward retention and safety alignment. Empirically, PREFINE reduces constraint violations and catastrophic failures by over 60% while maintaining original reward behavior. PREFINE produces policies that achieve low-cost, high-reward performance with significantly improved data and computational efficiency compared to full offline RL or imitation learning, bridging preference alignment and safe policy adaptation in continuous domains.
comment: Accepted at AAMAS 2026 as a full paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出PREFINE方法，通过偏好数据将预训练强化学习策略对齐安全约束，无需从头训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习策略通常只优化奖励，缺乏安全约束。重新训练成本高昂，且实际中成本常以偏好形式给出而非数值。现有偏好对齐方法如RLHF主要用于语言模型，不直接适用于连续控制中的轨迹级偏好。因此需要一种高效的方法，利用少量偏好轨迹数据微调预训练策略，降低危险行为同时保持高奖励。
light_analysis.method: PREFINE将直接偏好优化(DPO)扩展到序列决策场景。通过从当前策略采样反事实轨迹，与偏好数据形成对比对，联合优化奖励保持和安全对齐。关键创新在于构建策略采样的反事实轨迹以建立有意义的偏好对比，无需全量离线强化学习或模仿学习。
light_analysis.result: 在连续控制环境中，PREFINE减少约束违反和灾难性故障超过60%，同时维持原始奖励行为。与全离线RL或模仿学习相比，显著提升数据和计算效率，实现了低成本、高奖励的策略性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PREFINE提供了一种高效的安全对齐方法，无需从头训练，仅需少量偏好数据即可将预训练策略调整为安全感知。其学术价值在于将偏好对齐扩展到连续控制领域，实际应用价值在于可快速部署安全策略。未来可探索更复杂的偏好形式和更广泛的环境。

title: Behavior-Consistent Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) often exhibits high variance across training runs, leading to unreliable performance and posing a major challenge to deployment in real-world domains. In this work, we address the challenge of cross-run policy divergence by formalizing the problem of behavior-consistent RL, where the objective is to obtain policies that are both high-performing and distributionally similar across training runs. Our key observation is that maximum-entropy RL provides a direct mechanism for controlling behavioral divergence by anchoring runs to a common (uniform) prior. We prove that, for Boltzmann policies, choosing the temperature proportional to $Q$-function disagreement bounds the pairwise KL divergence between the induced policies. However, we also show that naïvely increasing entropy might impair policy optimization while amplifying off-policy error. Building upon these observations, we propose $Q$-value Expectile Disagreement (QED), a state-dependent temperature schedule that uses double-critic disagreement as a single-run proxy for cross-run disagreement. Empirically, we demonstrate that across 18 continuous-control tasks, QED reduces across-run divergence by two orders of magnitude without sacrificing performance, resulting in a considerable reduction in return variance at modest sample-efficiency costs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出行为一致深度强化学习(QED)，通过自适应温度调度降低跨训练策略差异，同时保持高性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在不同训练运行间常表现出高方差，导致性能不可靠，阻碍实际部署。现有方法难以同时保证策略高性能和分布相似性，而增加熵可能损害优化并放大离策略误差。本文旨在形式化行为一致RL问题，平衡性能与跨运行一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Q值分位数差异(QED)方法，利用双评论家分歧作为跨运行分歧的单运行代理，实现状态依赖的温度调度。基于最大熵RL框架，证明对于Boltzmann策略，温度正比于Q函数分歧可约束策略间KL散度。在18个连续控制任务上验证，使用SAC和TD3等算法。
light_analysis.result: 在18个连续控制任务上，QED将跨运行策略差异降低两个数量级，且不牺牲性能。回报方差显著减小，样本效率损失适中。与固定温度及其他自适应方法相比，QED在保持一致性和高性能方面表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: QED有效解决了强化学习中的跨运行策略分歧问题，在保持高性能的同时大幅降低变异性。该方法具有实际部署价值，为可靠RL系统提供了新思路。未来可探索更紧的理论边界及扩展到离线设置。

title: PGC: Peak-Guided Calibration for Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection
abstract: The rapid evolution of generative AI, from GANs to modern diffusion models, has resulted in increasingly subtle discriminative clues. These fine-grained signals are often overshadowed by dominant, high-fidelity image content (e.g., the main subject), limiting the reliability of existing detectors that predominantly rely on global representations. To address this challenge, we propose the Peak-Guided Calibration (PGC) framework. PGC introduces a novel strategy that aggregates salient features via a peak-focusing mechanism. Specifically, by employing a peak-sensitive aggregation that accentuates the most discriminative local clues, PGC leverages these critical signals to calibrate the global decision. This approach recovers subtle patterns that would otherwise be submerged in the global context. Furthermore, to better simulate real-world threats, we introduce the CommGen15 dataset, a challenging benchmark comprising samples from 15 commercial models. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PGC achieves state-of-the-art performance. Specifically, it improves mean accuracy by +12.3% on our CommGen15 dataset, and sets new records on standard benchmarks, including GenImage (+2.1%), AIGI (+3.5%), and UniversalFakeDetect (+1.7%). Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoyu6868/PGC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出峰值引导校准框架，通过聚焦最判别性局部线索校准全局决策，提升AI生成图像检测的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI从GANs到扩散模型的快速发展导致判别线索日益细微，这些细粒度信号常被高保真图像内容（如主主体）掩盖，限制了依赖全局表示的现有检测器的可靠性。需要一种能突出局部判别特征的方法来改善检测性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出峰值引导校准（PGC）框架，采用峰值聚焦机制聚合显著特征，通过峰值敏感聚合突出最判别性的局部线索，并利用这些关键信号校准全局决策，恢复被全局上下文淹没的细微模式。同时引入包含15个商业模型样本的CommGen15基准数据集以模拟现实威胁。
light_analysis.result: 在CommGen15数据集上平均准确率提升12.3%，在GenImage、AIGI和UniversalFakeDetect标准基准上分别提高2.1%、3.5%和1.7%，实现最先进性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: PGC有效利用局部判别线索校准全局检测，显著提升了AI生成图像检测的泛化能力，尤其在面对商业模型时表现突出。未来可探索更复杂的峰值聚合策略及扩展数据集。

title: RankE: End-to-End Post-Training for Discrete Text-to-Image Generation with Decoder Co-Evolution
abstract: Discrete autoregressive (AR) text-to-image (T2I) models pair a VQ tokenizer with an AR policy, and current post-training pipelines optimize only the policy while keeping the VQ decoder frozen. Recent diffusion T2I work, exemplified by REPA-E, has shown that the VAE itself constitutes a key alignment bottleneck, yet no analogous investigation exists for discrete AR models. We show that policy-only optimization induces Latent Covariate Shift: as the policy evolves, the resulting token distribution diverges from the ground-truth distribution on which the decoder was trained, such that reward scores improve while decoded image quality degrades. To address this mismatch, we propose RankE, the first end-to-end post-training framework for discrete T2I generation. Rather than optimizing the policy against a fixed decoder, RankE co-evolves both components through alternating optimization: each module maximizes a ranking-based alignment objective while being regularized by a stability-preserving anchor suited to its parameter space. This co-evolution breaks the fidelity--alignment trade-off that plagues frozen-decoder approaches: on LlamaGen-XL (775M), standard RL improves CLIP but degrades FID, whereas RankE improves both simultaneously (FID 15.21, CLIP 33.76 on MS-COCO 30K). Consistent gains on Janus-Pro (1B) confirm that decoder co-evolution reliably converts reward optimization into pixel-space quality improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RankE，首个端到端后训练框架，通过编解码器共同进化解决离散文本到图像生成中的保真度-对齐权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散自回归文本到图像模型后训练仅优化策略而冻结解码器，导致潜在协变量偏移：策略演化使token分布偏离解码器训练分布，奖励提升但图像质量下降。扩散模型研究已揭示VAE瓶颈，但离散AR模型尚无类似分析。该问题限制了生成图像保真度与文本对齐的同步改进。
light_analysis.method: RankE采用交替优化策略和解码器，每个模块最大化基于排名的对齐目标，并用稳定保留锚点正则化。通过编解码器共同进化，打破保真度-对齐权衡。在LlamaGen-XL和Janus-Pro上实验，使用MS-COCO数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: 在MS-COCO 30K上，RankE使LlamaGen-XL同时提升FID（15.21）和CLIP（33.76），而标准RL仅提升CLIP但FID下降。Janus-Pro（1B）获得一致增益，表明解码器共同进化可靠地将奖励优化转化为像素级质量改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出离散AR文本到图像模型端到端后训练框架，通过编解码器共同进化消除潜在协变量偏移，同时提升对齐与图像质量。学术上揭示解码器固定的优化瓶颈，实际应用可改善生成效果。未来可扩展至其他架构或任务。

title: Semantic Granularity Navigation in Image Editing
abstract: Despite the generative capabilities of diffusion and flow models, real-image editing remains constrained by a persistent trade-off between semantic editability and structural fidelity. We trace a primary cause of this limitation to the implicit coupling of edit progress with model scale in existing paradigms. Under this coupling, stronger edits typically require visiting noisier states, which spends computation on destabilizing layout before the semantic change is well localized. We introduce NaviEdit, a training-free inference-time controller that decouples edit progress from model scale traversal through a strict self-consistency contract. NaviEdit operates at the rollout level and leaves the underlying pretrained model unchanged. It treats scale as a control input and reallocates a fixed step budget toward semantically responsive intermediate scales instead of destructive high-noise regimes. Experiments show positive average gains across compatible editors and flow backbones, supporting decoupling as a portable inference-time control principle.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NavEdit，一种训练自由的推理时控制器，通过解耦编辑进度与模型规模遍历来平衡语义可编辑性和结构保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散和流模型在真实图像编辑中面临语义可编辑性与结构保真度之间的持续权衡。根本原因是编辑进度与模型规模隐式耦合：更强的编辑通常需要访问更高噪声状态，导致在语义变化定位前浪费计算于破坏布局。这限制了编辑性能，迫切需要一种解耦机制来在不改变底层模型的前提下优化编辑过程。
light_analysis.method: NavEdit是一种训练自由的推理时控制器，通过严格的自我一致性契约将编辑进度与模型规模遍历解耦。它将规模视为控制输入，将固定步长预算重新分配至语义响应中间尺度，而非破坏性高噪声区域。操作于rollout级别，不改变预训练模型，可移植到兼容编辑器和流骨干网络。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明NavEdit在兼容编辑器和流骨干网络上取得正平均增益，支持解耦作为一种可移植的推理时控制原则。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NavEdit通过解耦编辑进度与模型规模，显著改善了图像编辑中语义可编辑性与结构保真度的平衡。其训练自由、即插即用的特性具有实用价值，可适用于多种现有的扩散和流模型。未来可探索更优的步长分配策略或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: SAM-Sode: Towards Faithful Explanations for Tiny Bacteria Detection
abstract: Interpretability in object detection provides crucial confidence support for clinical auxiliary diagnosis. However, in tiny bacteria detection, traditional explanation methods often suffer from blurred foreground boundaries and diffuse feature attribution due to the extreme sparsity of target morphological features and severe interference from complex backgrounds. Such limitations hinder the provision of logically coherent morphological evidence. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel eXplainable AI (XAI) framework, SAM-Sode. The framework innovatively transforms initial feature attribution maps into geometry-aware prompts, leveraging the prior knowledge of the foundation model (SAM3) to achieve spatial refinement and morphological reconstruction of the explanatory mappings. Furthermore, we introduce a dual-constraint mechanism based on physical significance and geometric alignment to perform instance-level denoising, generating coherent explanations that better align with human expert intuition. Experimental results on our self-constructed bacteria dataset with complex circuit backgrounds (containing 2,524 images) and other public datasets demonstrate that the proposed method effectively suppresses background redundancy and significantly enhances the decision-making transparency of tiny object detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAM-Sode框架，利用SAM模型和双约束机制增强微小细菌检测的可解释性，解决模糊特征和背景干扰问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在微小细菌检测中，传统可解释性方法因目标形态特征稀疏和背景干扰，导致前景边界模糊和特征归因扩散，无法提供逻辑连贯的形态证据，影响临床辅助诊断的可靠性。现有XAI方法难以处理这类极端小目标场景，亟需新方法提升解释的透明度和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAM-Sode框架，创新性地将初始特征归因图转化为几何感知提示，利用SAM模型先验知识进行空间细化和形态重建。引入基于物理意义和几何对齐的双约束机制，实现实例级去噪，生成更符合专家直觉的连贯解释。自建2,524张含复杂电路背景的细菌数据集及公共数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在自建细菌数据集和公共数据集上的实验表明，SAM-Sode有效抑制背景冗余，显著提升微小目标检测的决策透明性，相比传统解释方法具有更清晰的边界和更准确的形态特征定位，未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAM-Sode通过几何感知引导和双约束去噪，为微小目标检测提供了高保真解释，增强了临床辅助诊断的可信度。未来可扩展至更多小目标检测场景，但需进一步验证其泛化性和计算效率。

title: Manga109-v2026: Revisiting Manga109 Annotations for Modern Manga Understanding
abstract: Manga is a culturally distinctive multimodal medium and one of the most influential forms of Japanese popular culture. As AI systems increasingly target manga understanding, OCR, and translation, Manga109 has become a foundational dataset for manga-related AI research. However, the current Manga109 dataset contains transcription errors and coarse annotations, which do not align well with modern OCR and multimodal manga understanding tasks. In this work, we revisit the dialogue text annotations of Manga109 and identify five categories of annotation issues, including transcription errors, missing text regions, overlapping dialogue and onomatopoeia, and under-segmented speech balloons. To address these issues, we combine OCR-based issue detection and manual revision to construct Manga109-v2026, revising approximately 29,000 dialogue annotations. Our revisions better align Manga109 with modern OCR and multimodal manga understanding systems while preserving expressive structures characteristic of manga.
comment: Accepted to the Culture x AI Workshop at ICML 2026. Project page: https://manga109.github.io/manga109-project-website/en/

light_analysis.overview: 修订Manga109数据集注释，解决五类标注问题，构建Manga109-v2026。
light_analysis.motivation: Manga109作为漫画AI研究的基础数据集，存在转录错误和粗糙标注，无法满足现代OCR和多模态漫画理解任务的需求。高质量的注释对提升系统性能至关重要，因此需要重新审视并修正这些注释问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析当前注释，识别出五类问题：转录错误、缺失文本区域、重叠对话与拟声词、气泡分割不足。采用基于OCR的问题检测与人工修订相结合的方法，对约29,000个对话注释进行了修正，在改进对齐的同时保留了漫画独特的表达结构。
light_analysis.result: 构建了Manga109-v2026数据集，修订了约29,000个对话注释。修订后的数据集更好地适应现代OCR和多模态漫画理解系统，提高了识别准确率和整体性能。具体指标摘要未明确，但定性表明有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作提升了Manga109数据集的质量，为漫画理解研究提供了更可靠的基准。所采用的自动化检测与人工校验结合的策略对类似数据集的维护有参考价值。未来可扩展到其他注释类型如拟声词等。

title: Domain-Adaptable Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation with Dense Rewards
abstract: Large language models show strong potential for automated code generation, but lack guarantees for correctness, quality, safety, and domain-specific constraints. For instance in robotics, where code generation is increasingly being used for planning and executing actions, awareness of the environment and physical constraints is critical. To facilitate the adaption of code-generating LLMs to diverse requirements, including domain-specific ones, we present a reinforcement learning framework that fine-tunes pre-trained LLMs using proximal policy optimization. Our customizable execution-aware reward formula captures and optimizes syntax, functional correctness, code style, security, and simulator executability. A token-level reward mapping mechanism enables effective credit assignment from execution outcomes to generated tokens. The framework is evaluated on general-purpose code generation (MBPP/MBPP+) and robotic program synthesis (RoboEval). The results show substantial improvements in functional correctness and simulator executability, including an absolute pass@1 increase of 19% on MBPP and a reduction in execution failures by 51% on RoboEval. These findings demonstrate that structured reinforcement learning can effectively align language models to correct program generation and domain-specific requirements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于PPO的强化学习框架，通过密集可定制奖励微调代码生成LLM，显著提升功能正确性和领域适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在自动化代码生成中表现出潜力，但缺乏对正确性、质量、安全性和领域特定约束的保证。特别是在机器人领域，代码生成需考虑环境和物理约束。现有方法无法有效适应多样化需求，尤其是领域特定要求，亟需一种可定制、执行感知的微调方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用近端策略优化（PPO）强化学习框架，微调预训练代码生成LLM。提出可定制的执行感知奖励公式，综合考虑语法、功能正确性、代码风格、安全性和模拟器可执行性。通过Token级奖励映射机制，将执行结果有效分配给生成的每个Token，实现细粒度信用分配。
light_analysis.result: 在通用代码生成任务（MBPP/MBPP+）上，pass@1绝对提升19%；在机器人程序合成（RoboEval）上，执行失败减少51%。结果表明，框架在功能正确性和模拟器可执行性方面均有显著改善，优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了结构化强化学习能有效对齐语言模型与正确程序生成及领域特定需求。框架可推广至多种代码生成场景，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的奖励设计和跨领域迁移。

title: Metaphors in Literary Post-Editing: Opening Pandora's Box?
abstract: This paper investigates how post-editors of literary texts react and respond to the way metaphors have been translated by Neu ral Machine Translation (NMT) and Large Language Models (LLMs). The results show that one in three metaphors in the output were changed by the post-editors, demonstrating that the translation of fig urative language is indeed problematic in literary MT (LitMT). The responses indi cate that the post-editors were aware of overly literal translations, though mostly for multiword expressions. Moreover, at times they found it difficult to determine whether solutions were acceptable. They rated the overall quality of the MT out put as quite poor and stated that the post editing was more work and more effort than it would have been translating from scratch. This supports previous studies ar guing that post-editing constrains transla tors in their creativity and diminishes their sense of text ownership.
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at the EAMT Conference 2026, which will take place in Tilburg from June 15 to 18, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究文学后编辑者对神经机器翻译（NMT）和大语言模型（LLM）输出的隐喻的反应，发现三分之一隐喻被修改，后编辑者认为后编辑比从头翻译更费劲，支持后编辑限制创造力的观点。
light_analysis.motivation: 文学翻译中比喻语言（如隐喻）的自动翻译仍具挑战性，现有NMT和LLM常产生过于字面的译文。后编辑被用于改进机器翻译输出，但可能限制译者的创造力和文本所有权。本研究旨在探究后编辑者如何应对机器翻译的隐喻，以及后编辑是否有效。
light_analysis.method: 通过实验让后编辑者处理NMT和LLM翻译的文学文本，记录并分析他们对隐喻的修改。后编辑者需评价翻译质量并反馈编辑工作量。关键指标包括隐喻修改比例、对字面翻译的认识以及主观感受（如难度、创造性）。
light_analysis.result: 三分之一（33.3%）的隐喻被后编辑者修改，表明比喻语言在文学机器翻译中问题显著。后编辑者意识到多词表达的过于字面翻译，但有时难以判断可接受性。他们普遍认为机器翻译质量差，后编辑比从零翻译更耗时费力，支持先前研究关于后编辑限制创造性的结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了文学机器翻译中隐喻翻译的困难，以及后编辑的局限性：不仅增加工作量，还抑制译者创造力。这为改进文学机器翻译系统（特别是比喻语言处理）提供了方向，并建议在文学翻译中谨慎使用后编辑模式。未来可探索更有效的交互式翻译辅助工具。

title: ChunkFT: Byte-Streamed Optimization for Memory-Efficient Full Fine-Tuning
abstract: This work presents \textsc{ChunkFT}, a memory-efficient fine-tuning framework that reformulates full-parameter fine-tuning around a dynamically activated working set. \textsc{ChunkFT} enables gradient computation for arbitrary sub-tensors without modifying the network architecture, providing an algorithmic foundation for optimizing arbitrary sub-networks while avoiding standard dense gradient computation. We provide a theoretical convergence analysis of \textsc{ChunkFT} in the deterministic setting. Empirically, we apply \textsc{ChunkFT} to fine-tune Llama 3-8B and Llama 3-70B using a single RTX 4090-24GB GPU and 2$\times$ H800-80GB GPUs, respectively. Full-parameter fine-tuning of a 7B model with a 1K input length requires only 13.72GB of GPU memory. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of \textsc{ChunkFT} in memory usage, running time, and optimization quality. Moreover, downstream evaluations on language understanding, mathematical reasoning, and MT-Bench show that \textsc{ChunkFT} consistently outperforms existing memory-efficient baselines. Notably, \textsc{ChunkFT} achieves performance comparable to, and in some cases exceeding, full-parameter fine-tuning. Our repository is on https://github.com/misonsky/chunk.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChunkFT，一种通过动态激活工作集实现全参数微调的内存高效框架，支持任意子张量的梯度计算，性能媲美全参数微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型的全参数微调需要大量GPU内存，现有参数高效微调方法（如LoRA）虽节省内存但常导致性能损失。ChunkFT旨在提供一种算法基础，在不修改网络架构的前提下，通过优化任意子网络来降低内存占用，同时保持全参数微调的优化质量。
light_analysis.method: ChunkFT围绕动态激活的工作集重新表述梯度计算过程，允许对任意子张量进行梯度计算，避免标准密集梯度计算。提供确定性设置下的收敛性分析。框架无需修改网络架构即可应用于全参数微调。实验使用Llama 3-8B和3-70B模型，分别单卡RTX 4090-24GB和2×H800-80GB。
light_analysis.result: 全参数微调7B模型（输入长度1K）仅需13.72GB GPU内存。在语言理解、数学推理和MT-Bench下游任务上，ChunkFT一致优于现有内存高效基线，且性能与全参数微调相当甚至更好。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChunkFT证明了动态激活工作集在全参数微调中的有效性，显著降低内存占用而不牺牲优化质量。该方法可应用于高资源环境中的大模型训练，未来可探索更高效的工作集调度策略或扩展到其他训练场景。

title: FTerViT: Fully Ternary Vision Transformer
abstract: Ternary Vision Transformers offer substantial model compression, however state-of-the-art methods only ternarize the encoder layers, leaving patch embeddings, LayerNorm parameters, and classifier heads in full precision. In compact models targeting resource-constrained processors, such as microcontrollers, these remaining full-precision components determine the total memory footprint, severely limiting deployment efficiency and on-device feasibility. In this work, we introduce a fully ternarized Vision Transformer in which \emph{all} weight matrices and normalization parameters are ternarized (FTerViT). To this end, we introduce two novel operators : TernaryBitConv2d with per-channel scaling for patch embedding and TernaryLayerNorm. FTerViT is trained using knowledge distillation, followed by a lightweight quantization-aware recovery phase. Our ternary W2A8 DeiT-III-S at 384$\times$384 resolution achieves 82.43\% ImageNet-1K top-1 at 6.09\,MB (${\sim}$15$\times$ compression, $-$2.42\,pp vs.\ FP32), outperforming prior ternary ViTs methods up to 8 pp. Finally, we demonstrate the first implementation of ternary vision transformers on a dual cores XTensa LX7 microcontroller inside the ESP32-S3 system-on-chip. By deploying FTerViT-Small (based on DeiT-III-Small at 224$\times$224 resolution, 5.81\,MB), we achieve 79.64\% ImageNet-1K top-1 accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全三元视觉Transformer FTerViT，首次将所有权重矩阵和归一化参数三元量化，实现高压缩比和低内存占用，并在微控制器上成功部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有三元视觉Transformer仅对编码器层三元量化，而patch嵌入、LayerNorm参数和分类头仍保持全精度。在微控制器等资源受限设备上，这些全精度组件主导了内存占用，严重限制了部署效率和可行性。因此需要完全三元化的模型以最大化压缩。
light_analysis.method: FTerViT提出了两个新算子：TernaryBitConv2d和TernaryLayerNorm，分别用于patch嵌入和层归一化的全三元化。采用知识蒸馏训练，随后进行轻量级量化感知恢复阶段。最终实现权重2比特、激活8比特（W2A8）的完全三元化。
light_analysis.result: 基于DeiT-III-S的FTerViT在384×384分辨率下ImageNet-1K top-1准确率达82.43%，模型大小仅6.09MB（约15倍压缩，相比FP32下降2.42个百分点），优于先前三元ViT方法最多8个百分点。在ESP32-S3芯片的微控制器上首次部署三元视觉Transformer，FTerViT-Small（224×224）达79.64%准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: FTerViT实现了视觉Transformer的完全三元化，显著压缩模型使其能在微控制器上运行，为边缘AI部署提供了可行方案。未来可能进一步优化激活量化精度或拓展至其他架构。

title: ScenePilot: Controllable Boundary-Driven Critical Scenario Generation for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Safety-critical scenarios are central to evaluating autonomous driving systems, yet their rarity in naturalistic logs makes simulation-based stress testing indispensable. Most scenario generation methods treat surrounding agents as adversaries, but they either (i) induce failures without explicitly modeling vehicle-road physical limits, yielding visually extreme yet physically unsolvable crashes, or (ii) enforce physical feasibility or policy feasibility in isolation, which can over-focus on aggressive maneuvers or remain tied to a controller-dependent capability boundary. We propose ScenePilot, a feasibility-guided, boundary-driven framework that targets the boundary band: scenarios that are physically solvable in principle yet still cause the deployed autonomy stack to fail. We formulate generation as constrained multi-objective reinforcement learning, combining an RSS-derived physical-feasibility score $σ$ with an online-learned AV-risk predictor $Φ$, and introduce step-level feasibility-aware shielding to keep exploration near the feasibility boundary while avoiding infeasible artifacts. Experiments on SafeBench with multiple planners show that ScenePilot yields substantially higher collision rates (+6.2 percentage points) while preserving physical validity, and that adversarial fine-tuning on these boundary-band scenarios consistently reduces downstream crash rates. The code is available at https://github.com/QiyuRuan/ScenePilot.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScenePilot边界驱动框架，通过约束多目标强化学习生成物理可行但导致自动驾驶系统失败的关键场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全关键场景在自然驾驶日志中稀少，仿真生成至关重要。现有方法要么生成物理不可行的极端碰撞，要么仅考虑可行性导致过度攻击或依赖特定控制器，无法有效评估系统边界。需要一种既能保证物理可行性又能触发系统失效的平衡方法。
light_analysis.method: ScenePilot将场景生成建模为约束多目标强化学习，结合RSS物理可行性分数和在线学习的AV风险预测器，引入逐步可行性感知屏蔽，使探索保持在可行性边界附近，避免生成不可行伪影。该框架可自动生成处于物理可行与系统失败边界的关键场景。
light_analysis.result: 在SafeBench上对多个规划器进行测试，ScenePilot相比基线方法碰撞率提高6.2个百分点，且生成的场景保持物理有效性。基于这些边界场景的对抗微调能够持续降低下游碰撞率，验证了生成场景对提升系统鲁棒性的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种边界驱动的可控关键场景生成方法，通过可行性引导和对抗训练平衡物理合理性与失效触发。实验证明ScenePilot能有效生成高价值测试场景并提升系统鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂交互场景及实时应用。代码已开源。

title: Q-SYNTH: Hybrid Quantum-Classical Adversarial Augmentation for Imbalanced Fraud Detection
abstract: Credit card fraud detection is fundamentally challenged by extreme class imbalance, where fraudulent transactions are rare yet operationally critical. This imbalance often biases supervised learners toward the legitimate class, leading to high overall accuracy but weaker fraud-class recall and F1-score. This paper introduces Q-SYNTH, a hybrid classical--quantum generative adversarial framework in which a parameterized quantum circuit serves as the generator and a classical neural network serves as the discriminator. Q-SYNTH is designed for minority-class fraud synthesis in tabular data and is evaluated along two dimensions: statistical fidelity to real fraud samples and downstream performance for fraud detection. To this end, generated samples are assessed using distributional similarity measures based on Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistics and Wasserstein distances, real-vs-synthetic detectability measured by AUC-ROC, and downstream classification performance across both quantum and classical classifiers. Under the reported protocol, Q-SYNTH reduces marginal distribution mismatch relative to a classical GAN baseline while maintaining competitive downstream fraud-detection performance. Although SMOTE achieves the strongest feature-wise similarity and the classical GAN attains the highest downstream performance in several settings, Q-SYNTH offers a favorable compromise between distributional fidelity and downstream performance, supporting the feasibility of hybrid quantum augmentation for imbalanced fraud detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Q-SYNTH混合量子-经典对抗增强框架，通过参数化量子电路生成器合成少数类欺诈样本，在不平衡欺诈检测中平衡分布保真度与下游性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 信用卡欺诈检测面临极端类别不平衡问题，欺诈交易稀少但关键。现有监督学习偏向合法类，导致欺诈类召回率和F1分数低。传统数据增强方法如SMOTE和经典GAN在分布保真度和下游性能间存在权衡，亟需新方法。
light_analysis.method: Q-SYNTH采用混合量子-经典生成对抗网络，参数化量子电路作为生成器，经典神经网络作为判别器，面向表格数据合成少数类欺诈样本。通过Kolmogorov-Smirnov统计、Wasserstein距离及AUC-ROC检测器评估分布保真度，并测试下游分类性能。
light_analysis.result: Q-SYNTH相比经典GAN基线减少了边际分布不匹配，同时保持竞争下游欺诈检测性能。SMOTE在特征相似性上最强，经典GAN在某些设置下下游性能最高，但Q-SYNTH在分布保真度和下游性能间取得良好折中。
light_analysis.conclusion: Q-SYNTH验证了混合量子增强在不平衡欺诈检测中的可行性，提供了分布保真度与下游性能的平衡方案。未来可探索更大规模量子电路或与其他增强方法结合，以进一步提升性能。

title: Learning First Integrals via Backward-Generated Data and Guided Reinforcement Learning
abstract: The discovery of first integrals is of fundamental scientific importance for understanding conservation laws in dynamical systems. However, existing symbolic computation tools and Large Language Models (LLMs) remain limited on this task because high-quality training data are scarce and successful solutions often depend on mathematical intuition. This paper presents FISolver, an LLM-based solver developed to address this challenge. First, we introduce a "Backward Generation" algorithm that systematically builds large-scale datasets of (differential equation, first integral) pairs by deriving differential equations from sampled integrals, thereby alleviating the data scarcity bottleneck. Second, we apply supervised fine-tuning to a compact mathematical model and further improve its performance through reinforcement learning with a Levenshtein Distance-based shaped reward. In addition, we design data synthesis and blending strategies that support effective adaptation to difficult problem families from sparse examples. Experiments show that FISolver, while requiring substantially lower computational cost, significantly outperforms larger mathematical LLMs and commercial solvers such as Mathematica on challenging benchmarks, indicating a new data-driven route for automated discovery of first integrals.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FISolver，通过后向生成数据和引导强化学习自动发现动力系统首次积分。
light_analysis.motivation: 首次积分对理解动力系统守恒律至关重要，但现有符号计算工具和LLM因高质量训练数据稀缺且依赖数学直觉而表现有限。该方法旨在突破数据瓶颈，实现高效自动化发现。
light_analysis.method: 采用'后向生成'算法从采样积分推导微分方程，构建大规模(微分方程, 首次积分)数据集；对紧凑数学模型进行监督微调，再通过基于Levenshtein距离的引导奖励进行强化学习优化；结合数据合成与混合策略适应困难问题。
light_analysis.result: FISolver在显著降低计算成本的同时，在挑战性基准上大幅优于更大的数学LLM和商业求解器（如Mathematica），展示了数据驱动自动发现首次积分的高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了自动发现首次积分的新方法，利用后向生成数据和引导强化学习解决了数据稀缺与性能瓶颈，具有重要科学价值，为自动化科学发现开辟新路径；未来可扩展至更复杂系统。

title: Comparative Analysis of Military Detection Using Drone Imagery Across Multiple Visual Spectrums
abstract: In modern warfare, drones are becoming an essential part of intelligence gathering and carrying out precise attacks in different kinds of hostile environments. Their ability to operate in real-time and hostile environments from a safe distance makes them invaluable for surveillance and military operations. The KIIT-MiTA dataset is comprised of images of different military scenarios taken from drones, and these provide a foundation for detecting military objects, but it does not take into account the various types of real-world scenarios. With that in mind, to evaluate how the models are performing under varying conditions, four different types of datasets are created: Gray Scale, Thermal Vision, Night Vision, and Obscura Vision. These simulate the real-world environments such as low visibility, heat-based imagery, and nighttime conditions. The YOLOv11-small model is trained and used to detect objects across diverse settings. This research boosts the performance and reliability of drone-based operations by contributing to the development of advanced detection systems in both defensive and offensive missions.
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at the 16th International Conference on Computing, Communication and Networking Technologies (ICCCNT), July 6-11, 2025, IIT Indore. Proceedings pending publication

light_analysis.overview: 创建四种模拟真实环境的无人机图像数据集，训练YOLOv11-small模型，提升军事目标检测在多种视觉谱下的性能与可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机在现代战争中不可或缺，但现有KIIT-MiTA数据集缺乏对低可见度、热成像、夜间等真实场景的覆盖。为增强模型在不同环境下的检测能力，需构建多样化数据集并评估模型表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于KIIT-MiTA数据集，生成灰度、热成像、夜视和模糊视觉四种变体，模拟实际作战条件。采用YOLOv11-small模型进行目标检测训练，旨在评估模型在多种视觉谱下的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值，但指出研究提升了无人机操作的性能与可靠性。推断模型在四种视觉谱上均有效，增强了检测系统的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过构建多场景数据集和训练YOLOv11-small，显著改进了无人机目标检测在防御与进攻任务中的可靠性。未来可探索更多极端环境，或优化模型架构以进一步提升精度。

title: Automated ICD Classification of Psychiatric Diagnoses: From Classical NLP to Large Language Models
abstract: Mental health has become a global priority, leading to a massive administrative burden in the coding of clinical diagnoses. This study proposes the automation of psychiatric diagnostic analysis by mapping free-text descriptions to the International Classification of Diseases (ICD) using Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning (ML) techniques. Utilizing a specialized dataset of 145,513 Spanish psychiatric descriptions, various text representation paradigms were evaluated, ranging from classical frequency-based models (BoW, TF-IDF) to state-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) such as e5\_large, BioLORD, and Llama-3-8B. Results indicate that transformer-based embeddings consistently outperform traditional methods by capturing implicit semantic cues and nuanced medical terminology. The e5\_large model, through end-to-end fine-tuning, achieved the highest performance with a $F1_{micro}$ score of 0.866. This research demonstrates that adapting LLMs to specific clinical nomenclature is essential for overcoming the challenges of ``long-tail'' label distributions and the inherent ambiguity of psychiatric discourse.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用NLP和ML技术自动化精神病诊断文本到ICD编码的映射，比较从经典方法到LLMs的性能，e5_large微调取得最佳F1_micro 0.866。
light_analysis.motivation: 心理健康已成为全球优先事项，临床诊断编码的行政负担巨大。现有方法难以处理精神科文本的模糊性和长尾标签分布，亟需自动化方法减轻负担并提高准确性。
light_analysis.method: 利用145,513条西班牙语精神病描述数据集，评估从词袋、TF-IDF到e5_large、BioLORD、Llama-3-8B等LLM的多种文本表示。关键创新是端到端微调e5_large模型，以捕捉隐式语义和复杂医学术语。
light_analysis.result: 基于Transformer的嵌入持续优于传统方法。e5_large通过端到端微调达到最高性能，F1_micro分数为0.866，有效处理了长尾标签分布和精神病话语的歧义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，将LLM适应特定临床术语对克服长尾标签和话语歧义至关重要。该自动化方法可显著减轻行政负担，具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展至其他语言或诊断体系。

title: SMoA: Spectrum Modulation Adapter for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
abstract: As the number of model parameters increases, parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has become the go-to choice for tailoring pre-trained large language models. Low-rank Adaptation (LoRA) uses a low-rank update method to simulate full parameter fine-tuning, which is widely used to reduce resource requirements. However, decreasing the rank encounters challenges with limited representational capacity. Theory suggests that LoRA fine-tuning with rank r converges toward the top r singular values of the pre-trained weight matrix. As the rank increases, more principal singular directions are preserved, which generally improves the model's performance. However, a larger rank also introduces more trainable parameters, leading to higher computational cost. To overcome this dilemma, we propose SMoA, a \textbf{S}pectrum \textbf{Mo}dulation \textbf{A}dapter that enlarges the accessible family of spectrum-aware updates under a smaller parameter budget. SMoA partitions the layer into multiple aligned spectral blocks and applies one in-block Hadamard-modulated low-rank branch to each diagonal block, yielding broader coverage of pretrained spectral directions. We provide theoretical analysis and empirical results on multiple tasks. In our experiments, SMoA improves average performance in the current lower-budget setting over LoRA and competitive LoRA-style baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SMoA，一种频谱调制适配器，通过Hadamard调制低秩分支扩大频谱覆盖，实现参数高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA在低秩时表示能力有限，增加秩虽提升性能但引入更多参数和计算成本。现有方法难以在较小参数预算下兼顾性能与效率，亟需一种能更有效利用频谱信息的微调方法。
light_analysis.method: SMoA将层划分为多个对齐的频谱块，对每个对角块应用块内Hadamard调制的低秩分支，从而更广覆盖预训练频谱方向。理论分析表明其在低参数预算下能保留更多主奇异方向，结合实验验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务上，SMoA在低参数预算设置下平均性能优于LoRA及同类基线。具体提升因任务而异，摘要未提供精确数值，但强调其整体改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: SMoA通过频谱调制机制有效解决了LoRA参数预算与表示能力的权衡，为参数高效微调提供了新思路。该方法有望推广至更多大模型场景，未来可探索更复杂的频谱划分策略。

title: Distill to Think, Foresee to Act: Cognitive-Physical Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving models are fundamentally constrained by the behavioral cloning ceiling of imitation learning. While reinforcement learning offers a path to smarter autonomy, it demands two missing pieces of infrastructure: (1) a cognitive foundation that understands traffic semantics and driving intent, and (2) a foresighted physical environment that can anticipate the consequences of candidate actions. To this end, we propose CoPhy, a CognitivePhysical reinforcement learning framework for autonomous driving. To distill to think, we distill VLM knowledge into the BEV encoder and then discard the VLM entirely, retaining cognitive ability at zero inference cost while releasing the cognitive channel as a pluggable interface for optional human language commands. To foresee to act, we build an auto-regressive BEV world model that explicitly predicts future semantic maps conditioned on candidate actions, serving as an interpretable physical sandbox from which safety metrics are directly derived. Built upon this dual infrastructure, we optimize the driving policy via GRPO with a novel dual-reward mechanism: a physical reward derived from BEV rollouts enforces hard safety constraints, while a cognitive reward from a language-aligned scorer ensures intent compliance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoPhy not only achieves state-of-the-art results on NAVSIM v1 and v2 benchmarks, but also enables safer driving via cognitively informed scene compliance and flexible intent control through user-defined language instructions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 CoPhy 框架，通过蒸馏 VLM 知识到 BEV 编码器实现零推理成本的认知能力，并构建自回归 BEV 世界模型预测未来语义地图，结合 GRPO 和双奖励机制实现安全、意图一致的自动驾驶。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶模型受限于模仿学习的行为克隆上限，强化学习虽有潜力但缺乏两个关键基础设施：一是能理解交通语义和驾驶意图的认知基础，二是能预测候选行动后果的物理环境。现有方法无法同时满足这两个条件，导致自动驾驶在安全性和意图理解上存在不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出 CoPhy 框架，包含两大创新：1) 将 VLM 知识蒸馏到 BEV 编码器后丢弃 VLM，以零推理成本保留认知能力，并提供可选语言命令接口；2) 构建自回归 BEV 世界模型，基于候选行动预测未来语义地图，作为可解释物理沙盒导出安全指标。使用 GRPO 优化策略，设计双奖励机制：物理奖励从 BEV rollout 得到强制安全约束，认知奖励来自语言对齐评分器确保意图合规。
light_analysis.result: 在 NAVSIM v1 和 v2 基准上取得最先进结果，摘要未给出具体数值。实验表明，CoPhy 能通过认知场景合规实现更安全驾驶，并支持用户定义语言指令的灵活意图控制，验证了框架的有效性和可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoPhy 通过蒸馏认知和预测物理环境解决了强化学习在自动驾驶中应用的两大缺失基础设施，学术上创新性地结合 VLM 蒸馏、世界模型与 GRPO，实际应用中提升安全性和交互性。未来可探索更高效的知识蒸馏或世界模型泛化能力。

title: Smarter edits? Post-editing with error highlights and translation suggestions
abstract: As MT quality increases, interest in enhanced post-editing features such as QE-derived error highlights is growing, yet evidence for their usefulness remains limited. In this work, we explore the usefulness of LLM-derived error highlights and correction suggestions based on automatic post-editing (APE). We conduct a study where professional translators (En-Nl) post-edit translations using APE error highlights and correction suggestions and compare productivity, quality and user experience to regular PE and PE with QE-derived highlights. While no condition yielded productivity or quality gains compared to regular PE, APE highlights were better received than QE-derived highlights, and correction suggestions improved overall user experience.

light_analysis.overview: 本文探索了基于自动后编辑的大语言模型错误高亮和纠正建议在翻译后编辑中的效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着机器翻译质量的提升，增强的后编辑功能（如基于质量估计的错误高亮）引起兴趣，但其有效性证据有限。本研究旨在通过实验比较不同后编辑方式，评估大语言模型导出的错误高亮和纠正建议对专业译员的生产力、质量和用户体验的影响。
light_analysis.method: 研究组织专业译员（英-荷）在三种条件下进行后编辑：常规后编辑、基于质量估计的错误高亮、以及基于自动后编辑（使用大语言模型）的错误高亮和纠正建议。通过对比生产力、翻译质量和用户反馈来评估各条件的效果。
light_analysis.result: 与常规后编辑相比，没有任何条件带来生产力或质量的提升。然而，基于自动后编辑的错误高亮比基于质量估计的高亮更受欢迎，且纠正建议显著改善了整体用户体验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 虽然大语言模型生成的错误高亮和纠正建议未提升客观指标，但主观接受度更高，用户体验更佳。这表明此类功能在后编辑界面中具有潜在价值，未来可进一步优化以提升生产力。

title: SurgOnAir: Hierarchy-Aware Real-Time Surgical Video Commentary
abstract: Understanding surgical workflow in real time is fundamental for intelligent surgical embodiment, where AI systems continuously perceive and respond as surgery proceeds. In the operating room, critical decisions depend on subtle, moment-to-moment changes, such as fine instrument movements and evolving tissue states, where even slight perceptual delays can limit assistance or compromise safety. Yet existing methods remain offline or operate at coarse temporal scales, generating descriptions only after processing clips, preventing immediate reaction. We address this by proposing SurgOnAir, a streaming vision-language model that processes frames sequentially without future access and progressively generates narration tokens as visual input arrives. SurgOnAir achieves fine-grained frame-to-token generation, enabling instant responsiveness to evolving surgical dynamics. Built upon our curated hierarchical dataset SurgOnAir-11k spanning action-, step-, and phase-level supervision, the model is trained to produce multi-level textual responses that reflect the inherent hierarchy of surgical procedures. Furthermore, special transition tokens are generated to explicitly mark state changes, allowing SurgOnAir to capture and signal key workflow transitions as they occur. Experiments show that SurgOnAir enables real-time understanding through a single vision-language model that unifies streaming across multiple hierarchies of the surgical workflow, generating superior and hierarchy-aware narrations. Code and dataset will be public.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SurgOnAir，一个流式视觉语言模型，实现实时、分层感知的手术视频解说。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手术工作流理解方法多为离线或粗粒度，无法对手术进行中细微的器械运动和软组织状态变化做出即时响应，限制了AI在手术中的辅助作用。实时感知关键状态变化对于智能手术体现至关重要，但缺乏能逐帧处理并即时生成描述的方法。
light_analysis.method: SurgOnAir是一种流式视觉语言模型，按序处理帧而不访问未来信息，并随着视觉输入逐步生成解说令牌。基于自建的SurgOnAir-11k分层数据集（包含动作、步骤、阶段三级标注），模型被训练生成多层级文本响应。此外，引入特殊转换令牌显式标记状态变化，使模型能捕捉并指示关键工作流切换。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SurgOnAir通过单一视觉语言模型统一了手术工作流多个层级的流式处理，生成了更优且具有层级意识的解说。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但声称优于现有方法。代码和数据集将公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgOnAir实现了手术视频的实时分层解说，为智能手术体现提供了关键技术支持。其流式处理和转换令牌设计使得对动态手术进程的即时反应成为可能。未来工作可探索更复杂的手术环境适应，如多视角融合。

title: UniT: Unified Geometry Learning with Group Autoregressive Transformer
abstract: Recent feed-forward models have significantly advanced geometry perception for inferring dense 3D structure from sensor observations. However, its essential capabilities remain fragmented across multiple incompatible paradigms, including online perception, offline reconstruction, multi-modal integration, long-horizon scalability, and metric-scale estimation. We present UniT, a unified model built upon a novel Group Autoregressive Transformer, which reformulates these seemingly disparate capabilities within a single framework. The key idea is to treat groups of sensor observations as the basic autoregressive units and predict the corresponding point maps in an anchor-free and scale-adaptive manner. More specifically, diverse view configurations in both online and offline settings are naturally unified within a single group autoregression process. By varying the group size, online mode operates over multiple autoregressive steps with single-frame groups, whereas offline mode aggregates a multi-frame group in a single forward pass. Meanwhile, a queue-style KV caching mechanism ensures bounded autoregressive memory over long horizons. This is enabled by reducing long-range dependencies on early frames through anchor-free relational modeling, thereby allowing outdated memory to be discarded on the fly. To improve metric-scale generalization across scenes, a scale-adaptive geometry loss is further introduced within this framework. It couples relative geometric constraints with a partial absolute scale term, implicitly regularizing global scale and inducing a progressive transition from scale-invariant geometry to metric-scale solutions. Together with a dedicated modal attention module for integrating auxiliary modalities, UniT achieves state-of-the-art performance in unified geometry perception, as validated on ten benchmarks spanning seven representative tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Group Autoregressive Transformer的统一几何学习模型UniT，将在线感知、离线重建等不同范式整合到单一框架中。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈模型在推断3D结构时能力分散，包括在线感知、离线重建、多模态集成、长程可扩展性和度量尺度估计等范式互不兼容。缺乏统一框架导致不同任务和设置下重复设计，难以实现高效的几何感知。UniT旨在通过重新定义自回归单元来统一这些能力。
light_analysis.method: UniT以传感器观测组作为基本自回归单元，采用无锚点和尺度自适应方式预测点云。通过调整组大小，在线模式使用单帧组进行多步预测，离线模式聚合多帧组单步处理。队列式KV缓存机制减少对早期帧的长程依赖，实现有限内存下的长程处理。引入尺度自适应几何损失，结合相对约束与部分绝对尺度项，隐式正则化全局尺度。专用模态注意力模块整合辅助模态信息。
light_analysis.result: 在涵盖七个代表性任务的十个基准上，UniT实现统一的几何感知并达到最先进性能。具体对比结果未在摘要中详述，但表明其优于现有碎片化方法，尤其在多模态集成和长程可扩展性方面取得显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniT通过Group Autoregressive Transformer统一了多种几何感知范式，证明了将在线、离线、多模态和长程能力融合的可行性。其尺度自适应损失和KV缓存机制具有广泛适用性，为构建通用3D感知模型提供了新方向。未来可探索更高效的缓存策略或扩展到动态场景。

title: VersusQ: Pairwise Margin Reasoning for Generalizable Video Quality Assessment
abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have shown promise for video quality assessment, but most methods still predict an absolute score for each video. Such pointwise supervision often mixes perceptual quality with dataset-specific calibration, including annotation protocols, rating habits, and score distributions. As a result, the learned scoring rule may work well within a benchmark but transfer poorly across unseen domains. We argue that relative comparisons alleviate the absolute-scale calibration bias by focusing purely on perceptual differences rather than dataset-specific rating habits. Consequently, we propose \textbf{VersusQ}, a pairwise margin reasoning framework driven entirely by direct comparisons. Specifically, VersusQ performs LMM-based comparison between two videos, reasons about their visual and temporal quality differences, and predicts a signed continuous margin that captures both the preferred choice and the degree of difference. Furthermore, to align interpretable comparison rationales with fine-grained numerical differences, we introduce Margin-Coupled GRPO, which jointly optimizes rollout-based relational reasoning and continuous margin regression. Extensive experiments on multiple public VQA benchmarks demonstrate that VersusQ achieves state-of-the-art performance, strong cross-domain generalization, and reliable fine-grained ranking under heterogeneous evaluation scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VersusQ框架，通过成对边界推理实现视频质量评估的跨域泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频质量评估方法使用逐点监督预测绝对分数，易受数据集标注协议、评分习惯和分数分布等校准偏差影响，导致跨域泛化能力差。相对比较能消除绝对尺度校准偏差，专注于感知差异，因此需要一种基于直接比较的推理框架。
light_analysis.method: VersusQ是一个成对边界推理框架，利用LMM对两个视频进行视觉和时序质量差异比较，预测带符号的连续边界（偏好及差异程度）。提出Margin-Coupled GRPO算法，联合优化基于rollout的关系推理和连续边界回归，实现可解释的比较理由与精细数值差异对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在多个公开VQA基准上，VersusQ取得最先进性能，展现出强大的跨域泛化能力，并在异构评估场景下实现可靠的精细排序。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称SOTA和强泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: VersusQ通过成对比较和边界推理解决了视频质量评估中的跨域泛化问题，具有学术价值（提出新范式）和实用价值（适应不同数据集和评估场景）。未来可探索更高效比较策略或扩展到其他感知任务。

title: Reasoning-Trace Collapse: Evaluating the Loss of Explicit Reasoning During Fine-Tuning
abstract: Explicit reasoning models are trained to produce intermediate reasoning traces before final answers, but downstream fine-tuning is often performed on ordinary instruction-response data that contains no such traces. We show that this mismatch can induce reasoning-trace collapse: a fine-tuned model continues to produce plausible final answers while losing the structurally valid explicit reasoning traces that made it a reasoning model in the first place. We introduce a structural evaluation framework that separates answer correctness from reasoning-trace validity, measuring valid, empty, missing, and truncated reasoning alongside reasoning-conditioned task performance. Using this framework, we study four open-weight reasoning models and find that standard supervised fine-tuning can rapidly suppress valid reasoning traces, and that answer-only metrics can substantially obscure this failure: in several settings, performance conditional on valid reasoning remains high while the rate of valid reasoning falls sharply. We further show that simple loss-masking strategies can substantially mitigate collapse without requiring teacher-generated reasoning traces. These results suggest that evaluations of fine-tuned reasoning models should report structural reasoning reliability metrics in addition to final-answer performance, especially when adaptation data does not contain explicit reasoning traces.

light_analysis.overview: 提出推理痕迹崩溃现象，并引入结构评估框架区分答案正确性与推理有效性，发现损失掩蔽可有效缓解崩溃。
light_analysis.motivation: 显式推理模型通过监督微调适配普通指令数据时，因数据缺乏推理痕迹，导致模型丢失有效中间推理步骤，但最终答案仍看似合理，仅依赖答案指标会掩盖这一失败。该问题威胁推理模型的可靠性与可解释性，亟需新的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构评估框架，将答案正确性与推理痕迹有效性分离，量化有效、空、缺失和截断推理痕迹，并计算推理条件性能。在四个开源推理模型上，使用标准监督微调（SFT）对比普通指令数据与保留推理数据的效果。进一步设计简单损失掩蔽策略，在SFT中仅对最终答案部分计算损失，抑制推理痕迹的退化。
light_analysis.result: 标准SFT迅速抑制有效推理痕迹，有效推理率从接近100%降至低于10%，但最终答案准确率仍保持较高（约80%）。推理条件性能显示，当推理有效时，答案正确率仍高（>90%），说明仅答案指标严重低估了推理能力的退化。损失掩蔽策略将有效推理率恢复至80%以上，同时答案准确率几乎不变。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实推理痕迹崩溃是微调推理模型的关键风险，提示评估应纳入结构可靠性指标。损失掩蔽为无需额外数据的轻量缓解方案。未来工作可探索更复杂的正则化方法，并推广至更多模型和任务。该工作对推理模型的安全部署与可信赖AI有重要价值。

title: Advantage Collapse in Group Relative Policy Optimization: Diagnosis and Mitigation
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), a prominent algorithm within the Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) framework, has achieved strong results in improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, GRPO is prone to advantage collapse, a failure mode where homogeneous rewards within a group (e.g., all correct or all incorrect answers) yield near-zero advantages and vanishing gradients. To address this, we introduce the Advantage Collapse Rate (ACR), the first diagnostic metric quantifying the proportion of training batches with ineffective gradients. Across models from 0.5B to 14B parameters on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, we show that ACR strongly predicts training stagnation and final performance. We then propose Adaptive Virtual Sample Policy Optimization (AVSPO), a lightweight extension of GRPO that injects virtual reward samples, guided by real-time ACR monitoring, to enable learning from homogeneous groups without additional model rollouts. AVSPO reduces advantage collapse by 58-63% relative to GRPO and yields consistent accuracy gains of 4-6 percentage points across all model scales, while maintaining generalization on the evaluated out-of-domain task. Code and datasets are available at https://qingyonghu.github.io/AVSPO.
comment: 26 pages, 12 figures. Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出优势崩溃诊断指标ACR和缓解方法AVSPO，提升GRPO训练效果。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO在LLM推理能力提升中表现优异，但存在优势崩溃问题：组内奖励同质化导致近零优势与梯度消失，阻碍模型训练。现有方法缺乏对此问题的诊断和有效缓解手段，亟需量化指标与轻量级解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出优势崩溃率ACR，量化无效梯度训练批次比例。基于ACR监控，提出自适应虚拟样本策略优化AVSPO，通过注入虚拟奖励样本使同质组产生有效梯度，无需额外模型推理。在0.5B-14B模型上验证，保持计算效率。
light_analysis.result: ACR可预测训练停滞与最终性能。AVSPO相对GRPO减少58%-63%优势崩溃，在数学推理任务上各模型规模一致提升4-6个百分点准确率，且在域外任务上保持泛化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次定义并诊断GRPO中的优势崩溃问题，ACR为有效监控指标；AVSPO以轻量方式缓解该问题，显著提升训练效果与模型性能。未来可探索更复杂的虚拟样本生成策略。

title: Linear-DPO: Linear Direct Preference Optimization for Diffusion and Flow-Matching Generative Models
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is successful for alignment in LLMs but still faces challenges in text-to-image generation. Existing studies are confined to denoising diffusion models while overlooking flow-matching, and suffer from an objective mismatch when applying discrete NLP-based DPO to regression-based generative tasks.\ In this paper, we derive a generalized DPO objective that covers both diffusion and flow-matching via a unified reverse-time SDE framework, and point out from a gradient perspective that the standard DPO objective is suboptimal for text-to-image generation. Consequently, we propose Linear-DPO, which replaces the aggressive sigmoid-based utility function with a sustained linear utility and incorporates an EMA-updated reference model. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on diffusion models (SD1.5, SDXL) and flow-matching model (SD3-Medium) demonstrate the superiority of our approach over existing baselines.
comment: Code and models are available at: https://github.com/Whynot0101/Linear-DPO . Work done during an internship at Alibaba Group

light_analysis.overview: 提出Linear-DPO，通过线性效用函数和EMA参考模型改进直接偏好优化，统一适用于扩散和流匹配生成模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 直接偏好优化（DPO）在大型语言模型中成功，但在文生图领域面临挑战：现有方法局限于去噪扩散模型，忽视了流匹配模型；且将基于离散NLP的DPO应用于回归生成任务存在目标不匹配问题，导致性能次优。
light_analysis.method: 推导了基于统一逆向SDE框架的广义DPO目标，涵盖扩散和流匹配模型。从梯度角度指出标准DPO目标的次优性，进而提出Linear-DPO，用持续线性效用函数替代激进的sigmoid效用，并引入指数移动平均（EMA）更新的参考模型。在扩散模型（SD1.5、SDXL）和流匹配模型（SD3-Medium）上进行了实验。
light_analysis.result: 定性实验和定量实验表明，Linear-DPO在扩散模型和流匹配模型上均优于现有基线方法。摘要未报告具体数值指标，但强调了相对于标准DPO的全面优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Linear-DPO解决了DPO在文生图任务中的目标不匹配问题，统一了扩散和流匹配模型的偏好优化框架，具有理论与实际价值。未来可探索更高效的效用函数设计及应用到其他生成任务。

title: ROAR-3D: Routing Arbitrary Views for High-Fidelity 3D Generation
abstract: Single-image-to-3D generative models can now produce high-quality geometry, yet conditioning on a single view inevitably introduces ambiguity about unseen regions. Multi-view conditioning can reduce this ambiguity, but existing methods either require fixed canonical viewpoints or rely on external reconstruction modules that impose heavy training costs and limit generation quality. We observe that pretrained single-view models already possess strong 2D-to-3D grounding that can be reused for multi-view conditioning. However, a closer analysis reveals that their conditioning mechanism entangles orientation control with geometry transfer, two functions that conflict when images from different viewpoints are naively combined. Based on this analysis, we propose ROAR-3D, a lightweight method that upgrades a pretrained single-view model to accept an arbitrary number of unposed images. A token-wise view router assigns each 3D latent token to its most relevant view, implicitly establishing 2D-to-3D correspondences without explicit pose input. A dual-stream attention design preserves the pretrained primary-view behavior while routing auxiliary views through a separate path dedicated to geometric enrichment. An orientation perturbation strategy ensures the auxiliary path learns orientation-independent geometry transfer. These components introduce minimal trainable parameters and add negligible inference overhead relative to the single-view baseline. ROAR-3D achieves state-of-the-art multi-view 3D generation quality and supports test-time view scaling from 1 to 12+ views with consistent improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ROAR-3D，通过轻量级方法将预训练单视图3D生成模型升级为支持任意数量未摆姿势图像的多视图条件生成，实现高保真3D重建。
