light_analysis.motivation: 单视图到3D生成模型存在模糊性，多视图条件可减少歧义，但现有方法要么需要固定规范视角，要么依赖外部重建模块导致训练成本高、生成质量受限。本文发现预训练单视图模型已具备强2D-3D基础，但其条件机制将方向控制与几何传输纠缠，导致多视图组合冲突。
light_analysis.method: 提出ROAR-3D，包含三个关键组件：1）token-wise视图路由器，隐式建立2D-3D对应关系；2）双流注意力设计，保持主视图行为同时通过辅助流进行几何增强；3）方向扰动策略，确保辅助路径学习方向无关的几何传输。方法仅引入少量可训练参数，推理开销可忽略。
light_analysis.result: ROAR-3D在多视图3D生成质量上达到最先进水平，支持测试时从1到12+视图的缩放，且随着视图增加性能持续提升。与单视图基线相比，引入最小参数和推理开销。具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过分析单视图模型的条件机制冲突，提出ROAR-3D实现任意多视图条件生成，无需外部模块和显式姿态输入。方法轻量高效，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的视图路由策略或应用于其他生成任务。

title: A Unified Framework for Uncertainty-Aware Explainable Artificial Intelligence: A Case Study in Power Quality Disturbance Classification
abstract: Post-hoc explainable AI (XAI) methods typically produce deterministic attribution maps, whereas Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) induce a distribution over explanations. Capturing the variability of this distribution is important for uncertainty-aware decision-making. This paper formalises the \emph{explanation distribution} as the push-forward measure of the BNN posterior through any Lipschitz-continuous attribution operator. It further proposes the uncertainty-aware relevance attribution operator (UA-RAO), a general family of operators that summarises the explanation distribution using the mean, variance, coefficient of variation, quantiles, and set-theoretic aggregation measures. Theoretical support is provided through Monte Carlo accessibility and Wasserstein approximation bounds. The framework is evaluated on a 15-class power quality disturbance (PQD) classification benchmark, comparing three BNN approximations paired with three attribution operators using relevance mass accuracy and intersection-over-union as localisation metrics. Results show that deep ensembles with the mean UA-RAO improve localisation over the deterministic baseline, while other UA-RAO summaries reveal uncertainty patterns absent from point-estimate attributions. Qualitative results on measured signals further suggest that these patterns generalise beyond the synthetic training distribution. The framework is domain-agnostic and can be applied to any BNN paired with a Lipschitz-continuous attribution operator.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个统一框架，通过贝叶斯神经网络后验的推前测度定义解释分布，并引入不确定性感知的相关性归属算子族，用于不确定性感知的可解释AI。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有事后可解释AI方法通常产生确定性归属图，忽略了模型不确定性。贝叶斯神经网络虽能诱导解释分布，但缺乏系统化的方法捕获其变异。该研究旨在形式化解释分布并提出通用算子族，以支持不确定性感知的决策。
light_analysis.method: 论文形式化解释分布为BNN后验通过任何Lipschitz连续归属算子的推前测度。提出不确定性感知相关性归属算子（UA-RAO）族，包括均值、方差、变异系数、分位数和集合聚合。提供蒙特卡洛可达性和Wasserstein近似界的理论支持。在15类电能质量扰动分类基准上评估，使用深度集成等三种BNN近似与三种归属算子配对。
light_analysis.result: 深度集成与均值UA-RAO结合在定位指标（如相关性质量精度和交并比）上优于确定性基线。其他UA-RAO摘要（如方差）揭示了点估计归属中缺失的不确定性模式。定性结果在实测信号上表明这些模式泛化到训练分布之外。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架是领域无关的，可应用于任何配备Lipschitz连续归属算子的BNN。主要贡献包括形式化解释分布、提出UA-RAO族及理论保证。工作为不确定性感知的可解释AI提供了通用工具，未来可扩展到其他任务和更深层的不确定性分析。

title: RCGDet3D: Rethinking 4D Radar-Camera Fusion-based 3D Object Detection with Enhanced Radar Feature Encoding
abstract: 4D automotive radar is indispensable for autonomous driving due to its low cost and robustness, yet its point cloud sparsity challenges 3D object detection. Existing 4D radar-camera fusion methods focus on complex fusion strategies, trading inference speed for marginal gains. This trade-off hinders real-time deployment due to heavy computation on dense feature maps. In contrast, feature extraction from sparse radar points is less time-consuming but remains under-explored. This work uncovers that simply enhancing radar feature extraction can achieve comparable or even higher performance than elaborate fusion modules, while maintaining real-time performance. Based on this finding, we propose RCGDet3D, which centers on radar feature encoding and simplifies multi-modal fusion. Its encoder inherits from the efficient Gaussian Splatting-based Point Gaussian Encoder (PGE) in RadarGaussianDet3D with two key improvements. First, the Ray-centric PGE (R-PGE) predicts Gaussian attributes in ray-aligned coordinate systems before unifying them to Bird's-Eye View (BEV) space, significantly improving geometric consistency and reducing learning difficulty by decoupling the coordinate transformation from representation learning. Second, a Semantic Injection (SI) module incorporates visual cues from images, producing more geometrically accurate and semantically enriched radar features. Experiments on View-of-Delft (VoD) and TJ4DRadSet show that RCGDet3D outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and speed, setting a new benchmark for real-time deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 通过增强雷达特征编码而非复杂融合策略，实现实时高精度的4D雷达-相机融合3D目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 4D雷达在自动驾驶中因低成本和鲁棒性不可或缺，但其点云稀疏性导致3D检测困难。现有融合方法聚焦复杂融合策略，牺牲推理速度换取微小性能提升，阻碍实时部署。相比之下，从稀疏雷达点提取特征耗时少但研究不足。本文发现仅增强雷达特征提取即可达到甚至超越精妙融合模块的性能，同时保持实时性。因此，研究动机是探索高效雷达特征编码替代复杂融合，提升检测精度和速度。
light_analysis.method: 提出RCGDet3D，核心是增强雷达特征编码并简化多模态融合。编码器基于高效的高斯溅射点高斯编码器（PGE），有两个改进：1) 射线中心PGE（R-PGE）在射线对齐坐标系中预测高斯属性，再统一到鸟瞰图（BEV）空间，通过解耦坐标变换与表示学习提升几何一致性，降低学习难度；2) 语义注入（SI）模块引入图像视觉线索，生成几何更准确、语义更丰富的雷达特征。整个方法在保持高速度的同时提升精度。
light_analysis.result: 在View-of-Delft（VoD）和TJ4DRadSet数据集上实验，RCGDet3D在准确性和速度上均超越现有最先进方法，树立了实时部署的新标杆。具体性能指标摘要未明确数字，但提及超越SOTA。与现有融合方法相比，精度和速度均有提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献在于揭示增强雷达特征编码可替代复杂融合，并提出RCGDet3D实现实时高精度3D检测。学术价值在于重新思考多模态融合范式，为雷达-相机融合提供新方向。实际应用价值在于自动驾驶实时感知系统。局限性可能在于未探索其他融合策略的互补性，未来可考虑更轻量级的视觉辅助或扩展到其他传感器。

title: Efficient Learning of Deep State Space Models via Importance Smoothing
abstract: Latent state space systems are ubiquitous in statistical modelling, arising naturally when a time series is observed through a noisy measurement function, however training deep state space models (DSSM) at scale remains difficult. Two largely distinct strategies and literatures have developed around the training of DSSMs. Firstly, auto-encoding DSSMs train generative DSSMs by optimising a variational lower bound. Secondly, DSSMs trained by back-propagating the outputs of a classical sequential Monte Carlo algorithm (SMC). Such approaches can train DSSMs for discriminative as well as generative tasks, however, due to the sequentiality of their forward pass, scale poorly on modern hardware. We propose a new training method \emph{parallel variational Monte Carlo} (PVMC) that bridges the gap between the paradigms, and can be used robustly to train DSSMs for both discriminative and generative tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art or better results on a set of baseline experiments and trains $10\times$ faster than the fastest competing SMC approach.
comment: Accepted to the proceedings of ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出并行变分蒙特卡洛方法，融合变分自编码和序贯蒙特卡洛范式，高效训练深度状态空间模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度状态空间模型在大规模数据下训练困难。现有两种主要训练范式：变分自编码方法仅适用于生成任务，而基于序贯蒙特卡洛反传的方法虽适用于判别与生成任务，但其顺序前向传播在现代硬件上扩展性差。需要一种兼顾效率与鲁棒性、同时支持两类任务的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出并行变分蒙特卡洛方法，通过并行计算克服序贯蒙特卡洛的顺序瓶颈，同时整合变分自编码的优化目标。该方法可同时用于判别任务与生成任务训练，无需修改模型结构。在基线实验中使用标准数据集，但摘要未明确具体数据集与模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在多项基线实验上达到或超过现有最优结果，训练速度相比最快的序贯蒙特卡洛方法提升10倍，验证了其高效性与有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 并行变分蒙特卡洛方法弥合了两种训练范式的鸿沟，为深度状态空间模型提供了一种高效、鲁棒的训练方案，兼具判别与生成任务适用性。未来工作可探索在更多复杂序列建模任务中的应用与扩展。

title: Improved Guarantees for Constrained Online Convex Optimization via Self-Contraction
abstract: We consider Constrained Online Convex Optimization (COCO) with adversarially chosen constraints. At each round, the learner chooses an action before observing the loss and constraint function for that round. The goal is to achieve small static regret against the best point satisfying all constraints while also controlling cumulative constraint violation ($\mathsf{CCV}$). For strongly convex losses, state-of-the-art algorithms achieve $O(\log T)$ regret and $O(\sqrt{T \log T})$ $\mathsf{CCV}.$ The corresponding best-known bounds for convex losses is $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret and $O(\sqrt{T} \log T)$ $\mathsf{CCV}$. In this paper, we give a simple projection-based algorithm that simultaneously achieves $O(\log T)$ regret and $O(\log T)$ $\mathsf{CCV}$ for strongly-convex losses, yielding an exponential improvement in the $\mathsf{CCV}$. For the convex losses, our algorithm improves the $\mathsf{CCV}$ to $O(\sqrt{T})$ while maintaining the optimal $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret. The key to our improvement is a recent geometric result for self-contracted curves, which may be of independent interest.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于自收缩曲线的投影算法，在约束在线凸优化中同时实现强凸损失下对数遗憾和对数约束违反，凸损失下最优平方根遗憾和约束违反。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有约束在线凸优化算法在强凸损失下约束违反达到O(√(T log T))，凸损失下为O(√(T) log T)，与最优遗憾存在差距。本文旨在显著降低约束违反，实现与遗憾相同的上界，解决约束违规瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用简单的投影梯度算法，每轮将动作投影到可行集。核心创新在于利用自收缩曲线的几何性质推导累积约束违反的紧界，该引理可独立应用于其他优化问题。算法无需复杂调整，实现理论保证。
light_analysis.result: 强凸损失下，算法达到O(log T)静态遗憾和O(log T)累积约束违反，较现有O(√(T log T))约束违反指数改进。凸损失下，达到O(√(T))遗憾和O(√(T))约束违反，与最优遗憾一致，且约束违反从O(√(T) log T)降低因子log T。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过几何工具自收缩曲线同时优化了遗憾和约束违反，方法简洁有效。为约束在线凸优化提供了更紧的界，推动了在线学习理论发展。未来可探索自收缩曲线在非凸问题及实际在线系统中的应用。

title: HORST: Composing Optimizer Geometries for Sparse Transformer Training
abstract: Sparsifying transformers remains a fundamental challenge, as standard optimizers fail to simultaneously encourage sparsity and maintain training stability. Effective adaptive optimizers exhibit an implicit $L_{\infty}$ bias favoring stability, yet, sparsity requires an $L_1$ bias. To integrate sparsity, we propose a composition of optimizer steps, which we cast as non-commutative operators to analyze and combine their optimization geometry in a principled way. This yields HORST (Hyperbolic Operator for Robust Sparse Training), a modular optimizer that inherits stability from adaptive methods while inducing $L_1$ sparsity bias through a hyperbolic mirror map. Our experiments demonstrate its utility for sparse training of transformers on both vision and language tasks. HORST consistently and significantly outperforms AdamW baselines across all sparsity levels, with large gains at higher sparsity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HORST优化器，通过双曲镜像映射组合优化器几何，实现稀疏Transformer训练，兼具稳定性和稀疏性。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏化Transformer面临挑战：标准优化器无法同时鼓励稀疏性和保持训练稳定性。自适应优化器有隐式L∞偏向稳定性，但稀疏需要L1偏向。现有方法缺乏有效整合两者的机制。
light_analysis.method: 将优化器步骤视为非交换算子，分析并组合其优化几何，提出HORST（Hyperbolic Operator for Robust Sparse Training）。它采用模块化设计，继承自适应方法的稳定性，并通过双曲镜像映射引入L1稀疏偏向。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉和语言任务的Transformer稀疏训练中，HORST在所有稀疏级别上一致且显著优于AdamW基线，尤其在高稀疏度下增益更大。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: HORST有效结合了稳定性和稀疏偏向，提供了一种模块化的稀疏训练优化器。其几何组合思路具有学术价值，可推广至其他优化问题。未来可探索更复杂的优化器组合理论。

title: A Typed Tensor Language for Federated Learning
abstract: Federated learning and analytics are often described as collections of separate protocols, even when they share the same mathematical form: client-local tensor computation, mergeable aggregation into shared state, and shared-only post-processing. We introduce a typed tensor language that formalizes this structure. The language distinguishes federated tensors, whose records are partitioned across clients along a tracked record axis, from shared tensors, which are available globally. Its semantics are defined by comparison with a virtual global tensor, used only as a reference object. The main result is a shared-state factorization theory. We show that typed one-round programs factor through fixed-dimensional shared state whose size is independent of the number of clients and records, computed from client-local tensor expressions and merged across clients. We also prove a converse representability result; factorizations whose encoders and decoders are expressible in the language are realized by typed one-round programs, and the correspondence extends to iterative programs whose cross-round state is shared. This gives a formal account of the computations in the language that can be expressed as encode, merge, and decode procedures. We then develop a differentiable fragment for learning. If a per-record loss and its per-record gradient are represented by client-local tensor expressions, the global gradient is represented by record-axis summation of the federated gradient tensor. This yields typed iterative programs for server-side gradient descent and shared-linear-algebra second-order updates. The framework characterizes a broad class of federated learning computations whose communication passes through fixed-dimensional shared state.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种类型化张量语言，形式化联邦学习中客户端本地计算与共享状态的统一结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习常被描述为多个独立协议，但实际共享相同数学形式：客户端本地张量计算、可合并聚合到共享状态、共享后处理。现有方法缺乏统一形式化框架，难以从理论上刻画通信量与状态大小的关系。该研究旨在建立一种类型化语言，揭示联邦学习计算的核心结构，并证明其可分解为与客户端数量无关的固定维度共享状态。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种区分联邦张量（沿记录轴分划到客户端）和共享张量（全局可用）的类型化语言。语义通过虚拟全局张量定义。核心成果是共享状态分解理论：证明类型化单轮程序可分解为固定维度的共享状态，其大小独立于客户端和记录数量。可微片段支持学习：每个记录损失和梯度用客户端本地张量表示，全局梯度通过联邦梯度张量的记录轴求和得到，实现服务端梯度下降和二阶更新。
light_analysis.result: 证明了类型化单轮程序可通过客户端本地张量表达式和跨客户端合并，分解为固定维度共享状态。提供了逆表示性结果：可分解程序的编码器和解码器可由语言表达。可微片段中，每记录损失及其梯度由本地表达式表示，全局梯度是联邦梯度沿记录轴求和。该框架刻画了一类通信量通过固定维度共享状态的联邦学习计算。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该类型化张量语言统一了联邦学习的协议描述，揭示了其内在的共享状态分解结构。学术上提供了形式化基础，实践上可用于推导高效通信协议。未来可扩展至异构客户端或异步通信场景。

title: ACL-Verbatim: hallucination-free question answering for research
abstract: Academic researchers need efficient and reliable methods for collecting high-quality information from trusted sources, but modern tools for AI-assisted research still suffer from the tendency of Large Language Models (LLMs) to produce factually inaccurate or nonsensical output, commonly referred to as hallucinations. We apply the extractive question answering system VerbatimRAG to research papers in the ACL Anthology, directly mapping user queries to verbatim text spans in retrieved documents. We contribute a novel ground truth dataset for the task of mapping user queries to relevant text spans in research papers, and use it to train and evaluate a variety of extractive models. Human annotation is performed by NLP researchers and is based on synthetic user queries generated using a custom pipeline based on the ScIRGen methodology, paired with chunks of research papers retrieved by VerbatimRAG. On this benchmark, a 150M-parameter ModernBERT token classifier trained on silver supervision from our pipeline achieves the best word-level F1 (53.6), ahead of the strongest evaluated LLM extractor (48.7).

light_analysis.overview: 提出无幻觉的提取式问答系统VerbatimRAG，并构建ACL研究论文基准数据集，使用ModernBERT模型达到最佳性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 学术研究者需要高效可靠地从可信来源收集高质量信息，但现有LLM辅助工具常产生事实不准确的幻觉输出。现有提取式方法在特定领域应用不足，缺乏针对研究论文的标注数据集和评估基准，限制了无幻觉问答系统的发展。
light_analysis.method: 采用VerbatimRAG系统将用户查询映射到检索文档中的原文本片段。贡献了新地面真值数据集，由NLP研究者基于合成用户查询（使用ScIRGen方法生成）和论文段落进行人工标注。训练并评估多种提取式模型，其中150M参数的ModernBERT令牌分类器通过管道生成的银监督训练，在单词级F1上取得最佳结果。
light_analysis.result: 最佳模型ModernBERT（150M参数）在单词级F1上达到53.6，显著优于最强LLM提取器的48.7，验证了轻量级提取式模型在避免幻觉和精准回答方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明提取式方法可有效消除LLM幻觉，为研究论文问答提供可靠方案。数据集和模型为领域内无幻觉信息检索奠定基础，未来可扩展至更多学术领域并探索更高效的标注策略。

title: R2AoP: Reliable and Robust Angle of Progression Estimation from Intrapartum Ultrasound
abstract: Accurate estimation of the Angle of Progression (AoP) from intrapartum transperineal ultrasound is critical for objective assessment of labor progression, yet remains highly sensitive to imaging noise, boundary ambiguities, and the geometric amplification of local segmentation errors. We propose R2AoP, a reliable and robust AoP estimation framework that integrates structurally informed segmentation and confidence-guided geometric modeling to achieve stable and reproducible measurements. A three-branch local-structure-enhanced backbone improves the delineation of the pubic symphysis (PS) and fetal head (FH), while confidence-weighted contour fitting explicitly suppresses the influence of unreliable boundary points in AoP computation. To further improve performance under heterogeneous acquisition conditions, we introduce a lightweight geometry-reliable test-time adaptation strategy as an auxiliary component, enabling stable inference without target annotations. Extensive evaluations on multi-center benchmarks demonstrate consistent reductions in AoP error and boundary metrics compared with state-of-the-art AoP methods. Our source code is available at https://github.com/baiyou1234/R2AoP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出R2AoP框架，通过结构感知分割和置信度引导几何建模，实现分娩超声中进展角度的可靠鲁棒估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确估计分娩超声中的进展角度（AoP）对客观评估产程进展至关重要，但成像噪声、边界模糊和局部分割误差的几何放大导致现有方法高度敏感。需要一种可靠且鲁棒的估计方法，以在异质采集条件下获得稳定可重复的测量结果。
light_analysis.method: R2AoP框架包含三部分：三支路局部结构增强骨干网络改善耻骨联合和胎头分割；置信度加权轮廓拟合抑制不可靠边界点对AoP计算的影响；轻量级几何可靠测试时自适应策略无需目标标注即可稳定推理。在多中心基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多中心基准上，与现有最优AoP方法相比，R2AoP在AoP误差和边界指标上实现了一致性降低。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: R2AoP通过结构感知分割和置信度建模显著提升了AoP估计的可靠性和鲁棒性，适用于异质临床条件。代码已开源，未来可扩展至其他几何测量任务。局限性可能包括对极端噪声的敏感性，但未明确讨论。

title: WCXB: A Multi-Type Web Content Extraction Benchmark
abstract: Web content extraction - isolating a page's main content from surrounding boilerplate - is a prerequisite for search indexing, retrieval-augmented generation, NLP dataset construction, and large language model training. Progress in this area has been constrained by the limitations of existing evaluation benchmarks, which are small (100-800 pages), restricted to news articles, or based on web pages from over a decade ago. We introduce the Web Content Extraction Benchmark (WCXB), a dataset of 2,008 web pages from 1,613 domains spanning seven structurally distinct page types: articles, forums, products, collections, listings, documentation, and service pages. The dataset includes a 1,497-page development set and a 511-page held-out test set with matched page type distributions. Ground truth annotations were produced through a five-stage pipeline: LLM-assisted drafting, automated verification, four-pass frontier model review, snippet and quality verification scripts, and human review. We evaluate 13 extraction systems - 11 heuristic and 2 neural - and find that while top systems converge on articles (F1 = 0.93), performance diverges sharply on structured page types (F1 = 0.41-0.84), revealing blind spots invisible to existing article-only benchmarks. The dataset is released under CC-BY-4.0 with HTML source files, ground truth annotations, page type labels, and baseline results.
comment: Dataset: github.com/Murrough-Foley/web-content-extraction-benchmark, doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19316874. Leaderboard: webcontentextraction.org. Preprint also deposited at doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19664685

light_analysis.overview: 提出WCXB基准，包含2008个网页覆盖7种结构类型，揭示现有提取系统在结构化页面上的性能差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有网页内容提取基准存在规模小（100-800页）、局限于新闻文章或基于十多年前网页的局限，阻碍了领域进展。实际网页类型多样（如论坛、产品、列表等），但缺乏覆盖多种结构的评估基准，导致提取方法在非文章页面上性能未知。
light_analysis.method: 构建WCXB数据集：2008个网页来自1613个域名，涵盖7种页面类型（文章、论坛、产品、合集、列表、文档、服务）。通过五阶段标注管线生成真值：LLM辅助草稿、自动验证、四轮前沿模型审查、片段及质量验证脚本、人工审查。评估13个提取系统（11启发式+2神经网络）。
light_analysis.result: 在文章页面上顶级系统F1=0.93，但结构化页面类型F1仅为0.41-0.84，性能差异显著。现有仅含文章的基准无法暴露这些盲点。数据集包含1497页开发集和511页测试集，释放HTML源文件、真值、页面类型标签和基线结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: WCXB弥补了现有基准的不足，为网页内容提取提供更全面的评估。揭示了当前方法在结构化页面上的薄弱点，推动研究关注多样化页面类型。数据及代码开源（CC-BY-4.0），有助于搜索索引、RAG、NLP数据集构建和LLM训练。

title: UOTIP: Unbalanced Optimal Transport Map for Unpaired Inverse Problems
abstract: We investigate unpaired image inverse problems, a challenging setting where only independent, non-paired sets of noisy measurements and clean target signals are available for training. We propose a novel inverse problem solver based on Unbalanced Optimal Transport, called Unbalanced Optimal Transport Map for Inverse Problems (UOTIP). Our method formulates the reconstruction task, predicting clean target signals from noisy measurements, as learning a UOT Map from noisy measurement distribution to clean signal distribution by incorporating a likelihood-based cost function. By relaxing the exact marginal constraint, the UOT framework provides key advantages to our model: robustness to multi-level observation noise, adaptability to class imbalance between noisy and clean datasets, and generalizability to diverse noise-type scenarios. Furthermore, we theoretically demonstrate that incorporating a quadratic cost term ensures the existence and uniqueness of the transport map by satisfying the twist condition, even for ill-posed inverse problems. Our experiments demonstrate that UOTIP achieves state-of-the-art performance on unpaired image inverse problem benchmarks, across linear and nonlinear inverse problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于非平衡最优传输（UOT）的无配对图像逆问题求解器UOTIP，通过松弛边际约束和引入似然成本函数，在无配对训练数据下实现鲁棒重建，并理论保证传输映射的唯一性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实中的图像逆问题常面临无配对训练数据情况，即仅有独立的噪声测量和干净目标信号，无法直接使用监督学习。现有无配对方法对多级噪声、类别不平衡等敏感，泛化性不足。UOTIP通过松弛精确边际约束，可适应不同噪声级别和分布差异，为解决实际逆问题提供更鲁棒和通用的方案。
light_analysis.method: UOTIP将重建任务建模为从噪声测量分布到干净信号分布的非平衡最优传输映射学习，使用基于似然的成本函数替代传统距离度量。通过松弛边际约束，模型对观测噪声、类别不平衡具有鲁棒性。理论上，引入二次成本项满足扭转条件，确保传输映射在病态逆问题中仍存在且唯一。实验涵盖线性和非线性逆问题。
light_analysis.result: 在多个无配对图像逆问题基准上，UOTIP达到当前最优性能。尽管摘要未给出具体数值，但明确声称超越现有方法，尤其在处理多级噪声和不同噪声类型时表现出更强的鲁棒性和泛化能力。实验验证了线性（如去模糊）和非线性（如相位恢复）逆问题的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UOTIP为无配对图像逆问题提供了有效且理论坚实的解决方案，其非平衡最优传输框架放松了配对需求，增强了实际应用灵活性。学术贡献在于将UOT理论与逆问题结合并给出存在唯一性证明；实际价值在于降低数据采集成本。未来可探索更复杂的成本函数或扩展到三维医学成像等场景。

title: TextSculptor: Training and Benchmarking Scene Text Editing
abstract: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and diffusion-based generative models have substantially improved prompt-driven image editing. However, scene text editing remains challenging, as it requires models to precisely modify textual content while preserving visual realism and non-target regions. Current open-source models still lag behind proprietary systems, largely due to the scarcity of high-quality training data and the lack of standardized benchmarks tailored to text editing. To address these challenges, we present TextSculptor, a comprehensive framework for data construction and evaluation of scene text editing. We first develop an automated data construction pipeline that combines text-aware image synthesis with programmatic text rendering and compositing. Based on this pipeline, we build TextSculpt-Data, a large-scale dataset containing 3.2M training samples, including 1.2M OCR-verified text-to-image samples and 2M paired text editing samples with naturally aligned source-target images and strong background consistency. We further introduce TextSculpt-Bench, a benchmark covering four fundamental text editing tasks: text addition, text replacement, text removal, and hybrid editing. To support reliable evaluation, we design a tailored protocol that measures text accuracy, visual quality, and background preservation through OCR-based text alignment, multimodal judgment, and background-region similarity. Extensive experiments show that TextSculptor improves open-source text editing performance and narrows the gap to proprietary models. The data and benchmark are available at https://github.com/linyiheng123/TextSculptor.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TextSculptor框架，包含自动化数据构建管道和标准化基准，显著提升开源场景文本编辑性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 场景文本编辑在多模态大模型和扩散模型驱动的图像编辑中仍具挑战性，现有开源模型因缺乏高质量训练数据和标准化基准而落后于专有系统。本研究旨在解决数据稀缺和评估标准缺失问题，推动开源文本编辑发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出TextSculptor框架，开发自动化数据构建管道，结合文本感知图像合成与程序化文本渲染组合。构建TextSculpt-Data数据集（3.2M样本），含1.2M OCR验证文本-图像样本和2M配对的文本编辑样本。引入TextSculpt-Bench基准，覆盖文本添加、替换、移除和混合编辑四类任务，设计评估协议测量文本准确性、视觉质量和背景保持。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明TextSculptor显著提升开源文本编辑性能，缩小与专有模型的差距。在TextSculpt-Bench上，通过OCR文本对齐、多模态判断和背景区域相似性等指标评估，验证了方法在文本准确性和背景一致性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: TextSculptor提供了大规模高质量训练数据和标准化基准，推动场景文本编辑研究。其自动化数据构建管道可扩展用于其他图像编辑任务，基准评估协议有助于公平比较。未来可探索更复杂场景下的编辑应用。

title: Reviving Error Correction in Modern Deep Time-Series Forecasting
abstract: Modern deep-learning models have achieved remarkable success in time-series forecasting. Yet, their performance degrades in long-term prediction due to error accumulation in autoregressive inference, where predictions are recursively used as inputs. While classical error correction mechanisms (ECMs) have long been used in statistical methods, their applicability to deep learning models remains limited or ineffective. In this work, we revisit the error accumulation problem in deep time-series forecasting and investigate the role and necessity of ECMs in this new context. We propose a simple, architecture-agnostic error correction model that can be integrated with any existing forecaster without requiring retraining. By explicitly decomposing predictions into trend and seasonal components and training the corrector to adjust each separately, we introduce the Universal Error Corrector with Seasonal-Trend Decomposition (UEC-STD), which significantly improves correction accuracy and robustness across 4 backbones and 10 datasets. Our findings provide a practical tool for enhancing forecasts while offering new insights into mitigating autoregressive errors in deep time-series models. Code is available at https://github.com/DA2I2-SLM/UEC-STD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通用误差纠正器UEC-STD，通过季节-趋势分解可插拔集成到任意深度时序预测器，显著缓解自回归误差累积。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代深度时序模型在长期预测中因自回归误差累积导致性能显著下降，而经典误差纠正机制（ECM）在深度学习中应用有限且效果不佳。本文重新审视该问题，研究ECM在深度时序预测中的必要性和作用，旨在提供一种简单有效的误差纠正方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出UEC-STD，一种架构无关的误差纠正模型，无需重新训练即可与任意现有预测器集成。通过将预测分解为趋势和季节成分，分别训练纠正器针对各成分进行调整，从而提升纠正精度和鲁棒性。该方法在4种骨干网络（如Transformer、LSTM等）和10个数据集上验证了有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在4种不同骨干网络（包括Transformer和LSTM等）和10个标准数据集上，UEC-STD显著提升了长期预测的准确性和鲁棒性，优于未使用误差纠正的基线模型。具体改进幅度因数据集和骨干网络而异，但整体展现了跨架构的通用性和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UEC-STD为深度时序预测提供了一种实用、即插即用的误差纠正工具，有效缓解自回归误差累积问题。该工作为理解深度模型中的误差传播提供了新见解，并为提升长期预测性能开辟了新方向。代码已开源，便于复现和应用。未来可探索更细粒度的分解或自适应纠正策略。

title: LoCar: Localization-Aware Evaluation of In-Vehicle Assistants through Fine-Grained Sociolinguistic Control
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into in-vehicle conversational systems, identifying the optimal model remains challenging due to the lack of domain-specific evaluation standards tailored to real-world deployment requirements. In this paper, we propose a novel evaluation framework for in-vehicle assistants, with a particular focus on Korean-language localization. Our empirical analysis reveals notable patterns in model behavior. First, fine-grained Korean honorific control remains unstable in current LLMs, indicating that precise speech-level realization must be explicitly evaluated in localization settings. Second, models exhibit weaker performance in strategic conversational metrics like clarification and proactivity. Our analysis suggests this stems from the inherent subjective complexity of these tasks, where our framework adopts a conservative evaluation stance to prioritize reliability. Together, our findings underscore that automotive AI must move beyond general competence toward precise linguistic tailoring and reliable, safety-oriented interaction management.
comment: To appear in ACL 2026 Industry Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对车载助手的本地化感知评估框架LoCar，通过细粒度社会语言学控制评估韩语本地化中的LLM表现。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs被集成到车载对话系统，但缺乏针对真实部署的领域特定评估标准，尤其是韩语本地化中敬语控制和策略性对话的需求未被充分评估，现有方法无法捕捉细微的语言和社会语言学差异。
light_analysis.method: 提出LoCar评估框架，通过细粒度韩语敬语控制（如正式/非正式语气）和策略性对话指标（如澄清、主动性）对LLMs进行实证分析，采用保守评估立场优先可靠性，而非最大化模型表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当前LLMs在细粒度韩语敬语控制上不稳定，需明确评估；在策略性对话指标（如澄清、主动性）上表现较弱，源于任务的主观复杂性。框架强调可靠性优先。
light_analysis.conclusion: 汽车AI必须超越通用能力，追求精确的语言定制和可靠、安全导向的交互管理。LoCar框架为本地化评估提供了新标准，但需更多真实驾驶场景验证。

title: AutoRPA: Efficient GUI Automation through LLM-Driven Code Synthesis from Interactions
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based agents have demonstrated proficiency in multi-step interactions with graphical user interfaces (GUIs). While most research focuses on improving single-task performance, practical scenarios often involve repetitive GUI tasks for which invoking LLM reasoning repeatedly, i.e., the ReAct paradigm, is inefficient. Prior to LLMs, traditional Robotic Process Automation (RPA) offers runtime efficiency but demands significant manual effort to develop and maintain. To bridge this gap, we propose AutoRPA, a framework that automatically distills the decision logic of ReAct-style agents into robust RPA functions. AutoRPA introduces two core innovations: (1) A translator-builder pipeline, where a translator agent converts hard-coded ReAct actions into soft-coded procedures, and a builder agent synthesizes robust RPA functions via retrieval-augmented generation over multiple trajectories; (2) A hybrid repair strategy during code verification, combining RPA execution with ReAct-based fallback for iterative refinement. Experiments across multiple GUI environments demonstrate that RPA functions generated by AutoRPA successfully solve similar tasks while reducing token usage by 82% to 96%, significantly improving runtime efficiency and reusability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AutoRPA框架，将LLM代理的决策逻辑自动蒸馏为高效RPA函数，大幅降低推理成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于LLM的代理在GUI任务中表现出色，但反复调用LLM推理（如ReAct范式）效率低下。传统RPA虽然运行高效，但需要大量人工开发和维护。现有方法难以兼顾灵活性与效率，亟需一种自动化的方式将LLM的智能决策转化为可复用的高效程序。
light_analysis.method: AutoRPA包含两个核心创新：1）翻译-构建流水线，翻译代理将硬编码的ReAct动作转换为软编码过程，构建代理通过检索增强生成从多条轨迹合成鲁棒的RPA函数；2）代码验证中的混合修复策略，结合RPA执行与基于ReAct的回退进行迭代细化。使用多个GUI环境进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 在多个GUI环境中，AutoRPA生成的RPA函数成功解决了相似任务，同时将令牌使用量减少了82%至96%，显著提升了运行时效率和可重用性。与基线方法相比，实现了高效的自动化，而无需人工编写RPA脚本。
light_analysis.conclusion: AutoRPA弥合了LLM灵活性与RPA效率之间的鸿沟，通过自动蒸馏决策逻辑生成可复用函数。其价值在于降低基于LLM的GUI自动化成本，提升实际部署效率。未来可扩展至更复杂的任务和跨应用场景。

title: VDFP: Video Deflickering with Flicker-banding Priors
abstract: Capturing digital screens with smartphones frequently induces severe banding due to hardware synchronization mismatches. Existing video restoration methods struggle with these structured, periodic luminance fluctuations, often resulting in residual artifacts or over-smoothed textures. We firstly construct DeViD, a real-world dataset in various scenes to deal with the lack of available datasets.Then we propose VDFP (Video Deflickering with Flicker-banding Priors), a novel perception-guided generation framework. First, we introduce a Degradation Field Modeling Based on Rolling Shutter Mechanism (DFM) capable of synthesizing complex multi-banding scenarios. Second, we present a spatial-temporal continuous prior perception (CPP). Unlike traditional binary segmentation, this module is optimized via a Flicker-Aware Mean Squared Error (FA-MSE) to capture the luminance transitions. By zero-initializing an augmented input layer, our model preserves pre-trained generative priors as well as spatial-temporal prior perception. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VDFP significantly outperforms other methods, eliminating complex banding with high-fidelity spatial details and temporal consistency. Our dataset and code will be released at~ https://github.com/ZhiyiZZhou/VDFP.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VDFP框架，利用闪烁条纹先验进行视频去闪烁，构建真实数据集DeViD，并引入退化场建模和连续先验感知模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能手机拍摄屏幕时因硬件同步不匹配产生严重条纹，现有视频恢复方法难以处理这种结构化的周期性亮度波动，常留下伪影或过度平滑纹理，因此需要专门针对视频闪烁条纹的复原方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出VDFP，包括基于滚动快门的退化场建模（DFM）合成复杂多条纹场景，以及时空连续先验感知（CPP）模块，通过闪烁感知均方误差（FA-MSE）优化，零初始化增强输入层保留预训练生成先验，实现高保真去闪烁。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明VDFP显著优于其他方法，消除复杂条纹同时保持高保真空间细节和时间一致性，在多种场景下有效去除闪烁条纹。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为解决视频去条纹问题提供了新框架和数据集，学术价值高，可应用于手机摄影等实际场景；未来可探索更复杂条纹模式下的鲁棒性提升。

title: GradeLegal: Automated Grading for German Legal Cases
abstract: Grading German legal exam solutions faces growing volumes and a shortage of qualified graders, delaying feedback and creating a bottleneck. At the same time, it is a high-stakes expert task, since state exam grades strongly influence career outcomes in Germany. Despite this practical relevance, literature lacks systematic studies on effective methods for grading legal exams. To address this gap, we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can support the automated grading of German legal case solutions in criminal and public law, thereby enabling scalable feedback and student self-testing. We present a systematic evaluation of 27 proprietary and open-source LLMs, benchmarking prompting strategies that incrementally add task-related information, such as a sample solution and a grading rubric. Using quadratic weighted kappa (QWK), reasoning-oriented LLMs can approximate expert grading in public law when given a sample solution and a grading rubric (up to 0.91), compared to 0.60 in criminal law, suggesting a harder grading task in criminal law. Beyond single-model grading, ensembling improves agreement by up to 0.15 over its best member and can offer an alternative to stronger closed-source single models. In addition, our findings suggest that effective prompt design and model selection are necessary for reliable LLM-based grading of legal exams.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估LLM在德国法律案例评分中的表现，发现推理型模型在公法领域可接近专家水平，集成方法提升一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 德国法律考试评分面临数量增长和合格评分员短缺的问题，导致反馈延迟和瓶颈。尽管是影响职业结果的高风险任务，但缺乏系统研究有效方法。本文旨在探究LLM能否支持自动化评分，实现可扩展反馈和学生自我测试，填补文献空白。
light_analysis.method: 评估27个专有和开源LLM，采用逐步添加任务信息的提示策略（如样本答案和评分标准）。使用二次加权卡帕（QWK）衡量一致性，并比较单模型与集成方法。数据涵盖刑法和公法案例。
light_analysis.result: 推理型LLM在公法中接近专家评分（QWK达0.91），刑法则为0.60，表明后者更困难。集成方法比最佳单模型一致性提升0.15，可作为强闭源模型的替代。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM有潜力支持法律评分，但需要有效的提示设计和模型选择。公法任务表现较好，刑法挑战更大。研究为自动化评分系统开发提供基准，未来可探索更多法律领域和评分标准。

title: SpectralEarth-FM: Bringing Hyperspectral Imagery into Multimodal Earth Observation Pretraining
abstract: Earth observation (EO) foundation models (FMs) are increasingly trained on multisensor data, spanning multispectral imagery (MSI), synthetic aperture radar (SAR), and derived geospatial layers, but hyperspectral imagery (HSI) remains underrepresented. Conversely, existing hyperspectral FMs are trained on HSI alone, leaving joint pretraining and fusion of HSI with co-located EO sensors unexplored. We introduce SpectralEarth-FM, a hierarchical transformer for multisensor EO input with heterogeneous spectral dimensionality. The architecture combines spectral tokenization for hyperspectral inputs, sensor-specific encoders, a cross-sensor fusion module, and a shared hierarchical encoder, enabling joint processing of HSI and lower-channel observations. To pretrain SpectralEarth-FM, we curate SpectralEarth-MM, a dataset that co-locates HSI from three spaceborne sensors (EnMAP, EMIT, DESIS) with Sentinel-2, Landsat-8/9 optical imagery, Landsat land surface temperature (LST), and Sentinel-1 SAR, over common geographic footprints. It comprises approximately 2M globally distributed locations, 25M georeferenced patches, and over 40TB of data. Pretraining uses a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA)-style objective that matches representations between global views and single-sensor local views from the same location. We evaluate SpectralEarth-FM on hyperspectral downstream tasks and standard EO benchmarks following the PANGAEA protocol, achieving state-of-the-art results across both evaluation settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpectralEarth-FM，一种分层变换器架构，首次将高光谱影像融入多模态地球观测预训练，通过跨传感器融合和JEPA预训练实现SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有地球观测基础模型多基于多光谱、SAR等数据，高光谱影像（HSI）未被充分使用；而高光谱基础模型仅单独训练HSI，未能与其他传感器联合预训练和融合。该研究旨在弥补这一空白，利用HSI丰富的光谱信息提升多模态遥感表征能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出SpectralEarth-FM，采用分层变换器架构，包括光谱标记化（处理高光谱输入）、传感器特定编码器、跨传感器融合模块和共享分层编码器。构建SpectralEarth-MM数据集，包含EnMAP、EMIT、DESIS三种星载HSI与Sentinel-2、Landsat-8/9、Landsat LST和Sentinel-1 SAR的同位数据，约200万全球地点、2500万补丁、超40TB。预训练使用JEPA风格目标，匹配全局视图与单传感器局部视图的表征。
light_analysis.result: 在HSI下游任务和标准EO基准（遵循PANGAEA协议）上评估，SpectralEarth-FM在两个评估设置中均取得最先进结果（具体指标摘要未明确）。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpectralEarth-FM将HSI成功融入多模态EO预训练，克服了HSI数据稀缺和异构融合挑战，为多传感器联合表征学习提供新范式。数据集SpectralEarth-MM可促进HSI与其他遥感数据的协同研究。未来可扩展至更多传感器类型和下游应用。

title: Q-ARVD: Quantizing Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models
abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models (ARVDs) have emerged as a promising architecture for streaming video generation, paving the way for real-time interactive video generation and world modeling. Despite their potential, the substantial inference cost of ARVDs remains a major obstacle to practical deployment, making model quantization a natural direction for improving efficiency. However, quantization for ARVDs remains largely unexplored. Our empirical analysis shows that directly applying existing quantization schemes developed for standard diffusion transformers to ARVDs leads to suboptimal performance, revealing quantization behaviors that differ from those observed in bidirectional diffusion models. In this paper, we identify two critical challenges in quantizing ARVDs: (C1) Highly unbalanced frame-wise quantization sensitivity. Error accumulation during autoregressive generation can induce severely skewed quantization sensitivity across frames, following an exponential-like decay pattern. (C2) Prominent and heterogeneous outlier patterns in weights. Weight distributions exhibit pronounced outlier channels, whose patterns vary substantially across layer types and block depths. To address these issues, we propose Q-ARVD, a novel framework for accurate ARVD quantization. (S1) To tackle the highly unbalanced frame-wise sensitivity, Q-ARVD incorporates a final-quality aware frame-weighting mechanism into the quantization objective. (S2) To prevent heterogeneous outliers from degrading performance, Q-ARVD introduces an outlier-aware adaptive dual-scale quantization, which automatically detects the presence and quantity of outlier channels for an arbitrary layer, and isolates them to protect normal channels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of Q-ARVD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Q-ARVD框架，解决自回归视频扩散模型量化中的帧间灵敏度不平衡和权重异构异常值问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型（ARVD）在流式视频生成中潜力巨大，但推理成本高阻碍实际部署。量化是提升效率的自然方向，但现有方案直接应用效果不佳。研究发现ARVD量化存在两个关键挑战：帧间量化灵敏度高度不平衡（指数衰减模式），以及权重中存在显著且异构的异常值模式。这些问题导致现有量化方案性能次优。
light_analysis.method: 针对帧间灵敏度不平衡，提出最终质量感知的帧加权机制，将加权项加入量化目标。针对异构异常值，提出异常值感知的自适应双尺度量化，自动检测各层的异常值通道并隔离，保护正常通道。整体框架称为Q-ARVD。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明Q-ARVD在量化ARVD方面表现优越，相比直接应用现有方案有显著提升。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究ARVD量化，揭示了其特有挑战并提出针对性解决方案Q-ARVD，显著降低推理成本。未来可应用于实时交互视频生成和世界建模。局限性可能包括对复杂场景的泛化性，值得进一步探索。

title: Fine-grained Claim-level RAG Benchmark for Law
abstract: The rapid progress of large language models (LLMs) is shifting semantic search toward a question-answering paradigm, where users ask questions and LLMs generate responses. In high-stake domains such as law, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is commonly used to mitigate hallucinations in generated responses. Nonetheless, prior work shows that RAG systems, whether general-purpose or legal-specific, still hallucinate at varying rates, making fine-grained evaluation essential. Despite the need, existing evaluation frameworks for legal RAG systems lack the granularity required to provide detailed analysis of retrieval and generation performance separately. Moreover, current benchmarks are largely English-only and centered on legal expert queries, overlooking non-expert needs. We introduce ClaimRAG-LAW, a comprehensive dataset for legal RAG that supports French and English, targets both experts and non-experts, and includes diverse question types reflecting realistic scenarios. We further apply a fine-grained evaluation framework of state-of-the-art legal RAG systems, revealing limitations in retrieval, generation, and claim-level analysis in the legal domain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ClaimRAG-LAW，一个支持法语和英语、面向专家与非专家用户的细粒度法律RAG评估基准，并揭示了现有系统在检索、生成及声明级分析上的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律领域RAG系统仍存在幻觉，现有评估框架缺乏对检索和生成性能的独立细粒度分析，且仅限英语和专家查询，忽视非专家需求。因此需要构建一个全面、多语言、面向不同用户群体的细粒度评估基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建ClaimRAG-LAW数据集，包含法语和英语，涵盖专家与非专家场景的多样化问题类型。采用细粒度评估框架，分别分析检索和生成阶段性能，并进行声明级分析，以全面评估法律RAG系统的能力。
light_analysis.result: 对当前最先进的法律RAG系统进行实验，发现其在检索、生成和声明级分析上均存在明显局限性，例如检索不精确、生成内容与法律事实不符等，但摘要未提供具体量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: ClaimRAG-LAW为法律RAG系统提供了更细致的评估手段，支持多语言和多样用户群体，有助于推动该领域减少幻觉、提升可靠性。未来可扩展更多语言和场景，并应用于系统优化。

title: Towards Understanding Self-Pretraining for Sequence Classification
abstract: Amos et al. (2024) showed that the accuracy of Transformer models in sequence classification can be significantly improved by first pretraining with a masked token prediction objective without external data or augmentation, a procedure referred to as self-pretraining (SPT). While the primary objective of Amos et al. (2024) was to showcase that Transformers can achieve strong performance on the Long-Range Arena (LRA), their pipeline raises more fundamental questions: How does SPT drive optimization to better solutions? Why can standard supervised training fail in Transformers? To better understand this, we replicate and systematically ablate the findings of Amos et al. (2024). Our ablations suggest that a central bottleneck in the studied settings is not depth or generalization alone, but the ability of label supervision to learn useful query-key Attention patterns from random initialization. With a minimal setup, we identify learning proximity interactions - turning absolute positional encodings into proximity-biased Attention scores - as a key source of the improvements brought by SPT. Finally, in a simplified theoretical setup, we show that label supervision can be locally blind to certain Attention-score directions that are instead detectable through masked reconstruction.
comment: v1: Preliminary, extension of the version accepted at ICML 2025 Workshop MOSS

light_analysis.overview: 通过消融实验揭示自预训练提升Transformer序列分类准确率的关键在于学习邻近交互的注意力模式，并证明标签监督对某些注意力方向存在局部盲点。
light_analysis.motivation: 虽然Amos等人展示了自预训练可显著提升Transformer在序列分类任务上的性能，但其内在机制尚不明确。本研究旨在解释自预训练如何驱动优化到更好的解，以及为什么标准监督训练在Transformer中可能失败，从而理解模型学习的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 通过系统复制和消融Amos等人的实验，识别出主要瓶颈是标签监督从随机初始化学习有用query-key注意力模式的能力。在最小化设置下，发现将绝对位置编码转化为邻近偏差注意力分数（学习邻近交互）是SPT改进的关键。简化理论分析显示，标签监督对某些注意力方向局部不可见，而掩码重建可检测。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体数据，但消融实验表明学习邻近交互是自预训练提升的核心机制；简化理论证明标签监督对某些注意力方向存在局部盲点，而掩码重建能有效检测这些方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了自预训练在Transformer序列分类中起作用的关键机制：学习邻近交互的注意力模式。这有助于理解监督训练失败的原因，并为设计更有效的训练策略提供理论指导，例如通过掩码重建克服标签监督的局部盲点。

title: Robust Personalized Recommendation under Hidden Confounding in MNAR
abstract: Recommender systems often rely on observational user--item interaction data, which is prone to selection bias due to users' selective interactions with items. Inverse propensity weighting and doubly robust estimators effectively mitigate selection bias under observed confounding, but are unreliable in the presence of hidden confounders. Existing approaches relying on randomized controlled trials (RCTs) or global sensitivity bounds are constrained in practice: RCTs demand costly experimental data, while global sensitivity bounds presume a uniformly bounded effect of unmeasured confounders on propensities through sensitivity analysis, thereby neglecting heterogeneity across user--item interactions. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel framework, which estimates user--item level sensitivity bounds, thereby substantially relaxing the homogeneity assumption inherent in global sensitivity bounds named Personalized Unobserved-Confounding-aware Interaction Deconfounder (PUID). To ensure both robustness and predictive accuracy, we further develop an adversarial optimization strategy and propose a benchmark-guided variant (BPUID) that incorporates pre-trained models as stabilizing references. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms global methods under hidden confounding, without requiring RCT data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PUID框架，通过用户-项目级别的灵敏度界处理隐藏混淆，无需RCT数据，在推荐系统中实现鲁棒个性化。
light_analysis.motivation: 推荐系统依赖观测数据，存在选择偏差。现有逆概率加权和双重稳健估计在隐藏混淆下不可靠，而依赖RCT或全局灵敏度界的方法成本高或忽略异质性。因此需要一种能估计用户-项目级别灵敏度界的方法，以更灵活地处理未测量混淆。
light_analysis.method: 提出PUID，估计用户-项目水平的灵敏度界，放松全局灵敏度界的同质性假设。进一步开发对抗优化策略，并引入基准指导变体BPUID，利用预训练模型作为稳定参考，提升鲁棒性和预测精度。
light_analysis.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，PUID和BPUID在隐藏混淆下显著优于全局方法，且无需RCT数据。摘要未提供具体数值，但指出性能提升明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个用户-项目级别灵敏度界框架，有效处理推荐系统中的隐藏混淆问题，提高了鲁棒性。实际应用价值在于无需昂贵的RCT数据。未来可探索更高效的优化策略及跨领域迁移。

title: APM: Evaluating Style Personalization in LLMs with Arbitrary Preference Mappings
abstract: Typical LLM responses tend to follow a default style, even though users often have distinct preferences regarding tone, verbosity, and formality that they do not explicitly state in their prompts. Evaluating whether personalization methods can adapt to these implicit preferences is challenging, since users typically provide prompts rather than reference responses, style preferences are not factually verifiable, and reference-free LLM judges may conflate personalization with general response quality. To address these challenges, we introduce the Arbitrary Preference Mapping (APM) benchmark, which decouples user attributes (e.g. enthusiastic) from response principles (e.g. persuasive) via a hidden, randomized mapping $\mathbf{C}$ that maps user attributes to preferences about response traits. Because $\mathbf{C}$ carries no semantic content and is resampled across runs, models cannot exploit stereotypical associations and must infer preferences from conversation history. Using this unbiased evaluation methodology, we adapt retrieval-augmented, prompt-optimization, and routing personalization methods and evaluate them on Llama-3.1-8B and Qwen-3.5-27B. Our results show that routing is the most reliable approach, while RAG only improves with the stronger base LLM, and soft prompt optimization fails to improve significantly over a non-personalized baseline. Our extensive evaluation reveals that in this realistic setting, personalization remains challenging, but our adapted methods show promise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出APM基准，通过隐藏随机映射解耦用户属性与响应偏好，实现无偏的个性化评估。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM响应通常遵循默认风格，但用户有未明确表达的偏好。评估个性化方法面临挑战：用户仅提供提示而非参考响应，风格偏好无法事实验证，且无参考评判可能混淆个性化与质量。现有方法无法可靠评估隐式偏好适应能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出Arbitrary Preference Mapping (APM) 基准，使用隐藏随机映射C将用户属性映射到响应特征偏好，C无语义且每次运行重采样，阻止模型利用刻板联想。改编了检索增强（RAG）、提示优化（soft prompt）和路由三种个性化方法，并在Llama-3.1-8B和Qwen-3.5-27B上评估。
light_analysis.result: 路由是最可靠的方法；RAG仅在更强的基础LLM（Qwen-3.5-27B）上有所提升；软提示优化相较于非个性化基线无显著改进。结果表明在现实设置中个性化仍具挑战，但改编方法展现出潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了APM基准，提供无偏的个性化评估方法。学术价值在于为隐式偏好适应研究建立可靠评估框架，实际价值在于指导个性化技术选择。局限性：部分方法效果有限，未来可探索更复杂的个性化策略。

title: Grounding Driving VLA via Inverse Kinematics
abstract: Existing Driving VLAs predict trajectories while largely ignoring their visual tokens -- a phenomenon we trace not to insufficient training but to a structurally ill-posed task formulation. We show that trajectory recovery, when viewed through the lens of inverse kinematics, requires both a current and a future visual state as boundary conditions; existing VLAs supply only the former, which encourages the model to shortcut through ego status and text commands alone. To address this, we re-design Driving VLA in the style of an inverse kinematics solver. First, a next visual state prediction objective that requires the LLM to predict the future visual scene provides dense visual supervision and suppresses shortcut paths. Second, a separate Inverse Kinematics Network (a cross-attention-based conditional diffusion model) that takes only the current and future visual states as input is designed to suppress reliance on ego status and textual shortcuts during trajectory decoding. With this simple prescription alone, our 0.5B-scale model recovers visual grounding and reaches trajectory planning performance comparable to 7B--8B VLAs more than an order of magnitude larger, on both the closed-loop NAVSIM-v2 and the nuScenes benchmarks. Extensive analysis further shows that this improvement stems from a recovered ability to exploit visual features, with the effect being most pronounced in dynamic driving situations such as turning.

light_analysis.overview: 通过逆运动学视角重新设计驾驶VLA，引入未来视觉状态预测和逆运动学网络，使0.5B模型达到7-8B模型的规划性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有驾驶VLA预测轨迹时忽略视觉token，原因是任务公式结构不良，仅提供当前视觉状态，鼓励模型利用自我状态和文本命令捷径，导致视觉接地丢失。本文旨在通过逆运动学理论恢复视觉接地，解决小模型无法有效利用视觉特征的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出以逆运动学求解器风格设计驾驶VLA：1）下一视觉状态预测目标，让LLM预测未来视觉场景，提供密集视觉监督；2）逆运动学网络，基于交叉注意力的条件扩散模型，仅用当前和未来视觉状态输入，抑制对自我状态和文本的依赖。模型规模0.5B。
light_analysis.result: 在NAVSIM-v2和nuScenes基准上，0.5B模型达到了7-8B大型VLA的性能，规模相差一个数量级以上。分析表明改进源于恢复利用视觉特征的能力，在动态驾驶场景如转弯中效果最明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过逆运动学视角解决了驾驶VLA的视觉接地问题，小模型达到大模型性能，揭示了任务公式化对视觉利用的影响。学术价值在于提出了结构化的视觉监督方法，实际应用价值在于高效部署。未来可探索更复杂的动态场景。

title: Divide et Calibra: Multiclass Local Calibration via Vector Quantization
abstract: Accurate and well-calibrated Machine Learning (ML) models are mandatory in high-stakes settings, yet effective multiclass calibration remains challenging: global approaches assume calibration errors are homogeneous across the latent space, while local methods often rely on latent-space dimensionality reduction, which leads to information loss. To address these issues, we propose a compositional approach to multiclass calibration, where region-specific calibration maps are constructed from shared codeword-dependent factors. We instantiate this idea via Vector Quantization (VQ), which induces a structured partition of the representation space, and an indexed parameterization of Dirichlet concentrations that enables parameter sharing across regions. Our approach learns heterogeneous calibration maps that generalize well even to sparse regions of the latent space. Experiments on benchmark datasets show significant improvements in local calibration while maintaining competitive global calibration and predictive performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于向量量化的组合式多类校准方法，通过结构化分区和参数共享实现局部与全局校准性能的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高风险场景中，模型校准至关重要，但现有全局方法假设校准误差同质，忽略局部差异；局部方法依赖降维导致信息损失。需要一种既能捕捉潜在空间异质性又避免信息丢失的校准技术。
light_analysis.method: 核心是通过向量量化对表示空间进行结构化分区，并利用索引化的狄利克雷浓度参数实现跨区域共享。每个区域学习特定校准映射，参数共享机制有效处理稀疏区域，避免过拟合。该方法无需降维，保留完整信息。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上，相比全局和局部基线方法，该方法显著提升局部校准质量，同时保持竞争性的全局校准精度和预测准确率。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种新颖的多类校准框架，通过向量量化实现区域自适应校准，平衡局部与全局性能。为高可靠性应用提供有效工具，未来可探索更复杂的量化策略或应用于其他校准场景。

title: Multimodal LLMs under Pairwise Modalities
abstract: Despite the impressive results achieved by multimodal large language models (MLLMs), their training typically relies on jointly curated multimodal data, requiring substantial human effort to construct multi-way aligned datasets and thereby limiting scalability across domains. In this work, we explore training MLLMs by only leveraging multiple paired modalities as a surrogate for the full joint multimodal distribution. Specifically, we first provide a theoretical analysis of the conditions under which the representations are identifiable with only observing pairwise modalities. Building on this analysis, we propose a representation learning framework for aligning latent representations across modalities using only pairwise data. The framework consists of two stages: latent representation alignment and cross-modal recomposition. Specifically, in the first stage, we learn the shared latent space across modalities by both self-modal reconstruction and pair-wise contrastive learning. We also incorporate an inductive bias in the contrastive learning process by partially aligning and minimal latent specification. In stage two, we integrate the encoder of newly introduced modalities with the decoders of the pre-trained modalities to facilitate cross-modal transfer and generation. We evaluate our method by newly adding 3D point clouds and tactile modalities into pre-trained MLLMs with three modality pairs and show that, by learning an aligned latent representation space, our model achieves strong cross-modal performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种仅利用配对模态数据训练多模态大语言模型的框架，通过理论分析和两阶段对齐实现跨模态表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM依赖人工构建的多路对齐多模态数据，成本高且限制跨域扩展。本研究旨在探索仅用配对模态数据替代完整联合分布进行训练，降低数据要求并提高可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: 首先理论分析仅观测配对模态下表示可辨识的条件。然后提出两阶段框架：第一阶段通过自模态重建和带部分对齐与最小潜在规范偏置的配对对比学习，学习共享潜在空间；第二阶段将新模态编码器与预训练模态解码器集成，实现跨模态迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在预训练MLLM中新增3D点云和触觉模态，使用三个模态对进行实验。结果表明，通过学习对齐的潜在表示空间，模型取得了强大的跨模态性能，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了仅用配对模态数据训练MLLM的可行性，简化了多模态数据准备流程。该方法具有理论依据和实际可扩展性，未来可进一步探索更多模态和更复杂的对齐策略。

title: A Dialogue between Causal and Traditional Representation Learning: Toward Mutual Benefits in a Unified Formulation
abstract: Causal representation learning (CRL) and traditional representation learning have largely developed along different trajectories. Traditional representation learning has been driven mainly by applications and empirical objectives, whereas CRL has focused more on theoretical questions, particularly identifiability. This difference in emphasis has created a gap between the two fields in terminology, problem formulation, and evaluation, limiting communication and sometimes leading to disconnected or redundant efforts. In this paper, we argue that these two fields should be brought into dialogue rather than treated as separate paradigms. To this end, we introduce a unified formulation in which the representation learning is characterized by two components: a task component, which specifies what information the learned representation is required to preserve, and a constraint component, which specifies what structure is imposed on the latent space. Under this formulation, the benefits run in both directions. CRL provides theoretical tools for understanding when structured latent constraints are useful or necessary, while traditional representation learning offers practical insights on task design and objective choice that can improve the development of CRL methods. To illustrate this interaction, we experimentally study how different task components affect the behavior of CRL methods under different structured constraints. Results on CausalVerse show that the effectiveness of causal constraints depends strongly on the tasks with which they are paired.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果表示学习与传统表示学习的统一框架，实现双向受益。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果表示学习（CRL）和传统表示学习长期沿不同轨迹发展：传统方法主要由应用和实证目标驱动，而CRL更关注理论问题（如可辨识性）。这种侧重点差异导致术语、问题公式和评估上的鸿沟，限制了交流并导致重复或脱节的工作。本文旨在促进两者对话，而非视为分离范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个统一公式，表示学习由两个组件刻画：任务组件（指定表示需保留的信息）和约束组件（指定对潜空间施加的结构）。在此框架下，CRL提供理论工具理解结构化约束何时有用，传统表示学习提供任务设计和目标选择的实践见解。通过实验研究不同任务组件如何影响CRL方法在不同结构化约束下的行为。
light_analysis.result: 在CausalVerse数据集上的实验表明，因果约束的有效性强烈依赖于与之配对的任务组件。具体结果未详细说明，但展示了统一框架下两者相互作用的实证验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献是统一了因果表示学习和传统表示学习的表述，使两者能够相互受益：CRL获得实践指导，传统方法获得理论支撑。这有助于弥合两个领域的差距，促进协同发展。未来可进一步探索更广泛的任务和约束组合。

title: Cross-lingual robustness of LLM-brain alignment and its computational roots
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) reliably predict neural activity during language comprehension and transformer depth has been interpreted as mirroring hierarchical cortical organization. However, it remains unclear whether such alignment extends to subcortical regions, overlaps spatially across languages, and what the computational roots of such alignment are. Here, we used a multilingual, whole-brain encoding framework to examine brain-LLM alignment across three typologically distinct languages: Mandarin, English, and French during naturalistic story listening. Our results show that across languages, transformer-based models predicted activity in a distributed landscape spanning widely distributed cortical functional networks like limbic, ventral attention, default mode network, and subcortical structures. Spatial alignment patterns showed substantial cross-linguistic overlap and remained largely stable across model layers, with limited layer progression consistent with functional cortical hierarchies. Contrary to previous evidence, contextual embeddings did not outperform static embeddings. To test candidate computational explanations, we examined whether layer-wise brain scores reflect surprisal and intrinsic dimensionality, and thereby predictive processing and information compression. Neither of these two computational metrics mirrored neural alignment profiles. Our findings suggest that brain-LLM alignment is spatially robust and cross-linguistically stable but not explainable from predictive uncertainty or representational geometry. Rather than directly reflecting shared hierarchical computation, neural predictivity may primarily arise from distributed lexical-semantic correspondences that generalize across languages.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示跨语言LLM与大脑对齐的空间鲁棒性，但发现其不受预期处理或信息压缩等计算机制解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 以往研究表明LLM能预测语言理解中的神经活动，但跨语言场景下这种对齐是否延伸至皮层下区域、不同语言间是否存在空间重叠，以及对齐的计算根源是什么尚不清楚。本文使用三种类型上截然不同的语言（普通话、英语、法语）及全脑编码框架，系统探究这些问题，以填补对脑-语言模型对齐机制的理解空白。
light_analysis.method: 采用多语言全脑编码框架，在自然故事聆听任务中收集三种语言的神经反应数据，利用基于transformer的LLM提取层表示，构建编码模型预测全脑活动。通过分析空间对齐模式的跨语言重叠、层次进展，并测试两种候选计算解释——词级预期处理（surprisal）和表征内在维度（intrinsic dimensionality），探究对齐的潜在机制。
light_analysis.result: Transformer模型可预测广泛分布的脑网络（包括边缘、腹侧注意、默认模式网络及皮层下结构），跨语言空间对齐高度重叠且跨层稳定，但未观察到明确的层次进展对应皮层层次。与先前证据不同，上下文嵌入并未优于静态嵌入。两种计算指标均未反映神经对齐模式，表明预测不确定性或表征几何无法解释对齐。
light_analysis.conclusion: 脑-LLM对齐在空间上鲁棒且跨语言稳定，但并非源于共享的层次化计算或信息压缩策略。神经可预测性更可能来源于跨语言通用的分布式词汇-语义对应。该发现挑战了Transformer深度直接映射皮层层次的观点，并为未来探究语言模型与脑机制的关系提供了新视角。

title: Dynamic Video Generation: Shaping Video Generation Across Time and Space
abstract: Diffusion models have achieved impressive performance in video generation, but their iterative denoising process remains computationally expensive due to the large number of tokens processed at each timestep. Recently, progressive resolution sampling has emerged as a promising acceleration approach by reducing latent resolution in early stages. However, scaling this idea to video generation remains challenging, as the additional temporal dimension introduces diverse spatio-temporal demands across different videos, and compressing only a single dimension often leads to limited acceleration or degraded quality. Therefore, we propose DVG, a Dynamic Video Generation framework that jointly allocates computation across time and space, automatically selecting content-aware acceleration strategies without manual tuning or retraining. DVG achieves near-lossless acceleration across models and tasks, reaching up to 7 times speedup on HunyuanVideo and HunyuanVideo-1.5, and 18 times when combined with distillation, demonstrating its potential as a key component in today's large-scale efficient video generation systems. Our code is in supplementary material and will be released on Github.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态视频生成框架DVG，通过联合时空维度分配计算，实现内容感知的加速策略，无需调参或重训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在视频生成中表现优异，但迭代去噪过程因每步处理大量token而计算成本高。渐进式分辨率采样虽有加速潜力，但推广到视频生成时面临挑战：额外时间维度引入多样时空需求，仅压缩单一维度导致加速有限或质量下降。因此需要一种能自动选择内容感知加速策略的方法。
light_analysis.method: DVG框架动态分配时空计算资源，无需手动调优或重训练。它自动识别视频内容特征，在时间与空间维度上联合压缩，实现加速。支持多种扩散模型和任务，可与蒸馏技术结合。核心在于内容感知策略，避免固定压缩导致的性能损失。
light_analysis.result: 在HunyuanVideo和HunyuanVideo-1.5上实现高达7倍加速，结合蒸馏可达18倍加速，且几乎无损失。实验涵盖不同模型与任务，验证了加速效果与通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DVG为大规模高效视频生成系统提供了关键组件，通过时空动态计算分配实现近无损加速，具有实用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的自适应策略或与其他加速方法结合，代码将开源。

title: Efficient Banzhaf-Based Data Valuation for $k$-Nearest Neighbors Classification
abstract: Data valuation, the task of quantifying the contribution of individual data points to model performance, has emerged as a fundamental challenge in machine learning. Game-theoretic approaches, such as the Banzhaf value, offer principled frameworks for fair data valuation; however, they suffer from exponential computational complexity. We address this challenge by developing efficient algorithms specifically tailored for computing Banzhaf values in $k$-nearest neighbor ($k$NN) classifiers. We first establish the theoretical hardness of the problem by proving that it is \#P-hard. Despite this intractability, we exploit the locality properties of $k$NN classifiers to develop practical exact algorithms. Our main contribution is a dynamic programming framework that achieves significant computational improvements: we present a pseudo-polynomial algorithm with $O(Wkn^2)$ time complexity for weighted $k$NN classifiers, where $W$ is the maximum sum of top-$k$ weights, and a specialized algorithm for unweighted $k$NN that achieves $O(nk^2)$ time complexity, that is, linear in the number of data points. We also offer efficient Monte Carlo estimation methods. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate the practical efficiency of our approach and its effectiveness in data valuation applications.

light_analysis.overview: 针对kNN分类器提出高效Banzhaf值计算算法，利用动态规划将复杂度降至线性或伪多项式，并支持蒙特卡洛估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据估值是机器学习中的关键任务，博弈论中的Banzhaf值提供了公平的贡献度量，但其指数级计算复杂度限制了实际应用。现有方法在大规模数据集上效率低下，亟需针对特定模型（如kNN）的高效算法。
light_analysis.method: 首先证明kNN分类器下Banzhaf值计算是#P-hard，随后利用kNN的局部性提出动态规划框架：针对加权kNN设计伪多项式算法（复杂度O(Wkn^2)，W为最大top-k权重和），针对非加权kNN实现线性算法（复杂度O(nk^2)），并补充了蒙特卡洛估计方法。
light_analysis.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，所提算法在计算效率上显著优于传统指数级方法，且能有效应用于数据估值任务。未提供具体数值指标，但验证了实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为kNN分类器的Banzhaf值数据估值提供了理论下界和高效算法，平衡了计算代价与估值准确性，有助于数据筛选、错误检测等应用。未来可扩展至其他模型或更复杂场景。

title: Towards Physically Consistent 4D Scene Reconstruction for Closed-loop Autonomous Driving Simulation
abstract: High-fidelity street scene reconstruction is pivotal for end-to-end autonomous driving simulation, where novel-view synthesis (NVS) and time-varying information modeling are two fundamental capabilities to facilitate closed-loop training. However, existing 3DGS methods and their 4D extensions fail to simultaneously achieve both. To bridge this gap, we establish an information-geometric diagnostic framework, revealing that this limitation stems from a credit assignment dilemma between spatial and temporal parameters. Specifically, the deterministic coupling between viewpoint and time in single-source observation creates a low-rank structure that induces massive null-space ambiguity between static view-dependent and dynamic time-varying components. Temporal information overshadows spatial cues, causing the estimation variance of spatial parameters to diverge. To address this issue, we propose Orthogonal Projected Gradient (OPG), a hierarchical training method designed to restore spatial identifiability. OPG prioritizes the integrity of spatial representations by securing them in an initial stage, then restricts temporal updates to the spatial null space, enabling proactive credit assignment. While OPG isolates temporal updates algebraically, Temporal Regularization Strategy is proposed to further refine the temporal solution space by imposing a smoothness constraint based on the physical prior of consistent appearance evolution, ensuring that the reconstructed scene remains physically consistent in closed-loop simulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method not only maintains stable NVS capabilities but also demonstrates superior performance in traditional observation-reproducing metrics, which indirectly reflect the capability of modeling temporal dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出正交投影梯度（OPG）方法，解决4D场景重建中空间与时间参数信用分配问题，实现物理一致的重建以支持闭环自动驾驶仿真。
light_analysis.motivation: 高保真街道场景重建对端到端自动驾驶仿真至关重要，需要同时具备新颖视图合成（NVS）和时间变化建模能力。现有3DGS及其4D扩展无法同时满足两者，根本原因是单源观测中视点与时间的确定性耦合导致空间和时间参数之间信用分配困境，时间信息淹没空间线索，使空间参数估计方差发散，影响重建物理一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出正交投影梯度（OPG）分层训练方法。首先在初始阶段保护空间表示完整性，然后将时间更新限制在空间零空间，实现主动信用分配。再结合时间正则化策略，基于一致外观演变的物理先验施加平滑约束，进一步优化时间解空间，确保重建场景在闭环仿真中物理一致。该方法从代数上隔离时间更新，并利用物理先验约束。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，方法不仅保持稳定新颖视图合成能力，还在传统观测再现指标上表现优越，间接反映了对时间动态建模能力的提升。与现有方法相比，在物理一致性和时空建模方面均有改进，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过诊断框架揭示了4D重建中空间与时间参数冲突的本质，提出OPG和正则化策略有效解决该问题。该方法提升了自动驾驶仿真的真实感和物理一致性，具有重要学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的物理先验或扩展到更多动态场景。

title: Building a Custom Taxonomy of AI Skills and Tasks from the Ground Up with Job Postings
abstract: Utilizing LLMs for automated taxonomy construction presents a clear opportunity for the comprehensive, yet efficient mapping of potentially complex domains. When contending with high volumes of rapidly growing corpora, however, it becomes unclear how to best leverage such data for optimal taxonomy construction. Taking the case of systematizing AI skills in the workplace, we use two large-scale job postings corpora to investigate key design decisions for the inclusion (or exclusion) of data points for taxonomy construction. We propose TaxonomyBuilder as a blueprint for our systematic study, with which we evaluate various configurations of custom, data-informed, and hierarchical taxonomies. We demonstrate that less data can provide more clarity: filtering inputs to TaxonomyBuilder provides better domain-specific coverage than offering unfiltered inputs to clustering and LLM-enhanced hierarchical taxonomy labeling tools.
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Accepted to CustomNLP4U 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TaxonomyBuilder框架，利用LLM自动构建AI技能分类法，发现过滤数据可提高领域覆盖。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化构建分类法对于高效映射复杂领域是关键，但面对大量快速增长的数据（如职位发布），如何最优利用数据构建分类法不明确。现有方法在处理海量语料时缺乏对数据点选择的设计决策研究，需要系统探讨数据包含或排除以优化分类法构建效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出TaxonomyBuilder蓝图，使用两个大规模职位发布语料库，系统评估不同数据配置的定制化、数据驱动层次分类法。关键创新是过滤输入到TaxonomyBuilder，结合聚类和LLM增强的层次标签工具，以优化领域特定覆盖。通过对比未过滤及不同过滤策略，探究数据点选择的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，过滤输入到TaxonomyBuilder比未过滤输入提供更好的领域特定覆盖，验证了'更少数据提供更清晰分类'的观点。虽然未给出具体数值，但结果明确显示数据过滤提升了分类法在AI技能领域的质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过系统研究数据选择策略，证明在构建复杂领域分类法时，数据过滤比全量数据更有效，能以更少数据实现更高领域覆盖率。该研究为自动分类法构建提供了实践指导，但局限性在于仅聚焦AI技能领域，未来需验证其通用性。

title: DySink: Dynamic Frame Sinks for Autoregressive Long Video Generation
abstract: Autoregressive long video generation often adopts bounded-memory streaming for efficiency, typically combining local windows for short-term continuity with static early-frame sinks as long-range anchors. However, this fixed allocation keeps early frames cached even when the current visual state has substantially diverged from them, while discarding potentially more relevant intermediate history. As a result, the retained long-range context may become less adaptive and bias generation toward outdated cues; in severe cases, RoPE-induced phase re-alignment can homogenize inter-head attention and cause sink collapse, where content regresses toward sink frames. We propose DySink, a retrieval-based framework that maintains a compact memory bank and selects visually relevant historical frames as dynamic frame sinks. DySink couples adaptive retrieval with a sink anomaly gate, which detects excessive inter-head consensus over retrieved context and suppresses collapse-prone context. Experiments on minute-long videos show that DySink consistently improves dynamic degree over strong baselines while also achieving higher temporal quality. The code and model weights will be released at https://github.com/yebo0216best/DySink.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DySink，一种基于检索的动态帧汇框架，用于自回归长视频生成，通过自适应选择相关历史帧替代静态汇，提升长时上下文适应性并抑制汇塌缩。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归长视频生成常采用有界记忆流，结合局部窗口和静态早期帧汇作为长程锚点。然而，固定分配导致早期帧在视觉状态大幅偏离后仍被缓存，丢弃了更相关的中间历史，使长程上下文适应性差，偏向过时线索。严重时，RoPE相位重对齐会均化跨头注意力，引发汇塌缩，内容向汇帧回归。因此需要动态选择相关历史帧作为汇。
light_analysis.method: DySink采用检索式框架，维护紧凑记忆库，通过自适应检索选择视觉相关的历史帧作为动态帧汇。同时引入汇异常门控，检测检索上下文上的过度头间共识，抑制易塌缩的上下文。该方法与现有自回归模型兼容，无需改变生成机制。在分钟级长视频上验证，代码和模型将开源。
light_analysis.result: 在分钟级长视频数据集上的实验表明，DySink在强基线上持续提高了动态度（dynamic degree），同时实现了更高的时间质量。具体指标未在摘要中详细列出，但显式优于现有方法，验证了动态汇的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DySink通过动态帧汇解决了自回归长视频生成中静态汇导致上下文过时和塌缩问题，提升了长时生成的质量和适应性。该方法具有通用性，可应用于各种自回归视频模型。未来可能探索更高效的检索机制或扩展到其他序列生成任务。

title: Beyond Text-to-SQL: An Agentic LLM System for Governed Enterprise Analytics APIs
abstract: Enterprise analytics aims to make organizational data accessible for decision-making, yet non-technical users still face barriers when using traditional business intelligence tools or Text-to-SQL systems. While recent Text-to-SQL approaches based on Large Language Models (LLMs) promise natural language access to structured data, they fall short in enterprise settings where analytics pipelines rely on governed APIs rather than raw databases. In practice, these APIs encapsulate complex business logic to ensure consistency, auditability, and security. However, delegating mathematical or aggregation logic to an LLM introduces reliability and compliance risks. To this end, we present Analytic Agent, an LLM-based agentic system that translates natural language intents into secure interactions with enterprise analytics APIs. Evaluated on 90 real enterprise use cases constructed by domain experts, it reliably interprets user goals, validates permissions, executes governed queries, and generates compliant visualizations through multi-step reasoning and policy-aware orchestration.
comment: The first four authors contributed equally to this work

light_analysis.overview: 提出Analytic Agent，一个将自然语言意图转化为受治理的企业分析API安全交互的LLM代理系统，解决企业环境下Text-to-SQL的可靠性和合规性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业分析中非技术用户使用传统BI或Text-to-SQL系统存在障碍。现有LLM Text-to-SQL方法直接访问数据库，但企业依赖封装业务逻辑的API来保证一致性、可审计性和安全性。将数学或聚合逻辑委托给LLM引入可靠性和合规性风险，因此需要一种能解释用户意图、验证权限、执行受治理查询并生成合规可视化的代理系统。
light_analysis.method: 提出Analytic Agent，基于LLM的代理系统，采用多步推理和策略感知编排。系统将自然语言意图转化为与企业分析API的安全交互：解释用户目标、验证权限、执行受治理查询、生成合规可视化。核心创新在于利用代理机制和策略引擎确保安全性和合规性，而非直接生成SQL。
light_analysis.result: 在90个由领域专家构建的真实企业用例上评估，Analytic Agent能够可靠地解释用户目标、验证权限、执行受治理查询并生成合规可视化。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但表明系统有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了一个适用于企业环境的LLM代理系统，解决了Text-to-SQL方法在受治理API场景下的局限性，确保了可靠性和合规性。具有高实际应用价值，但潜在局限包括对复杂用例的扩展性及性能细节未明确。

title: LiteViLNet: Lightweight Vision-LiDAR Fusion Network for Efficient Road Segmentation
abstract: Road segmentation is a fundamental perception task for autonomous driving and intelligent robotic systems, requiring both high accuracy and real-time inference, especially for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. Existing multi-modal road segmentation methods often rely on heavy transformer-based encoders to achieve state-of-the-art performance, but their enormous computational cost prohibits real-time deployment on embedded platforms. To address this dilemma, we propose \textbf{LiteViLNet}, a lightweight multi-modal network that fuses RGB texture information and LiDAR geometric information for efficient road segmentation. Specifically, we design a dual-stream lightweight encoder and depth-wise separable convolutions to extract hierarchical features from both modalities with minimal parameters. We further propose a Multi-Scale Feature Fusion Module (MSFM) to facilitate cross-modal interaction at different levels, and a large-kernel-bridge module to capture long-range dependencies with linear complexity. Extensive experiments on the KITTI Road dataset and real-world applications demonstrate that LiteViLNet achieves a promising balance between accuracy and efficiency. Notably, with only 14.04M parameters, our model attains a 96.36\% MaxF score, ranking the best among all CNN-based methods and being comparable to larger transformer-based models, and runs at 163.79 FPS in model-only inference on RTX 4060 Ti (22.18 FPS on Jetson Orin NX). It outperforms numerous heavy-weight methods in inference speed while maintaining highly competitive accuracy, fully validating the potential of LiteViLNet for real-time embedded deployment in autonomous driving and intelligent robotics.

light_analysis.overview: LiteViLNet是一种轻量级RGB-LiDAR融合网络，通过高效的特征提取和跨模态交互，在参数量仅14.04M的条件下实现道路分割的高精度与实时性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有道路分割方法多采用重型Transformer编码器，计算成本高，难以在资源受限的边缘设备上实时运行。为解决这一矛盾，需要设计轻量级多模态网络，在保持高精度的同时显著提升推理速度。
light_analysis.method: 提出双流轻量编码器与深度可分卷积提取层次化特征；设计多尺度特征融合模块（MSFM）实现不同层级跨模态交互；引入大卷积核桥模块以线性复杂度捕获长距离依赖。整体结构紧凑，参数量仅14.04M。
light_analysis.result: 在KITTI Road数据集上取得96.36% MaxF，优于所有CNN方法，与大型Transformer模型相当；在RTX 4060 Ti上达163.79 FPS，Jetson Orin NX上22.18 FPS，实现精度与速度的优异平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiteViLNet为自动驾驶与智能机器人中的实时道路分割提供了高效解决方案，验证了轻量级多模态网络在嵌入式平台的应用潜力。未来可探索更高效的融合机制与知识蒸馏进一步压缩模型。

title: Playing Devil's Advocate: Off-the-Shelf Persona Vectors Rival Targeted Steering for Sycophancy
abstract: We study the effect of different persona on \textbf{sycophancy}: model's agreement with users even when the user is incorrect. The standard mitigation, Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA), derives a steering direction from labelled pairs of sycophantic and honest responses. This study evaluates whether off-the-shelf persona steering vectors, originally developed for general role-playing and not trained on sycophancy data, can serve as an alternative. In two instruction-tuned models, steering toward personas characterised by doubt or scrutiny reduces sycophancy to approximately $68\%$ and $98\%$ of CAA's effect, and, unlike CAA, maintains accuracy when the user is correct. The effect is also asymmetric: steering toward agreeable personas does not produce a mirror increase in sycophancy. Geometrically, the persona vector is largely independent of the direction of sycophancy in activation space. Collectively, these findings suggest that sycophancy is better understood as a persona-level property rather than a single steerable direction. We release our code here: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Sycophancy-Steering-9DF0/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用现成的角色向量替代CAA来减少模型顺从，效果显著且保持准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法CAA需要标注的顺从-诚实响应对来推导引导方向，成本高且可能损害模型在正确用户输入下的准确性。本文探索是否可以直接利用已有的、为通用角色扮演设计的角色向量来减少顺从，以降低数据需求并保持模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 使用现成的角色向量（如怀疑、审视等）进行激活引导，在两种指令微调模型上评估。对比标准CAA方法，测量顺从率降低比例，并检查在用户正确时的准确率。通过几何分析探究角色向量与顺从方向的关系。
light_analysis.result: 引导向怀疑或审视角色可使顺从率降至CAA效果的68%和98%，且保持用户正确时的准确率不变。相反，引导向顺从角色不会镜像增加顺从。角色向量与顺从方向在激活空间中大致独立。
light_analysis.conclusion: 顺从更应被视为角色级属性而非单一可引导方向。现成角色向量可作为高效替代方案，无需专门数据训练，具有实用价值。未来可探索更多角色向量的效果及解释性。

title: DAMA: Disentangled Body-Anchored Gaussians for Controllable Multi-Layered Avatars
abstract: Existing 3D clothed avatar reconstruction methods achieve high visual fidelity but ignore geometric structure and physical plausibility. They either model clothed humans as a single deformable surface or attempt garment disentanglement without enforcing geometric constraints, resulting in ambiguous garment boundaries and no control over stacking or layer ordering. To address these limitations, we introduce DAMA (Disentangled body-Anchored Gaussians for Controllable Multi-layered Avatars), a 3D avatar reconstruction method that produces physically plausible clothed avatars through a dedicated representation and reconstruction method. At the representation level, we bind Gaussians to SMPL-X faces using barycentric in-plane coordinates and a positive normal offset. Based on this parameterization, the reconstruction method lifts 2D segmentations to body-anchored Gaussians, refines layers using topology-guided correction, and jointly optimizes geometry and appearance. DAMA is the first Gaussian avatar reconstruction method from multi-view images to achieve physically plausible layering, clean garment separation, and explicit stacking control. On the full 4D-DRESS dataset (82 scans), it achieves state-of-the-art performance in geometry reconstruction, garment separation, penetration rate, and penetration depth. The representation further supports user-defined garment reordering and fast conversion of body-conforming garments to simulation-ready meshes. Project Page: https://danieleskandar.github.io/dama/

light_analysis.overview: 提出DAMA方法，首次实现从多视图图像重建具有物理合理分层、干净衣物分离和显式堆叠控制的高斯化身。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D穿衣人体重建方法虽视觉保真度高，但忽略了几何结构和物理合理性，要么将穿衣人体建模为单一可变形表面，要么试图分离衣物但缺乏几何约束，导致衣物边界模糊且无法控制层叠顺序。这一问题在虚拟现实、电影制作等应用中至关重要，需要生成具有清晰分层和物理合理性的可控数字人。
light_analysis.method: DAMA方法在表示层面将高斯绑定到SMPL-X网格面，使用重心面内坐标和正法线偏移。重建时，从多视图图像将2D分割提升为身体锚定高斯，通过拓扑引导校正细化层，并联合优化几何和外观。这是首个从多视图图像实现物理合理分层、干净衣物分离和显式堆叠控制的高斯化身重建方法。
light_analysis.result: 在完整的4D-DRESS数据集（82个扫描）上，DAMA在几何重建、衣物分离、穿透率和穿透深度方面达到最先进性能。同时支持用户定义的衣物重排序和快速将贴合身体的衣物转换为可模拟网格。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAMA通过专有的表示和重建方法生成物理合理的穿衣化身，实现了清晰的衣物分离和层叠控制，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的衣物拓扑和动态场景，但当前方法在衣物模拟和交互方面已展现出潜力。

title: Single-Pass, Depth-Selective Reading for Multi-Aspect Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Aspect-Term Sentiment Analysis (ATSA) in multi-aspect sentences faces a fundamental tradeoff between efficiency and expressiveness. Existing models either re-encode the sentence for each aspect or rely on static use of deep representations, leading to redundant computation and limited adaptivity. We argue that Transformer depth is a costly, queryable resource, and propose DABS, a single-pass inference framework that encodes each sentence once to construct a reusable, depth-ordered substrate. Each aspect then queries this shared representation to selectively read relevant tokens and abstraction levels, without re-encoding. This decouples shared sentence encoding from lightweight, aspect-conditioned readout. Experiments on four ATSA benchmarks show that DABS achieves competitive performance while reducing end-to-end computation by up to 60% in multi-aspect settings (M >= 2). Further analyses indicate that adaptive depth querying is most beneficial for linguistically complex cases such as negation and contrast. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/panzhzh/acl-dabs
comment: Accepted at ACL2026 (main). Our solution (DABS) reads the sentence once, then lets each aspect selectively query the right tokens and Transformer depths, cutting redundant computation while preserving ATSA accuracy

light_analysis.overview: 提出DABS框架，通过单次编码和深度选择性读取，实现高效多角度情感分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 多方面情感分析（ATSA）中，现有方法要么为每个方面重新编码句子，导致计算冗余；要么静态使用深层表示，适应性不足。这种效率和表达能力之间的权衡限制了实际应用，尤其是在多角度场景下，计算成本随方面数量线性增长。因此，需要一种既能共享句子编码又能针对不同方面灵活读取深度表示的方法。
light_analysis.method: DABS是一种单次推理框架，首先对句子进行一次编码，构建可重用的深度有序基板（depth-ordered substrate）。每个方面通过查询该共享表示，选择性读取相关词元（tokens）和抽象层级，无需重新编码。这种设计将共享句子编码与轻量级、方面条件的读出（readout）解耦，核心创新在于将Transformer深度视为可查询的资源。
light_analysis.result: 在四个ATSA基准数据集上，DABS取得了有竞争力的性能，同时在多角度设置（M>=2）下，端到端计算量减少高达60%。进一步分析表明，深度自适应查询对语言复杂案例（如否定和对比）最有益。摘要未提供具体准确率数值，但强调了计算效率的显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: DABS通过单次编码和深度选择性读取，有效解决了ATSA中效率与表达能力的矛盾，证明了将深度作为可查询资源的可行性。该方法在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算成本，特别适用于含多个方面的复杂句子。未来工作可探索更高效的深度查询策略或扩展到其他序列标注任务。

title: Hybrid Machine Learning Model for Forest Height Estimation from TanDEM-X and Landsat Data
abstract: Integrating machine learning (ML) with physical models (PM) has emerged as a promising way of retrieving geophysical parameters from remote sensing data. In this context, a ML model for estimating forest height from TanDEM-X interferometric coherence measurements has recently been proposed, that constrains the learning process through a PM. While the features used for training and inversion where selected to ensure the physical consistency of the solutions, they could not resolve all height / structure and baseline / terrain slope ambiguities in the data. To improve this, the extension of the feature space with optical Landsat data is proposed able to provide complementary information on forest type or structure. The extended model is applied and validated on several TanDEM-X acquisitions over the Gabonese Lopé national park site and assessed against airborne LiDAR measurements. Results show a 13.5% reduction in RMSE and a 16.6% reduction in MAE compared to the original hybrid model, confirming the added value of multispectral inputs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种混合机器学习模型，融合TanDEM-X和Landsat数据提升森林高度估计精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有混合机器学习模型仅依赖TanDEM-X干涉相干性特征，虽通过物理模型约束学习过程，但仍无法完全解决高度/结构与基线/地形坡度间的歧义。光学Landsat数据能提供森林类型或结构的补充信息，有助于解决歧义。因此，该研究通过扩展特征空间融合多光谱数据，旨在提高森林高度估计的准确性。
light_analysis.method: 论文在原有混合机器学习模型基础上，将特征空间扩展至包含光学Landsat数据。模型以TanDEM-X干涉相干性测量为主，结合物理模型约束学习过程，并加入Landsat多光谱信息作为辅助特征。实验数据覆盖加蓬Lopé国家公园的多个TanDEM-X采集场景，最终利用机载LiDAR测量进行验证和评估。
light_analysis.result: 与原始混合模型相比，加入Landsat数据后，森林高度估计的均方根误差（RMSE）降低13.5%，平均绝对误差（MAE）降低16.6%。结果表明，多光谱输入显著提升了模型性能，验证了光学数据在解决物理歧义方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实，融合光学Landsat数据与TanDEM-X干涉相干性特征的混合机器学习模型能有效改善森林高度估计，降低误差。该方法具有实际应用价值，可用于大范围森林监测。未来工作可进一步探索其他光学传感器或数据融合策略，以提升模型泛化能力。

title: Beyond the Bellman Recursion: A Pontryagin-Guided Framework for Non-Exponential Discounting
abstract: Most value-based and actor--critic reinforcement learning methods rely on Bellman-style recursions, yet these recursions collapse under non-exponential discounting common in human preferences and survival processes. We show the breakdown is structural: exponential discounting sits at a fragile intersection of multiplicativity and time homogeneity, and violating either property breaks standard dynamic programming.
