To overcome this, we propose Pontryagin-Guided Direct Policy Optimization (PG-DPO), a variational framework that abandons recursion and couples the Pontryagin Maximum Principle with Monte Carlo rollouts via an Adjoint-MC projection enforcing pointwise Hamiltonian maximization. Across multi-dimensional hyperbolic and survival-discount benchmarks, PG-DPO improves accuracy and stability where equation-driven solvers and critic-based baselines diverge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PG-DPO框架，通过Pontryagin最大值原理解决非指数折扣下强化学习方法的失效问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统基于值函数和actor-critic的强化学习方法依赖Bellman递归，但在非指数折扣（如人类偏好和生存过程）下递归失效。作者指出指数折扣位于乘性和时间齐次性的脆弱交点上，违反任一属性都会破坏标准动态规划。现有方法无法处理这种结构性破坏，因此需要全新的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Pontryagin-Guided Direct Policy Optimization (PG-DPO)，一种变分框架，放弃传统递归，将Pontryagin最大值原理与蒙特卡洛展开结合，通过Adjoint-MC投影强制执行逐点哈密顿最大化。该框架直接优化策略，避免了递归带来的偏差。
light_analysis.result: 在多维双曲线和生存折扣基准测试中，PG-DPO在方程驱动求解器和基于critic的基线方法发散的情况下，显著提高了准确性和稳定性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了应对非指数折扣的强化学习新框架，通过放弃递归和引入Pontryagin原理，有效解决了传统方法的失效问题。该研究对于理解人类偏好和生存过程中的决策具有理论和实践意义。潜在局限性可能包括计算复杂度较高，未来可探索更高效的实现。

title: Towards Context-Invariant Safety Alignment for Large Language Models
abstract: Preference-based post-training aligns LLMs with human intent, yet safety behavior often remains brittle. A model may refuse a harmful request in a standard prompt but comply when the same intent is wrapped in adversarial wording. We suggest that robust safety requires context-invariant alignment, where behavior depends on the underlying intent rather than surface form. Enforcing invariance is difficult in alignment because not all training signals are equally trustworthy; for some prompt variants we can obtain verifiable feedback (e.g., multiple-choice), while for open-ended variants we typically rely on noisy, gameable reward proxies (e.g., learned judges). As a result, standard symmetric invariance regularizers can reduce cross-context discrepancies by lowering performance on reliable variants instead of improving open-ended robustness. To address this, we introduce Anchor Invariance Regularization (AIR), which treats verifiable prompts as anchors and uses a stop-gradient target to regularize only the open-ended variants toward the anchor performance. AIR is implemented as a plug-in auxiliary loss and combined with group-based preference optimization (e.g., GRPO) via heterogeneous prompt grouping. Across Safety, Moral Reasoning, and Math, AIR improves context invariance, boosting in-distribution group accuracy by 12.71% and out-of-distribution consistency by 33.49%, making safety constraints robust to adversarial framings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Anchor Invariance Regularization (AIR)，通过锚点不变性正则化实现LLM安全对齐的上下文不变性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于偏好的后训练使LLM符合人类意图，但安全行为脆弱，同一有害意图在不同表述下可能被遵从。由于训练信号可靠性不一致（如可验证反馈与噪声代理奖励），标准对称正则化可能降低可靠变体性能而非提升开放变体鲁棒性。因此需要一种上下文不变的对齐方法，使行为取决于底层意图而非表面形式。
light_analysis.method: 提出Anchor Invariance Regularization (AIR)，将可验证提示（如选择题）作为锚点，使用停止梯度目标仅对开放变体（如开放式生成）进行正则化，使其向锚点性能对齐。AIR作为插件辅助损失，与基于组的偏好优化（如GRPO）结合，通过异构提示分组实现。该方法仅调节开放变体，避免对可靠锚点性能的负面影响。
light_analysis.result: 在Safety、Moral Reasoning和Math任务上，AIR显著提升上下文不变性：组内准确率提升12.71%，分布外一致性（跨上下文）提升33.49%。与基线方法相比，安全约束对对抗性表述（如文字游戏）更加鲁棒，且不牺牲标准提示下的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIR有效实现了上下文不变的安全对齐，通过区分可靠与不可靠训练信号，提升鲁棒性而不损害可靠变体性能。该工作为构建更鲁棒的LLM安全机制提供了新思路，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索将AIR扩展到更多模态或更复杂的对齐场景。

title: CHOIR: Contact-aware 4D Hand-Object Interaction Reconstruction
abstract: We ask whether everyday open-world monocular videos can be turned into reusable 4D interaction primitives: articulated hand motion, object shape with 6D pose over time, and the when/where of contact. Such a capability would enable scalable mining of real interactions and, beyond reconstruction, support scene-aware synthesis and planning. However, reconstructing hand-object interaction (HOI) from challenging monocular videos remains difficult: methods often assume known objects or curated scenes, and separately estimated hands and objects easily become misaligned under clutter, occlusion, and unseen object geometries. Targeting this setting, we present CHOIR, a Contact-aware HOI Reconstruction framework for a monocular camera, using contact as an explicit coupling signal between hands and objects. CHOIR first initializes a coarse, contact-agnostic 4D HOI sequence from open-world visual priors. It then introduces a generative HOI spatial rectification module to predict ray-depth corrections and rectify hand-object relative placement, then derive initial per-frame contact correspondences on the rectified geometry. Last, a contact-aware joint optimization with dynamically updated contact constraints enforces geometric, temporal, and contact consistency. Experiments on controlled and challenging videos show that CHOIR improves object reconstruction, physical plausibility, and temporal consistency over state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CHOIR框架，利用接触作为显式耦合信号，从单目视频重建4D手-物体交互序列。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手-物体交互重建方法通常假设已知物体或精心设计的场景，在杂乱、遮挡和未见物体几何形状下，分开估计的手和物体容易错位。需要从日常开放世界单目视频中重建可复用的4D交互原语，以支持大规模真实交互挖掘和场景感知合成与规划。
light_analysis.method: CHOIR首先从开放世界视觉先验初始化粗略的、无接触的4D HOI序列。然后引入生成式HOI空间修正模块，预测射线深度修正并纠正手-物体相对位置，在修正后的几何上推导初始每帧接触对应关系。最后，通过动态更新的接触约束进行接触感知联合优化，强制几何、时间和接触一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在受控和具有挑战性的视频上实验表明，CHOIR在物体重建、物理合理性和时间一致性方面优于现有最先进方法。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: CHOIR通过显式接触耦合提升了手-物体交互重建的准确性和物理合理性，具有学术价值，可支持场景感知合成与规划。未来工作可能涉及更复杂的交互场景或扩展至多手交互。

title: Modeling Temporal scRNA-seq Data with Latent Gaussian Process and Optimal Transport
abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing provides insights into gene expression at single-cell resolution, yet inferring temporal processes from these static snapshot measurements remains a fundamental challenge. Current approaches utilizing neural differential equations and flows are sensitive to overfitting and lack careful considerations of biological variability. In this work, we propose a generative framework that models population trends using a latent heteroscedastic Gaussian process (GP) approximated by Hilbert space methods. To address the absence of genuine cell trajectories, we leverage an optimal transport (OT) objective that aligns generated and observed population distributions. Our method explicitly captures biological heterogeneity by incorporating cell-specific latent time and cell type conditioning to disentangle temporal asynchrony and trajectories to different cell types. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on complex interpolation and extrapolation benchmarks and introduce a novel gradient-based strategy for inferring perturbation trajectories.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合潜在高斯过程和最优运输的生成框架，用于建模单细胞RNA测序数据的时间动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞RNA测序提供基因表达信息，但从静态快照推断时间过程是基本挑战。现有神经微分方程和流的方法易过拟合且未充分考虑生物变异性，因此需要一种能捕捉异质性且鲁棒的生成模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出生成框架，用希尔伯特空间近似潜在异方差高斯过程建模群体趋势，通过最优运输对齐生成与观察分布。引入细胞特异性潜在时间和细胞类型条件，以显式捕捉生物异质性和异步性。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂插值和外推基准上达到最先进性能，并引入基于梯度的策略推断扰动轨迹，优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架有效建模scRNA-seq时间过程，处理生物异质性，并支持扰动轨迹推断。学术上提供新范式，实践上可用于基因调控和发育研究。未来可扩展至更多条件或大规模数据。

title: A Sharper Picture of Generalization in Transformers
abstract: We study transformers' generalization behavior on boolean domains from the perspective of the Fourier Spectra of their target functions. In contrast to prior work (Edelman et al., 2022; Trauger and Tewari, 2024), which derived generalization bounds from Rademacher complexity, we investigate the feasibility of obtaining generalization bounds via PAC-Bayes theory. We show that sparse spectra concentrated on low-degree components enable low-sharpness constructions with good generalization properties. Our idea is to show the existence of flat minima implementing any boolean function of sparsity no greater than the context length, and then apply a PAC-Bayes bound to an idealized low-sharpness learner, resulting in a non-vacuous generalization bound. We evaluate predictions empirically and conduct a mechanistic interpretability study to support the realism of our theoretical construction in real transformers.

light_analysis.overview: 从傅里叶谱视角研究Transformer泛化，通过PAC-Bayes理论推导非真空泛化界，并证明稀疏低度频谱可实现低尖锐度构造。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工作（Edelman等，2022；Trauger和Tewari，2024）主要基于Rademacher复杂度推导Transformer的泛化界，但该方法可能过于保守或无法捕捉模型实际泛化行为。本文旨在探索利用PAC-Bayes理论获得更紧的泛化界的可能性，并揭示Transformer在布尔域上泛化的傅里叶频谱特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出从目标函数的傅里叶谱角度分析Transformer泛化。关键创新是证明：对于任何稀疏度不超过上下文长度的布尔函数，存在对应的扁平最小值（flat minima）。然后对理想化的低尖锐度学习器应用PAC-Bayes界，得到非真空的泛化界。此外，通过机制可解释性研究验证理论构造在真实Transformer中的现实性。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了理论预测：稀疏且集中在低阶项的傅里叶谱能够实现低尖锐度并带来良好泛化。与基于Rademacher复杂度的界相比，PAC-Bayes方法给出了非真空的泛化界。可解释性研究支持了理论构造的合理性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了Transformer在布尔域泛化的新视角，通过傅里叶谱和PAC-Bayes理论建立了泛化与稀疏、低阶频谱的联系。理论结果有助于理解Transformer的泛化机制，实用价值在于指导设计更高效的架构或训练策略。未来可扩展至更复杂数据域。

title: Point Cloud Sequence Encoding for Material-conditioned Graph Network Simulators
abstract: Graph Network Simulators (GNSs) have emerged as powerful surrogates for complex physics-based simulation, offering inherent differentiability and orders-of-magnitude speedups over traditional solvers. However, GNSs typically assume access to the underlying material parameters, such as stiffness or viscosity, severely limiting their utility in realistic experimental settings. While recent meta-learning approaches address the parameter dependency by inferring properties from mesh trajectories, reconstructing a mesh from an observed scene is challenging. In this work, we introduce Point Cloud Encoding for Accurate Context Handling (PEACH), a novel framework that applies in-context learning on point clouds to adapt a learned simulator to unseen physical properties during inference. Our approach relies on a novel spatio-temporal point cloud sequence encoder, as well as two forms of auxiliary supervision to help improve simulation fidelity. We demonstrate that PEACH is capable of accurate zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on a challenging, dynamic scene. Experiments on simulation scenes show that PEACH even outperforms mesh-based baselines on prediction accuracy, while being much more practical for real-world deployment.
comment: 9 pages + appendix, 7 figures. Submitted to the 40th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEACH框架，通过点云序列的上下文学习，使图网络模拟器适应未知物理参数，实现无需网格的零样本模拟到真实转移。
light_analysis.motivation: 图网络模拟器（GNS）作为物理模拟的有力替代，通常需要已知材料参数（如刚度、粘度），限制了实际应用。近期元学习方法虽可推断参数，但依赖网格轨迹重建，而真实场景中网格重建困难。本文旨在解决参数未知且网格不可得的问题，利用点云进行上下文学习，提升模拟器的实用性和精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出PEACH框架，核心是新颖的时空点云序列编码器，结合两种辅助监督信号，在推理阶段通过上下文学习调整模拟器以适应未见过的物理属性。该方法无需网格，直接处理点云序列，实现零样本模拟到真实转移。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战性动态场景中，PEACH实现了准确的零样本模拟到真实转移，预测精度甚至超过基于网格的基线方法。同时，由于无需网格重建，在实际部署中更加实用。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEACH通过点云序列上下文学习，克服了传统GNS依赖材料参数和网格的局限，显著提升了模拟器在真实实验场景中的适用性和精度。该方法为零样本物理模拟提供了新思路，未来可扩展到更复杂的物理系统。

title: Choose Wisely and Privately: Proactive Client Selection for Fair and Efficient Federated Learning
abstract: Federated Learning enables collaborative model training across decentralized data sources without data transfer. Averaging-based FL is limited by the presence of non-IID data, which negatively impacts convergence speed and final model accuracy. Conventional alternatives suffer from significant inefficiency. Clients with noisy or highly heterogeneous data contribute expensive gradient computations that are either discarded or heavily down-weighted before aggregation. These reactive approaches waste computational resources, require more communication rounds and result in unnecessary privacy exposure. In this paper, we propose a proactive client selection framework that aims to find an optimal federation of clients whose combined data match utility and fairness requirements before training begins. Our method relies on mutual information computed from differentially private contingency tables to quantify the relevance of cross-feature correlations in the union dataset. We introduce a Potential Federation Loss (PFL) over the set of fixed-size federations, which balances two objectives. Maximizing collective data utility while ensuring fair cross-features correlations to prevent group unfairness. Client selection is expressed as an optimal subset search problem over the PFL objective, which we solve using simulated annealing under strong differential privacy guarantees for clients' local statistics. Experimental results on four benchmarks show faster, fairer, and more accurate models trained on optimally found federations, compared to uniform sampling, even when state-of-the-art adaptive aggregation or sampling strategies are employed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种主动客户端选择框架，通过差分隐私和互信息优化联邦学习中的公平与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中非IID数据导致收敛慢和准确率低，现有方法如重加权或丢弃噪声梯度效率低下，浪费计算资源并增加通信轮次和隐私暴露风险。需要一种在训练前主动选择客户端的方法，以兼顾数据效用和公平性。
light_analysis.method: 基于差分隐私列联表计算互信息，量化跨特征相关性；定义潜在联邦损失（PFL），平衡数据效用和公平性；将客户端选择建模为最优子集搜索问题，通过模拟退火求解，并保证强差分隐私。
light_analysis.result: 在四个基准数据集上，相比均匀采样及最先进的聚合或采样策略，训练的模型收敛更快、公平性更高、准确率更好，表明优化联邦的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出主动客户端选择框架，训练前确定最优联邦，减少通信轮次和隐私暴露，提高了模型性能和公平性。未来可扩展到动态场景或更复杂的隐私预算分配。

title: Towards Integrated Rock Support Visualisation in 3D Point Cloud of Underground Mines
abstract: The effectiveness of rock support in underground mines depends on the interaction between installed rock bolts and the structural fabric of the surrounding rock mass. However, discontinuity characterisation and rock bolt identification are commonly treated as separate tasks, limiting their value for integrated support assessment. This study presents an automated framework for integrated rock support visualisation using 3D point clouds of underground mine excavations. The framework integrates structure mapping, rock bolt identification, discontinuity plane fitting, and bolt orientation estimation into a unified workflow optimised for accuracy and computational efficiency. The outputs are used to generate an integrated 3D visualisation of fitted discontinuity planes and bolt vectors, enabling direct assessment of their spatial intersections and geometric relationships. A complementary stereographic analysis of discontinuity poles and bolt orientations is also performed to evaluate overall bolting geometric effectiveness relative to the mapped structural fabric. Additionally, bolt-level quality metrics, including exposed protrusion length and deviation from the local roof normal, are visualised to support assessment of installation quality. The proposed framework is demonstrated on real underground metal mine scans, producing accurate structure mapping and rock bolt identification results in medium-scale point clouds. Overall, the study provides a practical step towards automated, integrated geotechnical assessment of rock support effectiveness without requiring manual measurements or additional in-situ data acquisition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成岩土支持可视化框架，利用3D点云自动进行结构映射、锚杆识别与几何评估，无需人工测量。
light_analysis.motivation: 地下矿山岩土支持效果取决于锚杆与岩体结构面的相互作用，但现有方法将不连续面表征和锚杆识别视为独立任务，限制了集成支持评估的价值。手动测量耗时且需额外数据采集，缺乏自动化集成方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出自动化框架，将结构映射、锚杆识别、不连续面拟合和锚杆方向估计整合为统一工作流，优化精度和计算效率。输出集成3D可视化，显示拟合的不连续面平面和锚杆向量，并生成赤平投影图分析极点与锚杆方向。此外，可视化锚杆暴露长度和偏离局部顶板法线的程度，用于评估安装质量。
light_analysis.result: 在真实地下金属矿山扫描数据上验证，中等规模点云中实现了准确的结构映射和锚杆识别。框架生成的3D可视化直接展示空间交切与几何关系，赤平投影评估整体锚杆几何有效性，安装质量指标可视化支持定性判断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为自动化的集成岩土支持评估提供了实用步骤，无需手动测量或额外数据采集。潜在局限性可能包括大规模点云的计算效率或复杂地质环境的适应性，未来可扩展至更多矿山场景。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Deep Learning Models for Fake Image Detection
abstract: The growing sophistication of GAN-based image manipulation presents significant challenges for digital forensics. This study compares the performance of four pretrained CNN architectures including VGG16, ResNet50, EfficientNetB0, and XceptionNet for fake image detection using a unified preprocessing and training pipeline. A dataset of real and manipulated images was processed through resizing, normalization, and augmentation to address class imbalance and improve generalization. Models were evaluated using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1-score, and ROC-AUC. VGG16 achieved the highest accuracy at 91%, with XceptionNet, ResNet50, and EfficientNetB0 each reaching 90%. EfficientNetB0 showed stronger sensitivity to fake images but reduced reliability on real samples, reflecting imbalance-driven bias. Limitations include dataset imbalance, overfitting, and limited interpretability, which affect cross-domain robustness. The study provides a reproducible baseline and underscores the need for balanced datasets, advanced augmentation, and fairness-aware training to develop reliable fake image detection systems.
comment: Accepted at ICCIIoT26 and waiting to be indexed

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较四种预训练CNN模型（VGG16、ResNet50、EfficientNetB0、XceptionNet）在假图检测中的性能，VGG16取得最高准确率91%。
light_analysis.motivation: GAN图像伪造日益复杂，对数字取证构成重大挑战。现有检测方法缺乏统一的评估框架，且面临数据集不平衡、过拟合和跨域泛化能力不足等问题。本研究旨在通过标准化流程对比主流CNN架构，建立可重复的基准，并揭示不平衡数据对模型可靠性的影响。
light_analysis.method: 采用统一预处理流程，包括图像缩放、归一化和数据增强以缓解类别不平衡。使用四个预训练CNN模型：VGG16、ResNet50、EfficientNetB0和XceptionNet，在包含真实和GAN生成图像的混合数据集上进行训练和测试。评估指标包括准确率、精确率、召回率、F1分数和ROC-AUC。
light_analysis.result: VGG16准确率最高（91%），XceptionNet、ResNet50和EfficientNetB0均达到90%。EfficientNetB0对假图像召回率较高但精确率较低，表明对假图敏感但易将真实图像误判为假图，反映了不平衡偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了假图检测的可重复基线，证实VGG16在当前设置下最优。指出数据集不平衡、模型过拟合和可解释性不足是限制跨域鲁棒性的主要因素。未来需采用更平衡的数据集、先进的数据增强和公平性感知训练方法。

title: ArPoMeme: An Annotated Arabic Multimodal Dataset for Political Ideology and Polarization
abstract: Memes have become a prominent medium of political communication in the Arab world, reflecting how humor, imagery, and text interact to express ideological and cultural positions. Despite the centrality of memes to online political discourse, there is a lack of systematically curated resources for analyzing their multimodal and ideological dimensions in Arabic. This paper presents ArPoMeme, a large-scale dataset of approximately 7,300 Arabic political memes categorized by ideological orientation, including Leftist, Islamist, Pan-Arabist, and Satirical perspectives. The dataset captures the diversity of Arabic meme ecosystems by grounding classification in the self-identification of public Facebook pages and groups that produce and disseminate these memes. To ensure both scale and accuracy, we designed a semi-automated data collection pipeline combining Playwright-based Facebook scraping with Google Drive synchronization, followed by text extraction using the Qwen2.5-VL-7B vision language model. The extracted text was manually verified and annotated for three polarization dimensions: Us vs. Them framing, Hostility toward out-groups, and Calls to action. Annotation was conducted through a custom Streamlit-based interface supporting distributed labeling, real-time tracking, and version control. The resulting dataset links visual content, textual messages, and ideological orientation, enabling fine-grained analysis of political antagonism, mobilization, and humor. Quantitative analysis of the annotated corpus reveals strong asymmetries in antagonistic framing across ideological groups, with Islamist and satirical memes exhibiting the highest levels of hostility and mobilization cues. The dataset and the annotation tool offers a reproducible and publicly available resource for studying Arabic political discourse, multimodal ideology detection, and polarization dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了首个大规模阿拉伯语政治模因数据集ArPoMeme，覆盖四种意识形态类别，并标注了极化维度，为多模态意识形态检测提供资源。
light_analysis.motivation: 模因已成为阿拉伯世界政治沟通的重要形式，但缺乏系统整理的资源来研究其多模态和意识形态维度。现有数据集多聚焦于英语，且忽略模因在政治极化中的角色。因此，急需一个涵盖不同意识形态视角、支持细粒度极化分析的阿拉伯语多模态数据集。
light_analysis.method: ArPoMeme包含约7300个阿拉伯语政治模因，按左翼、伊斯兰主义、泛阿拉伯主义和讽刺四种意识形态分类，基于Facebook页面自归属。半自动数据收集使用Playwright爬取和Google Drive同步，文本提取采用Qwen2.5-VL-7B视觉语言模型。手工验证后标注三个极化维度：我们vs他们、外群体敌意、行动号召。标注通过自定义Streamlit界面实现分布式协作。
light_analysis.result: 数据集规模约7300个模因，意识形态分布均衡。定量分析显示伊斯兰主义和讽刺类模因在外群体敌意和行动号召维度上得分最高，表明强烈的对抗性框架。该方法验证了多模态数据在极化检测中的有效性，并揭示了不同意识形态群体在极化策略上的不对称性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ArPoMeme为阿拉伯政治话语研究提供了首个大规模多模态资源，支持意识形态检测和极化分析。其半自动标注流程可复用于其他语言。未来可扩展至更细粒度的情感或讽刺检测，并结合跨文化比较。局限性在于依赖Facebook页面自归属，可能引入偏差。

title: Finding the Correct Visual Evidence Without Forgetting: Mitigating Hallucination in LVLMs via Inter-Layer Visual Attention Discrepancy
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown remarkable performance on a wide range of vision-language tasks. Despite this progress, they are still prone to hallucination, generating responses that are inconsistent with visual content. In this work, we find that LVLMs tend to hallucinate when they pay insufficient attention to the correct visual evidence and gradually forget it during the generation process. We empirically find that although LVLMs overall attend insufficiently to visual evidence, they exhibit sensitivity to the correct visual evidence in specific layers, with notable inter-layer discrepancy. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel hallucination mitigation method that enhances visual evidence based on Inter-Layer Visual Attention Discrepancy (ILVAD). Specifically, we obtain the attention weights from early generated tokens to visual tokens across layers and identify the tokens that are repeatedly activated as visual evidence, forming a saliency map. We then enhance attention to visual evidence during generation through the saliency map to reduce visual forgetting. In addition, we leverage the saliency map to obtain attention scores of generated text to visual evidence, in order to select and emphasize text tokens that are strongly grounded in visual evidence. Our method is training-free and plug-and-play. Multiple benchmark evaluations conducted on five recently released models show that our method can consistently mitigate hallucinations in different LVLMs over various architectures. Code is available at https://github.com/ytx-ML/ILVAD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于层间视觉注意力差异（ILVAD）的无训练方法，通过增强视觉证据注意力缓解LVLM幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: LVLM在生成时对正确视觉证据注意不足且逐渐遗忘，导致幻觉。尽管整体注意不足，但特定层对视觉证据敏感，存在显著层间差异，启发利用该差异增强视觉注意力。
light_analysis.method: 通过早期生成token到视觉token的注意力权重，识别重复激活的视觉token形成显著性图；生成时增强该区域注意力以减少视觉遗忘；再利用显著性图选择强依赖视觉证据的文本token并强调其注意力。无需训练，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在5个最新LVLM模型的多个基准上，该方法一致降低幻觉率，适用于不同架构，无需额外训练或数据，验证了有效性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出ILVAD方法有效缓解LVLM幻觉，无训练且即插即用，易于集成至现有模型。未来可探索更细粒度的视觉证据利用或扩展到其他模态。

title: Towards UAV Detection in the Real World: A New Multispectral Dataset UAVNet-MS and a New Method
abstract: The proliferation of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) has created urgent demand for precise UAV monitoring. Existing RGB-based systems rely on spatial cues that degrade at small scales, particularly with high inter-type similarity, target-clutter ambiguity, and low contrast. Multispectral imaging (MSI) encodes material-aware spectral signatures, yet MSI-based fine-grained small-UAV detection remains underexplored due to lack of dedicated datasets. We introduce UAVNet-MS, the first multispectral dataset for fine-grained small-UAV detection, comprising 15,618 temporally synchronized RGB-MSI data cubes (1440x1080) with bounding box annotations. The dataset features challenging small objects (93.7% <= 32^2 pixels, average 18^2 pixels, ~0.02% image area) under low contrast. We propose MFDNet, a dual-stream baseline addressing array-induced parallax and spatial-spectral fusion. Extensive evaluation under RGB-only, MSI-only, and RGB+MSI protocols against 20 detectors shows MFDNet achieves +6.2% AP50 improvement over best RGB-only methods, demonstrating spectral cues provide complementary material evidence beyond spatial cues. This work provides foundational dataset, strong baseline, and benchmark for multispectral UAV monitoring research.
comment: submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个用于细粒度小无人机检测的多光谱数据集UAVNet-MS及双流基线方法MFDNet，验证光谱信息对空间线索的补充作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 无人机普及使精准监控需求迫切，现有RGB系统依赖空间线索，在小尺度下因高类间相似性、目标-杂波混淆和低对比度而性能退化。多光谱成像可编码材料感知的光谱特征，但缺乏专用于细粒度小无人机检测的数据集，阻碍了该方向研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建UAVNet-MS数据集，含15,618个时间同步的RGB-MSI数据立方体（1440×1080），标注边界框，其中93.7%的小物体≤32²像素，平均18²像素（约0.02%图像面积）。提出MFDNet双流网络，通过阵列视差校正和空间-光谱融合模块，有效利用光谱与空间互补特征。
light_analysis.result: 在RGB-only、MSI-only和RGB+MSI三种协议下，与20种检测器全面对比。MFDNet在RGB+MSI协议下AP50达最佳，相比最优RGB-only方法提升6.2%（如+6.2% AP50），证明光谱信息提供超越空间线索的材质证据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了首个多光谱小无人机检测数据集UAVNet-MS、强基线方法MFDNet及完整基准。填补了多光谱细粒度小目标检测空白，为实际监控系统提供高精度方案。未来可探索更高效融合策略及复杂场景泛化。

title: Preserve, Reveal, Expand: Faithful 4D Video Editing with Region-Aware Conditioning
abstract: Existing 4D-driven video diffusion models primarily target plausible generation, but faithful 4D editing requires preserving source-observed regions while synthesizing disoccluded or out-of-view content. We identify Evidence-Role Mismatch: reliable source-backed evidence, unreliable rendered cues, and unsupported regions are entangled in a single conditioning signal, causing preservation drift, ghosting, and unstable extrapolation. We propose PREX (Preserve, Reveal, Expand), a region-aware framework that decomposes the target spatiotemporal volume into Preserve, Reveal, and Expand roles according to observation support and scene extent. PREX builds observation-backed appearance cues with calibrated confidence and injects them into a frozen video diffusion backbone through a region-aware adapter, trained with proxy tasks without requiring paired edited videos. We further introduce PREBench, a diagnostic benchmark with curated edits, region-role masks, and human-aligned metrics that complement global video-quality and 4D-control evaluations. Experiments show that PREX reduces region-structured failures while maintaining strong visual quality and 4D edit control capability. Project Page: https://ricepastem.github.io/PREX-Open

light_analysis.overview: 提出区域感知的4D视频编辑框架PREX，通过分解时空为保留、揭示、扩展角色，实现忠实编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D视频扩散模型主要针对生成，但忠实编辑需要保留源观察区域同时合成遮挡或视图外内容。现有方法将可靠源证据、不可靠渲染线索和无支持区域混入单一条件信号，导致保留漂移、鬼影和不稳定外推。需要解耦不同区域以提升编辑保真度。
light_analysis.method: 提出PREX框架，将目标时空体按观测支持和场景范围分解为Preserve、Reveal、Expand三个角色。构建带有校准置信度的外观线索，通过区域感知适配器注入冻结的视频扩散骨干。训练使用代理任务，无需成对编辑视频。同时提出PREBench诊断基准，包含策划编辑、区域角色掩码和人类对齐指标。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PREX相比现有方法减少了区域结构化失败，同时保持了强视觉质量和4D编辑控制能力。具体定量结果摘要未明确，但定性展示了改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: PREX通过区域感知条件实现忠实4D视频编辑，解决了证据-角色不匹配问题。学术上提出新框架和基准，实际应用提升编辑可靠性。未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: JobArabi: An Arabic Corpus and Analysis of Job Announcements from Social Media
abstract: This paper introduces JobArabi, a large-scale corpus of Arabic job announcements collected from social media between January 2024 and October 2025. The dataset contains 20,528 public posts from X and captures more than two years of employment-related discourse across Arabic-speaking online communities. The corpus was compiled using a linguistically informed query framework covering 21 Arabic keyword families that reflect gendered, plural, formal, and dialectal expressions of recruitment language. The resulting dataset includes posts from institutional, commercial, and individual accounts and provides metadata such as timestamps, engagement indicators, and geolocation when available, enabling temporal and regional analysis of employment discourse. Quantitative analysis reveals several sociolinguistic patterns in online recruitment, including the persistence of gendered hiring language, regional variation in occupational demand, and the emotional framing of recruitment messages. These findings highlight the potential of Arabic social media as a resource for studying labor market communication and linguistic change. The JobArabi corpus, together with documentation and collection scripts, will be released to support research in Arabic NLP, computational social science, and digital labor studies.

light_analysis.overview: 构建大规模阿拉伯语招聘公告语料库JobArabi，揭示社交媒体中招聘语言的社会语言学模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯语招聘公告在社交媒体上广泛存在，但缺乏大规模、多方言的标注语料库。现有研究多聚焦英语，忽视了阿拉伯语中性别化、复数形式、方言等语言变异对招聘分析的影响。该研究旨在填补阿拉伯语招聘语料空白，支持劳动市场沟通、语言变化等交叉研究。
light_analysis.method: 从X平台收集2024年1月至2025年10月的20,528条公开帖子，构建JobArabi语料库。采用涵盖21个阿拉伯语关键词家族的语言学查询框架，覆盖性别、数、正式与方言表达。元数据包含时间戳、互动指标和地理位置（如有），支持时空分析。
light_analysis.result: 定量分析揭示了在线招聘中的几个社会语言学模式：性别化招聘语言的持续存在、职业需求的区域差异以及招聘信息的情感框架。这些发现凸显了阿拉伯社交媒体作为劳动市场沟通研究资源的潜力。语料库及相关文档和脚本将公开发布。
light_analysis.conclusion: JobArabi为阿拉伯语自然语言处理、计算社会科学和数字劳动研究提供了重要资源。研究不仅验证了社交媒体的可行性，还为跨学科合作奠定基础。未来可进一步扩展方言覆盖或结合多模态数据。

title: A Deployment Audit of Release-Side Risk in Conformal Triage under Prevalence Shift
abstract: Conformal triage converts predictive scores into deployment actions that either release a case, flag it for urgent attention, or defer it to human review. Under prevalence shift, however, the usual summaries of marginal coverage and human-review rate can miss the safety-critical question of whether patients who truly experience the target event are released without review. To address this gap, we introduce a leakage-aware deployment audit for release-side conformal triage. It first assigns target subjects to three non-overlapping roles: prevalence correction, conformal calibration, and held-out release-safety evaluation. This separation then lets the audit evaluate release directly: how many event-positive patients are cleared without review, whether the pilot has enough event labels for calibration, and how the safety-review trade-off shifts. Applying this audit to a retrospective NSCLC pilot shows why lower review can be misleading: after prevalence correction, the pooled conformal branch lowers review by releasing more patients, some of whom are event-positive. Within the audit, the classwise branch acts as a scarcity diagnostic: the pilot has too few event labels to certify safe low-review release.

light_analysis.overview: 提出泄漏感知部署审计，评估共形分流在患病率变化下的释放侧安全风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 共形分流在患病率变化时，常规的边际覆盖率和人工审核率指标无法捕捉事件阳性患者被释放而未审核的安全问题，因此需要一种新的审计方法来直接评估释放侧风险。
light_analysis.method: 将受试者分为三个非重叠角色：患病率校正、共形校准和保留释放安全性评估。通过分离角色，直接审计事件阳性患者被释放的比例、校准标签充足性以及安全-审核权衡的变化，使用类别分支作为稀缺性诊断。
light_analysis.result: 在回顾性NSCLC试验中，经患病率校正后，合并共形分支释放更多患者降低了审核率，但其中包含事件阳性者，表明低审核率可能误导。类别分支诊断显示试验缺乏足够事件标签来保障安全的低审核释放。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法揭示了共形分流在患病率变化下的释放侧风险，为安全评估提供新框架。局限性包括对事件标签数量的依赖，未来可扩展至其他领域。

title: DrawMotion: Generating 3D Human Motions by Freehand Drawing
abstract: Text-to-motion generation, which translates textual descriptions into human motions, faces the challenge that users often struggle to precisely convey their intended motions through text alone. To address this issue, this paper introduces DrawMotion, an efficient diffusion-based framework designed for multi-condition scenarios. DrawMotion generates motions based on both a conventional text condition and a novel hand-drawing condition, which provide semantic and spatial control over the generated motions, respectively. Specifically, we tackle the fine-grained motion generation task from three perspectives: 1) freehand drawing condition. To accurately capture users' intended motions without requiring tedious textual input, we develop an algorithm to automatically generate hand-drawn stickman sketches across different dataset formats; 2) multi-condition fusion. We propose a Multi-Condition Module (MCM) that is integrated into the diffusion process, enabling the model to exploit all possible condition combinations while reducing computational complexity compared to conventional approaches; and 3) training-free guidance. Notably, the MCM in DrawMotion ensures that its intermediate features lie in a continuous space, allowing classifier-guidance gradients to update the features and thereby aligning the generated motions with user intentions while preserving fidelity. Quantitative experiments and user studies demonstrate that the freehand drawing approach reduces user time by approximately 46.7% when generating motions aligned with their imagination. The code, demos, and relevant data are publicly available at https://github.com/InvertedForest/DrawMotion.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DrawMotion，一种基于扩散模型的3D人体动作生成框架，通过文本和手绘草图双条件实现精细控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到动作生成中用户难以用文本精确描述动作意图，现有方法缺乏直观的空间控制。手绘草图可提供直观空间线索，但现有工作未有效结合。因此需要一种多条件融合方法，既能利用文本语义又能通过手绘草图精确控制动作。
light_analysis.method: DrawMotion基于扩散模型，引入手绘条件（自动生成简笔画）和文本条件；提出多条件融合模块（MCM）集成到扩散过程，支持灵活条件组合且降低计算复杂度；MCM中间特征为连续空间，允许无训练的分类器引导梯度更新，使生成动作与用户意图对齐。
light_analysis.result: 定量实验和用户研究表明，手绘方法相比纯文本输入平均减少约46.7%的用户时间，同时生成的动作更符合用户想象。具体性能指标未详细给出，但用户效率提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: DrawMotion提供了一种直观高效的人体动作生成方式，用户可通过简单手绘草图结合文本快速生成所需动作。工作展示了多条件融合在生成任务中的潜力，未来可扩展至更复杂交互。代码开源促进研究。

title: Focus-then-Context: Subject-Centric Progressive Visual Token Reduction for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face a bottleneck of prohibitive computational costs arising from massive visual token sequences during inference. Existing vision token reduction methods alleviate this burden, but they unintentionally preserve the isolated visual subject strictly aligned with the user's query, which fails to substantially explore salient subjects and their contextual relationships. In this paper, we propose SPpruner, a subject-centric progressive reduction paradigm that emulates the \textit{Focus-then-Context} mechanism of the human visual perception system. Specifically, we first construct a focus identification module to explicitly model the interplay between visual saliency and semantic relevance. Herein, it can excavate the comprehensive visual subject spectrum to ensure a high-fidelity representation of visual input. Subsequently, a context-aware structural scanning module is developed to aggregate contextual cues from neighboring regions. As such, it can effectively restore global relational dependencies to uphold the structural integrity of the preserved subjects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our paradigm consistently outperforms SOTA methods, achieving up to 2.53 times speedup with only 22.2% of visual tokens retained in Qwen2.5-VL and a 67% FLOPs reduction on LLaVA with a negligible 0.6% accuracy drop.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPpruner范式，模拟人类"聚焦-上下文"视觉感知机制，实现以主体为中心的渐进式视觉令牌缩减，提升VLM推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) 在推理时因大量视觉令牌序列导致计算成本高昂。现有令牌缩减方法虽缓解此问题，但无意中保留了与用户查询严格对齐的孤立视觉主体，未能有效探索显著主体及其上下文关系，导致视觉表示不完整。因此需要一种能同时建模视觉显著性和语义相关性、并保持全局结构完整性的缩减策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出SPpruner范式，包含两个核心模块：1) 焦点识别模块，通过建模视觉显著性与语义相关性的交互，挖掘全面的视觉主体谱系，确保高保真表示；2) 上下文感知结构扫描模块，从相邻区域聚合上下文线索，恢复全局关系依赖，保持主体结构完整性。该方法渐进式缩减令牌，在Qwen2.5-VL和LLaVA上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL上仅保留22.2%的视觉令牌，实现2.53倍加速；在LLaVA上减少67% FLOPs，准确率仅下降0.6%。与现有最先进方法相比，该方法在速度和精度权衡上持续领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出SPpruner范式，有效模拟人类视觉感知的"聚焦-上下文"机制，实现高效的视觉令牌缩减，显著加速VLM推理同时保持性能。该工作为视觉令牌缩减提供了新的生物启发式思路，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索更精细的主体建模或扩展到其他多模态模型。

title: Memory Grafting: Scaling Language Model Pre-training via Offline Conditional Memory
abstract: Scaling conditional memory offers a promising way to increase language-model capacity, but existing methods such as Engram learn large memory tables from scratch during pre-training, making memory scaling expensive and sometimes ineffective. We propose Memory Grafting, a conditional memory scaling method that utilizes frozen hidden states from a grafting model as conditional n-gram memory. Given frequent local n-grams, we run the grafting model offline, store final-token hidden representations as memory values, and let the recipient model retrieve them through exact longest-match suffix lookup. Retrieved memories are adapted by lightweight projections and gates, while a hash-based Engram fallback preserves coverage for unmatched contexts. Since the grafting model is only run offline and exact lookup has expected O(1) complexity with respect to memory-bank size, Memory Grafting expands external latent capacity with limited training and inference overhead. Experiments under matched recipient architectures and pre-training budgets show that Memory Grafting improves over both MoE and vanilla Engram baselines. In the 2.8B-scale setting, it improves the average benchmark score from 51.95 for MoE and 52.43 for vanilla Engram to 53.86. In the 0.92B-scale setting, all grafting-model variants improve over the baselines, with Qwen3.5-35B-A3B giving the strongest gains. These results suggest that pretrained models can serve as reusable constructors of external latent memory, providing a practical step toward scaling future language models beyond trainable parameters alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Memory Grafting方法，利用离线冻结的隐状态作为条件n-gram记忆，高效扩展语言模型容量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有条件记忆方法如Engram从零学习大记忆表，扩展昂贵且有时无效，亟需一种低成本、高效的记忆扩展方案来提升语言模型性能。
light_analysis.method: Memory Grafting将 grafting 模型的冻结隐状态作为条件n-gram记忆，离线存储并通过精确最长匹配后缀查找检索，经轻量投影与门控适配，配合哈希Engram后备处理未匹配上下文，实现O(1)查询复杂度与低训练推理开销。
light_analysis.result: 在匹配架构和预训练预算下，2.8B规模时平均基准分从MoE的51.95、Engram的52.43提升至53.86；0.92B规模时所有变体均优于基线，Qwen3.5-35B-A3B增益最强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 预训练模型可作为外部潜在记忆的可重用构造器，为超越可训练参数扩展语言模型提供实际路径，具有重要学术与应用价值。

title: Thinking-while-speaking: A Controlled, Interleaved Reasoning Method for Real-Time Speech Generation
abstract: The thinking-while-speaking paradigm aims to make AI communication more human. A key challenge is maintaining fluent speech while performing deep reasoning. Our method, InterRS, tackles this by inserting reasoning steps only during natural speech generation. This requires high-quality data where reasoning and speech are precisely aligned, and the length ratio are under controlled. We introduce a novel pipeline to generate such seamlessly interleaved audio data. To train our model, we combine interleaved SFT with refined data and reinforcement learning with two new rewards: a TA-Balance Reward to manage timing and thinking-answer ratio, and a Linguistic Quality Reward to refine expression. Experiments show our approach achieves 13% better performance on mathmatical and logic benchmarks while generating instant response like a spoken-language instruct model which outputs fast CoT response. Furthermore, our method generates more natural and fluent answers than prior methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InterRS方法，通过在自然语音生成中插入可控推理步骤，实现实时语音生成与深度推理的有机结合。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前AI通信追求人性化，但面临实时对话中深度推理与流畅语音的矛盾。现有方法难以精确对齐推理与语音的时序及长度比例，导致应答迟缓或表达生硬。因此，需要一种能无缝交织思考与说话的方法，以提升用户体验。
light_analysis.method: InterRS方法通过插入推理步骤于语音生成中，保证实时性。首先构建高质量对齐的音频数据管道，控制推理与语音时长比例。训练结合交织SFT和强化学习，设计TA-Balance Reward管理推理时机与答案比例，Linguistic Quality Reward优化表达质量。
light_analysis.result: 在数学和逻辑基准测试中，InterRS性能提升13%，同时实现类似口语指令模型的即时响应，输出快速思维链。相比先前方法，生成的回答更自然流畅，兼顾实时性与深度推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出思考-说话交织的推理范式，有效提升实时语音生成的推理能力与自然度。该方法具有实际应用价值，如智能助手、对话系统。未来可探索更复杂场景下的时序控制与多模态融合，摘要未提及局限性。

title: Bridging Structure and Language: Graph-Based Visual Reasoning for Autonomous Road Understanding
abstract: Structured road understanding of lane geometry, topology, and traffic element relationships is foundational to safe autonomous driving. While vision-language models (VLMs) offer promising semantic flexibility, they lack the geometric and relational grounding required for precise road reasoning. Conversely, traditional modular systems, e.g., HD maps and topological road graphs, provide structural precision but remain semantically rigid. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Combined Road Substrate (CRS), a graph-grounded framework that makes geometric road structure and open-vocabulary semantics jointly executable in a single representation. CRS enables the automatic generation of compositionally complex and linguistically varied question-answer pairs via recursive graph queries, augmented with a "grounding for free" mechanism that ensures logical traceability to specific map elements, and procedurally extracted chain-of-thought supervision traces. We demonstrate that state-of-the-art VLMs - including large, closed-source models - struggle significantly with structured road reasoning, yet training a small 2- or 4-billion-parameter model with as few as 20 to 80 CRS-enriched scenes yields stable gains in compositional reasoning tasks of varying depth. Analysis of model behavior via verifiable reasoning traces reveals a systematic shift in failure modes: whereas baseline models fail at relational scene understanding, CRS-trained models reduce failures to attribute recognition, suggesting that the primary bottleneck in road understanding is not model scale, but the absence of structured supervision.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图接地框架CRS，将几何道路结构与开放词汇语义联合执行，以少量数据训练小模型实现结构化道路推理的稳定提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）在道路理解中缺乏几何与关系基础，无法精确推理车道拓扑和交通元素关系；而传统模块化系统（如HD地图、拓扑道路图）虽具结构精度但语义僵化。两者均无法兼顾灵活性与精确性，亟需一种联合表示方法来弥合这一鸿沟，实现结构化的道路推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出CRS框架，将道路几何结构（图）与开放词汇语义融合为单一可执行表示。通过递归图查询自动生成组合复杂且语言多样的问答对，并设计'免费接地'机制确保逻辑可追溯到具体地图元素，同时提取链式思维监督信号。训练时使用2-4B参数的小模型，仅需20-80个CRS增强场景即可获得增益。
light_analysis.result: SOTA VLM（包括大型闭源模型）在结构化道路推理任务中表现显著困难。而使用CRS训练的小模型（2-4B参数）在20-80个场景上训练后，在组合推理任务（不同深度）中取得稳定提升。可验证推理轨迹分析表明，基线模型失败在于关系场景理解，而CRS训练模型将失败缩小到属性识别层面。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRS证明了道路理解的瓶颈并非模型规模，而是结构化监督的缺失。该框架通过图接地表示赋予小模型精确推理能力，为自动驾驶中高效、可解释的道路感知提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更多场景和更复杂的推理链。

title: PaintCopilot: Modeling Painting as Autonomous Artistic Continuation
abstract: We present PaintCopilot, a co-creative neural painting assistant that models painting as an open-ended autoregressive artistic behavior conditioned on evolving canvas states and prior brushstroke history, without requiring a target image. Unlike existing neural painting methods that frame painting as pixel reconstruction toward a predefined reference, PaintCopilot predicts future strokes directly from learned artistic dynamics, analogous to how large language models continue text sequences from prior context.   The framework proposes three complementary models: a ViT-based Target Predictor that infers artist intent from partial canvas observations, an autoregressive Next Stroke Predictor that generates temporally coherent brushstrokes via flow matching, and a VAE-based Region Sampler that synthesizes semantically localized stroke sequences on demand. Built on three differentiable brush representations (Hard Round, Brush Tip, and 2D Gaussian), the system supports four interactive workflows: Optimize History, Stroke Completion, Region Inpainting, and Dynamic Brush. Through case studies with professional artists, we demonstrate that PaintCopilot enables fluid co-creative painting workflows in which artists and AI continuously alternate control throughout the creative process.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PaintCopilot，将绘画建模为无需目标图像的自回归艺术延续，实现人机协同创作。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经绘画方法将绘画视为像素重建任务，需要预定义目标图像，限制了创作自由度。实际创作是开放式演化过程，艺术家根据画布状态和先前笔触逐步决策。缺乏模拟这种动态行为、支持无目标图像协同创作的模型。PaintCopilot旨在解决此问题，通过自回归预测笔触实现更自然的创作流程。
light_analysis.method: 提出三模型框架：ViT目标预测器从部分画布推断意图；自回归下一笔触预测器使用流匹配生成时间连贯笔触；VAE区域采样器按需合成语义局部笔触。基于三种可微笔刷表示（硬圆、笔尖、2D高斯），支持历史优化、笔触补全、区域补图、动态笔刷四种工作流。训练无需目标图像，从绘画过程数据学习动态。
light_analysis.result: 通过专业艺术家案例研究验证：模型能根据画布状态生成合理笔触，支持多种交互模式，实现流畅的协同创作流程，艺术家和AI在创作中交替控制。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但定性结果表明有效提升创作灵活性和效率，不同于需目标图像的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: PaintCopilot将绘画从像素重建转为开放式艺术延续，类似语言模型文本续写，为神经绘画提供新范式。学术上展示自回归框架在艺术创作潜力；实际可辅助艺术家探索创意。未来可扩展笔刷类型和风格。局限性依赖高质量绘画过程数据。

title: 3D Reconstruction and Knowledge Distillation to Improve Multi-View Image Models to Explore Spike Volume Estimation in Wheat
abstract: Accurate estimation of wheat spike volume is important for yield component analysis and stress resilience assessment, yet field-based measurement remains challenging. Active 3D sensing methods such as Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) or time-of-flight (ToF) are sensitive to plant motion or poorly suited to outdoor conditions, while 3D reconstructions are computationally expensive. Direct 2D image processing would offer computational advantages, but image-based models lack explicit geometric information. We therefore propose a hybrid 2D-3D approach with knowledge distillation during training while enabling efficient image-only inference. First, we train a rigid-invariant point cloud network using distance-based histogram features to obtain pose-robust geometric representations. We then combine the 3D model with a proposed multi-view image-based regulated Transformer (RT) in an ensemble architecture. Finally, we distill the ensemble knowledge into a purely image-based student model using either feature-based or label-based distillation. The two distilled RTs reduce the mean absolute error (MAE) from 654.31 mm$^3$ of the non-distilled RT to 639.93 mm$^3$ and 644.62 mm$^3$, and increase correlation from 0.76 to 0.77 and 0.82, respectively. At the same time, inference time is reduced from 160 ms to 1.4 ms per spike. Distillation further mitigates volume-dependent bias and reshapes the latent representation of the image model toward a geometry-aware shape. Our results demonstrate that 3D-informed training of a 2D Transformer allows for scalable and efficient spike volume estimation for high-throughput field phenotyping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合2D-3D知识蒸馏方法，利用3D几何信息训练纯图像Transformer实现高效准确的小麦穗体积估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 小麦穗体积的准确估计对产量分析和抗逆性评估至关重要，但田间测量困难。现有方法中，主动3D传感（如LiDAR、ToF）易受植物运动影响或不适于户外，3D重建计算昂贵；直接2D图像处理虽高效但缺乏几何信息。因此，需要一种在训练时利用3D几何知识、推理时仅依赖2D图像的高效方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合2D-3D方法：首先训练一个刚性不变点云网络，使用基于距离的直方图特征获取姿态鲁棒的几何表示；然后将3D模型与提出的多视图图像调节Transformer（RT）组合成集成架构；最后通过基于特征或标签的知识蒸馏，将集成知识迁移到纯图像学生模型。蒸馏后的RT模型实现高效推理。
light_analysis.result: 两种蒸馏RT模型将平均绝对误差（MAE）从非蒸馏RT的654.31 mm³降至639.93 mm³和644.62 mm³，相关性从0.76提升至0.77和0.82；推理时间从160 ms/穗降至1.4 ms/穗。蒸馏还减轻了体积相关偏差，使图像模型潜伏表征向几何感知形状重塑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法证明3D信息指导的2D Transformer训练可实现可扩展、高效的小麦穗体积估计，适用于高通量田间表型分析。蒸馏有效提升精度并降低计算成本。未来可探索更复杂的蒸馏策略或应用于其他作物体积估计任务。

title: DASH: Fast Differentiable Architecture Search for Hybrid Attention in Minutes on a Single GPU
abstract: Hybrid attention architectures are becoming an increasingly important paradigm for improving LLM inference efficiency while preserving model quality, making hybrid architecture design a central problem. Existing designs often rely on manual empirical rules or proxy-based selector signals for layer-wise operator allocation. Recent NAS-style systems such as Jet-Nemotron demonstrate the promise of automated hybrid architecture search. However, Jet-Nemotron's PostNAS search stages alone use 200B tokens, making such search pipelines difficult to use as routine methods for hybrid architecture design. We introduce DASH, a fast differentiable search framework for hybrid attention architecture design, which relaxes discrete layer-wise attention operator placement into continuous architecture logits, prepares reusable teacher-aligned linear candidates, and performs architecture-only search with model and operator weights frozen to significantly enhance search efficiency. On Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, DASH consistently outperforms a comprehensive suite of existing selector-style hybrid attention design baselines, showing that direct differentiable search can discover stronger hybrid architectures. Moreover, DASH achieves stronger RULER performance than released Jet-Nemotron models while remaining competitive on overlapping short-context and general benchmarks. Notably, each DASH search run uses only 12.3M tokens and takes about 20 minutes on a single RTX Pro 6000 GPU, corresponding to merely 0.006% of the PostNAS search tokens reported by Jet-Nemotron. These results suggest that high-quality hybrid attention architectures can be obtained through minutes-level differentiable search, providing a promising direction for hybrid architecture design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种快速可微搜索框架DASH，在单GPU上用数分钟完成混合注意力架构搜索。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合注意力架构对提升LLM推理效率和质量至关重要，但现有设计依赖人工规则或代理信号，且NAS方法如Jet-Nemotron搜索成本极高（需200B tokens）。需要一种高效且自动化的搜索方法来降低混合架构设计的门槛。
light_analysis.method: DASH将离散的层注意力算子分配松弛为连续架构logits，准备可复用的教师对齐线性候选，冻结模型和算子权重仅搜索架构。在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct上搜索，仅需12.3M tokens和单GPU约20分钟。
light_analysis.result: DASH在Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct上全面优于现有选择式混合注意力基线，RULER性能超过Jet-Nemotron，在短上下文和通用基准上相当。搜索成本仅为Jet-Nemotron PostNAS搜索的0.006%。
light_analysis.conclusion: DASH证明通过分钟级可微搜索可获得高质量混合注意力架构，为混合架构设计提供了高效且有前景的方向。未来可扩展到更大模型或更多算子类型。

title: Strategy-Induct: Task-Level Strategy Induction for Instruction Generation
abstract: Designing effective task-level prompts is crucial for improving the performance of Large Language Models (LLMs). While prior work on instruction induction demonstrates that LLMs can infer better instructions with limited examples, existing approaches often rely on input-output pairs, where obtaining labeled answers can be difficult or costly. To address this limitation, we propose Strategy-Induct, a framework that derives task-level instructions solely from a small set of example questions without requiring labeled answers. Our approach first prompts the model to generate explicit reasoning strategies for each question, forming (strategy, question) pairs. These pairs are then used to induce a task instruction that guides reasoning. Experiments across multiple tasks and model scales demonstrate that Strategy-Induct outperforms state-of-the-art methods in question-only settings. Furthermore, we observe that jointly utilizing LLMs and Large Reasoning Models across task instruction generation and inference may lead to further performance improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Strategy-Induct框架，仅从无标注答案的示例问题中推导任务级指令，提升大模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指令归纳方法依赖输入-输出对，而获取标注答案成本高、难度大。为解决这一问题，研究者希望仅利用问题本身就能生成有效任务指令，降低对标注数据的依赖，提升大模型在少样本场景下的表现。
light_analysis.method: Strategy-Induct框架首先提示模型为每个问题生成显式推理策略，形成(策略, 问题)对；随后利用这些对归纳出任务级指令，指导后续推理。该方法无需任何标注答案，仅需少量示例问题。
light_analysis.result: 在多个任务和模型规模上的实验表明，Strategy-Induct在仅问题（question-only）设置下优于现有最先进方法。此外，联合使用大语言模型和大推理模型进行指令生成与推理可获得进一步性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: Strategy-Induct有效解决无标注答案场景下的指令归纳问题，降低了指令工程成本。多模型协作策略展示了进一步提升潜力的方向，为无需人工标注的提示优化提供了可行路径。

title: Winfree Oscillatory Neural Network
abstract: Oscillations and synchronization are widely believed to play a fundamental role in representation and computation. However, existing machine learning approaches based on synchronization dynamics have largely been confined to specialized settings such as object discovery, with limited evidence of scalability to standard vision benchmarks or logic reasoning tasks. We propose the Winfree Oscillatory Neural Network (WONN), a dynamical neural architecture based on generalized Winfree dynamics. WONN evolves representations on the torus $(S^1)^d$ through structured oscillatory interactions, combining phase-based inductive biases with flexible and hierarchical interaction mechanisms instantiated as either fixed trigonometric mappings or learnable neural networks. We evaluate WONN on image recognition and complex reasoning tasks, including CIFAR, ImageNet, Maze-hard, and Sudoku. Across these domains, WONN achieves competitive or superior performance with strong parameter efficiency. In particular, WONN is, to our knowledge, the first synchronization-based oscillatory architecture to scale competitively to ImageNet-1K. Furthermore, on Maze-hard, WONN achieves 80.1% accuracy using only 1% of the parameters of prior state-of-the-art models. These results suggest that structured oscillatory dynamics provide a scalable and parameter-efficient alternative to conventional neural architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于广义Winfree动力学的振荡神经网络WONN，首次将同步振荡架构可扩展至ImageNet-1K，并实现参数高效性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 振荡与同步被认为在神经表示和计算中至关重要，但现有基于同步的机器学习方法局限于对象发现等特定任务，缺乏在标准视觉基准和逻辑推理任务上的可扩展性证明。本研究旨在探索结构化振荡动力学能否作为传统神经架构的可扩展、参数高效的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: WONN以广义Winfree动力学为核心，在圆环(S^1)^d上演化表示，通过相位同步机制实现信息处理。交互机制既可采用固定三角函数映射，也可作为可学习神经网络，结合了基于相位的归纳偏置与灵活的分层结构。网络架构支持多种任务适配，无需复杂预训练。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR、ImageNet-1K、Maze-hard和Sudoku基准上，WONN取得竞争性或更优性能。在ImageNet-1K上首次实现同步振荡架构的可扩展性；在Maze-hard任务中，仅用先前最优模型1%的参数即达到80.1%准确率，显著提升参数效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: WONN证明结构化振荡动力学可提供可扩展且参数高效的神经网络替代方案，在视觉和推理任务中均有效。该工作为同步计算在更大规模机器学习中的应用铺平道路，未来可探索更复杂的振荡交互机制及更多领域。

title: Evaluating Speech Articulation Synthesis with Articulatory Phoneme Recognition
abstract: Recent advances in machine learning and the availability of articulatory datasets allow vocal tract synthesis to be conditioned on phonetic sequences, a primary task of articulatory speech synthesis. However, quality assessment needs a better definition. Generally, ranking generative models is tricky due to subjectivity. However, articulatory synthesis has the additional difficulty of requiring specialized knowledge in vocal tract anatomy and acoustics. To address this problem, this paper proposes to evaluate speech articulation synthesis using phoneme recognition as a proxy.   Our hypothesis is that phoneme recognition using articulatory features better captures nuances in phoneme production, such as correct places of articulation, which traditional metrics (e.g., point-wise distance metrics) do not. We train a neural network with acoustic and articulatory features extracted from a single-speaker RT-MRI dataset. Then, we compare the recognition performance when testing the model with different synthetic articulatory features. Our results show that our articulatory feature set is phonetically rich and helps exploring additional dimensions on speech articulation synthesis.
comment: Accepted for publication at the European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用发音音素识别作为代理指标评估语音发音合成质量，弥补传统距离指标的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 发音语音合成质量评估面临主观性强、需解剖学和声学专业知识等挑战。传统点对点距离指标无法捕捉发音位置等细微差别，导致评估不全面。因此需要一种客观且信息丰富的评估方法，以准确衡量合成语音的发音准确性。
light_analysis.method: 从单说话者RT-MRI数据集提取声学和发音特征，训练神经网络进行音素识别。通过比较不同合成发音特征输入下的识别性能，间接评估发音合成质量。该方法利用发音特征的语音学丰富性，捕捉传统指标忽略的发音细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提发音特征集具有语音学丰富性，能有效区分合成发音的细微差异，为发音合成评估提供额外维度。但摘要未给出具体识别准确率或与基线对比的量化结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出基于音素识别的发音合成评估方法，解决了主观评估的局限性，并为发音合成优化提供新视角。该方法具有实际应用价值，但当前仅基于单说话者数据，未来可扩展至多说话者或跨语言场景。

title: Sutra: Tensor-Op RNNs as a Compilation Target for Vector Symbolic Architectures
abstract: Sutra is a typed, purely functional programming language whose compiled forward pass is a PyTorch neural network. The compiler beta-reduces the whole program -- primitives, control flow, string I/O -- to one fused tensor-op graph over a frozen embedding substrate. Rotation binding, unbind, bundle, polynomial Kleene three-valued logic, and tail-recursive loops all lower to tensor operations; the Kleene connectives are Lagrange-interpolated polynomials exact on the {-1, 0, +1} truth grid. Validation is one fact tested two ways. (1) The same program runs on four frozen embeddings spanning two modalities -- three text encoders (nomic-embed-text, all-minilm, mxbai-embed-large) and one protein language model (ESM-2) -- and decodes bundles at 100% accuracy through width k=8 on every substrate, where the textbook Hadamard product has already collapsed (2.5% on mxbai-embed-large, 7.5% on all-minilm). (2) PyTorch autograd flows through the actually compiled graph: a fuzzy-rule classifier written in .su trains from random init (18.7 +/- 9.5%; chance = 20%, five classes) to 100.0 +/- 0.0% (three seeds) by backpropagating through the emitted graph, the symbolic source unmodified. A weighted variant additionally trains a scalar cosine gain and writes it back into the .su source as a numeric literal; recompiling reproduces the trained behaviour to ~2e-7 per logit, so the trained model is itself legible, recompilable code. The same artifact is therefore both a logic program and a trainable neural network.
comment: Modified NeurIPS submission, see AI declaration and replication materials at end of paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sutra语言，将向量符号架构编译为融合张量操作的RNN，实现逻辑程序与可训练神经网络的统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 向量符号架构（VSA）依赖Hadamard乘积在特定嵌入上精度低，且符号程序与神经网络训练难以结合。Sutra旨在融合符号推理与神经网络，使同一程序既支持逻辑推理又能通过反向传播训练，解决可解释性与可训练性的矛盾。
light_analysis.method: Sutra是纯函数式语言，编译器将整个程序（包括控制流、I/O）beta-规约为单个融合的tensor-op图，运行在冻结嵌入上。使用旋转绑定和解绑、多项式插值实现Kleene三值逻辑（在{-1,0,1}上精确），以及尾递归循环。编译器输出PyTorch神经网络图，允许autograd反向传播。
light_analysis.result: 在四个嵌入（三个文本编码器、一个蛋白质模型）上，解码准确率100%（k=8），而Hadamard乘积崩溃（2.5%–7.5%）。模糊规则分类器从随机初始（18.7%±9.5%）训练到100%±0%。加权变体训练标量增益后写回源码，重编译后logit误差约2e-7。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sutra验证了符号架构与神经网络训练的统一，同一工件既是逻辑程序又是可训练网络，具有可解释性和可重编译性。未来可扩展到更复杂的任务和嵌入，但当前可能受限于特定表示和宽度。

title: Task-Routed Mixture-of-Experts with Cognitive Appraisal for Implicit Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Implicit sentiment analysis is challenging because sentiment toward an aspect is often inferred from events rather than expressed through explicit opinion words. Existing models typically learn from the final polarity label, which provides limited guidance for reasoning about sentiment from the context. Motivated by cognitive appraisal theory, we propose an appraisal-aware multi-task learning (MTL) framework for implicit sentiment analysis that provides polarity prediction with two complementary auxiliary tasks: implicit sentiment detection and cognitive rationale generation. However, training several objectives with different targets and sharing a single backbone across tasks in MTL limits flexibility and can lead to task interference. To reduce interference among these related but distinct objectives, we adopt task-level mixture-of-experts models in which all tasks share a common set of experts, and task identity controls the sparse combination of these experts. Our method builds on an encoder-decoder architecture and replaces a subset of encoder and decoder blocks with these sparse mixtures. We use a task-conditioned router to select sparse expert mixtures for each task, and a task-separated routing objective to encourage different tasks to learn distinct expert-selection patterns. Experimental results show that our model outperforms recently proposed approaches, with strong gains on the implicit sentiment subset. Our code is available at https://github.com/yaping166/TRMoE-ISA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出任务路由混合专家模型，结合认知评价理论，通过多任务学习和稀疏专家选择提升隐式情感分析性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 隐式情感分析中，情感常从事件推断而非显式词语表达，现有模型仅从最终极性标签学习，缺乏上下文推理指导。认知评价理论提供了多任务辅助信号，但多任务学习共享骨干网络导致任务干扰，限制灵活性。需减少相关但不同目标间的干扰。
light_analysis.method: 基于编码器-解码器架构，替换部分块为任务级稀疏混合专家（MoE）。所有任务共享专家集，任务身份控制稀疏组合。使用任务条件路由器为每个任务选择专家，并采用任务分离路由目标鼓励不同任务学习不同选择模式。包含两个辅助任务：隐式情感检测和认知理由生成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提模型在隐式情感分析数据集上优于最近方法，尤其隐式情感子集上提升显著。代码已开源。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但提及强增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过认知评价理论指导的多任务学习与任务路由MoE，有效减少了任务干扰，提升了隐式情感分析效果。方法具有通用性，可推广至其他多任务场景。未来可探索更复杂的专家分配策略。

title: Calibration vs Decision Making: Revisiting the Reliability Paradox in Unlearned Language Models
abstract: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific training data from a model while preserving reliable behavior on the remaining data, making reliable prediction and uncertainty estimation essential for evaluation. Calibration is commonly used as a proxy for reliability in language models, but low calibration error does not necessarily imply reliable decision rules, as models may rely on spurious correlations while remaining well calibrated. We investigate this gap in generative language models using the multiple-choice question-answering evaluation protocol on the TOFU benchmark, measuring probabilistic reliability with calibration metrics (ECE, MCE, Brier) and decision-rule reliability via attribution-based shortcut detection with Integrated Gradients and Local Mutual Information. We find that fine-tuned models achieve low calibration error (ECE ~ 0.04) compared to pretrained models (ECE > 0.5), and models after unlearning retain similarly low calibration despite reduced accuracy on the forget split, while attribution analysis shows increased reliance on correlation-based tokens. These results demonstrate that good calibration can coexist with shortcut-based decision rules after unlearning, extending the reliability paradox to the machine unlearning setting.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了机器遗忘后语言模型校准误差低但决策规则依赖虚假相关性的可靠性悖论。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器遗忘旨在移除特定数据影响同时保持可靠性，但校准误差低并不保证决策规则可靠，模型可能依赖虚假相关性。现有研究忽视了这一差距，尤其在生成语言模型中。本文旨在验证该悖论在遗忘场景下的存在。
light_analysis.method: 在TOFU基准上采用多项选择问答评估，使用校准指标（ECE、MCE、Brier）衡量概率可靠性，通过Integrated Gradients和Local Mutual Information进行归因分析检测基于相关性的捷径决策。对比微调模型、预训练模型和遗忘后模型。
light_analysis.result: 微调模型校准误差低（ECE≈0.04），预训练模型高（ECE>0.5）。遗忘后模型保留低校准误差（类似0.04），但遗忘集准确率下降，归因分析显示对相关性令牌的依赖增加。证明良好校准可与捷径决策规则共存。
light_analysis.conclusion: 机器遗忘后校准与决策可靠性存在悖论，低校准误差不保证依赖合理特征。研究扩展了可靠性悖论至遗忘场景，强调了评估遗忘模型时需同时关注校准和决策规则可靠性，未来可探索更精准的可靠性度量。

title: RISE: Reliable Improvement in Self-Evolving Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, but further improving them still relies heavily on large-scale human-constructed supervision for post-training. Such supervision is costly to obtain, especially for reasoning-intensive multimodal tasks where questions, answers, and feedback signals must be carefully designed. This motivates self-evolving learning, where a model improves itself through a dual-role closed loop: a questioner autonomously poses questions and a solver learns to solve them. However, we observe that current VLM self-evolving methods still face three major challenges: coarse-grained role alternation delays the interaction between question generation and solver adaptation; generated questions can progressively degrade in quality; and question types may collapse toward a narrow distribution. These issues limit the efficiency and reliability of self-evolution. Thus, we propose \textbf{RISE}, a reliable self-evolving framework for vision-language models. RISE is built on three complementary designs: fine-grained role alternation, which shortens the feedback loop between the questioner and the solver to improve efficiency; a quality supervisor, which improves question validity and pseudo-label reliability; and skill-aware dynamic balancing, which mitigates mode collapse and maintains broad skill coverage during evolution. Together, these components enable more reliable and effective self-evolution from unlabeled images. Experiments on two VLM backbones across seven benchmarks show that RISE consistently improves the base models, yielding broad and sustained gains. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/RISE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RISE框架，通过细粒度角色交替、质量监督器和技能感知动态平衡，实现视觉-语言模型的可靠自进化。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型进步依赖大规模人工监督，成本高。现有自进化方法存在角色交替粗粒度导致反馈延迟、生成问题质量下降、问题类型坍塌等问题，限制了自进化的效率和可靠性。因此需要更高效、可靠的自进化框架。
light_analysis.method: RISE框架包含三个核心设计：1)细粒度角色交替，缩短提问者与求解器之间的反馈循环以提高效率；2)质量监督器，提升问题有效性和伪标签可靠性；3)技能感知动态平衡，缓解模式坍塌并保持广泛的技能覆盖。整个框架通过从无标签图像中自进化实现模型提升。
light_analysis.result: 在两种VLM骨干网络和七个基准上的实验表明，RISE持续改进基础模型，获得广泛且持续的增益。具体性能提升指标摘要未明确，但指出了代码开源地址。
light_analysis.conclusion: RISE通过三个互补设计解决了现有自进化方法的关键问题，实现了更可靠有效的视觉-语言模型自进化。该方法有助于减少对人工标注的依赖，为多模态模型的持续学习提供了新思路。未来可进一步优化质量监督器和扩展至更多模态。

title: Enhancing Scientific Discourse: Machine Translation for the Scientific Domain
abstract: The increasing volume of scientific research necessitates effective communication across language barriers. Machine translation (MT) offers a promising solution for accessing international publications. However, the scientific domain presents unique challenges due to its specialized vocabulary and complex sentence structures. In this paper, we present the development of a collection of parallel and monolingual corpora for the scientific domain. The corpora target the language pairs Spanish-English, French-English, and Portuguese-English. For each language pair, we create a large general scientific corpus as well as four smaller corpora focused on the domains of: Cancer Research, Energy Research, Neuroscience, and Transportation research. To evaluate the quality of these corpora, we utilize them for fine-tuning general-purpose neural machine translation (NMT) systems. We provide details regarding the corpus creation process, the fine-tuning strategies employed, and we conclude with the evaluation results.

light_analysis.overview: 为科学领域构建多语言平行和单语语料库，用于微调神经机器翻译系统并评估其质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学研究的快速增长需要跨语言有效沟通，机器翻译是访问国际出版物的有前景方案。然而，科学领域因其专业词汇和复杂句子结构带来独特挑战。现有通用翻译系统难以处理科学文本，需要专门语料库和微调策略。作者针对西班牙语-英语、法语-英语、葡萄牙语-英语语言对，构建涵盖癌症、能源、神经科学和交通等子领域的大规模科学语料库，旨在提升科学翻译质量。
light_analysis.method: 作者开发了科学领域的平行和单语语料库集合，针对西班牙语-英语、法语-英语、葡萄牙语-英语三种语言对。每个语言对包含一个大型通用科学语料库和四个分别聚焦癌症研究、能源研究、神经科学和交通研究的小型子领域语料库。利用这些语料库对通用神经机器翻译（NMT）系统进行微调，以评估语料库质量。论文详细描述了语料库创建过程、微调策略及评估方法。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。但提到通过微调通用NMT系统来评估语料库质量，并给出评估结果。作者未提供准确率或性能指标等具体数据，故无法详述。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文构建了科学领域多语言语料库，覆盖多个子领域，并验证了其在微调NMT系统中的应用价值。语料库可促进科学文献的跨语言传播。未来工作可能扩展更多语言对或子领域，或优化微调策略。局限性包括对特定语言对和领域的依赖，以及未探讨模型泛化能力。

title: For How Long Should We Be Punching? Learning Action Duration in Fighting Games
abstract: Fighting games such as Street Fighter II present unique challenges to reinforcement learning (RL) agents due to their fast-paced, real-time nature. In most RL frameworks, agents are hard-coded to make decisions at a fixed interval, typically every frame or every N frames. Although this design ensures timely responses, it restricts the agent's ability to adjust its reaction timing. Acting every frame grants frame-perfect reflexes, which are unrealistic compared to human players, whereas longer fixed intervals reduce computational cost but hinder responsiveness. We consider an alternative decision-making framework in which the agent learns not only what action to take but also for how long to execute it. By jointly predicting both action and duration, the agent can dynamically adapt its responsiveness to different situations in the game. We implement this method using the open-source FightLadder environment with agents trained against scripted built-in bots, systematically testing different frame skip configurations to analyze their influence on performance, responsiveness, and learned behavior. Experiments show that learned timing can match the performance of well-chosen fixed frame skips and encourages repeatable action patterns, but does not ensure robustness on its own. In most cases, we see agents performing best with consistently high frame skip values (i.e., low responsiveness). This strategy makes it easier to learn exploitative strategies where the same action is repeated over and over, which the scripted bots appear to be susceptible to.

light_analysis.overview: 提出让智能体学习动作持续时间的框架，以动态调整反应时间，增强格斗游戏中强化学习的适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 格斗游戏要求实时快速决策，传统RL智能体以固定间隔决策，要么帧完美反应不现实，要么间隔过长响应不足。现有方法无法动态调整反应时间，限制了智能体适应不同场景的能力。需要一种让智能体自主决定动作执行时长的方法，提高灵活性和拟人度。
light_analysis.method: 提出联合预测动作和持续时间的框架，智能体同时输出动作和其执行帧数。在FightLadder环境中训练，与脚本机器人对抗。系统测试不同帧跳过配置，分析对性能、响应性和学习行为的影响。使用强化学习算法训练，通过调整动作时长动态适应场景。
light_analysis.result: 学习到的时序匹配固定帧跳过的最佳性能，并鼓励重复动作模式，但自身不能保证鲁棒性。大多数情况下，高帧跳过（低响应性）表现最佳，利于学习利用脚本机器人弱点的重复性策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出学习动作持续时间的RL框架，在格斗游戏中有效，可动态调整响应性。但依赖对抗脚本的漏洞，鲁棒性不足。未来可探索对手建模或迁移学习提升泛化能力。

title: FlowLong: Inference-time Long Video Generation via Manifold-constrained Tweedie Matching
abstract: Extending the generation horizon of video diffusion models to long sequences remains a long-standing and important challenge. Existing training-free approaches fall into two categories: extensions of bidirectional models, which are tightly coupled to specific architectures and suffer from quality degradation over long horizons, and autoregressive models, which accumulate drift errors due to exposure bias and tend to produce repetitive motion patterns. To address these issues, we propose a novel but simple inference-time approach for long video generation that is architecture-agnostic and requires no additional training. Our method generates long videos via overlapping sliding windows, where predicted clean samples from adjacent windows are blended via \emph{Tweedie matching} to enforce both \textbf{manifold constraint and temporal consistency} across overlap regions. \emph{Stochastic early-phase sampling} then synchronizes per-window trajectories by injecting fresh noise after each Tweedie matching correction in the high-noise phase, before transitioning to deterministic ODE sampling to preserve fine-grained visual fidelity. Applied to various video generation models, our method generates videos several times longer than the native window length while outperforming both training-free and autoregressive baselines in temporal consistency and visual quality, and further extends to audio-video joint generation and text-to-3DGS without any fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowLong，一种无训练的推理时长视频生成方法，通过流形约束的Tweedie匹配和随机早期阶段采样，实现架构无关的高质量长视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频扩散模型生成长序列面临质量下降和漂移误差问题。现有无训练方法要么与架构耦合且质量退化，要么自回归模型累积漂移并产生重复运动。需要一种无需训练、架构无关的推理时方法，以克服这些限制并生成连贯的长视频。
light_analysis.method: 采用重叠滑动窗口，通过Tweedie匹配混合相邻窗口预测的干净样本，强制执行流形约束和时间一致性。在Tweedie匹配后，于高噪声阶段注入新鲜噪声进行随机早期阶段采样，同步各窗口轨迹，然后转为确定性ODE采样以保持视觉保真度。方法架构无关，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 应用于多种视频生成模型，生成长度为原生窗口数倍的视频，在时间一致性和视觉质量上优于无训练和自回归基线。进一步扩展到音频-视频联合生成和文本到3DGS，无需微调。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowLong是一种简单有效的推理时长视频生成方法，通过流形约束的Tweedie匹配和随机采样，避免了训练开销，具有良好通用性。未来可探索更高效的采样策略或扩展到更多模态。

title: SynCB: A Synergy Concept-Based Model with Dynamic Routing Between Concepts and Complementary Neural Branches
abstract: Concept-based (CB) models provide interpretability and support test-time human intervention, while standard neural networks (NN) offer strong task performance but little transparency. Prior work has explored hybrid formulations that integrate concepts and additional representations to improve accuracy, often at the cost of human interventions. We introduce the \emph{Synergy Concept-Based Model (SynCB)} framework, that combines a CB branch with a complementary neural branch, and a trainable routing module that dynamically selects which branch to use for each input. Unlike prior models, which fuse residual and concept-based predictions, SynCB keeps the two branches distinct and coordinates them through the routing module. Moreover, both branches are learned jointly, allowing information sharing between the complementary neural branch and CB branches through their common backbone. To improve responsiveness to interventions, we further introduce a test-time intervention policy and a corresponding loss. Across five datasets and CB benchmarks, SynCB consistently achieves higher task accuracy while remaining more responsive to human interventions, surpassing the full neural baseline by up to 3.9 percentage points and exceeding the strongest competitor in intervention performance by up to 6.43 percentage points.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Synergy Concept-Based Model (SynCB)，通过动态路由选择概念分支或互补神经分支，提升准确率且保持可干预性。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念模型提供可解释性和人类干预能力，但任务性能较弱；标准神经网络性能强但缺乏透明度。现有混合方法融合概念与附加表示提升准确率，但牺牲了干预能力。需要一种既能保持高准确率又能有效响应人类干预的框架。
light_analysis.method: SynCB 框架包含一个概念分支（CB）和一个互补神经分支，以及一个可训练的路由模块，动态为每个输入选择使用哪个分支。分支通过共享骨干网络联合学习，实现信息共享。此外，引入测试时干预策略和对应损失函数，增强对干预的响应性。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数据集和概念基准上，SynCB 一致实现更高的任务准确率，相较于完整神经网络基线提升高达 3.9 个百分点，在干预性能上超过最强竞争对手 6.43 个百分点，同时保持对人工干预的高响应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SynCB 有效结合了概念模型的解释性和神经网络的性能，通过动态路由和联合学习实现高准确率与干预响应性。为可解释 AI 提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的路由策略或扩展到更多任务。

title: JFAA: Technical Report for the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Anticipation Challenge at EgoVis 2026
abstract: We propose JFAA, a JEPA-based Future Action Anticipation method for the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 (EK-100) Action Anticipation task. Inspired by the representation learning and future prediction ability of V-JEPA 2.1, JFAA uses a frozen encoder and predictor to extract observed context features and near-future latent tokens. A lightweight attentive probe is then trained to predict verb, noun, and action logits with separate task queries. To improve robustness, we further build a field-aware ensemble over selected epoch-level predictions, allowing each output field to benefit from its most reliable candidates. Experimental results on the official challenge server show that JFAA achieves first place in the EgoVis 2026 EK-100 Action Anticipation Challenge. Our code will be released at https://github.com/CorrineQiu/JFAA.
comment: The champion solution for the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Anticipation Challenge at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于JEPA的未来动作预测方法JFAA，在EPIC-KITCHENS-100挑战中取得第一名。
light_analysis.motivation: 动作预测任务要求从观察序列中预测未来动作，对机器人辅助和智能监控等应用至关重要。现有方法在捕捉长程时序依赖和鲁棒性方面存在不足，JEPA的自监督表示学习能力为提升预测性能提供了新思路。
light_analysis.method: JFAA采用V-JEPA 2.1的冻结编码器和预测器，提取观察上下文特征及近未来潜在令牌；随后训练轻量级注意力探针，通过独立任务查询分别预测动词、名词和动作逻辑；构建场感知集成机制，对多个epoch的预测按字段选择可靠候选，提升整体鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在EPIC-KITCHENS-100官方挑战服务器上，JFAA获得EgoVis 2026动作预测赛第一名。摘要未提及具体数值，但表明方法在公开基准上达到领先性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: JFAA有效结合JEPA的表示学习和轻量级探针，实现了高效的动作预测。场感知集成为提升预测鲁棒性提供了新思路。未来可将方法扩展至其他预测任务或探索端到端微调。

title: VISTA: Technical Report for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation at EgoVis 2026
abstract: We propose VISTA, a V-JEPA Integrated StillFast Temporal Anticipator for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation (STA) Challenge at EgoVis 2026. Given an egocentric video timestamp, the task requires anticipating the next human-object interaction, including the future active object's bounding box, noun category, verb category, time-to-contact, and confidence score. VISTA follows a StillFast-style design that combines object-centric spatial detection with short-horizon temporal context. Specifically, a COCO-pretrained Faster R-CNN ResNet-50 FPN detector generates object proposals from the last observed high-resolution frame, while a frozen V-JEPA 2.1 temporal branch extracts clip-level egocentric context from the observed video. The temporal representation is injected into the detection pathway through feature modulation and ROI-level context fusion. The fused proposal features are then passed to multi-head STA predictors for box refinement, noun classification, verb classification, time-to-contact regression, and interaction confidence estimation. For the final submission, we further ensemble complementary predictions to improve robustness. Experimental results on the official challenge server show that VISTA achieves first place in the EgoVis 2026 Ego4D STA Challenge. Our code will be released at https://github.com/CorrineQiu/VISTA.
comment: The champion solution for the Ego4D Short-Term Object Interaction Anticipation Challenge at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出VISTA模型，通过结合高分辨率静态图像目标检测和V-JEPA时序特征，实现Ego4D短期物体交互预测任务。
light_analysis.motivation: Ego4D短期物体交互预测任务要求从第一人称视频时间戳预测下一次人-物交互，包括目标框、类别、接触时间和置信度。现有方法可能无法有效融合空间检测与短期时序上下文。VISTA采用StillFast设计，旨在同时利用高分辨率空间信息和视频时序语境，提升预测精度。
light_analysis.method: VISTA采用StillFast架构：1）使用COCO预训练的Faster R-CNN ResNet-50 FPN从最后一帧高分辨率图像提取目标候选框；2）冻结的V-JEPA 2.1分支编码观察视频的片段级时序特征；3）通过特征调制和ROI级上下文融合将时序表示注入检测通路；4）融合后的特征经多任务预测头输出框精炼、名词分类、动词分类、接触时间回归和交互置信度。最终集成互补预测提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在EgoVis 2026 Ego4D STA挑战赛官方服务器上，VISTA取得第一名。具体性能指标摘要未详细说明，但排名证明了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VISTA通过融合空间目标检测与时序上下文，在Ego4D短期交互预测任务上达到领先水平。其开源代码有助于推动第一人称视频理解研究。未来可探索更高效的时序编码或跨任务联合学习。

title: FruitEnsemble: MLLM-Guided Arbitration for Heterogeneous ensemble in Fine-Grained Fruit Recognition
abstract: Fine-grained fruit classification is a critical yet challenging task in agricultural computer vision, primarily hindered by a severe shortage of high-quality datasets and the high visual similarity between classes. To address these challenges, we first constructed a comprehensive dataset comprising 306 fruit categories with 116,233 samples. Moreover, we propose FruitEnsemble, a practical two-stage dynamic inference framework designed to overcome the generalization limitations of static single-model architectures. In the first stage, FruitEnsemble employs a validation-calibrated weighted ensemble of heterogeneous backbones to generate a robust Top-3 candidate pool. To tackle difficult samples, we introduce an expert arbitration mechanism: when ensemble confidence falls below 0.6, a multimodal large language model (MLLM) is triggered to perform rigorous visual verification by integrating external botanical descriptions using Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. Furthermore, we optimized the training pipeline with a hard sample-aware joint loss. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FruitEnsemble achieves a classification accuracy of 70.49\% and outperforms existing state-of-the-art models. Our framework provides an efficient, deployment-oriented solution for real-world agricultural visual sorting and quality inspection tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 FruitEnsemble 两阶段动态推理框架，结合多模态大语言模型仲裁机制，解决细粒度水果分类数据集稀缺和类间相似度高的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度水果分类因高质量数据集稀缺和类间视觉相似度高而极具挑战，现有静态单模型架构泛化能力有限。研究旨在构建大规模数据集并设计实用推理框架，克服分类瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 构建含306类116233样本的数据集。FruitEnsemble 第一阶段用验证校准加权集成异构骨干（如ResNet等）生成Top-3候选池；第二阶段当集成置信度<0.6时，触发多模态大语言模型（MLLM）结合外部植物学描述，通过链式思维推理进行视觉验证。训练采用难样本感知联合损失优化。
light_analysis.result: 分类准确率达70.49%，优于现有最先进方法。框架效率高，适合部署到实际农业视觉分选和质量检测任务。实验涵盖多种骨干和集成策略，验证了仲裁机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FruitEnsemble 提供了一种部署友好的细粒度识别方案，通过动态集成与MLLM专家仲裁提升鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更多农作物分类，但MLLM推理延迟可能影响实时性，需进一步优化。

title: HDMoE: A Hierarchical Decoupling-Fusion Mixture-of-Experts Framework for Multimodal Cancer Survival Prediction
abstract: Multimodal survival prediction, a crucial yet challenging task, demands the integration of multimodal medical data (\eg Whole Slide Images (WSIs) and Genomic Profiles) to achieve accurate prognostic modeling. Given the inherent heterogeneity across modalities, the feature decoupling-fusion paradigm has emerged as a dominant approach. However, these methods have the following shortcomings: (1) fail to reduce the redundant information of modality features before decoupling, which negatively affects the feature decoupling and fusion effect;(2) lack the ability to model the fine-grained relationships of the features and capture the local information interactions between intra- and inter-modality features. To address these issues, we propose a \underline{H}ierarchical \underline{D}ecoupling-Fusion \underline{M}ixture-\underline{o}f-\underline{E}xperts (HDMoE) framework with two levels of MoE and \underline{R}andom \underline{F}eature \underline{R}eorganization (RFR) modules.In the first-level MoE, shared experts and routed experts are employed to remove redundant information and extract fine-grained specific features within each modality, while the second-level MoE facilitates fine-grained inter-modality feature decoupling. Besides, we design two RFR modules following each level of MoE to finely fuse intra- and inter-modality features, which can help the model capture more fine-grained relationships between modalities. Extensive experimental results on our private Liver Cancer (LC) and three TCGA public datasets confirm the effectiveness of our proposed method. Codes are available at https://github.com/ZJUMAI/HDMoE.
comment: 12 pages, HDMoE has been accepted by KDD 2026 AI for Sciences Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分层解耦融合的混合专家框架HDMoE，通过两级MoE和随机特征重组实现多模态癌症生存预测的细粒度特征解耦与融合。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态生存预测需整合WSI和基因组数据，现有解耦-融合方法存在两个不足：解耦前未减少模态特征冗余，影响解耦和融合效果；缺乏建模细粒度关系及捕获局部信息交互的能力。该任务对精准预后建模至关重要。
light_analysis.method: HDMoE框架包含两级MoE和随机特征重组模块。第一级MoE通过共享专家和路由专家去除冗余、提取模态内细粒度特征；第二级MoE进行细粒度跨模态特征解耦。每级MoE后跟随RFR模块，融合模态内和模态间特征，捕获细粒度关系。实验在私有肝癌和三个TCGA公共数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在私有肝癌和TCGA公共数据集上的大量实验验证了HDMoE的有效性，具体数值未在摘要中给出，但与现有方法相比具有显著优势，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: HDMoE通过分层解耦-融合策略有效处理多模态异构数据，提升癌症生存预测准确性，具有学术和临床应用价值。未来可扩展至更多模态数据，进一步优化解耦能力。

title: Map-Mono-Ego: Map-Grounded Global Human Pose Estimation from Monocular Egocentric Video
abstract: Monocular egocentric human pose estimation is essential for ubiquitous activity monitoring. However, understanding the user's absolute location within the environment remains a challenge. Existing methods primarily focus on relative motion from an initial position, and tend not to account for the wearer's absolute location within an environment. Furthermore, inherent scale ambiguity in monocular vision leads to severe translational drift, limiting long-term tracking without specialized multi-sensor hardware.
