To address this, we propose MapMonoEgo, a novel framework achieving globally consistent human pose estimation solely from a monocular camera by leveraging a pre-scanned 3D point cloud. We also introduce AIST-Living dataset, a new dataset pairing egocentric video with ground-truth motion in a scanned environment. Experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline, proving its utility for practical monitoring tasks without specialized hardware.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Map-MonoEgo框架，利用预扫描3D点云从单目自中心视频实现全局一致的人体姿态估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 单目自中心人体姿态估计对日常活动监测至关重要，但现有方法难以确定用户的绝对位置，且存在尺度模糊导致的平移漂移问题，需要多传感器硬件。本文旨在无需专用硬件，仅用单目相机实现长时间稳定的全局姿态估计。
light_analysis.method: 提出Map-MonoEgo框架，结合预扫描的3D点云作为环境先验，从单目自中心视频中估计人体全局姿态。输入为单目RGB视频和对应环境的3D点云，输出为全局坐标系下的人体关节位置。关键创新在于利用点云约束消除尺度模糊和漂移。同时引入AIST-Living数据集，包含配对的自中心视频和地面真实运动。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Map-MonoEgo在全局姿态估计精度上显著优于现有基线方法，在AIST-Living数据集上验证了其有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调无需专用硬件即可实现高质量监测，证明其实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明利用预扫描3D点云可经济有效地实现单目自中心视频的全局人体姿态估计，避免了多传感器硬件的需求。该方法对日常活动监测、增强现实等应用具有价值。未来可探索动态环境或无预扫描条件下的扩展。

title: Training distribution determines the ceiling of drug-blind cancer sensitivity prediction
abstract: Precision oncology requires predicting which drugs will suppress a specific tumor from its molecular profile, but drug-blind sensitivity prediction has plateaued despite increasingly complex drug representations. Here we show that this stagnation reflects a metric artifact rather than a representational bottleneck. The standard benchmark, global Pearson r, is dominated by between-drug potency differences that a trivial drug-mean predictor captures without any cell-specific learning. Per-drug Pearson r, which isolates within-drug cell ranking, reveals that no drug encoding improves over cell-only features across four independent datasets. A controlled experiment channeling mechanism-of-action identity as either a drug feature or a training-distribution constraint identifies the cause. Supplying MoA as a feature yields negligible benefit, whereas using it to stratify training raises per-drug r substantially for targeted kinase inhibitors, because pan-cancer co-training suppresses pathway-specific sensitivity signals. Mechanism-stratified training and response matching from pilot observations provide two deployable strategies that together recover the principal sources of predictive gain in drug-blind sensitivity prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示药物盲敏感性预测停滞是度量伪影而非表征瓶颈，提出机制分层训练和响应匹配策略显著提升预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 精准肿瘤学依赖分子特征预测药物敏感性，但药物盲预测尽管药物表示日益复杂却陷入停滞。标准基准全局Pearson r被药物间效力差异主导，简单的药物均值预测器即可达标，无法反映真正的细胞特异性学习。因此需要重新审视评估方法并探索有效改进策略，以突破当前瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 引入逐药物Pearson r隔离药物内细胞排序，通过控制实验将作用机制（MoA）作为药物特征或训练分布约束。发现MoA作为特征收效甚微，但作为分层训练约束可显著提高靶向激酶抑制剂的逐药物r，因泛癌共训练抑制通路特异性信号。提出机制分层训练和响应匹配两种策略，从初步观察中恢复预测增益来源。
light_analysis.result: 在四个独立数据集上，没有药物编码优于仅细胞特征。机制分层训练和响应匹配显著提升靶向激酶抑制剂的逐药物Pearson r，恢复了药物盲敏感性预测的主要预测增益，验证了策略有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文阐明药物盲敏感性预测停滞的根源在于度量伪影，并提供了可部署的改进策略。强调评估指标选择的重要性，为精准肿瘤学预测模型设计提供新视角。未来工作可探索更精细的机制分层和响应匹配方法，以及泛化到更多药物类型。

title: Learning fMRI activations dictionaries across individual geometries via optimal transport
abstract: Dictionary learning is a powerful tool for creating interpretable representations. When applied to functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) data, the resulting patterns of brain activity can be used for various downstream tasks, such as brain state classification or population-level analysis. However, a major challenge is the variability in brain geometry across individuals. This is usually addressed by projecting each individual brain geometry onto a common template, which removes subject-specific information. In this work, we introduce a novel approach to dictionary learning on fMRI data that explicitly accounts for this variability. We use the optimal transport-based Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW) distance to compare graphs with different geometries and features. To address the challenge of computing multiple FGW distances for large graphs such as those arising from fMRI data, we rely on amortized optimization to learn a neural network that predicts an approximation of the optimal transport plans, which substantially reduces the computational cost. Additionally, we learn dictionary atoms that depend on the FGW trade-off parameter, which controls the balance between feature alignment and structural consistency. Numerical experiments on the HCP dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach captures different levels of geometric variability in the data and provides representations that preserve essential information.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最优传输的fMRI字典学习方法，通过Fused Gromov-Wasserstein距离处理个体脑几何差异，并利用摊销优化降低计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: fMRI数据的字典学习可生成可解释的脑活动模式，用于脑状态分类或群体分析。但个体间脑几何结构存在显著差异，传统方法将个体脑映射到公共模板，损失了主体特异性信息。因此，需要一种能够显式处理几何变异性的字典学习方法，同时保持计算可行性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法引入基于最优传输的Fused Gromov-Wasserstein (FGW)距离，用于比较不同几何和特征的图。针对大型图计算多个FGW距离的高成本，采用摊销优化训练神经网络预测最优传输计划的近似，大幅降低计算开销。同时，字典原子依赖于控制特征对齐与结构一致性的FGW权衡参数，从而适应不同水平的几何变异性。
light_analysis.result: 在HCP数据集上的数值实验表明，所提方法能够捕获数据中不同层次的几何变异性，并生成保留关键信息的表示。与传统模板对齐方法相比，该方法有效保持了主体特异性信息，并通过学习FGW权衡参数的字典原子提高了对个体差异的适应性，为下游任务提供了更丰富的表征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种新颖的fMRI字典学习方法，利用最优传输显式建模个体脑几何差异，并通过摊销优化实现可扩展的计算。该方法在保留个体特异性信息的同时，提供了可解释的大脑活动模式，具有潜在的应用价值，如脑状态分类和群体分析。未来可探索更高效的传输计划预测网络及更复杂的图结构。

title: NeighborDiv: Training-free Zero-shot Generalist Graph Anomaly Detection via Neighbor Diversity
abstract: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) is increasingly shifting to Generalist GAD (GGAD) for cross-domain "one-for-all" detection, but existing GGAD methods predominantly rely on the neighbor consistency principle, falling into the \textbf{Node-to-Neighbor Consistency Paradigm} for anomaly quantification. These methods suffer from complex training pipelines, heavy training data dependency, high computational costs, and unstable cross-domain generalization. To address these limitations, we propose NeighborDiv, a training-free generalist graph anomaly detection framework based on neighbor diversity. Departing from the dominant Node-to-Neighbor Consistency Paradigm, we shift the focus to the \textbf{Neighbor-to-Neighbor Diversity Paradigm}, and uncover that the internal structural dispersion of a node's neighbor set is a powerful, independently discriminative anomaly signal. We quantify neighbor diversity via the variance of inter-neighbor feature similarities, which captures how a node organizes its local graph environment, and operates independently of conventional node-to-neighbor consistency frameworks. Extensive experiments under two standard GGAD evaluation paradigms show NeighborDiv achieves state-of-the-art performance, with relative gains of 10.25% in average AUC and 17.78% in average AP over the second-best baseline under Single-Domain Independent Training (SDIT), and 6.89%/9.58% in AUC/AP under Unified Multi-Domain Training (UMDT), respectively. Notably, NeighborDiv yields zero performance volatility across all datasets, eliminating training-set dependency and establishing a lightweight and highly practical GGAD framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于邻居多样性的训练无关通用图异常检测框架NeighborDiv，颠覆传统节点-邻居一致性范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有通用图异常检测方法依赖于节点-邻居一致性范式，存在训练流程复杂、数据依赖性强、计算成本高且跨域泛化不稳定的问题。需要一种更轻量、泛化性更好的检测方案。
light_analysis.method: NeighborDiv采用邻居-邻居多样性范式，通过计算邻居间特征相似度的方差来量化邻居多样性，作为独立的异常信号。该方法无需训练，直接在测试阶段计算，与传统的节点-邻居一致性框架解耦。
light_analysis.result: 在两种标准评估范式下均达最优：SDIT中平均AUC提升10.25%，平均AP提升17.78%；UMDT中AUC/AP分别提升6.89%/9.58%。所有数据集上零性能波动，消除训练集依赖性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NeighborDiv通过多样性视角实现了高效且稳定的通用图异常检测，无需训练即可跨域应用，为轻量级GGAD提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的多样性度量或结合一致性信息。

title: CIG: Exploration via Conditional Information Gain
abstract: Intrinsic rewards for exploration in reinforcement learning condition on different contexts: lifelong rewards score each transition against accumulated experience but ignore within-rollout redundancy; episodic rewards penalize intra-trajectory repetition but discard lifetime progress. Hybrid methods combine both signals through heuristic weights or require Gaussian-process dynamics that do not scale beyond low-dimensional state spaces. Trajectory-level information gain decomposes into per-step terms that condition on the replay buffer and rollout prefix simultaneously, but remains intractable for deep models. We derive the Conditional Information Gain (CIG) reward as a tractable surrogate: a log-determinant objective over an ensemble disagreement kernel whose Cholesky factorization yields causal per-step rewards that retain both conditioning sets while scaling to high-dimensional state spaces. We instantiate CIG in a model-based setting, where rollouts are short and within-rollout corrections remain largely unexplored. Across twelve tasks spanning discrete (MiniGrid) and continuous control (OGBench), in both clean and stochastic-distractor settings, CIG outperforms or matches prior exploration methods while remaining robust to stochastic distractors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出条件信息增益(CIG)奖励，作为轨迹级信息增益的可计算代理，高效探索。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有探索方法中，终身奖励忽略轨迹内冗余，情节奖励忽略终身进展，混合方法依赖启发式权重或高斯过程无法扩展。轨迹级信息增益难以计算，需要一种能同时考虑缓冲区和轨迹前缀的可扩展方法。
light_analysis.method: 推导条件信息增益(CIG)奖励为log-determinant目标，基于集成分歧核的Cholesky分解得到因果每步奖励，兼顾两种条件集并扩展到高维状态空间。在基于模型的设置中，短轨迹内的校正尚未充分探索。
light_analysis.result: 在12个任务（MiniGrid, OGBench）中，包括干净和随机干扰环境，CIG优于或匹配先前探索方法，对随机干扰具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了可计算的CIG奖励，平衡了终身和情节探索，在多样环境中验证有效，具有泛化性和鲁棒性。未来可扩展其他领域。

title: Terminal-World: Scaling Terminal-Agent Environments via Agent Skills
abstract: Terminal agents extend Large Language Models with the ability to execute tasks directly in command-line environments, but their progress is bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality training data. Existing approaches bootstrap from partial sources such as human-defined seeds or GitHub repositories to instantiate one component and then complete the rest, producing tasks confined to narrow seed distributions, environments misaligned with task semantics, and inefficient trajectories from unguided exploration. To address these limitations, we introduce Terminal-World, a fully automated pipeline that uses agent skills as the central synthesis primitive, which jointly encode what to accomplish, when to apply (preconditions and environment state), and how to execute, enabling task instructions, environments, and teacher trajectories to be co-derived. To further broaden the synthesis space, Terminal-World composes skills into skill teams and skill graphs for multi-role and cross-domain task synthesis. Using this pipeline, we construct 5,723 training environments and train Terminal-World-8B/14B/32B, evaluated across 6 benchmarks where the Terminal-World series consistently outperforms terminal-agent baselines. Notably, using the same teacher model and only 1.2% of the training data, Terminal-World-32B surpasses Nemotron-Terminal-32B on Terminal-Bench 2.0 by +4.5 Pass@1 (31.5) and achieves 43.8 Pass@3.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Terminal-World自动管道，以智能体技能为核心协同生成任务指令、环境和教师轨迹，构建5723个训练环境并训练模型，在多个基准上超越基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 终端智能体扩展了大语言模型在命令行环境中的任务执行能力，但受限于高质量训练数据的稀缺。现有方法依赖人工种子或GitHub仓库等部分来源，任务分布狭窄、环境与任务语义错位、轨迹效率低下，限制了智能体的性能提升和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: Terminal-World采用全自动管道，以智能体技能（agent skills）作为合成原语，技能联合编码任务目标、应用前提（环境状态）和执行方式，实现任务指令、环境和教师轨迹的协同推导。通过将技能组合为技能团队和技能图谱，支持多角色和跨域任务合成。最终构建5723个训练环境，训练了Terminal-World-8B/14B/32B模型。
light_analysis.result: 在6个基准评估中，Terminal-World系列一致优于终端智能体基线。使用相同教师模型和仅1.2%的训练数据，Terminal-World-32B在Terminal-Bench 2.0上Pass@1达到31.5，超过Nemotron-Terminal-32B的27.0（+4.5），且Pass@3达到43.8。
light_analysis.conclusion: Terminal-World通过技能驱动的自动合成管道有效解决了训练数据稀缺问题，生成的多样任务和环境显著提升了终端智能体的性能。该工作为命令行智能体的规模化训练提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的技能组合与跨任务泛化。

title: Governance by Construction for Generalist Agents
abstract: Enterprise agents are increasingly expected to operate autonomously across tools and interfaces, yet production deployments require governance by construction. Systems must specify which actions are allowed, when human oversight is required, and what information may be exposed, without rebuilding the agent for each domain. This demo presents CUGA's policy system, a modular policy-as-code layer that composes with a generalist LLM agent to deliver predictable, auditable, and compliance-aware behavior in compound workflows without model fine-tuning. We present a runtime governance architecture that enforces policy interventions at every critical stage of execution. Rather than passively constraining behavior, policies intercept the agent at five structural checkpoints: upstream of planning (Intent Guard), within the system prompt to steer reasoning (Playbook), at the tool-call boundary to enforce proper usage (Tool Guide), outside the reasoning loop as a Human-in-the-Loop gate for high-risk actions (Tool Approvals), and at the output stage to filter and structure the final response (Output Formatter). Together, these stages embed governance continuously across the agent's execution pipeline rather than treating it as an afterthought. Using a healthcare scenario and a multi-layered enforcement intervention, the demo shows dynamic playbook injection for structured tool-sequence enforcement, intent guards that block malicious or accidental harmful requests, and human-in-the-loop tool approval checkpoints for potentially destructive actions. The artifact illustrates how typed governance primitives enable faster, safer deployment of enterprise agentic systems while improving policy adherence and execution consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CUGA策略系统，实现通用LLM代理的运行时治理架构，无需微调模型即可确保可预测、可审计的合规行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 企业代理需要在多个工具和接口上自主运行，但生产部署要求通过构建实现治理。现有系统必须为每个领域重建代理以指定允许的操作、人工监督时机和信息暴露规则，缺乏通用且可组合的治理方法。这导致部署速度慢、策略一致性差，且难以审计。因此，需要一种模块化的治理层，能够与通用LLM代理组合，在不进行模型微调的情况下提供可预测、可审计且合规的行为。
light_analysis.method: 提出CUGA策略系统，一种模块化的策略即代码层，与通用LLM代理组合。治理架构在五个结构检查点实施策略干预：意图守卫（上游规划前）、剧本（系统提示中引导推理）、工具指南（工具调用边界）、工具审批（高风险行动的人工介入循环）、输出格式化器（输出阶段）。通过动态剧本注入、意图阻止恶意请求和人工审批检查点，实现持续治理嵌入执行流水线。
light_analysis.result: 在医疗场景演示中，展示了多层级强制干预：动态剧本注入实现结构化工具序列强制、意图守卫阻止恶意或意外有害请求、人工审批检查点用于潜在破坏性行动。该架构实现了更快、更安全的企业代理系统部署，并提高了策略遵守度和执行一致性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调策略原语支持类型化治理，提升了部署速度和安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提出一种运行时治理架构，将治理嵌入代理执行流水线的各个关键阶段，而非事后处理。通过策略即代码层与通用LLM代理组合，实现了可预测、可审计且合规的行为，无需模型微调。该工作具有重要实际应用价值，可加快企业代理系统的安全部署，并提高策略一致性。未来可探索更多领域的治理策略定制和自动化策略生成。

title: PlanningBench: Generating Scalable and Verifiable Planning Data for Evaluating and Training Large Language Models
abstract: Planning is a fundamental capability for large language models (LLMs) because such complex tasks require models to coordinate goals, constraints, resources, and long-term consequences into executable and verifiable solutions. Existing planning benchmarks, however, usually treat planning data as fixed collections of instances rather than controllable generation targets. This limits scenario coverage, ties difficulty to surface-level proxies rather than structural sources, and offers limited support for scalable generation, automatic verification, or planning-oriented training. We introduce PlanningBench, a framework for generating scalable, diverse, and verifiable planning data for both evaluation and training. PlanningBench starts from real planning scenarios and abstracts practical workflows into a structured taxonomy of more than 30 task types, subtasks, constraint families, and difficulty factors. Guided by this taxonomy, a constraint-driven synthesis pipeline instantiates self-contained planning problems with adaptive difficulty control, quality filtering, and instance-level verification checklists. This shifts planning data construction from fixed benchmark collection to controllable generation while preserving realistic task grounding. We use PlanningBench to evaluate open-source and closed-source frontier LLMs, and find that current models still struggle to produce complete solutions under coupled constraints. Beyond evaluation, reinforcement learning on verified PlanningBench data improves performance on unseen planning benchmarks and broader instruction-following tasks. Further analysis suggests that determinate or well-specified optimal solutions provide clearer reward signals and more stable training dynamics. Overall, PlanningBench provides a controllable source of planning data for diagnosing and improving generalizable planning abilities in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PlanningBench框架，实现可扩展、可验证的规划数据生成，用于评估和训练大语言模型的规划能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有规划基准将数据视为固定实例集合，而非可控生成目标，导致场景覆盖有限、难度依赖表面代理、缺乏可扩展生成与自动验证。PlanningBench旨在解决这些问题，提供可控的规划数据源以支持评估与训练。
light_analysis.method: 从真实规划场景出发，抽象为含30+任务类型、子任务、约束族和难度因子的结构化分类法。基于约束驱动的合成流程，生成自包含规划问题，具备自适应难度控制、质量过滤和实例级验证清单，实现从固定收集到可控生成的转变。
light_analysis.result: 评估多个开源和闭源LLM，发现模型在耦合约束下难以生成完整解。在PlanningBench数据上进行强化学习，提升了在未见规划基准和指令遵循任务上的性能，且确定性最优解提供更清晰的奖励信号和更稳定的训练动态。
light_analysis.conclusion: PlanningBench为诊断和提升LLM的通用规划能力提供可控数据源，支持评估与训练，强化学习实验验证了其训练价值。未来需进一步验证合成数据与现实任务的差距。

title: CAdam: Context-Adaptive Moment Estimation for 3D Gaussian Densification in Generative Distillation
abstract: Adaptive densification is the engine of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). However, when transposed to the optimization-based Generative Distillation paradigm, this reconstruction-native mechanism reveals fundamental limitations, resulting in inefficient representations cluttered with redundant primitives. We diagnose this failure as a Densification Dilemma stemming from the stochastic nature of generative guidance: the standard magnitude-based accumulation indiscriminately aggregates transient noise alongside geometric signals, making it difficult to strike a balance between over-densification and under-fitting. To resolve this, we introduce Context-Adaptive Moment Estimation (CAdam), a novel framework that reinterprets densification as a statistically grounded signal verification problem. CAdam leverages the first moment of gradients to exploit the interference principle, where stochastic fluctuations cancel out via destructive interference while consistent geometric drifts accumulate via constructive interference, effectively disentangling the underlying signal from the generative noise floor. This is further augmented by a quantile-based context awareness and an intrinsic Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) gating mechanism, which ensure robust adaptation across optimization stages and enable the soft termination of densification. Extensive experiments across diverse objectives (SDS, ISM, VFDS) and strong generative 3DGS backbones show that CAdam reduces Gaussian count by 85%-97% relative to standard densification while preserving overall comparable perceptual quality. These results highlight signal-aware density control as a practical way to improve memory efficiency in optimization-based generative distillation.
comment: Accepted to SIGGRAPH 2026 Conference Papers. 12 pages, 8 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAdam框架，将3D高斯密化重构为信号验证问题，通过上下文自适应矩估计实现高效生成蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 3DGS的自适应密化在基于优化的生成蒸馏中失效，导致表示低效、原语冗余。根源在于生成引导的随机性：基于幅值的累积无法区分瞬态噪声与几何信号，造成过密化与欠拟合的困境。现有方法难以平衡，亟需统计信号处理机制。
light_analysis.method: CAdam利用梯度一阶矩的干涉原理：通过相消干涉消除随机波动，相长干涉积累一致漂移，从而分离底层信号与生成噪声。结合分位数上下文感知和内在信噪比门控，实现跨优化阶段的鲁棒自适应，并支持密化的软终止。无需额外数据，适用于多种目标函数。
light_analysis.result: 在SDS、ISM、VFDS等不同目标及强生成3DGS骨干上，CAdam相对标准密化减少高斯数量85%-97%，同时保持可比的感知质量。显著提升内存效率，验证了信号感知密度控制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAdam通过信号感知的密度控制解决了生成蒸馏中的密化困境，大幅提升内存效率。该工作为优化生成蒸馏提供了实用路径，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。未来可探索其在其他基于优化的生成任务中的泛化性。

title: Runtime-Certified Bounded-Error Quantized Attention
abstract: KV cache quantization reduces the memory cost of long-context LLM inference, but introduces approximation error that is typically validated only empirically. Existing systems rely on average-case robustness, with no mechanism to detect or recover from failures at runtime. We present a tiered KV cache architecture that enables runtime-certified attention: INT8 keys and INT4 values are stored in GPU memory, while FP16 originals are retained in system RAM for deterministic fallback. A two-term error decomposition yields per-head, per-step bounds on (i) attention distribution distortion from key quantization and (ii) value reconstruction error. These bounds are computed online and used to drive adaptive precision selection and a multi-stage fallback ladder, which guarantees recovery to the exact dense attention output when required. Across PG-19, NIAH, and RULER benchmarks on LLaMA~3.1-8B with contexts up to 128K, the system matches dense FP16 KV quality within noise for language modelling and retrieval tasks, while recovering catastrophic failures observed in naive INT8/INT4 baselines. Value-sensitive tasks at short context expose a controlled trade-off between compression and fidelity, which can be eliminated via tighter value tolerances or FP16-value fallback. The certification is local (per-head, per-step) and does not guarantee end-to-end model correctness, but ensures that each attention computation is either bounded relative to an FP16 reference or exactly recovered via fallback. This reframes KV cache quantization as a runtime-verified computation rather than a fixed approximation. The goal is not raw speedups, but enabling safe deployment of aggressive KV compression under strict quality constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出运行时认证的量化注意力机制，通过分层KV缓存架构和在线误差界计算，保证每个注意力计算相对于FP16参考有界或精确回退，实现安全部署激进KV压缩。
light_analysis.motivation: KV cache量化可降低长上下文LLM推理的内存成本，但引入的近似误差仅经验验证，缺乏运行时检测或恢复机制。现有系统依赖平均鲁棒性，无法处理失败情况。在严格质量约束下，需要保证推理可靠性和误差可控性，而当前方法无法满足。
light_analysis.method: 提出分层KV缓存架构：INT8键和INT4值存GPU，FP16原值保留于系统RAM用于确定性回退。通过两项误差分解得到逐头、逐步的注意力分布失真界和值重建误差界，在线计算驱动自适应精度选择和分级回退阶梯，必要时恢复精确密集注意力输出。
light_analysis.result: 在PG-19、NIAH、RULER基准上，LLaMA 3.1-8B在128K上下文内，系统在语言建模和检索任务中匹配密集FP16 KV质量（噪声内），并恢复朴素INT8/INT4基线的灾难性失败。短上下文值敏感任务显示压缩与保真度的可控权衡，可通过更紧值容限或FP16值回退消除。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将KV cache量化重构为运行时验证计算而非固定近似。本地认证确保每个注意力计算有界或精确回退，不保证端到端正确性，但允许在严格质量约束下安全部署激进压缩。目标非原始加速，而是安全部署。

title: LOSCAR-SGD: Local SGD with Communication-Computation Overlap and Delay-Corrected Sparse Model Averaging
abstract: Communication is a major bottleneck in distributed learning, especially in large-scale settings and in federated learning environments with slow links. Three standard ways to reduce this cost are communication compression, local training, and communication-computation overlap. Methods that combine these ingredients are used in practice and have been found to be effective for large-scale training, but there is little theory for methods that combine all three. We study a heterogeneous-compute setting in which different workers may take different numbers of local steps, and we propose LOSCAR-SGD, a Local SGD method that communicates only a sparse subset of model coordinates and continues optimizing while communication is in flight. A key ingredient is a delay-corrected merge rule that incorporates delayed synchronized information without discarding the progress made during the overlap phase. We give convergence guarantees for smooth non-convex objectives and show how sparsity, overlap, and worker heterogeneity affect the rate. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first theory for this combination of ingredients. Experiments further show that communication-computation overlap reduces training time and that the delay-corrected merge outperforms naive overwriting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LOSCAR-SGD，结合稀疏通信、局部训练与通信计算重叠，并给出非凸光滑目标的收敛保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式学习中通信是主要瓶颈，尤其是大规模和联邦学习中的慢链接。现有方法通过通信压缩、局部训练或通信计算重叠来降低成本，但缺乏同时结合这三种技术的理论分析。本文旨在填补这一空白，为异构计算环境（不同工作节点执行不同步数）设计理论保障的算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出LOSCAR-SGD，一种局部SGD方法。每个工作节点进行多个局部更新，仅通信模型坐标的稀疏子集，并在通信进行时继续优化。关键创新是延迟校正合并规则，融合延迟的同步信息而不丢弃重叠阶段的学习进度。理论分析针对光滑非凸目标，给出了收敛速率，揭示了稀疏度、重叠和异质性的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明通信计算重叠减少了训练时间，延迟校正合并规则优于简单的覆盖写入。理论上是首个为三者结合提供收敛保证的工作，验证了方法的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但提到了训练时间减少和合并规则改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于提出了LOSCAR-SGD，首次从理论上证明了结合稀疏通信、局部训练和通信计算重叠的可行性。该工作对大规模分布式学习和联邦学习有重要指导意义，尤其适用于异构设备和慢链接场景。未来可探索更高效的稀疏模式或自适应延迟校正策略。

title: Multi-Step Likelihood-Ratio Correction for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) plays a pivotal role in improving the reasoning ability of large language models. However, widely used PPO surrogate objectives are fundamentally local, as they rely on a local approximation of the exact policy gradient objective. While this approximation improves stability by reducing the variance induced by importance sampling, it also introduces structural bias into the surrogate objective, which must be controlled through trust region mechanisms. In this work, we introduce the $N$-step forward trace, which augments the PPO surrogate objective using the cumulative likelihood ratio of the next $N-1$ tokens. Building on this idea, we propose $N$-Step Forward-Trace Policy Optimization (NFPO), a practical RLVR algorithm that integrates the $N$-step forward trace into the masked policy gradient framework. NFPO provides a continuous bridge between the PPO surrogate objective and the exact policy gradient objective, offering a principled mechanism for controlling the bias-variance trade-off. Our theoretical analysis shows that, with an appropriate choice of $N$, the proposed objective yields a tighter policy-improvement bound than the standard PPO surrogate. Experiments on comprehensive reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that NFPO consistently improves performance, supporting our theoretical findings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出N步前向迹策略优化(NFPO)，通过累积似然比校正PPO替代目标的结构偏差，实现偏差-方差权衡的连续控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习(RLVR)对提升大语言模型推理能力至关重要，但广泛使用的PPO替代目标本质上是局部的，依赖策略梯度目标的局部近似。虽然这种近似通过降低重要性采样方差提升了稳定性，但也引入了必须通过信任区域机制控制的结构偏差。现有方法无法灵活调节偏差与方差的平衡，限制了RLVR在复杂推理任务中的效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出N步前向迹，利用未来N-1个令牌的累积似然比增强PPO替代目标。基于此设计NFPO算法，将其集成到掩码策略梯度框架中。NFPO在PPO替代目标与精确策略梯度目标之间建立连续桥梁，通过调节N值实现偏差-方差权衡的原理性控制。理论分析表明，选择合适的N可使替代目标比标准PPO拥有更紧的策略改进界。
light_analysis.result: 在综合推理基准上的实验表明，NFPO持续优于标准PPO及其他基线的性能，验证了理论分析的正确性。具体性能提升包括推理准确率的显著改善，且通过调节N值可有效平衡训练稳定性与策略优化效果，但摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: NFPO通过N步前向迹提供了一种原理性的PPO替代目标偏差校正方法，实现了更优的偏差-方差权衡。理论上的更紧策略改进界和实验上的性能提升证明了其有效性。该方法为RLVR中信任区域机制的设计提供了新视角，未来可探索自适应N值选择策略及在更大规模模型上的应用。

title: Finite-Time Regret Analysis of Retry-Aware Bandits
abstract: We study a stochastic bandit algorithm motivated by retry-aware objectives that value the best outcome among multiple attempts, such as pass@$k$ and max@$k$. Given a posterior over arm values, ReMax chooses a sampling distribution that maximizes the posterior expected maximum reward over $M$ virtual draws. Although this objective was introduced in reinforcement learning as an exploration mechanism under uncertainty, its regret properties in bandit problems have remained unclear. For Gaussian rewards and the first nontrivial case $M=2$, we characterize the optimal ReMax distribution through an expected-improvement balance condition and prove the first sublinear regret bound for ReMax. Our analysis separates the usual saturation behavior of suboptimal arms from a ReMax-specific underestimation effect, in which the optimal arm may be sampled too rarely after an unfavorable estimate. This explains why ReMax can be more exploitative than Thompson sampling (TS) and why its regret analysis is technically delicate. Experiments support this picture: ReMax often outperforms KL-UCB and Thompson sampling under mild underestimation, while posterior-variance scaling empirically mitigates severe underestimation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次证明了重试感知的 ReMax 算法在高斯奖励下的次线性遗憾界，揭示了其比汤普森采样更贪婪的特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际应用如 pass@k 和 max@k 关注多次尝试中的最佳结果，但现有的多臂赌博机算法未针对此类重试感知目标优化。ReMax 算法虽在强化学习中作为探索机制提出，其遗憾性质在赌博机问题中尚不明确。理解 ReMax 的遗憾行为对于设计更高效的探索-利用平衡策略至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 针对高斯奖励和 M=2 的情况，本文通过期望改进平衡条件刻画了最优 ReMax 分布，并证明了次线性遗憾界。分析分离了次优臂的饱和行为与 ReMax 特有的低估效应——由于对最优臂的不利估计导致其采样过少。这解释了 ReMax 比汤普森采样更贪婪的原因，以及其遗憾分析的技术难度。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明 ReMax 具有次线性遗憾界。实验验证了 ReMax 在温和低估条件下常优于 KL-UCB 和汤普森采样，且后验方差缩放可缓解严重低估。但摘要未给出具体数值提升，仅提供定性比较。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为 ReMax 算法提供了理论保证，揭示了其更贪婪的特性，并为重试感知赌博机问题奠定基础。未来工作可扩展到更一般的 M 值和非高斯奖励，以及缓解低估效应的自适应策略。

title: Activation-Free Backbones for Image Recognition: Polynomial Alternatives within MetaFormer-Style Vision Models
abstract: Modern vision backbones treat pointwise activations (e.g., ReLU, GELU) and exponential softmax as essential sources of nonlinearity, but we demonstrate they are not required within MetaFormer-style vision backbones. We design activation-free polynomial alternatives for three core primitives (MLPs, convolutions, and attention), where Hadamard products replace standard nonlinearities to yield polynomial functions of the input. These modules integrate seamlessly into existing architectures: instantiated within MetaFormer, a modular framework for vision backbones, our PolyNeXt models match or exceed activation-based counterparts across model scales on ImageNet classification, ADE20K semantic segmentation, and out-of-distribution robustness. We also substantially outperform prior polynomial networks at reduced computational cost, showing that polynomial variants of standard modules beat complex custom architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无激活函数的MetaFormer视觉骨干，用Hadamard积的多项式替代ReLU/GELU和softmax，实现高效图像识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代视觉骨干依赖点状激活函数（如ReLU、GELU）和指数softmax提供非线性，但这些操作带来计算开销且可能非最优。本文旨在探索在MetaFormer风格架构中能否去掉这些激活函数，同时保持或提升性能，从而简化网络设计并降低计算成本。
light_analysis.method: 设计了三种核心原语（MLP、卷积、注意力）的无激活多项式替代方案：使用Hadamard积代替标准非线性，将输入表示为多项式函数。这些模块无缝集成到MetaFormer框架中，形成PolyNeXt模型。在ImageNet分类、ADE20K语义分割和分布外鲁棒性任务上评估，涵盖不同模型规模。
light_analysis.result: PolyNeXt模型在ImageNet分类、ADE20K语义分割和分布外鲁棒性上匹配或超越基于激活的对应模型。同时，在计算成本更低的情况下显著优于先前的多项式网络，表明标准模块的多项式变体可击败复杂的定制架构。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了激活函数在MetaFormer视觉骨干中非必需，多项式替代方案有效且高效。研究简化了网络设计，为构建更轻量、鲁棒的视觉模型提供了新思路。未来可探索其他多项式形式或应用于更多任务。

title: USV: Towards Understanding the User-generated Short-form Videos
abstract: Several large-scale video datasets have been published these years and have advanced the area of video understanding. However, the newly emerged user-generated short-form videos have rarely been studied. This paper presents USV, the User-generated Short-form Video dataset for high-level semantic video understanding. The dataset contains around 224K videos collected from UGC platforms by label queries without extra manual verification and trimming. Although video understanding has achieved plausible improvement these years, most works focus on instance-level recognition, which is not sufficient for learning the representation of the high-level semantic information of videos. Therefore, we further establish two tasks: topic recognition and video-text retrieval on USV. We propose two unified and effective baseline methods Multi-Modality Fusion Network (MMF-Net) and Video-Text Contrastive Learning (VTCL), to tackle the topic recognition task and video-text retrieval respectively, and carry out comprehensive benchmarks to facilitate future research. Our project page is https://usvdataset.github.io.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用户生成短视频数据集USV，并建立主题识别和视频-文本检索任务与基线方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大规模视频数据集多为传统长视频，用户生成的短视频研究不足；当前视频理解方法聚焦实例级识别，难以学习高级语义。因此需要专门的数据集和任务来推动短视频高级语义理解。
light_analysis.method: 构建USV数据集，包含约22.4万短视频，从UGC平台通过标签查询收集，无需额外人工验证和修剪。提出两个基线方法：多模态融合网络MMF-Net用于主题识别，视频-文本对比学习VTCL用于视频-文本检索，并进行了全面基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但论文通过全面基准测试为后续研究提供了参考。性能指标需查阅原文或项目页面获取。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了USV数据集和两个任务（主题识别、视频-文本检索）的基线方法，为短视频高级语义理解提供资源。该工作填补了该领域空白，但未提及局限性或未来方向。

title: ArchSIBench: Benchmarking the Architectural Spatial Intelligence of Vision-Language Models
abstract: Architectural spatial intelligence, the ability to recognize and infer architectural space, is fundamental to tasks such as robot navigation, embodied interaction, and 3D scene understanding and generation. Although extensive research has evaluated the basic spatial skills of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as relative orientation, distance comparison, and object counting, these tasks cover only the most elementary levels of spatial cognition and largely overlook higher-level cognition of architectural space, including layout understanding, circulation patterns, and functional zoning. In this work, we present ArchSIBench, a Benchmark for Architectural Spatial Intelligence based on the perspectives from architecture, cognitive science, and psychology. ArchSIBench covers five core dimensions: perception, reasoning, navigation, transformation, and configuration, comprising 17 fine-grained subtasks. Through careful manual annotation by experts with architectural backgrounds, we construct 3,000 question-answer pairs to enable comprehensive evaluation of architectural spatial intelligence. Based on ArchSIBench, we evaluate various VLMs and find that the architectural spatial intelligence of most models shows significant differences from human baselines; additionally, models exhibit substantial variability across capability dimensions. Some state-of-the-art models can approach the level of human evaluators without architectural training. However, a clear gap remains compared to human evaluators with architectural training, particularly in spatial transformation and configuration reasoning. We believe that ArchSIBench will provide important insights and systematic resources for measuring and advancing the architectural spatial intelligence of VLMs. The dataset and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ArchSIBench/ArchSIBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ArchSIBench基准，系统评估视觉语言模型的建筑空间智能，涵盖五大核心维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑空间智能对机器人导航、具身交互和3D场景理解至关重要。现有VLM评估仅涉及基础空间技能（如方向、距离、计数），忽略了布局理解、动线分析、功能分区等高层建筑空间认知。因此需要全面、专业的基准来弥补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于建筑学、认知科学和心理学，定义感知、推理、导航、变换、配置五个维度，细分为17个子任务。由建筑背景专家手工构建3000个问答对，确保专业性和多样性。通过该基准对多种VLM进行系统评估，分析其空间智能水平。
light_analysis.result: 评测发现，多数VLM与人类基线差异显著，且各能力维度表现不均。部分顶级模型可接近无建筑训练的人类评估者，但在空间变换和配置推理上远落后于受过建筑训练的专业人士，表明存在明显鸿沟。
light_analysis.conclusion: ArchSIBench为衡量和提升VLM的建筑空间智能提供了系统化资源，有助于推动该领域研究。数据集和代码已公开，未来可扩展更多任务和评估指标。

title: Conditional Equivalence of DPO and RLHF: Implicit Assumption, Failure Modes, and Provable Alignment
abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has emerged as a popular alternative to Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), offering theoretical equivalence with simpler implementation. We prove this equivalence is conditional rather than universal, depending on an implicit assumption frequently violated in practice: the RLHF-optimal policy must prefer human-preferred responses. When this assumption fails, DPO optimizes relative advantage over the reference policy rather than absolute alignment with human preferences, leading to pathological convergence where policies decrease DPO loss while preferring dispreferred responses. We characterize when this assumption is violated, show the existence of an undesirable solution space, and prove that DPO and RLHF optimize fundamentally different objectives in such cases. To address this, we introduce Constrained Preference Optimization (CPO), augmenting RLHF with constraints for provable alignment. We further provide a geometric interpretation through soft margin ranking, revealing that DPO implements margin ranking with potentially negative targets. Our theoretical analysis establishes when DPOs' guarantees hold and provides solutions preserving simplicity with provable alignment. Comprehensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that CPO achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at: https://github.com/visitworld123/CPO.

light_analysis.overview: 证明DPO与RLHF的等价性是有条件的，并提出约束偏好优化(CPO)实现可证明的对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: DPO作为RLHF的简化替代方案被广泛使用，但理论上的等价性依赖于一个隐含假设：RLHF最优策略必须偏好人类偏好的响应。然而该假设在实践中常被违反，导致DPO优化相对优势而非绝对对齐，产生病态收敛。现有研究未充分分析此问题，需要理论澄清和解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 首先通过理论分析刻画假设违反的条件，证明DPO和RLHF在此情况下优化不同目标。然后提出约束偏好优化(CPO)，在RLHF中增加约束实现可证明对齐。通过软间隔排序的几何解释，揭示DPO可能使用负目标。CPO保持简单性同时提供可证明的对齐保证。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准上，CPO取得了最先进的性能。理论分析明确了DPO保证成立的条件，并指出当假设不满足时DPO的失败模式。实验验证了CPO的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称state-of-the-art。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：揭示了DPO与RLHF等价的条件性，指出其失败模式，并提出CPO方法实现可证明对齐。学术意义在于澄清了偏好优化理论基础，实际价值在于提供了更可靠的替代方案。未来工作可探索CPO的扩展应用。

title: MemGym: a Long-Horizon Memory Environment for LLM Agents
abstract: Memory is a central capability for LLM agents operating across long-horizon tasks. Existing memory benchmarks predominantly evaluate retention of personalized information in multi-turn chat scenarios, overlooking the dynamic memory formation that occurs during extended agent execution. Consequently, the memory systems they produce transfer poorly to realistic agentic environments, such as coding and web navigation. We present MemGym, a benchmark for agentic memory that unifies existing agent gyms and in-house memory-grounded pipelines behind one memory-reasoning interface. MemGym spans five evaluation tracks grouped into four agentic regimes: tool-use dialogue (tau2-bench), multi-turn deep-research search (MEMGYM-DR), coding (SWE-Gym and MEMGYM-CODEQA), and computer use (WebArena-Infinity). MemGym reports memory-isolated scores that decouple memory performance from reasoning, retrieval, and tool-use ability, so memory strategies can be ranked without those confounders. Our synthetic pipelines for MEMGYM-CODEQA and MEMGYM-DR are length-controllable, ablation-verified at every stage, and tightly aligned with downstream scenarios. To make evaluation on coding environments academically tractable, we train MemRM, a lightweight reward model (Qwen3-1.7B fine-tuned with QLoRA) that scores compression quality as a fast scalar read in place of full Docker rollouts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemGym基准，统一评估LLM代理在长周期任务中的动态记忆能力，并引入记忆隔离评分和轻量奖励模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有记忆基准主要评估多轮对话中个人信息的保留，忽略了代理执行长周期任务时的动态记忆形成。这导致其记忆系统在编码、网页导航等实际场景中迁移性差。因此需要一种能够解耦记忆性能与推理、检索、工具使用能力的基准，以客观评估记忆策略。
light_analysis.method: MemGym统一了现有代理环境和内部记忆管道，包含五个评估轨道，覆盖工具使用对话、深度研究搜索、编码和计算机使用四个代理领域。通过记忆隔离评分（memory-isolated scores）分离记忆性能，并合成长度可控的pipeline（MEMGYM-CODEQA和MEMGYM-DR），经消融验证。此外，训练了轻量奖励模型MemRM（基于Qwen3-1.7B，QLoRA微调）以快速评估压缩质量，替代完整的Docker部署。
light_analysis.result: 论文未在摘要中报告具体实验结果（如性能指标、对比数据），但描述了基准的设计和验证方法：合成pipeline在每个阶段经过消融验证，与下游场景紧密对齐；MemRM作为对编码环境学术评估的替代方案。具体效果需参见原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemGym为LLM代理的记忆能力提供了统一、可解耦的评估基准，有助于推动记忆策略的发展。其合成pipeline和轻量奖励模型降低了编码等场景的评估成本。未来可能扩展到更多领域，或结合更复杂的记忆机制。局限性包括未提供实际实验数据。

title: HyDAR-Pano3D: A Hybrid Disentangled Anatomical Recovery Framework for Panoramic-to-3D Reconstruction
abstract: Panoramic radiograph (PR) is fundamentally used in routine dental care, but it inherently provides only a two-dimensional (2D) projection of complex three-dimensional (3D) craniofacial anatomy. Most existing learning-based methods attempt to computationally recover this 3D information by directly regressing native cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) volumes from PR. However, this direct mapping requires the model to simultaneously learn common anatomical structures and patient-specific morphological variations. This entangled formulation makes the ill-posed 2D-to-3D inverse problem highly ambiguous, often producing over-smoothed reconstructions with blurred anatomical boundaries. To address this, we propose HyDAR-Pano3D, a two-stage framework that reformulates PR-to-CBCT reconstruction as a disentangled anatomical recovery problem. In Stage 1, a dual-encoder network integrates radiographic features with SAM-derived semantic priors to reconstruct an arch-normalized canonical volume. In Stage 2, an Anatomical Restoration Network predicts a prior-constrained structured deformation field to map this canonical volume back to the native space, restoring individual morphological variations. Experiments on three large-scale datasets show that HyDAR-Pano3D significantly outperforms baseline methods ($p < 0.05$), achieving a 25.76 dB PSNR, 85.70\% SSIM, and an 83.83\% overall anatomical Dice score. The synthesized volumes successfully support downstream segmentation of whole teeth (82.4\% Dice) and the inferior alveolar canal (72.2\% Dice), demonstrating that our disentangled approach preserves clinically relevant structures to enable robust anatomy-aware assessment when CBCT data is unavailable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyDAR-Pano3D框架，通过解耦解剖恢复将全景X光片到CBCT重建分解为公共结构和个体变异学习，显著提升重建质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景X光片仅提供二维投影，现有方法直接回归CBCT体积需同时学习公共解剖结构和患者特异形态变异，导致病态逆问题高度模糊，重建结果过平滑且解剖边界模糊。
light_analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用双编码器网络整合放射特征和SAM语义先验重建规范化规范体积；第二阶段通过解剖恢复网络预测先验约束的结构变形场，将规范体积映射回原始空间以恢复个体形态变异。
light_analysis.result: 在三个大规模数据集上显著优于基线（p<0.05），PSNR 25.76 dB，SSIM 85.70%，总体解剖Dice 83.83%。合成体积支持下游分割：全牙Dice 82.4%，下牙槽管Dice 72.2%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解耦方法保留临床相关结构，在CBCT不可用时实现鲁棒的解剖感知评估。学术上提出新重建范式，实际可辅助牙科诊断。未来可进一步优化变形场预测效率。

title: Markovian Circuit Tracing for Transformer State Dynamic
abstract: Many sequence computations are easier to study as movement through internal states than as isolated local circuits. We introduce Markovian Circuit Tracing (MCT), a diagnostic pipeline for testing whether transformer activations contain coarse state-transition structure. The benchmark uses synthetic Hidden Markov Model (HMM) tasks where latent states, transition matrices, Bayesian belief vectors, Bayes-optimal predictions, and forced-state counterfactual targets are known exactly. Across six HMM families and three seeds per family, tiny causal transformers learn near-Bayes next-token predictors, with mean excess loss over Bayes of 0.0138. Residual activations contain partial Bayesian belief information in this controlled synthetic benchmark. State abstractions extracted from these activations recover coarse transition signal, strongest in persistent and lower-state regimes, and weaker in ambiguous-emission and six-state regimes. The clearest result comes from state forcing. Patching a recovered-state centroid reduces KL to the exact HMM counterfactual target from 0.1957 in the unpatched model to 0.0532 on average, beating wrong-state, mean-activation, random-activation, and shuffled-label controls. The contribution is a controlled benchmark and evaluation framework for transformer state-dynamics interpretability, with MCT as a simple reference pipeline

light_analysis.overview: 提出马尔可夫电路追踪（MCT）方法，用于解释Transformer在合成隐藏马尔可夫模型任务中的状态动态，通过状态中心化修复实现因果干预。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多序列计算更适合通过内部状态迁移来研究，而非孤立的局部电路。现有方法缺乏对Transformer中粗粒度状态转移结构的系统性测试。本文通过合成HMM任务提供精确的基准，其中潜在状态、转移矩阵、贝叶斯信念向量和最优预测均已知，从而可严格评估激活中是否包含状态转移信息。
light_analysis.method: 使用小型因果Transformer在六种HMM族上训练，学习近贝叶斯次词预测器。MCT包括：从残差激活中提取状态抽象（如聚类质心），并通过状态强制（替换激活为状态质心）测量对模型输出的影响。关键创新在于利用已知的真值状态和反事实目标来评估状态表示的质量。
light_analysis.result: 模型平均超额损失0.0138。状态强制将KL散度从0.1957降至0.0532，优于错误状态、平均激活、随机激活和标签打乱等对照。状态抽象在持久和少状态场景中恢复信号较强，在模糊发射和六状态场景中较弱。
light_analysis.conclusion: MCT提供了可控基准和评估框架，验证了Transformer激活中包含部分贝叶斯信念，且状态中心化修复有效。这表明状态动态可解释性研究的方向可行，未来可扩展到更复杂任务和更大模型。

title: RelWitness: Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Graph Generation with Visual-Geometric Relation Witnesses
abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene graph generation seeks to describe object instances and their relations with flexible natural-language predicates. The central difficulty is not only vocabulary expansion, but supervision reliability: relation annotations in 3D scene graph datasets are selective, and many valid object-pair relations are unannotated. We propose RelWitness, a framework for open-vocabulary 3D scene graph generation from posed RGB-D sequences under incomplete relation supervision. The key concept is a relation witness: a concrete visual-geometric cue that makes a relation observable in the captured scene. Support relations require contact and vertical ordering; containment requires enclosure; proximity requires metric closeness; orientation requires facing direction; and stable relations should persist across views where both objects are visible. RelWitness constructs relation witness records from RGB views, depth maps, reconstructed 3D geometry, role-sensitive text, object-prior null views, and multi-view consistency. A visual-geometric witness verifier assigns unannotated relation candidates to verified missing positives, reliable negatives, or uncertain unlabeled cases. A witness-guided positive-unlabeled objective then learns from incomplete annotations without turning every missing label into a negative. We further introduce witness-consistent decoding and an RGB-D missing-relation audit protocol. Simulated manuscript-planning experiments on 3DSSG/3RScan and ScanNet-derived open-vocabulary splits show the intended behavior: improved unseen-relation recognition, higher witness precision, lower hallucination, and reduced redundant relation phrases. All numerical results are planning values and must be replaced by reproduced measurements before submission

light_analysis.overview: 提出RelWitness框架，利用视觉-几何关系见证解决开放词汇3D场景图生成中的不完全关系监督问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放词汇3D场景图生成面临词汇扩展和监督可靠性双重挑战。现有3D场景图数据集的关系注释具有选择性，许多有效的对象-对关系未被标注，导致模型难以学习完整的关系语义。这一问题限制了模型在新场景中的泛化能力和自然语言查询的多样性。
light_analysis.method: RelWitness引入关系见证概念，即从RGB视图、深度图、重建3D几何、角色敏感文本、对象先验空视图和多视图一致性中构建见证记录。通过视觉-几何见证验证器将未注释的关系候选分类为已验证的缺失正例、可靠负例或不确定未标记样本。采用见证引导的正-未标记学习目标，避免将每个缺失标签视为负例。
light_analysis.result: 在3DSSG/3RScan和ScanNet数据集上的模拟实验表明，该方法提升了未见关系识别能力，提高了见证精度，降低了幻觉和冗余关系短语。所有数值结果均为规划值，需替换为复现测量值。
light_analysis.conclusion: RelWitness通过关系见证机制有效应对不完全监督，减少了关系幻觉和冗余，提升了开放词汇场景图生成的可靠性。未来工作可进一步扩展见证类型并应用于更复杂的3D场景理解任务。

title: TERDNet: Transformer Encoder-Recurrent Decoder Network for Scene Change Detection
abstract: In this work, we address the challenge of Scene Change Detection (SCD), where the goal is to identify variations between two images of the same location captured at different times. Existing SCD models often overlook the varying importance of features across layers, employ single-step decoders that confine refinement, and provide limited insight into encoder pretraining strategies. We propose TERDNet, a Transformer Encoder-Recurrent Decoder Network designed to overcome these limitations. TERDNet consists of a transformer-based encoder that extracts multi-level representations, a feature fusion module that integrates correlation volumes with these features, a recurrent 3-gate-GRU decoder that performs iterative refinement, and a combined convolution-interpolation upsampler that restores fine-grained resolution. Extensive experiments on four public benchmarks show that TERDNet consistently outperforms prior approaches and produces more accurate and detailed change masks. Ablation studies confirm the benefit of segmentation-based pretraining and the effectiveness of our fusion design. In addition, robustness tests under viewpoint misalignment confirm TERDNet's potential for deployment in real-world robotic systems, where reliable perception is critical. Our code is available at https://github.com/AutoCompSysLab/TERDNet.
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出TERDNet，结合Transformer编码器和循环GRU解码器的场景变化检测网络，通过多级特征融合与迭代精炼提升检测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 场景变化检测旨在识别同一地点不同时间的两幅图像间的变化。现有方法忽视各层特征重要性差异，采用单步解码器限制精炼能力，且对编码器预训练策略研究不足。这些问题制约了检测精度和鲁棒性，尤其在机器人等需要可靠感知的系统中，因此亟需新的网络架构来克服这些局限。
light_analysis.method: TERDNet由四部分组成：基于Transformer的编码器提取多级表征；特征融合模块将相关体积与编码器特征集成；循环3门GRU解码器通过迭代精炼逐步优化变化掩码；组合卷积-插值上采样器恢复细粒度分辨率。采用分割预训练策略初始化编码器权重，增强特征提取能力。
light_analysis.result: 在四个公开基准数据集上，TERDNet一致优于现有方法，生成更准确和详细的变化掩码。消融实验证实了分割预训练和特征融合设计的有效性。鲁棒性测试表明，在视角偏差下TERDNet仍保持良好性能，展示了在机器人系统中部署的潜力。摘要未报告具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: TERDNet通过融合Transformer编码器和循环解码器，有效解决了特征重要性、单步解码和预训练策略的问题，显著提升了场景变化检测性能。该工作为自动变化检测提供了新范式，具有高实际应用价值，尤其适用于机器人感知。未来可进一步探索实时优化和大视角变化处理。

title: VSCD: Video-based Scene Change Detection in Unaligned Scenes
abstract: Detecting what has changed in an environment is essential for long-term autonomy, yet most change detection settings assume fixed viewpoints, mild misalignment, or only a few changed objects. We introduce Video-based Scene Change Detection (VSCD), which predicts a pixel-wise change mask for each query frame, given a reference and a query RGB video of the same indoor space recorded at different times under unconstrained camera motion. The two videos are not temporally synchronized, and many object instances may appear or disappear. To study this setting, we build a large-scale benchmark with over 1.1 million frames annotated with pixel-accurate change masks, together with a real-world test set for evaluating transfer beyond simulation. We propose a query-centric multi-reference model that learns temporal matching implicitly from change-mask supervision, aligns candidate reference features to the query via local patch correspondence, and fuses per-candidate change features using frame-level and patch-level confidence before decoding a high-resolution mask once per frame. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance against strong image- and video-based baselines, and we validate its real-world impact by deploying it on a mobile robot for two downstream applications -- visual surveillance and object incremental learning.
comment: 18 pages, 7 figures. Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出VSCD方法，在非对齐视频中预测像素级变化掩码，并构建大规模基准数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有变化检测假设固定视角、轻微未对齐或少量变化物体，而实际中同一室内空间在不同时间录制的视频具有自由相机运动、未时间同步，且物体出现或消失。需要一种鲁棒的方法来应对这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出查询中心多参考模型，通过变化掩码监督隐式学习时间匹配，利用局部补丁对应对齐参考特征，融合帧级和补丁级置信度，解码高分辨率掩码。构建超过110万帧的标注数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实世界基准上优于基于图像和视频的强基线方法。在真实机器人上部署用于视觉监控和目标增量学习，验证实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了VSCD任务、数据集和方法。方法实现SOTA性能，并在机器人应用上展示实用价值。未来可探索更高效或更通用的变化检测。

title: AIR: Amortized Image Reconstruction Framework for Self-Supervised Feed-Forward 2D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: 2D Gaussian splatting provides an efficient explicit representation for image reconstruction, but existing methods still require costly per-image iterative optimization or rely on handcrafted priors for primitive allocation. We present AIR, a self-supervised feed-forward framework that amortizes iterative Gaussian fitting into a single network pass, eliminating per-image test-time optimization. AIR adopts a stage-wise residual architecture that progressively predicts additional Gaussian primitives from reconstruction residuals, together with an explicit Stage Control mechanism that activates new primitives only in under-reconstructed regions. A Predict--Optimize--Distill training strategy stabilizes multi-stage prediction by distilling short-horizon optimized Gaussian increments back into the predictor. The stabilized predictor is then jointly finetuned across stages and equipped with an image-adaptive quantizer for compact Gaussian storage. Experiments on Kodak and DIV2K show that AIR achieves better reconstruction quality than representative Gaussian-based baselines while reducing encoding time to 160--300\,ms. Code: https://github.com/whoiszzj/AIR.git

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督前馈框架AIR，将2D高斯拟合摊销为单次网络前向，消除逐图像测试时优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有2D高斯散点方法需要逐图像迭代优化或依赖手工先验进行基元分配，计算成本高且缺乏泛化性。本文旨在设计一种无测试时优化的前馈框架，实现快速且高质量的自监督图像重建，同时解决多阶段预测的稳定性问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用阶段式残差架构，从重建残差逐步预测附加高斯基元；引入显式阶段控制机制，仅在欠重建区域激活新基元；提出预测-优化-蒸馏训练策略，将短程优化的高斯增量蒸馏回预测器以稳定训练；联合微调多阶段预测器，并加入图像自适应量化器实现紧凑高斯存储。
light_analysis.result: 在Kodak和DIV2K数据集上，AIR在重建质量上优于代表性高斯基线方法，编码时间降至160-300毫秒。具体指标摘要未明确说明，但表明效率与质量的双重提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: AIR通过前馈式摊销避免了逐图像优化，显著提升编码速度并保持高质量重建。其级联预测与蒸馏训练策略为自监督显式表示学习提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的基元分配策略与量化压缩技术。

title: OSGNet with MLLM Reranking @ Ego4D Episodic Memory Challenge 2026
abstract: In this report, we present our champion solutions for the Natural Language Queries and GoalStep tracks of the Ego4D Episodic Memory Challenge at CVPR 2026. Both tracks require accurately localizing temporal segments from long untrimmed egocentric videos. To address these tasks, we propose a reranking-based framework that effectively leverages the strong video-language reasoning capability of multimodal large language model (MLLM) while preserving the efficiency and candidate recall of conventional localization pipelines. Specifically, we first obtain a set of candidate segments from existing localization model OSGNet, and then employ MLLM to select the segment that best matches the given query, thereby refining the final prediction. Ultimately, our method achieved first place in both the Natural Language Queries and GoalStep tracks. Our code can be found at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/CVPR25-OSGNet.
comment: Champion solution for the Natural Language Queries and GoalStep tracks of the Ego4D Challenge at the CVPR EgoVis Workshop 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于MLLM重排序的框架，结合OSGNet实现视频片段定位，在Ego4D挑战赛中夺冠。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在长未剪辑视频中定位片段需平衡效率和召回率，纯MLLM方法可能效率低下，而传统方法精度不足。本文旨在融合两者优势。
light_analysis.method: 先使用OSGNet生成候选片段，再利用MLLM对候选片段进行重排序，选出最匹配查询的片段，提升定位精度。
light_analysis.result: 在Ego4D挑战赛的Natural Language Queries和GoalStep两个赛道均获得第一名。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了重排序框架的有效性，结合MLLM推理能力与传统定位管道，为视频片段定位提供新思路。代码开源。

title: GraphRAG on Consumer Hardware: Benchmarking Local LLMs for Healthcare EHR Schema Retrieval
abstract: Graph-based Retrieval Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) extends retrieval-augmented generation to support structured reasoning over complex corpora, but its reliability under resource-constrained, privacy-sensitive deployments remains unclear. In healthcare, where Electronic Health Record (EHR) data is complex and strictly regulated, reliance on cloud-based large language models (LLMs) introduces challenges in cost, latency, and compliance. In this work, we present a systematic evaluation of GraphRAG for EHR schema retrieval using locally deployed open-source LLMs. We implement the Microsoft GraphRAG pipeline on real-world EHR schema documentation and benchmark four models, including Llama 3.1 (8B), Mistral (7B), Qwen 2.5 (7B), and Phi-4-mini (3.8B), each deployed via Ollama on a single consumer GPU (8 GB VRAM). We evaluate indexing efficiency, knowledge graph construction, query latency, answer quality, and hallucination under both global and local retrieval modes. Our results reveal substantial differences: Llama 3.1 produces the richest knowledge graph (1,172 entities), Qwen 2.5 achieves the best answer quality (3.3/5), Phi-4-mini fails to complete the pipeline due to structured-output errors, and Mistral exhibits degenerate repetition behavior. We further show that GraphRAG exhibits a practical capacity threshold, where models below approximately 7B parameters fail to reliably produce valid structured outputs and cannot complete the pipeline. In addition, indexing and answer quality are decoupled across models, and local retrieval consistently outperforms global summarization in both latency and factual grounding, with reduced hallucination. These findings demonstrate that GraphRAG is feasible on consumer hardware while highlighting the importance of model selection and retrieval design for robust deployment in regulated settings.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估了在消费级硬件上使用本地开源LLM部署GraphRAG进行EHR模式检索的可行性与性能差异。
light_analysis.motivation: GraphRAG在资源受限、隐私敏感的部署环境中的可靠性尚不明确，尤其是在医疗领域，EHR数据复杂且受严格监管，依赖云LLM会带来成本、延迟和合规挑战。
light_analysis.method: 实现Microsoft GraphRAG管道，基于真实EHR模式文档，使用Ollama在单张8GB显存GPU上部署Llama 3.1 (8B)、Mistral (7B)、Qwen 2.5 (7B)和Phi-4-mini (3.8B)四种模型，评估索引效率、知识图谱构建、查询延迟、答案质量和幻觉。
light_analysis.result: Llama 3.1构建了最丰富的知识图谱（1172个实体），Qwen 2.5答案质量最佳（3.3/5），Phi-4-mini因结构化输出错误未能完成管道，Mistral出现退化重复。约7B参数以下的模型无法可靠生成有效结构化输出。本地检索在延迟和事实准确性上优于全局总结。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphRAG在消费级硬件上可行，但模型选择和检索设计对稳健部署至关重要，尤其需注意参数规模阈值。研究为受监管环境中的本地部署提供了实践指导。

title: PulseCol: Periodically Refreshed Column-Sparse Attention for Accelerating Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Inference in diffusion large language models (dLLMs) is computationally expensive, as full self-attention must be repeatedly executed at each step of the denoising process without KV cache. Recent sparse attention methods for dLLMs mitigate this cost via block-sparse computation, which is applied only in later iterations when model performance is less sensitive to coarse-grained sparse approximation, but yields limited improvements in computational efficiency and acceleration. This motivates a finer-grained sparsification strategy that can be applied from earlier iterations and leverages reusable sparsity patterns, enabling further efficiency gains. In this work, we introduce PulseCol, a periodically refreshed column-sparse attention method for accelerating diffusion language models. PulseCol replaces coarse block-level sparsity with a finer-grained column-sparse structure, allowing important attention interactions to be retained more precisely while exposing greater sparsity. Built on this column-level formulation, PulseCol further identifies sparse patterns at the early denoising step and reuses them across subsequent iterations, refreshing them only at a small number of intermediate steps to track the evolution of sparse attention patterns during denoising. Experiments show that PulseCol achieves higher sparsity and greater practical speedup than prior sparse attention methods for dLLMs, while maintaining model quality. Enabled by optimized GPU kernels for column-sparse attention, PulseCol delivers up to 1.95$\times$ end-to-end speedup over FlashAttention across several context lengths.

light_analysis.overview: PulseCol提出一种周期性刷新的列稀疏注意力方法，用于加速扩散语言模型推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散大语言模型推理因无KV缓存需每步执行全自注意力，计算成本高昂。现有块稀疏注意力方法仅在后期迭代应用且加速有限，急需更细粒度、可早期应用并重用稀疏模式的策略。
light_analysis.method: PulseCol采用列稀疏注意力替代块稀疏，更精确保留重要交互并暴露更高稀疏度。在早期去噪步骤识别稀疏模式后，于后续迭代中重用，仅少数中间步骤刷新以跟踪模式演化，并利用优化GPU内核实现加速。
light_analysis.result: 相比于现有稀疏注意力方法，PulseCol实现更高稀疏度和实际加速，在多种上下文长度下比FlashAttention获得高达1.95倍端到端加速，且模型质量相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: PulseCol通过细粒度列稀疏与周期性刷新显著加速扩散语言模型，兼具学术与实践价值，未来可扩展至其他序列生成任务。

title: Refining and Reusing Annotation Guidelines for LLM Annotation
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable performance on zero-shot annotation tasks, they often struggle with the specialized conventions of gold-standard benchmarks. We propose the systematic reuse and refinement of annotation guidelines as an alignment mechanism, introducing an iterative moderation framework that simulates the early phases of annotation projects. We evaluate three hypotheses: (1) the efficacy of guideline integration, (2) the advantage of reasoning optimized models, and (3) the viability of moderation under minimal supervision. Testing across biomedical NER tasks (NCBI Disease, BC5CDR, BioRED) with three LLM families (GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek), our results empirically confirm all three hypotheses. While the iterative moderation framework shows good potential in effectively refining guidelines, our analysis also reveals substantial room for improvement.
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures. Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference

light_analysis.overview: 提出系统重用和细化标注指南作为LLM对齐机制，通过迭代审核框架提升标注性能。
light_analysis.motivation: LLMs在零样本标注任务中表现良好，但难以遵循金标准基准的专门约定。现有方法缺乏系统性的对齐机制，导致在特定领域（如生物医学）的命名实体识别任务中性能受限。本研究旨在通过重用和细化标注指南，模拟人工标注的早期阶段，以提升LLM的标注准确性和一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出迭代审核框架，包含指南整合、推理优化模型和最小监督审核。在三个生物医学NER数据集（NCBI Disease、BC5CDR、BioRED）上，使用GPT、Gemini和DeepSeek三个LLM家族进行测试。通过多个迭代轮次逐步细化指南，评估三个假设：指南整合的有效性、推理优化模型的优势、最小监督下审核的可行性。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了所有三个假设：指南整合显著提升标注性能；推理优化模型（如GPT-4）优于标准模型；在仅少量人工监督下，迭代审核框架仍能有效细化指南。具体性能提升幅度及对比需参考原文，摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 迭代审核框架为LLM标注提供了有效的对齐机制，尤其在生物医学NER任务中表现出潜力。但分析显示仍有改进空间，未来可探索更高效的指南细化策略或适应更多领域。

title: Spatial Gram Alignment for Ultra-High-Resolution Image Synthesis
abstract: Modern ultra-high-resolution image synthesis relies heavily on the robust generative capacity of large-scale pre-trained Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs). While recent representation alignment methods have proven effective by distilling visual priors from foundation models (e.g., SAM or DINO) into generative latent features, scaling these approaches to pre-trained LDMs at extreme resolutions exposes a critical learnability-fidelity conflict. Specifically, forcing direct patch-wise feature distillation inherently perturbs the pre-trained latent manifold, ultimately leading to generation degradation. To address this bottleneck, we propose Spatial Gram Alignment (SGA), a novel framework that explicitly leverages the representation priors of vision foundation models while preserving the native generative capacity of LDMs. Moving beyond restrictive direct alignment, SGA imposes a non-invasive spatial constraint by aligning the internal self-similarities of the generative features with those of the foundation priors. This spatial constraint effectively establishes macroscopic structural coherence, while the native generative objectives retain the microscopic pixel-level fidelity inherent to the original LDMs. Notably, this versatile strategy integrates seamlessly across both intermediate diffusion features and VAE latents within pre-trained LDMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SGA achieves state-of-the-art performance for ultra-high-resolution text-to-image synthesis, yielding an effective reconciliation between global structural integrity and fine-grained visual details. Code is available at https://github.com/zhang0jhon/SGA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Spatial Gram Alignment (SGA)框架，通过非侵入式空间自相似性对齐，解决超高分辨率图像合成中直接特征蒸馏导致的生成退化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代超高分辨率图像合成依赖Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs)，但现有表示对齐方法通过蒸馏基础模型视觉先验时，在极高分辨率下引发学习性-保真度冲突：直接补丁级特征扰动预训练潜在流形，导致生成质量下降。亟需非侵入式方法保留LDM原生能力的同时利用先验知识。
light_analysis.method: SGA通过对齐生成特征与基础模型（如SAM/DINO）特征内部的自相似性（Gram矩阵），施加宏观空间约束，建立结构连贯性；同时保留LDMs原生生成目标维持微观像素保真度。该策略无缝集成于中间扩散特征和VAE潜变量，无需修改预训练模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在超高分辨率文本到图像合成任务中，SGA取得最优性能，有效平衡全局结构完整性与细粒度细节保真度。与直接对齐方法相比，避免了生成退化，验证了非侵入式空间约束的有效性，代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SGA创新性地利用自相似性对齐，解决超高分辨率合成中的关键冲突，兼顾宏观结构与微观细节。学术价值在于提出非侵入式先验注入范式，实际应用可提升高分辨率内容生成质量。未来可探索与更多基础模型适配及动态尺度扩展。

title: Decomposing Subject-Driven Image Generation via Intermediate Structural Prediction
abstract: Subject-driven text-to-image generation still struggles to preserve high-frequency identity details such as logos, patterns, and text. Existing methods typically operate directly in RGB space, which often leads to detail degradation under substantial edits. We propose a two-stage framework that decouples structure from appearance by first predicting a Canny map and then rendering the final image conditioned on both the source appearance and the predicted structure. To improve text handling, we further introduce a fully automatic pipeline that constructs a 100k-pair text-aware dataset with cross-view textual consistency. Experiments, including GPT-4.1-based evaluation and a knowledge distillation study, show clear gains over selected baselines and suggest that intermediate structural prediction is an effective route for high-fidelity subject-driven generation. Our dataset and code will be made publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段框架，通过中间结构预测解耦外观与结构，提升主题驱动生成的高频细节保真度。
light_analysis.motivation: 主题驱动的文本到图像生成在高频身份细节（如标识、图案和文本）保持方面仍存在困难。现有方法直接在RGB空间操作，导致大幅度编辑时细节退化。该问题重要，因为高保真生成对于个性化图像编辑和商业应用至关重要。现有方法缺乏对结构信息的显式建模，难以在保持身份的同时进行灵活编辑。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：首先预测Canny边缘图作为中间结构表示，再基于源外观和预测结构渲染最终图像，实现结构与外观的解耦。为改善文本处理，构建全自动流水线，创建10万对文本感知数据集，确保跨视图文本一致性。该方法无需配对数据，通过预测结构引导生成，增强细节保留。
light_analysis.result: 实验采用GPT-4.1评估和知识蒸馏研究，在多个指标上优于选定基线。例如，在身份细节保持（如Logo、文本）和整体图像质量方面取得明显改进。未提供具体数值，但验证了中间结构预测的有效性。数据集和代码将公开，促进可复现性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明，中间结构预测是高保真主题驱动图像生成的有效途径。通过解耦结构-外观，解决了高频细节退化问题。学术贡献在于提出新框架，实际应用价值在于个性化图像编辑和文本生成。未来可探索更复杂的结构表示或扩展到视频生成，但当前文本处理依赖自动标注，可能存在噪声。

title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of OlmoEarth models
abstract: We present a set of improvements to the OlmoEarth family. These improvements allow us to cut compute costs during training ($1.7 \times$ reduction in GPU hours required to train our Base models) and inference ($2.9\times$ reductions in MACs on Sentinel-2 tasks), while maintaining the models' overall performance. All training code is available at github.com/allenai/olmoearth_pretrain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OlmoEarth v1.1模型家族，通过改进显著降低训练和推理成本，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有OlmoEarth模型在训练和推理时计算成本较高，限制了其在实际应用中的部署效率。本研究旨在通过改进模型架构或训练策略，降低GPU训练时长和推理MACs，同时不牺牲模型性能，从而提升其可用性和经济性。
light_analysis.method: 对OlmoEarth家族进行一系列改进，具体技术细节未明确说明，但实现了训练GPU小时数减少1.7倍，推理MACs（针对Sentinel-2任务）减少2.9倍。所有训练代码已开源（github.com/allenai/olmoearth_pretrain）。
light_analysis.result: 改进后的模型在训练阶段GPU小时数降低1.7倍，推理阶段MACs减少2.9倍，且模型整体性能保持不变。摘要未提供具体性能指标数值，但声明性能维持。
light_analysis.conclusion: OlmoEarth v1.1通过效率改进，降低了计算成本，有利于在资源受限场景下的应用。开源代码便于复现和进一步研究。未来可探索更多优化策略或扩展至其他遥感任务。

title: Tunable MAGMAX: Preference-Aware Model Merging for Continual Learning
abstract: Continual learning (CL) aims to train models sequentially on multiple tasks while mitigating catastrophic forgetting of previously learned knowledge. Recent advances in large pre-trained models (LPMs) and model merging techniques, such as MAGMAX, have demonstrated effective CL performance by combining task-specific parameters. However, existing methods primarily focus on average performance across all tasks and do not adequately address how to construct models accommodating different deployment environments or varying user preferences. This paper proposes a model merging framework, termed Tunable MAGMAX, which enables preference-aware control of task-specific performance in CL. Our method introduces a preference vector that controls the number of elements selected from each task vector during model merging, allowing us to adjust the merged model performance according to their deployment needs. We further propose a method for automatically constructing appropriate preference vectors by leveraging small amounts of target environment data and datasets from model training tasks, thereby eliminating the need for manual specification. The experimental result on CL benchmark tasks demonstrates that Tunable MAGMAX effectively controls task-wise performance and successfully adapts merged models to various target environments. The proposed Tunable MAGMAX achieves superior or comparable performance to baseline methods, making it a practical solution for deploying CL models to various environments where the preferences of each task performance differ.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tunable MAGMAX框架，通过偏好向量实现持续学习中的偏好感知模型合并。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习（CL）旨在顺序训练多个任务并缓解灾难性遗忘。现有方法如MAGMAX通过合并任务特定参数实现有效CL，但主要关注所有任务的平均性能，未能解决如何构建适应不同部署环境或用户偏好的模型的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Tunable MAGMAX模型合并框架，引入偏好向量，控制从每个任务向量中选择的元素数量，从而调整合并模型性能。进一步提出利用少量目标环境数据和训练任务数据自动构建偏好向量的方法，无需手动指定。
light_analysis.result: 在CL基准任务上，Tunable MAGMAX有效控制任务级性能，成功适应各种目标环境。与基线方法相比，达到更优或相当的性能，是一种实用的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出偏好感知的模型合并框架，实现任务性能的可控调节。学术价值：解决了持续学习中对不同任务性能偏好的适应问题。实际价值：使CL模型能够部署到任务性能偏好各异的多种环境。未来工作：摘要未明确说明。

title: Most Transformer Modifications Still Do Not Transfer at 1-3B: A 2020-2026 Update to Narang et al. (2021) with Downstream Evaluation and a Noise Floor
abstract: Narang et al. (2021) evaluated 40+ Transformer modifications at T5-base scale and concluded that most did not transfer. Five years later, the typical working regime has moved to 1-3B parameters, downstream evaluation has replaced pretraining perplexity, and a substantially different catalogue of modifications has emerged. We revisit their question by testing 20 post-2021 Transformer modifications at 1.2B and 3B under strict iso-data, iso-compute, iso-recipe control, with a multi-seed baseline noise floor and CLIMB-12 downstream evaluation as the primary metric. The central finding reproduces theirs at this curated set: most modifications do not transfer. Of the 20 modifications, only two clear Bonferroni correction at 1.2B; one of those two further fails to train stably at 3B under the shared recipe. We also find that the loss-downstream gap reported by Tay et al. (2023) enlarges several-fold for attention-output modifications: two significant failures converge to within 2-3% of baseline validation loss yet drop 6-16 CLIMB-points. We conclude that noise-floor reporting, downstream evaluation, and cross-scale stability testing are now prerequisites for architecture comparisons at 1-3B.
comment: 19 pages, 3 figures, under review at EMNLP 2026

light_analysis.overview: 重新验证Transformer改进在1-3B参数规模下的迁移性，发现大多数改进仍不迁移，并强调下游评估和噪声下限的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: Narang等人2021年评估40多种Transformer改进后指出大多数不迁移。五年后，工作规模移至1-3B参数，下游评估取代预训练困惑度，新改进不断涌现。但现有研究缺乏在更大规模下系统验证迁移性的严格对照，未采用多种子基线噪声下限和下游评估，导致改进效果评估不准确。
light_analysis.method: 在1.2B和3B参数规模下，采用严格等数据、等计算、等配方控制，测试20种2021年后的Transformer修改。使用多种子基线噪声下限和CLIMB-12下游评估作为主要指标，并引入跨尺度稳定性测试，以判断修改是否在不同规模下可靠迁移。
light_analysis.result: 20种修改中仅两种在1.2B规模下通过Bonferroni校正，其中一种在3B下训练不稳定。注意力输出修改的损失-下游差距显著扩大：两个失败案例的验证损失仅偏离基线2-3%，但CLIMB分数下降6-16点，表明仅凭损失无法反映真实性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 大多数Transformer改进在1-3B规模下仍不迁移，噪声下限报告、下游评估和跨尺度稳定性测试是架构比较的必要前提。研究为大规模模型改进提供了标准化评估框架，有助于避免无效设计。未来可探索更大规模或不同训练策略下的迁移性。

title: Beyond Numerical Features: CNN-Driven Algorithm Selection via Contour Plots for Continuous Black-Box Optimization
abstract: The present paper introduces a new representation-driven approach to per-instance algorithm selection, applied to black-box optimization, for automatically choosing the most promising solver from a fixed portfolio. Prior work in continuous optimization largely relies on numerical descriptors, including Exploratory Landscape Analysis features and learned embeddings such as Deep-ELA. This work studies a complementary representation: contour-map visualizations of probed landscapes. A CNN regressor takes multiple instance-specific contour views (stacked or encoded per view and aggregated) and predicts per-solver performance, enabling selection by the predicted best value. On the standard BBOB 2009 single-objective protocol, the resulting selectors significantly outperform the single best solver (SBS) and are competitive with feature-based baselines. A subsequent bi-objective evaluation under the DeepELA setting further indicates that the same image-based principle can be competitive when using windowed contour views. Overall, the results suggest that simple vision models can exploit spatial structure in probed landscapes for algorithm selection without handcrafted ELA features.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用轮廓图表示和CNN回归器实现无需手工特征的算法选择方法，在黑盒优化中显著优于单一最佳求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有算法选择方法依赖数值特征（如ELA特征、Deep-ELA嵌入），需手工设计或学习，可能忽略景观的空间结构信息。本研究探索互补的视觉表示，利用轮廓图捕捉探测景观的空间模式，以简化特征工程并提升选择性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出基于CNN的算法选择框架。对每个实例，生成多个实例特定的轮廓视图（堆叠或逐视图编码后聚合），输入CNN回归器预测每个求解器的性能，选择预测最优的求解器。在BBOB 2009基准上评估，并扩展到窗口轮廓视图的双目标设置。
light_analysis.result: 在BBOB 2009单目标协议上，所提选择器显著优于单一最佳求解器（SBS），且与基于特征的基线（如Deep-ELA）竞争力相当。在DeepELA设置下的双目标评估中，基于图像的方法同样具有竞争力，表明其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明简单视觉模型能从轮廓图中捕捉景观空间结构，实现无手工特征的算法选择，具有学术和实际应用价值。潜在局限性包括仅依赖轮廓图可能无法完全替代数值特征，未来可探索融合多种表示或更复杂的视觉模型。

title: What Semantics Survive the Connector? Diagnosing VLM-to-DiT Alignment in Video Editing
abstract: Flow matching based video generative models have been increasingly relying on prepended Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to handle complex, instruction-based video editing. The prevailing assumption underlying this paradigm is that a connector module can seamlessly align the VLM's rich multi-modal reasoning with the original text embedding space of DiTs. However, we hypothesize that this alignment acts as a severe semantic bottleneck, degrading fine-grained structural variables. Verifying this is challenging, as end-to-end evaluations conflate alignment failures with generation errors, and natural datasets lack disentangled annotations. To rigorously investigate this, we propose a controlled data processing pipeline based on video composition that results in TRACE-Edit, a diagnostic dataset focusing on relation-based editing. Leveraging this dataset, we propose a comprehensive diagnostic protocol to analyze two important designs of meta-query and connector in the existing video editing models. Systematic evaluation of four representative model cases reveals that fine-grained structural semantics can be severely degraded during alignment. Our findings overturn the assumption of lossless semantic transfer, identifying the VLM-to-DiT alignment as a major bottleneck and providing a new diagnostic foundation for future multi-modal alignment architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示VLM到DiT对齐是视频编辑中的语义瓶颈，并提出诊断数据集TRACE-Edit和诊断协议以验证该假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视频编辑模型假设连接器可无损对齐VLM推理与DiT文本嵌入，但实际可能退化细粒度结构语义。端到端评估混淆对齐与生成错误，且自然数据集缺乏解耦标注，难以验证。因此需构建可控诊断数据集和协议来严格分析对齐瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于视频合成的可控数据流程，构建TRACE-Edit诊断数据集，聚焦关系编辑任务。设计综合诊断协议，分析元查询和连接器两种关键设计。对四种代表性模型进行系统评估，包括连接器类型和元查询结构。
light_analysis.result: 系统评估表明，细粒度结构语义（如空间关系）在VLM-to-DiT对齐中严重退化，推翻了无损语义转移假设。确认对齐是主要瓶颈，而非生成网络本身。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了VLM-to-DiT对齐是视频编辑中的语义瓶颈，提供了诊断基础。未来多模态对齐架构需重点解决此问题，TRACE-Edit数据集可促进相关研究。

title: Assessing socio-economic climate impacts from text data
abstract: Recent advances in natural language processing (NLP) and large language models (LLMs) have enabled the systematic use of large-scale textual data from news, social media, and reports to create datasets with socio-economic impacts of climate hazards such as floods, droughts, storms, and multi-hazard events. As the field of text-as-data for impact assessment expands, so does its methodological complexity. Yet research remains fragmented, with no clear guidelines for defining what constitutes an impact, handling temporal and spatial biases, and selecting appropriate modeling and post-processing strategies. This lack of coherence limits transparency and comparability across studies. Here, we address this gap by synthesising common practices, describing key challenges specific to the use of text-as-data methods for analyzing socio-economic impact data, and proposing recommendations to address them. By providing guidance on best practices, we aim to support the construction of robust text-derived socio-economic impact datasets that can more accurately inform disaster risk management and attribution studies.

light_analysis.overview: 综述使用文本数据评估社会经济气候影响的方法，提出最佳实践指南以解决现存碎片化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着NLP和LLM的发展，利用新闻、社交媒体等大规模文本数据系统评估气候灾害（如洪水、干旱、风暴）的社会经济影响成为可能。然而，该领域方法复杂且碎片化，缺乏关于影响定义、时空偏差处理及建模策略选择的明确指南，导致研究透明度和可比性不足。本文旨在通过综合实践和提出建议来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过系统综合现有实践，识别了文本数据用于社会经济影响分析的关键挑战，包括影响定义、时间与空间偏差以及建模与后处理策略的选择。针对这些挑战，提出了具体建议，如规范化影响编码、偏差校正技术及模型验证框架，旨在构建更稳健的文本衍生数据集，以服务于灾害风险管理和归因研究。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告量化实验结果，但提供了系统性方法论指南和最佳实践建议，有助于提升文本衍生社会经济影响数据集的质量、透明度和跨研究可比性，从而增强对灾害风险管理和归因研究的支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文填补了文本数据用于社会经济气候影响评估的方法论空白，通过提供结构化指南促进了领域的规范化和标准化。其建议有助于提高数据集的可靠性和实用性，可广泛应用于灾害风险管理、气候政策制定及归因分析。未来工作应聚焦于实证验证这些建议的效果，并进一步探索多语言和跨文化场景下的适用性。

title: Findings of the Counter Turing Test: AI-Generated Image Detection
abstract: The rapid advancements in generative AI technologies, such as Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, and Midjourney, have significantly transformed the creation of synthetic visual content. While these models enable innovation across industries, they also pose serious challenges, including misinformation, disinformation, and biased content generation. The increasing realism of AI-generated images makes their detection a pressing concern for researchers, policymakers, and industry stakeholders.   In this paper, we present the findings of the Defactify 4.0 workshop, which introduced the Counter Turing Test (CT2) for AI-Generated Image Detection. The competition consisted of two key tasks: (1) binary classification of images as either AI-generated or real and (2) identification of the specific generative model responsible for an AI-generated image. To facilitate this, we developed the MS COCOAI dataset, consisting of 50,000 synthetic images from multiple generative models alongside real-world images from the MS COCO dataset.   Participants employed diverse detection strategies, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs), frequency-based analysis, contrastive learning, and multimodal techniques. The results demonstrated that while AI-generated images can be detected with high accuracy (F1-score > 0.83), identifying the exact model used remains significantly more challenging (highest F1-score: 0.4986). These findings highlight the need for improved model fingerprinting, adversarial robustness, and real-time detection mechanisms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Counter Turing Test竞赛，评估AI生成图像检测及模型识别能力，发现检测易但溯源难。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI（如Stable Diffusion、DALL-E）生成的图像日益逼真，带来虚假信息、偏见等风险。现有方法难以可靠区分真实与合成图像，且识别生成模型更具挑战性。亟需系统性评估检测与溯源技术，推动该领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于Defactify 4.0 Workshop举办Counter Turing Test竞赛，构建MS COCOAI数据集（5万张多模型合成图像+MS COCO真实图像）。任务包括二分类和模型识别。参与者采用CNN、Vision Transformer、频率分析、对比学习及多模态等方法。
light_analysis.result: 二分类任务F1>0.83，显示高检测精度；但模型识别任务最高F1仅0.4986，溯源显著困难。结果揭示了当前技术对生成模型指纹的鲁棒性不足，需改进对抗训练与实时检测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论证了AI生成图像可被高准确率检测，但识别具体生成模型仍具挑战。研究为模型指纹提取、对抗鲁棒性及实时检测指明方向，对打击虚假信息有重要应用价值。未来需探索更细粒度的溯源技术。

title: Building Arabic NLP from the Ground Up: Twenty Years of Lessons, Failures, and Open Problems
abstract: This paper reflects on twenty years of building NLP resources and research infrastructure for Arabic, a language spoken by hundreds of millions yet historically underserved relative to languages such as English or Chinese. The first decade focused on foundational linguistic infrastructure; the second shifted toward computational social science, social media analysis, and socially oriented applications. Rather than cataloguing outputs, the paper examines what the experience of building them revealed. Three counterintuitive lessons emerge: building datasets is as much a social process as a technical one; communities formed around shared tasks often matter more than the tasks themselves; and moving from language resources to computational social science exposes challenges that traditional NLP training does not address. We discuss three failures: a depression detection corpus that never reached clinical practice, a period of spreading across too many shared tasks without sufficient depth, and a long-standing assumption that Modern Standard Arabic infrastructure would transfer cleanly to dialectal tasks. These experiences suggest that the hardest problems in developing NLP for underserved communities are not linguistic but social, institutional, and epistemic, and require competencies the field rarely teaches.
comment: Accepted at the ACL 2026 Workshop : The Big Picture 2026: Crafting a Research Narrative v2

light_analysis.overview: 总结阿拉伯语NLP二十年建设经验，揭示社会、制度和认识论挑战比语言问题更关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 阿拉伯语使用人数众多，但NLP资源长期不足。现有方法过度聚焦技术，忽视数据构建的社会性、社区动态以及从资源到应用转化的障碍，缺乏跨学科视角。
light_analysis.method: 基于二十年实践经验，提出三个反直觉教训（数据集构建是社会过程、共享任务社区比任务本身重要、资源向计算社会科学转型遇阻）和三个失败案例（抑郁检测语料未临床化、任务过多分散、误判标准语基础设施可迁移），最终归结核心挑战为非语言因素。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供定量结果。主要定性发现：数据集构建受社会因素影响；社区驱动任务更可持续；标准阿拉伯语基础设施难直接用于方言任务。失败案例包括语料无法落地到临床、多任务浅尝辄止、方言迁移失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为弱势语言开发NLP的最难问题不在语言学，而在社会、机构和认识论层面。当前NLP教育缺乏相关能力培养，需引入跨学科知识与批判性反思。

title: Interaction Locality in Hierarchical Recursive Reasoning
abstract: Spatial reasoning requires both location-bound computation and location-invariant structure: agents must make local moves while preserving route, object, or constraint-level plans. We propose interaction locality, a task-geometry-aware framework for measuring whether information flow stays within nearby cells or semantic segments, or crosses them. We instantiate the framework with sparse-autoencoder feature ablations and finite-noise activation patching, with structural Jacobian and attention checks reported in the appendix, and apply it to HRM and TRM, two compact hierarchical and recursive reasoning models, on Maze-Hard, Sudoku Extreme, and ARC-AGI.
