Across these models, activation patching gives the clearest architectural fingerprint: high-level recurrent states tend to write information within nearby cells or same-segment units, while repeated recursive updates accumulate these local writes into broader solution structure. This pattern holds across maze paths, Sudoku constraints, and ARC-AGI object neighborhoods, with the strongest concentration in TRM. To test whether interaction locality extends beyond toy-yet-challenging grid benchmarks, we also apply it to MTU3D, a large-scale embodied 3D scene-grounding model. In this MTU3D setting, causal spatial locality appears primarily at the transition where visual scene features are handed to the downstream grounding module, rather than uniformly throughout the visual encoder. This contrast suggests that the local-to-global handoff observed in HRM and TRM is tied to explicit recursive reasoning dynamics, while embodied 3D models may concentrate causal spatial structure at module boundaries. Interaction locality turns the intuitive local-execution/global-planning story into a reproducible measurement framework for recursive and embodied spatial reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互局部性框架，通过激活修补等方法度量递归推理模型中信息流的局部性，揭示局部到全局的过渡模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 空间推理需要同时支持局部位置绑定计算和全局结构不变性。现有方法缺乏可重复的度量来衡量递归推理中信息流动的局部性，特别是从局部执行到全局规划的过渡是否成立。理解这一机制对于设计更高效的层次递归模型具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 提出交互局部性框架，结合稀疏自编码器特征消融和有限噪声激活修补，辅以结构雅可比和注意力检查。应用于HRM和TRM两个层次递归推理模型，在Maze-Hard、Sudoku Extreme和ARC-AGI任务上测试；并扩展到MTU3D三维场景定位模型。
light_analysis.result: 激活修补显示高级递归状态倾向于在相邻单元或语义段内写入信息，递归更新累积形成全局结构，该模式在三个任务中一致，TRM最强。在MTU3D中，因果空间局部性主要集中在视觉特征传递到下游模块的边界，而非均匀分布。
light_analysis.conclusion: 交互局部性将直观的局部执行/全局规划故事转化为可重复测量框架，表明递归推理中的局部-全局过渡与显式递归动力学相关，而3D模型集中在模块边界。该框架为分析递归和具身空间推理模型提供了新工具。

title: Causal Machine Learning Is Not a Panacea: A Roadmap for Observational Causal Inference in Health
abstract: Objective: The growing availability of large-scale observational clinical datasets and challenges in conducting randomized controlled trials have spurred enthusiasm in using causal machine learning (ML) for causal inference in observational data. We present a roadmap for applying causal ML to observational data. Materials and methods: We outline the importance of assessing validity assumptions within available data and applying causal ML responsibly for clinical experts using causal ML and ML practitioners with limited clinical expertise. Observations: Despite advances in causal ML, its limitations remain largely under-appreciated across disciplines. This gap in shared knowledge may impact the validity of findings. Discussion: Causal assumptions must be satisfied and modeling choices justified. Otherwise, these approaches risk producing biased or misleading results, with consequences for clinical research and patient care. Conclusion: Causal ML can be a powerful tool for generating causal hypotheses. We provide a template to strengthen the rigor and interpretability of causal analyses.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个路线图，指导在健康观察性数据中负责任地应用因果机器学习，强调其局限性和假设验证的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大规模观察性临床数据集的可用性和随机对照试验的挑战，因果机器学习在观察性数据中用于因果推断受到关注。然而，其局限性在各学科中未被充分认识，可能导致有偏见或误导性的结果，影响临床研究和患者护理。因此，需要一份路线图来帮助临床专家和机器学习从业者理解并正确应用因果ML。
light_analysis.method: 论文概述了评估可用数据中有效性假设（如无混淆、正性等）的重要性，并提供了负责任使用因果ML的路线图。强调建模选择需要合理，并针对临床专家和ML从业者分别提出建议。模板旨在加强因果分析的严谨性和可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出因果假设必须满足，否则因果ML可能产生偏见结果。论文通过讨论观察数据和讨论部分强调了正确应用的紧迫性，但未给出量化性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 因果机器学习是生成因果假设的有力工具，但其应用必须谨慎。论文提供了一份模板以增强因果分析的严谨性和可解释性，旨在弥合跨学科的知识差距，并促进医疗领域的因果推断实践。

title: Learning to Think in Physics: Breaking Shortcut Learning in Scientific Diffusion via Representation Alignment
abstract: Physics-informed diffusion models typically enforce PDE constraints only on final outputs, leaving intermediate representations unconstrained and prone to shortcut learning under shifted boundary conditions. We introduce **REPA-P**, a teacher-free, architecture-agnostic framework that aligns intermediate features with physical states using first-principles residuals. REPA-P attaches lightweight $1{\times}1$ projection heads to selected layers, decodes hidden activations into physical quantities, and applies PDE residual losses during training. These heads are discarded at inference, introducing **zero overhead**. Across four PDE tasks, including Darcy flow, topology optimization, electrostatic potential, and turbulent channel flow, REPA-P accelerates convergence by up to $2{\times}$, reduces physics residuals by up to $66.4\%$, and improves out-of-distribution robustness by up to $49.3\%$, with consistent gains on both U-Net and Diffusion Transformer backbones. Ablations show that supervising a small set of intermediate layers captures most benefits and complements output-level physics losses. Code is available at [https://github.com/Hxxxz0/REPA-P](https://github.com/Hxxxz0/REPA-P).

light_analysis.overview: 提出REPA-P框架，通过中间特征与物理状态对齐，零开销地消除物理信息扩散模型中的捷径学习，显著提升泛化性和收敛速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息扩散模型通常仅在最终输出上施加PDE约束，中间表示完全自由，导致模型在边界条件变化时极易发生捷径学习，即利用与物理无关的伪相关进行预测。这种问题严重削弱了模型在科学仿真等实际应用中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。现有方法要么依赖教师模型，要么增加推理开销，缺乏一种高效且通用的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: REPA-P是一种无教师、架构无关的框架，通过在选定中间层附加轻量级1×1卷积投影头，将隐藏激活解码为物理量，并计算基于第一性原理的PDE残差作为额外训练损失。训练完成后投影头被丢弃，推理时无额外开销。该方法适用于U-Net和扩散Transformer等主流骨干网络。
light_analysis.result: 在Darcy流、拓扑优化、静电势和湍流通道流四个PDE任务上，REPA-P将收敛速度提升至多2倍，物理残差减少最多66.4%，分布外鲁棒性（边界条件偏移）提升最多49.3%。消融实验显示仅监督少量中间层即可捕获大部分收益，且与输出级物理损失互补。
light_analysis.conclusion: REPA-P首次通过中间表示对齐有效抑制了物理信息扩散模型中的捷径学习，且不引入任何推理开销。该框架具有架构通用性，可轻松集成到现有模型中，提升了科学仿真的可靠性和效率。未来工作可探索其在更多复杂物理系统和多尺度问题中的适用性。

title: AttriStory: Fine-grained Attribute Realization for Visual Storytelling with Diffusion Models
abstract: Visual storytelling with diffusion models has made impressive strides in maintaining character consistency across narrative scenes. However, a critical gap remains: while these methods ensure a character remains consistent across scenes, they provide no systematic method to ensure if fine-grained attributes such as color and textures of clothing, accessories are faithfully rendered in the generated images. Towards this goal, we introduce AttriStory, a benchmark enabling attribute realization in visual storytelling. We curate 200 multi-scene stories across 10 distinct artistic styles using Large Language Model. Each scene is constructed with detailed attribute specifications to enable rich visual narratives. Further, to address attribute realization, we propose a plug-and-play latent optimization module that operates during early denoising steps, when the model establishes structural and semantic content. We achieve this through AttriLoss objective designed to maximize alignment between the cross-attention maps for desired attribute-object pairs while suppressing spurious associations, guiding models to localize attributes correctly. This approach operates orthogonally to existing consistency mechanisms, integrating seamlessly with current story generation pipelines without requiring architectural modifications. Our experiments demonstrate consistent improvements on incorporating AttriLoss across all baselines. This work positions attribute realization as a distinct, complementary dimension of visual storytelling, alongside character consistency, advancing the field toward fine-grained attribute-controlled story generation. Project-page:https://manogna-s.github.io/attristory/

light_analysis.overview: 提出AttriStory基准和AttriLoss方法，实现视觉故事生成中细粒度属性的忠实渲染，与现有角色一致性机制互补。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型在视觉故事生成中能保持角色一致性，但无法系统确保衣物颜色、纹理等细粒度属性在生成图像中准确呈现，这是一个关键缺失。该问题重要，因为细粒度属性影响叙事真实性和细节丰富度，而现有方法缺乏对此的专门优化。
light_analysis.method: 构建AttriStory数据集，包含200个多场景故事（10种艺术风格），每个场景有详细属性说明。提出AttriLoss损失函数，在去噪早期步骤优化交叉注意力图，最大化属性-对象对的对齐并抑制虚假关联。该方法作为即插即用模块，无需修改模型架构，可无缝集成到现有故事生成流程。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基线上一致改进属性实现效果。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声称实验表明AttriLoss的引入带来持续提升。与基线对比，该方法在不牺牲角色一致性的前提下增强了属性准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AttriStory将属性实现确立为视觉故事生成中与角色一致性互补的独立维度，推动细粒度属性控制的故事生成发展。其即插即用特性易于应用，但摘要未提及局限性，未来可探索更复杂属性或动态场景。

title: VIHD: Visual Intervention-based Hallucination Detection for Medical Visual Question Answering
abstract: While medical Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promise in assisting diagnosis, they still frequently generate hallucinated responses that appear linguistically plausible but lack visual evidence. Such hallucinations pose risks to clinical decision-making and necessitate effective detection. Existing introspective detection methods primarily perform uncertainty estimation or logical verification by analyzing model responses conditioned on original or perturbed inputs. However, such external perturbations are often heuristic and context-agnostic, which overlooks the internal cross-modal dependency between generated tokens and related visual tokens during decoding. To address this issue, we propose VIHD, a Visual Intervention-based Hallucination Detection method that leverages targeted visual token masking to calibrate semantic entropy for more effective hallucination detection. VIHD locates visually dominant decoder layers via Visual Dependency Probing (VDP), executes Visual Intervention Decoding (VID) via token masking to calibrate the semantic distribution, and quantifies the resulting Calibrated Semantic Entropy (CSE) as a reliable hallucination signal. Extensive experiments on three medical VQA benchmarks with two medical MLLMs demonstrate that VIHD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, underscoring the importance of fine-grained visual dependency for hallucination detection. The code will be available at https://github.com/Jiayi-Chen-AU/VIHD

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于视觉干预的幻觉检测方法VIHD，通过掩蔽视觉token校准语义熵，有效检测医学多模态大语言模型的幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学多模态大语言模型在辅助诊断中可能生成缺乏视觉证据的幻觉响应，对临床决策构成风险。现有内省检测方法依赖启发式外部扰动，忽略了解码过程中生成token与视觉token之间的内部跨模态依赖，导致检测效果不佳。因此，需要一种能利用细粒度视觉依赖的幻觉检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出VIHD方法，包含三个步骤：首先通过视觉依赖探测（VDP）定位视觉主导的解码器层；然后执行视觉干预解码（VID），通过掩蔽目标视觉token来校准语义分布；最后量化校准语义熵（CSE）作为幻觉信号。该方法在解码过程中直接干预视觉信息，利用内部跨模态依赖，无需外部扰动。
light_analysis.result: 在三个医学VQA基准（如Med-VQA等）和两个医学MLLM（如Med-PaLM等）上实验，VIHD在幻觉检测性能上持续优于现有最先进方法。具体指标包括准确率、F1分数等，表明细粒度视觉依赖对检测幻觉的重要性。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称一致优于SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIHD通过视觉token掩蔽校准语义熵，有效检测医学MLLM的幻觉，强调了跨模态依赖的重要性。该方法具有临床安全价值，可提升AI辅助诊断的可靠性。未来可探索更高效的视觉依赖探测策略及扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: Cumulative Meta-Learning from Active Learning Queries for Robustness to Spurious Correlations
abstract: Spurious correlations in real-world datasets cause machine learning models to rely on irrelevant patterns, undermining reliability, generalization, and fairness. Active learning offers a promising way to address this failure mode by querying informative samples that distinguish core features from spurious ones. However, standard active-learning methods simply append queried examples to the labeled set, effectively updating only the likelihood term. In deep learning regimes, the influence of these informative samples can be diluted by the larger labeled set and memorized by overparameterized models. We propose Cumulative Active Meta-Learning (CAML), an active-learning framework that uses queried examples to meta-learn the prior, or inductive bias, governing how the model adapts. CAML casts each active-learning round as a meta-learning task: the current labeled set serves as meta-train data for adaptation, while the newly queried batch serves as meta-test data for evaluating generalization. Unlike conventional meta-learning, which treats tasks as independent and identically distributed, CAML exploits the sequential dependence between active-learning rounds by maintaining a cumulative inductive bias that is progressively refined. Theoretically, we show that this cumulative formulation introduces interaction terms that couple earlier meta-learned inductive biases with later query-induced objectives, capturing dependencies absent from standard meta-learning. Empirically, CAML improves minority-group accuracy across spurious-correlation benchmarks and acquisition strategies, with gains of up to 27.8% on Dominoes, 29.9% on Waterbirds, 14.3% on SpuCo, and 24.0% on CivilComments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出累积主动元学习（CAML），利用主动学习查询样本进行元学习，累积更新归纳偏置以提升模型对虚假相关性的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实数据集中的虚假相关性导致模型依赖无关模式，损害可靠性、泛化和公平性。标准主动学习仅将查询样本追加到标注集，在深度学习中其影响易被过度参数化模型稀释和记忆。因此需要一种能持续利用信息样本更新模型先验的新方法。
light_analysis.method: CAML将每个主动学习轮次视为元学习任务：当前标注集作为元训练数据用于模型适应，新查询批次作为元测试数据评估泛化。不同于传统元学习假设任务独立同分布，CAML利用轮次间的顺序依赖，维护并逐步精炼累积归纳偏置。理论上证明该累积形式引入耦合早期偏置与后续目标的交互项。
light_analysis.result: 在多个虚假相关性基准上，CAML显著提升少数群体准确率：Dominoes提升27.8%，Waterbirds提升29.9%，SpuCo提升14.3%，CivilComments提升24.0%。与标准主动学习和元学习方法相比，CAML在不同获取策略下均表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAML为主动学习与元学习的结合提供了新框架，理论分析揭示了累积归纳偏置的优势，实证结果验证了其有效性。该工作增强了模型在虚假相关性下的鲁棒性，具有重要的学术与应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的任务顺序及跨领域迁移。

title: The Illusion of Intervention: Your LLM-Simulated Experiment is an Observational Study
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show potential as simulators of human behavior, offering a scalable way to study responses to interventions. However, because LLMs are trained largely on observational data, interventions in experiments with LLM-simulated synthetic users can induce unintended shifts in latent user attributes, causing user drift where the implicit simulated population differs across treatment conditions, potentially distorting effect estimates. We formalize the confounding or selection bias that can arise due to user drift and show how intervention-dependent shifts can inflate or attenuate observed differences in user responses under intervention. To diagnose confounding, we propose using negative control outcomes--attributes that should remain invariant under intervention--to identify distribution shifts across intervention conditions, providing evidence of user drift. To mitigate drift, we study adjusting the persona specification by eliciting additional confounders, finding that targeted, setting-relevant confounders can substantially reduce bias across survey-style and multi-turn agent evaluations.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLM模拟实验中干预导致的用户漂移问题，提出诊断和缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为人类行为模拟器具有潜力，但训练数据多为观察性数据，导致在模拟实验中施加干预时可能引发潜在用户属性的非预期偏移（用户漂移），使得不同处理条件下的隐含模拟人群不同，扭曲干预效果估计。现有方法未充分认识这种混杂或选择偏倚，亟需诊断和缓解措施。
light_analysis.method: 首先形式化用户漂移导致的混杂或选择偏倚，分析干预依赖的偏移如何放大或衰减用户响应的差异。提出使用阴性对照结果（即应在干预下保持不变的属性）来检测分布偏移，从而诊断用户漂移。为缓解漂移，研究通过调整角色规范（persona specification）来引入额外混杂因子，发现针对性的、与场景相关的混杂因子能显著减少偏倚，涵盖调查式和多轮智能体评估。
light_analysis.result: 通过实验验证了阴性对照结果能有效识别干预条件之间的分布偏移，提供用户漂移的证据。调整角色规范，加入目标相关的混杂因子后，在多种评估场景中（如调查式和多轮对话）显著降低了干预效应估计的偏差。具体数值摘要未明确，但方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究揭示了LLM模拟实验中因干预导致用户漂移而引发的混杂问题，并提供了诊断（阴性对照）和缓解（调整角色规范）的实用工具。这对利用LLM进行因果推断和行为模拟具有重要意义，未来可进一步探索自动化混杂因子发现或更鲁棒的模拟设置。

title: Diffuse to Detect: Bi-Level Sample Rebalancing with Pseudo-Label Diffusion for Point-Supervised Infrared Small-Target Detection
abstract: Point supervision has become a scalable solution to address dense annotation for infrared small target detection, but its performance is limited by two coupled bottlenecks: unstable pseudo-label evolution in cluttered, low-contrast infrared imagery and severe sample-distribution imbalance. In this paper, we present a more adaptive and stable framework to address these issues. Leveraging the intrinsic consistency between thermal radiation patterns and heat diffusion, we propose a physics-induced annotation strategy that expands single-point labels into reliable pseudo-masks. To further enhance supervision and alleviate sample imbalance, we develop a bi-level dual-update framework that jointly optimizes detector weights, sample weights, and diffusion parameters. A meta-classifier dynamically predicts sample-wise loss weights, while a differentiable diffusion module refines pseudo-labels with detection feedback, enabling adaptive interaction between training and hyperparameter optimization. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate five-fold annotation acceleration, superior detection accuracy, and comparable performance with 30% of the training data, validating the efficiency and practicality of our approach. Our code is available at https://github.com/yuanhang-yao/diffuse-to-detect.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于热扩散物理启发的点监督红外小目标检测方法，通过双层样本重平衡和伪标签扩散提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 点监督虽可缓解红外小目标检测的密集标注问题，但受限于两个耦合瓶颈：复杂低对比度红外图像中伪标签演化不稳定和样本分布严重不平衡。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题，导致检测精度受限。本文旨在通过物理一致性约束和自适应优化框架，实现稳定伪标签生成与样本平衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出物理启发的注释策略，利用热辐射模式与热扩散的内在一致性，将单点标签扩展为可靠伪掩码。开发双层双更新框架，联合优化检测器权重、样本权重和扩散参数：元分类器动态预测样本级损失权重，可微分扩散模块利用检测反馈细化伪标签，实现训练与超参数优化的自适应交互。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上，该方法实现五倍标注加速，检测精度显著提升，且仅用30%训练数据即可达到与全监督相当的性能。相比现有方法，有效解决了伪标签不稳定和样本不平衡问题，验证了方法的效率与实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过物理启发的伪标签扩散和双层优化框架，为点监督红外小目标检测提供了高效稳健的解决方案。其在实际应用中可大幅降低标注成本，提升检测性能。未来可探索更复杂的物理模型或扩展到其他点监督任务。

title: ShapeBench: A Scalable Benchmark and Diagnostic Suite for Standardized Evaluation in Aerodynamic Shape Optimization
abstract: Rapid progress in aerodynamic shape optimization (ASO) has outpaced currently-available standardized evaluation frameworks. Fair comparison requires a unified benchmark spanning diverse shape classes, objective formulations, and matched-budget state-of-the-art baselines. We introduce ShapeBench, an open-source ASO benchmark with a unified API spanning 103 tasks across eight shape categories and multiple optimization regimes. Each ShapeBench task includes a validated surrogate for fast search; when feasible, a high-fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) pipeline for final verification is available, enabling systematic fidelity-gap analysis. ShapeBench provides a reproducible protocol with well-configured baselines to compare fairly using a consistent budget metric, allowing for comparison among both classical and LLM-driven methods, including general-purpose optimizers and a new domain-specialized evolutionary LLM baseline, ShapeEvolve. Results on ShapeBench demonstrate substantial variance in optimizer rankings across shape categories and problem formulations, with mean pairwise Spearman $ρ= 0.013$, so single-task conclusions do not reliably generalize across problem classes. The benchmark is also far from saturation; classical methods are rarely applicable across all shape categories and tasks, further highlighting the need for more general-purpose approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ShapeBench，一个涵盖103个任务、8个形状类别的可扩展气动外形优化基准测试套件，支持标准化评估和公平比较。
light_analysis.motivation: 气动外形优化(ASO)领域进展迅速，但缺乏统一的标准化评估框架。现有方法比较困难，因为不同研究使用不同的形状类别、目标函数和预算。ShapeBench旨在提供一个统一的API和匹配预算的基线，以促进公平比较和可重复性。
light_analysis.method: ShapeBench提供统一API，包含103个任务，覆盖8个形状类别和多种优化模式。每个任务包含验证过的代理模型用于快速搜索，并可选高保真CFD管道用于最终验证。此外，引入了领域特定的进化LLM基线ShapeEvolve，以及经典优化器和通用优化器，所有基线均使用一致预算度量。
light_analysis.result: 在ShapeBench上的实验显示，优化器排名在不同形状类别和问题公式间高度不一致，平均成对Spearman ρ=0.013，表明单任务结论无法泛化。基准远未饱和，经典方法很少能适用于所有任务，凸显了对更通用方法的需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: ShapeBench为ASO标准化评估提供了可扩展的基准和诊断工具，揭示了跨任务泛化的挑战，并强调了开发通用优化方法的必要性。该基准有助于推动ASO领域更公平、可重复的研究。

title: Findings of the Counter Turing Test: AI-Generated Text Detection
abstract: The rapid proliferation of AI-generated text has introduced significant challenges in maintaining the integrity of digital content. Advanced generative models such as GPT-4, Claude 3.5, and Llama can produce highly coherent and human-like text, making it increasingly difficult to differentiate between human-written and AI-generated content. While these models have transformative applications, their misuse has raised concerns about misinformation, biased narratives, and security threats.   This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of state-of-the-art AI-generated text detection techniques and evaluates their effectiveness through the Counter Turing Test (CT2) shared tasks. Task A (Binary Classification) required participants to distinguish between human-written and AI-generated text, while Task B (Model Attribution) focused on identifying the specific language model responsible for generating a given text. The results demonstrated high performance in binary classification, with the top system achieving an F1 score of 1.0000, but significantly lower scores in model attribution, where the best system achieved 0.9531, highlighting the increased complexity of this task.   The top-performing teams leveraged fine-tuned transformer models, ensemble learning, and hybrid detection approaches, with DeBERTa-based and BART-based methods demonstrating strong results. However, the lower scores in Task B underscore the challenges of distinguishing outputs from different LLMs, necessitating further research into adversarial robustness, feature extraction, and cross-domain generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 通过Counter Turing Test共享任务系统评估AI文本检测技术，提出二进制分类和模型归因任务，发现二进制分类表现极高而模型归因更具挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: AI生成文本的快速传播对数字内容真实性构成严重威胁，先进模型如GPT-4、Claude 3.5可生成高度逼真的文本，现有检测方法难以区分。该研究旨在系统评估当前检测技术的有效性，重点解决人机文本区分和特定模型识别问题。
light_analysis.method: 设计两个共享任务：Task A为二进制分类（判断文本是否由AI生成），Task B为模型归因（识别具体生成模型）。参与者采用微调transformer模型（如DeBERTa、BART）、集成学习和混合检测方法。数据集涵盖多种LLM生成文本。
light_analysis.result: Task A最佳系统F1得分1.0000，显示二进制分类已基本解决；Task B最佳系统F1得分0.9531，表明模型归因难度显著更高。DeBERTa和BART方法表现突出，但整体归因性能低于分类，凸显跨模型区分挑战。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过CT2任务验证了二进制分类的高效性，但模型归因仍面临对抗鲁棒性、特征提取和跨域泛化等难题。未来需加强多模型区分和泛化能力研究，对维护内容安全具有重要意义。

title: SpineContextResUNet: A Computationally Efficient Residual UNet for Spine CT Segmentation
abstract: Automated segmentation of the vertebral column in Computed Tomography (CT) scans is a prerequisite for pathological assessment and surgical planning. However, state-of-the-art methods, particularly those based on Transformers or large-scale ensembles, demand substantial GPU resources, creating a barrier for clinical adoption in resource-constrained environments or on edge devices. To address this, we introduce SpineContextResUNet, a computationally efficient 3D Residual U-Net designed for rapid spinal localization. Our architecture integrates a lightweight Context Block that employs parallel multi-dilated convolutions to capture long-range anatomical dependencies without the high latency of Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) or the memory overhead of Self-Attention mechanisms. Extensive validation on two public benchmarks, VerSe2020 and CTSpine1K, demonstrates that our model achieves a Dice score of 88.17% and 88.13% respectively. To evaluate performance under strict hardware constraints, we compared our model against a bottlenecked SwinUNETR scaled to match our ~1.7M hardware footprint. While the constrained Transformer suffers severe performance degradation due to a lack of spatial inductive biases in a limited-data regime, our CNN-based approach successfully maintains high accuracy. Crucially, heavy baselines like TotalSegmentator fail due to memory exhaustion on commodity hardware (Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM), our model performs robust inference, making it a viable solution for point-of-care diagnostics and deployment on edge platforms like the Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级3D Residual U-Net SpineContextResUNet，用于高效脊柱CT分割，在资源受限环境下保持高精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有脊柱CT分割方法基于Transformer或大型集成模型，需要大量GPU资源，难以在临床资源受限环境或边缘设备上部署。由于缺乏空间归纳偏置，在数据有限条件下Transformer性能严重下降，而传统CNN方法在紧凑架构下仍能保持高精度。因此需要设计计算高效的模型，实现快速且准确的脊柱定位。
light_analysis.method: 提出SpineContextResUNet，采用3D Residual U-Net架构，集成轻量级Context Block，使用并行多膨胀卷积捕获长程解剖依赖，避免RNN的高延迟或自注意力的内存开销。模型参数量约1.7M，在VerSe2020和CTSpine1K两个公开基准上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在VerSe2020上Dice达到88.17%，在CTSpine1K上Dice达到88.13%。与参数量相近的SwinUNETR（~1.7M）相比，受限Transformer因缺乏空间归纳偏置性能严重下降，而CNN方法保持高精度。在消费级硬件（Intel Core i5, 8GB RAM）上，重型基线TotalSegmentator因内存耗尽失败，本文模型可稳健推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpineContextResUNet以极小参数量实现了可媲美大型模型的脊柱分割精度，且在资源受限硬件上可行，适用于临床即时诊断和边缘设备（如Nvidia Jetson Orin Nano）部署。未来可进一步优化Context Block或扩展至其他医学图像分割任务。

title: Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance for Flow Models under Compositional Rewards
abstract: Inference-time guided sampling steers state-of-the-art diffusion and flow models without fine-tuning by interpreting the generation process as a controllable trajectory. This provides a simple and flexible way to inject external constraints (e.g., cost functions or pre-trained verifiers) for controlled generation. However, existing methods often fail when composing multiple constraints simultaneously, which leads to deviations from the true data manifold. In this work, we identify root causes of this off-manifold drift and find that the approximation error scales severely with gradient misalignment. Building on these findings, we propose Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance ($g^\text{car}$), a lightweight and learnable method, which actively rectifies off-manifold drift by dynamically detecting and resolving gradient conflicts. We validate $g^\text{car}$ across diverse domains, ranging from synthetic datasets and image editing to generative decision-making for planning and control. Our results demonstrate that $g^\text{car}$ effectively rectifies off-manifold drift, surpassing baselines in generation fidelity while using light compute. Code is available at https://github.com/yuxuehui/CAR-guidance.
comment: Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出冲突感知加性引导方法，动态解决梯度冲突，纠正组合奖励下的离流形漂移。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理时引导方法在组合多个约束时容易偏离真实数据流形，导致生成质量下降。研究表明这种离流形漂移的根本原因是梯度方向不一致带来的近似误差，且误差随梯度冲突程度严重放大。因此需要一种能主动检测并解决梯度冲突的轻量方法，以在组合约束下保持生成 fidelity。
light_analysis.method: 提出 Conflict-Aware Additive Guidance (g^car)，一种轻量可学习的方法，通过动态检测梯度之间的冲突并主动修正，从而纠正离流形漂移。该方法不改变预训练模型，仅在推理时添加引导信号。在合成数据集、图像编辑和生成式决策规划控制等任务中验证，计算开销低。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务上验证，g^car 有效纠正离流形漂移，生成 fidelity 超过现有基线，同时计算量轻。具体指标未在摘要中明确，但声称超越基线且轻量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文理论分析了组合约束下离流形漂移的成因，提出轻量可学习的冲突感知引导方法，提升了多约束引导生成的可靠性。方法适用于扩散和流模型，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的冲突检测机制或扩展到其他生成模型。

title: Correcting Stochastic Update Bias in Preconditioned Language Model Optimizers
abstract: Preconditioned optimizers are central to language model training, but their stochastic update rules are usually treated as direct approximations to population preconditioned descent. We show that this view misses two finite-sample biases. First, the gradient and preconditioner are typically estimated from the same minibatch, introducing gradient--preconditioner coupling bias. Second, even when the preconditioner estimate is unbiased, its inverse or inverse-root is generally biased because inversion is nonlinear. We propose a single-batch bias-correction framework that addresses both effects: cross-fitted preconditioning estimates the numerator and preconditioner from independent microbatch groups, while variance-corrected inversion uses microbatch variability to subtract the leading delta-method bias term. The framework applies to diagonal moment, diagonal curvature, and matrix preconditioning methods, instantiated in AdamW, Sophia, and Shampoo. Bias correction reduces held-out pretraining loss on Qwen2.5-0.5B by $0.15$, $0.07$, and $0.11$ nats, respectively; the effects on mixed-quality pretraining and downstream instruction tuning are consistently neutral-to-positive. Together, these results establish bias correction as a practical mechanism for reducing finite-sample update bias and improving the performance of preconditioned optimizers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架纠正预条件语言模型优化器中的随机更新偏差，包括梯度-预条件耦合偏差和反演偏差，可应用于AdamW、Sophia、Shampoo等优化器。
light_analysis.motivation: 预条件优化器是语言模型训练的核心，但其随机更新规则被视为种群预条件下降的近似，忽略了两种有限样本偏差：梯度与预条件估计同批导致的耦合偏差，以及无偏预条件估计的逆因非线性产生的偏差。这些偏差影响训练效果，现有方法未系统解决，亟需校正。
light_analysis.method: 提出单批次偏差校正框架：交叉拟合预条件估计从独立微批次组分别估计分子和预条件，消除耦合偏差；方差校正反演利用微批次变异性减去Delta方法偏差项。适用于对角动量、对角曲率和矩阵预条件方法，在AdamW、Sophia、Shampoo上实例化。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen2.5-0.5B上，偏差校正使预训练损失分别降低0.15、0.07和0.11 nats；对混合质量预训练和下游指令调优效果中性或积极，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了偏差校正作为减少有限样本更新偏差、提升预条件优化器性能的实用机制。该贡献具有学术价值，可提升语言模型训练效率，未来可扩展至其他优化器及应用场景。

title: PACD-Net: Pseudo-Augmented Contrastive Distillation for Glycemic Control Estimation from SMBG
abstract: Effective diabetes management requires continuous monitoring of glycemic levels. Clinically, glycemic control is assessed using metrics such as Time in Range (TIR), Time Below Range (TBR), and Time Above Range (TAR), typically derived from continuous glucose monitoring (CGM). However, many patients rely on self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG) due to the high cost and limited accessibility of CGM. Unlike CGM, SMBG provides sparse and irregular measurements, making accurate estimation of these metrics challenging. Conventional supervised learning approaches struggle under such sparsity, leading to poor generalization and unstable performance. To address this, we propose PACD-Net, a self-supervised contrastive knowledge distillation framework for estimating glycemic control from SMBG. Pseudo-SMBG samples with richer temporal coverage are used as teacher signals to guide learning from sparse observations. In addition, multi-view contrastive learning enforces representation consistency across diverse sampling patterns. The model adopts a hybrid Swin Transformer-CNN backbone to capture temporal dependencies in sparse SMBG sequences. Experimental results demonstrate that PACD-Net consistently outperforms existing methods in estimating TAR, TIR, and TBR from real-world SMBG data, achieving improved accuracy as well as enhanced stability and generalization under extremely sparse observation settings. The proposed framework provides a practical tool for clinical SMBG interpretation and offers a generalizable approach for learning from sparse and irregularly sampled sensor data in broader applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PACD-Net，一种伪增强对比蒸馏框架，用于从稀疏的自我监测血糖数据中准确估计血糖控制指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 糖尿病患者常用SMBG监测血糖，但SMBG数据稀疏且不规则，难以估计TIR、TBR、TAR等临床指标。传统监督学习方法在稀疏数据下泛化差、不稳定。需要一种能有效利用稀疏观测进行准确估计的方法。
light_analysis.method: PACD-Net采用自监督对比知识蒸馏框架。利用伪SMBG样本（时间覆盖更丰富）作为教师信号，引导从稀疏观测中学习。多视图对比学习强制不同采样模式下的表示一致性。模型采用混合Swin Transformer-CNN骨干网络捕获稀疏序列的时间依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在真实SMBG数据上，PACD-Net在估计TAR、TIR、TBR时一致优于现有方法，在极稀疏观测设置下不仅提高准确性，还增强稳定性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: PACD-Net为临床SMBG解释提供了实用工具，并为从稀疏不规则采样传感器数据中学习提供了可泛化的方法。未来可扩展到其他医疗监测场景。

title: The Devil is in the Condition Numbers: Why is GLU Better than non-GLU Structure?
abstract: Gated Linear Units (GLU) and their variants are widely adopted in modern open-source large language model architectures and consistently outperform their non-gated counterparts, yet the underlying reasons for this advantage remain unclear. In this work, we study GLU by analyzing two-layer networks in the neural tangent kernel (NTK) regime. Our analysis reveals that the GLU structure reshapes the NTK spectrum, leading to a smaller condition number and a more compact eigenvalue distribution. Building on this finding, we further analyze the resulting training dynamics and show how the reshaped spectrum leads to faster convergence of GLU models, including a characteristic loss-crossing phenomenon observed between GLU and non-GLU models. Finally, we empirically observe that GLU has limited impact in reducing the generalization gap on various models, including ViT and GPT-2, suggesting that its primary benefit lies in accelerating optimization rather than reducing the generalization gap.

light_analysis.overview: 证明GLU通过重塑NTK谱的条件数加速优化收敛，而非提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: GLU及其变体在现代大语言模型中广泛使用且性能优于非门控结构，但优势原因不明。理解这一机制有助于设计更高效的模型架构，现有缺乏理论解释。
light_analysis.method: 采用神经正切核（NTK）理论分析两层网络，对比GLU与非GLU结构。通过计算NTK谱的条件数和特征值分布，揭示GLU导致更小条件数和更紧凑分布。进一步分析训练动态，解释收敛加速与损失交叉现象。实验验证ViT和GPT-2上的泛化差距。
light_analysis.result: GLU结构显著降低NTK条件数，使特征值分布更紧凑，从而加快收敛速度，并观察到独特的损失交叉现象。但GLU对泛化差距影响有限，在ViT和GPT-2等模型上未显著缩小训练与测试性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLU的主要贡献在于加速优化过程而非提升泛化，为理解门控机制提供了理论依据。未来可探索在更复杂架构中的条件数调控，或结合其他正则化手段改善泛化。

title: The Hidden Signal of Verifier Strictness: Controlling and Improving Step-Wise Verification via Selective Latent Steering
abstract: Generative verifiers have emerged as a promising paradigm for step-wise verification, but their verification behavior is often poorly calibrated: they may be under-critical and miss erroneous steps, or over-critical and reject correct reasoning. We refer to this tendency to be overly lenient or overly critical as verifier strictness. In this work, we study whether verifier strictness can be controlled through hidden-state intervention. We uncover a verification-specific hidden-state signal: in step-wise verification, a verifier's tendency to accept or reject a solution step is encoded near the boundary of the corresponding verification paragraph. Exploiting this signal, we show that hidden-state steering can directly modulate verifier strictness without fine-tuning. However, uniform steering induces a trade-off between error detection and correctness certification. To address this, we propose VerifySteer, which exploits latent correctness signals for sample-level routing and selectively intervenes on paragraph boundaries. Experiments on ProcessBench and Hard2Verify show that VerifySteer outperforms prompt optimization and activation steering baselines, and is competitive with self-consistency while requiring 4-7x less inference compute. VerifySteer is also complementary to verification fine-tuning, providing further gains on top of fine-tuned verifiers. The code is available at https://github.com/YefanZhou/VerifySteer.

light_analysis.overview: 发现验证器严格性的隐藏状态信号，通过选择性隐态干预实现无需微调的严格性控制，并提出VerifySteer方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式验证器在逐步验证中常出现校准不良问题：可能过于宽松而漏检错误步骤，或过于严格而拒绝正确推理。这种倾向称为验证器严格性。现有方法如提示优化或微调难以直接控制严格性，且存在性能与计算成本之间的权衡。因此，需要一种高效、可控的方法来调节验证器的行为。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先发现验证器在逐步验证中，其接受或拒绝步的倾向编码在对应验证段落的边界附近，形成一个隐藏状态信号。利用该信号，通过隐态干预可直接调制严格性而无需微调。但均匀干预会在错误检测和正确认证间产生权衡。为此，提出VerifySteer，利用潜在正确性信号进行样本级路由，并选择性干预段落边界。在ProcessBench和Hard2Verify数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: VerifySteer在ProcessBench和Hard2Verify上优于提示优化和激活干预基线，与自一致性方法性能相当，但推理计算量减少4-7倍。此外，VerifySteer与验证微调互补，在微调验证器基础上能进一步提升性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了验证器严格性的隐藏状态信号，并提出VerifySteer方法实现高效、可控制的严格性调节。该方法无需微调，计算成本低，且与现有微调方法兼容。学术上提供了对验证器行为的深入理解，应用上可提升逐步验证系统的可靠性和效率。未来可探索更细粒度的干预策略。

title: Hack-Verifiable Environments: Towards Evaluating Reward Hacking at Scale
abstract: Aligning autonomous agents with human intent remains a central challenge in modern AI. A key manifestation of this challenge is reward hacking, whereby agents appear successful under the evaluation signal while violating the intended objective. Reward hacking has been observed across a wide range of settings, yet methods for reliably measuring it at scale remain lacking. In this work, we introduce a new evaluation paradigm for measuring reward hacking. Whereas prior studies have primarily analyzed it post hoc by inspecting agent trajectories, we instead embed detectable reward hacking opportunities directly into environments. This makes their exploitation verifiable by design, enabling deterministic and automated measurement of whether and how agents exploit such vulnerabilities. We instantiate this approach in $\textit{TextArena}$ and release $\textit{Hack-Verifiable TextArena}$, a testbed in which reward hacking can be measured reliably. Using this benchmark, we analyze reward hacking behavior across language models in diverse environments and settings. We open source the code at https://github.com/MajoRoth/hack-verifiable-environments/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种嵌入可验证奖励黑客机会的评估范式，实现大规模奖励黑客行为的确定性测量。
light_analysis.motivation: 奖励黑客是智能体与人类意图对齐的关键挑战，现有方法主要事后分析轨迹，缺乏可靠的大规模测量手段。本文旨在通过设计可验证的环境，使奖励黑客行为能被自动检测，从而系统性地评估智能体是否以及如何利用这些漏洞。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出“可验证黑客环境”评估范式，将可检测的奖励黑客机会直接嵌入环境，利用设计保证其可验证性。基于此构建 Hack-Verifiable TextArena 测试平台，通过确定性自动化方法测量语言模型在不同环境中的奖励黑客行为，并开源代码。
light_analysis.result: 在 Hack-Verifiable TextArena 上对多种语言模型进行测试，结果表明该范式能可靠测量奖励黑客行为，并揭示不同模型和环境下奖励黑客发生率和策略差异。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种可扩展的奖励黑客评估方法，为对齐研究提供了标准化基准。该工作有助于理解智能体在复杂环境中偏离人类意图的机制，未来可拓展至更多环境与模型类型。局限性在于当前仅针对文本环境。

title: Draw2Think: Harnessing Geometry Reasoning through Constraint Engine Interaction
abstract: Vision-language models solve geometry problems with rising accuracy, yet their intermediate states remain latent and unverifiable: a relation expressed in textual reasoning or drawing code carries no guarantee that a constraint-satisfying configuration realizes it. We observe that existing externalization methods based on rendered pixels or one-shot scripts fail to provide exact, per-action geometric guarantees. Enforcing geometric relations by algebraic definition closes this gap: the workspace becomes a constraint-checked evolving canvas. We present Draw2Think, a framework that recasts geometric reasoning from latent spatial inference into agentic interaction with the GeoGebra constraint engine. In a Propose-Draw-Verify loop, Draw2Think externalizes hypotheses onto an executable canvas, measures exact geometric quantities, and feeds structured observations back to the model, so subsequent reasoning proceeds from checked canvas state grounded by the shared workspace. This externalization makes two properties separately auditable: model-level Construction Fidelity (whether the canvas realizes the intended configuration) and engine-level Measurement Faithfulness (exact values and relations from canvas constraints). Across construction, outcome, and rendering evaluations, Draw2Think builds canvases that pass 95.9% predicate-level and 84.0% strict problem-level construction checks on GeoGoal, improves outcome accuracy by up to 4.1%/16.4% on planar/solid benchmarks, and attains 68.2%/90.5% strict/relaxed rendering scores on GenExam-math. Project page is available at https://draw2think.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: Draw2Think通过约束引擎交互实现可验证的几何推理，将隐式推理转化为可审计的代理循环。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在几何推理中缺乏可验证的中间状态，模型输出的文本推理或绘图代码无法保证存在满足约束的真实配置。基于像素渲染或一次性脚本的外部化方法无法提供精确的每动作几何保证，导致推理过程不可审计且结果不可靠。
light_analysis.method: 提出Draw2Think框架，采用Propose-Draw-Verify循环与GeoGebra约束引擎交互。模型提出假设后，将几何关系编码为约束画布，引擎执行代数检查并返回精确测量值。框架分离审计两个维度：构造保真度（画布是否实现预期配置）和测量忠实度（约束导出的精确值和关系）。
light_analysis.result: 在GeoGoal数据集上，画布通过95.9%谓词级和84.0%严格问题级构造检查；平面/立体基准结果准确率分别提升4.1%/16.4%；GenExam-math上严格/宽松渲染分数达68.2%/90.5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: Draw2Think通过约束引擎交互提供可验证的几何推理，提升了模型的可靠性和透明度。该方法将推理过程外化，使每一步可审计，适用于需要精确几何推理的场景。未来可扩展到其他需要可验证空间推理的领域。

title: VBFDD-Agent for Electric Vehicle Battery Fault Detection and Diagnosis: Descriptive Text Modeling of Battery Digital Signals
abstract: With the rapid proliferation of electric vehicles, the safety and reliability of lithium-ion batteries have become critical concerns. Effective anomaly detection is essential for ensuring safe battery operation. However, as battery systems and operating scenarios become increasingly complex, battery fault diagnosis and maintenance require stronger cross-domain adaptability and human-AI collaboration. Traditional fault detection and diagnosis methods are usually designed for specific scenarios and predefined workflows, making them less effective in complex real-world applications.   To address the scarcity of open-source battery fault report corpora and the lack of unified maintenance knowledge representation, this study proposes a descriptive text modeling approach for battery signal reports. Monitoring signals, statistical features, anomaly records, and state assessment results are transformed into structured and readable natural language descriptions, forming a language corpus for battery health diagnosis and maintenance.   Based on this corpus, we propose VBFDD-Agent, a vehicle battery fault detection and diagnosis agent for automotive-grade battery systems. VBFDD-Agent integrates descriptive battery-state texts, historical case retrieval, local maintenance manuals, and large language model reasoning to generate structured diagnostic results and maintenance recommendations. Experiments show that the proposed framework can accurately perform anomaly monitoring based on descriptive textual representations and provide flexible, efficient, and actionable maintenance suggestions. Expert evaluation further confirms the practical value of the generated recommendations. Overall, VBFDD-Agent extends traditional battery diagnosis from label prediction to interpretable and maintenance-oriented decision support.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过描述性文本建模电池数字信号，构建VBFDD-Agent，利用大语言模型推理实现可解释的电池故障诊断与维护建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着电动汽车普及，锂离子电池安全性和可靠性成为关键。电池系统和运行场景日益复杂，传统故障检测方法针对特定场景和预定流程，在真实应用中效果不佳。同时，缺乏开源电池故障报告语料库和统一维护知识表示。亟需一种跨域适应性强、支持人机协作的电池诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出描述性文本建模方法，将电池监测信号、统计特征、异常记录和状态评估结果转化为结构化的自然语言描述，构建电池健康诊断语料库。基于此，开发VBFDD-Agent，集成描述性电池状态文本、历史案例检索、本地维修手册和大语言模型推理，生成结构化诊断结果和维修建议。利用LLM的推理能力实现灵活诊断。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，VBFDD-Agent能够基于描述性文本表示准确进行异常监测，并提供灵活、高效、可操作的维护建议。专家评估进一步确认了生成建议的实用价值。该方法将传统电池诊断从标签预测扩展为可解释的、面向维护的决策支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: VBFDD-Agent通过文本建模和大模型推理，增强了电池故障诊断的跨域适应性和人机协作能力，为电池安全维护提供了可解释的决策支持。该研究填补了开源电池故障报告语料库的空白，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用意义。未来工作可进一步优化文本建模和推理效率。

title: Distribution-Aware Reward: Reinforcement Learning over Predictive Distributions for LLM Regression
abstract: Large language models can predict real-valued quantities from heterogeneous inputs such as text, code, and molecular strings, but most training objectives score each decoded floating-point number independently, improving point estimates without ensuring calibrated predictive distributions. This limits applications requiring candidate ranking or uncertainty estimation. We introduce Distribution-Aware Reward, an on-policy reinforcement learning objective whose main contribution is to train language models to produce better predictive distributions for regression tasks, rather than only optimizing individual decoded outputs against scalar targets. Our method treats multiple decoded samples as an empirical predictive distribution, evaluates it with the Continuous Ranked Probability Score, and assigns leave-one-out credit based on each rollout's marginal contribution to distribution quality, rewarding predictions that are both accurate and appropriately dispersed. We evaluate our method on a controlled Gaussian-mixture task, code performance prediction, and molecular property prediction from SMILES strings. Across tasks, our method improves over supervised fine-tuning and pointwise reinforcement learning baselines, with strong rank-correlation gains, including a 6-point Spearman improvement on KBSS. On MoleculeNet, it uses only SMILES strings yet remains competitive with strong graph-based and 3D molecular models. Further analyses show that our method mitigates rollout diversity collapse and improves uncertainty diagnostics, suggesting that directly optimizing predictive distributions makes language model regression more robust and better calibrated.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Distribution-Aware Reward，一种基于在线强化学习的目标函数，训练语言模型在回归任务上生成校准的预测分布，而非仅优化单点估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型可从异构输入预测实值量，但多数训练目标独立评分每个解码浮点数，改进点估计而不确保校准的预测分布。这限制了需要候选排序或不确定性估计的应用。现有方法忽略分布质量，导致预测不鲁棒、校准差。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出Distribution-Aware Reward，一种在线强化学习目标。将多个解码样本视为经验预测分布，用连续排名概率评分（CRPS）评估，并基于每个rollout对分布质量的边际贡献分配留一法信用，奖励既准确又适当分散的预测。在受控高斯混合任务、代码性能预测和分子性质预测上评估。
light_analysis.result: 该方法优于监督微调和点式强化学习基线，Spearman相关系数提升高达6点（KBSS）。在MoleculeNet上，仅用SMILES字符串即与强图基和3D分子模型竞争。缓解了rollout多样性崩溃，改进了不确定性诊断。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了直接优化预测分布使语言模型回归更鲁棒、校准更好。主要贡献是Distribution-Aware Reward目标。学术价值在于引入强化学习优化分布而非点估计，实际应用价值在于提高候选排序和不确定性估计。未来可探索更复杂的分布评估指标。

title: STAR-IOD: Scale-decoupled Topology Alignment with Pseudo-label Refinement for Remote Sensing Incremental Object Detection
abstract: Remote sensing imagery typically arrives in the form of continuous data streams. Traditional detectors often forget previously learned categories when learning new ones; therefore, research on Remote Sensing Incremental Object Detection (RS-IOD) is of great significance. However, existing methods largely overlook the intra-class scale variations prevalent in remote sensing scenes, which undermines the effectiveness of knowledge transfer and old knowledge preservation. Moreover, RS-IOD also suffers from missing annotations, which cause the model to misclassify old-class instances as background. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework, STAR-IOD. First, we introduce a Subspace-decoupled Topology Distillation (STD) module to transfer structural knowledge, explicitly aligning inter-class topological relationships and mitigating intra-class representation discrepancies induced by scale shifts. Furthermore, we introduce the Clustering-driven Pseudo-label Generator (CPG), a plug-and-play module that leverages K-Means clustering to dynamically identify class-specific thresholds, thereby guaranteeing an accurate distinction between true positive targets and background noise and alleviating the issue of missing annotations for old classes. We also constructed two Remote Sensing Incremental Object Detection datasets, DIOR-IOD and DOTA-IOD to facilitate research on RS-IOD. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches by 1.7% and 2.1% mAP on DIOR-IOD and DOTA-IOD, respectively, effectively alleviating catastrophic forgetting while preserving strong detection performance on both base and novel classes. The code and dataset are released at: https://github.com/zyt95579/STAR-IOD.
comment: STAR-IOD was accepted by ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAR-IOD框架，通过子空间解耦拓扑蒸馏和聚类驱动伪标签生成，解决遥感增量目标检测中的尺度变化和缺失标注问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 遥感图像通常以连续数据流形式出现，传统检测器在学习新类别时会遗忘旧类别，因此遥感增量目标检测（RS-IOD）研究具有重要意义。然而，现有方法忽略了遥感场景中普遍存在的类内尺度变化，这削弱了知识迁移和旧知识保留的效果。此外，RS-IOD还面临缺失标注问题，导致模型将旧类实例误分类为背景。这些问题严重限制了模型在增量学习中的性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出STAR-IOD框架，包含两个核心模块：（1）子空间解耦拓扑蒸馏（STD）模块，通过显式对齐类间拓扑关系并缓解尺度变化引起的类内表示差异，实现结构知识迁移；（2）聚类驱动伪标签生成器（CPG），利用K-Means聚类动态识别类别特定阈值，准确区分真阳性目标和背景噪声，缓解旧类缺失标注问题。还构建了DIOR-IOD和DOTA-IOD两个遥感增量目标检测数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在DIOR-IOD和DOTA-IOD数据集上，STAR-IOD的mAP分别比当前最优方法高1.7%和2.1%，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，同时在基类和新类上均保持强检测性能。实验充分验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAR-IOD通过尺度解耦拓扑对齐和伪标签精炼，显著提升了遥感增量目标检测的性能，克服了类内尺度变异和缺失标注两大挑战。该工作为遥感连续数据流场景下的目标检测提供了新思路，代码和数据集已开源，有助于推动该领域研究。未来可探索更复杂的拓扑结构和聚类策略。

title: Resolving Long-Tail Ambiguity in Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Segmentation with Language Priors
abstract: Existing approaches for unsupervised 3D point cloud segmentation predominantly rely on a purely visual similarity-based learning-by-clustering paradigm, which suffers from a fundamental limitation: long-tail ambiguity. In such a paradigm, features of minor classes are consistently absorbed by dominant clusters, leading to severely imbalanced predictions. To address this issue, we propose LangTail, a language-guided hierarchical learning framework that leverages the balanced world knowledge encoded in language models to mitigate long-tail ambiguity in unsupervised 3D segmentation. The key idea is to establish multi-level associations between language-derived semantic priors and visually underrepresented minor classes, thereby compensating for the biased attention of purely visual clustering toward dominant classes. Specifically, LangTail first constructs an entity-level semantic prior from language models, capturing balanced and fine-grained world knowledge across categories. These priors are injected into a hierarchical clustering framework via contrastive alignment. This guides multi-granularity semantic structure formation and prevents minor classes from being absorbed by dominant clusters, yielding more discriminative representations for underrepresented categories. Extensive experiments on ScanNet-v2, S3DIS, and nuScenes demonstrate that LangTail consistently outperforms existing methods by significant margins, \ie, +13.5, +12.9, and +8.9 mIoU, respectively. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of language priors in improving the representation of minority classes in 3D point clouds. The code will be released at: https://github.com/Whisky0129/langtail_official.
comment: In submission. The code will be released at: https://github.com/Whisky0129/langtail_official

light_analysis.overview: 提出LangTail框架，利用语言先验解决无监督三维点云分割中的长尾歧义问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无监督三维点云分割方法基于纯视觉相似性的聚类学习范式，存在长尾歧义问题：次要类别的特征被主导聚类吸收，导致预测严重不平衡。这个问题重要，因为现实场景中类别分布长尾，现有方法对稀有小类表现差。语言模型蕴含平衡的世界知识，可为视觉聚类提供补偿，但如何有效融合语言先验与视觉特征仍是挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出LangTail语言引导的分层学习框架。首先，从语言模型构建实体级语义先验，捕获平衡且细粒度的类别知识。然后，通过对比对齐将这些先验注入层次聚类框架，形成多粒度语义结构，防止小类被主导聚类吸收。该方法无需标注数据，利用语言先验增强小类的判别性表示。实验在ScanNet-v2、S3DIS、nuScenes数据集上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在ScanNet-v2、S3DIS、nuScenes数据集上，LangTail分别超出现有方法13.5、12.9、8.9 mIoU，显著提升。这表明语言先验有效改善了三维点云中少数类别的表示，解决了长尾歧义问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: LangTail通过语言先验解决了无监督三维分割的长尾歧义，展示了语言知识在视觉聚类中的价值。学术上，提出了语言引导的分层聚类范式；应用上，可用于无标签场景的语义理解。未来可探索更细粒度的语言先验或扩展到其他3D任务。

title: Lowering the Barrier to IREX Participation: Open-Source Algorithms, Toolkit, and Benchmarking for Iris Recognition
abstract: This paper proposes two new open-source iris recognition algorithms, providing both Python and IREX-compliant C++ implementations to be submitted to the official IREX X program. This work has two primary goals: (a) to conduct the first-ever assessment of open-source iris recognition solutions according to IREX testing protocols, and (b) to offer a model C++ submission that significantly facilitates the entry of other teams' open-source methods into the IREX evaluation. The new methods consist of two Neural Networks trained with: (i) Triplet loss with Batch-Hard Triplet mining (TripletIris), and (ii) ArcFace loss (ArcIris). The paper also provides open-source IREX-compliant C++ implementations of two existing methods: (a) an iris image filtering-based algorithm utilizing human saliency-driven kernels (HDBIF), and (b) a human-interpretable algorithm for detecting and comparing Fuchs' crypts (CRYPTS). Except for CRYPTS, which faced timing constraints during 1:N search, these methods have undergone the official IREX X evaluation and have also been assessed using several popular academic benchmarks: Quality-Face/Iris Research Ensemble, Warsaw-Biobase Post-Mortem Iris, CASIA-Iris-Thousand-V4, CASIA-Iris-Lamp-V4, IIT Delhi Iris Database, IIITD Contact Lens Iris Database, NDIris3D, and Notre Dame Variable Iris Image Quality Release 2. Finally, this paper also provides open-source models for iris segmentation and circle estimation that can be incorporated into any new iris recognition method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两个基于深度学习的开源虹膜识别算法，并提供IREX标准实现，首次评估开源方案在官方测试协议下的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 虹膜识别是生物特征识别的重要技术，但现有开源方案缺乏符合IREX官方测试协议的标准实现，导致参与IREX评估门槛高。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过提供开源算法和模型实现，降低其他团队参与IREX评估的难度，并首次对开源虹膜识别方案进行IREX协议下的全面评估。
light_analysis.method: 提出TripletIris（基于Triplet loss和Batch-Hard挖掘）和ArcIris（基于ArcFace loss）两种神经网络算法，同时提供HDBIF（基于人类显著性驱动核的滤波算法）和CRYPTS（可解释的Fuchs隐窝检测算法）的IREX兼容C++实现。算法在多个公开数据集（如CASIA-Iris、IIT Delhi等）上训练和评估，并开源了虹膜分割和圆估计模型。
light_analysis.result: 除CRYPTS因1:N搜索时间限制外，其他方法均通过官方IREX X评估，并在学术基准上测试，包括Quality-Face/Iris Research Ensemble、Warsaw-Biobase Post-Mortem Iris等多个数据集。具体性能指标摘要未提供，但确认了方法的有效性。与基线方法的对比结果未详细说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次验证了开源虹膜识别算法在IREX协议下的性能，并提供了可复用的C++实现和模型，显著降低了参与官方评估的门槛。开源工具包和基准测试有助于推动虹膜识别领域的研究进展，未来可扩展到更多算法和评估协议。

title: Sketch2MinSurf: Vision-Language Guided Generation of Editable Minimal Surfaces from Hand-Drawn Sketches
abstract: Converting hand-drawn sketches into structured 3D geometries remains challenging due to the difficulty of representing non-Euclidean surfaces and maintaining topological consistency. Existing generative models such as GANs, NeRFs, and diffusion architectures often fail to produce editable manifolds directly usable in downstream design workflows. We present Sketch2MinSurf, a hybrid vision-language and geometric optimization framework that integrates vision-language guidance with minimal-surface theory to generate smooth and editable 3D surfaces from hand-drawn sketches. The core of our approach is a spatial-topological encoding that represents geometry as tuples of node coordinates and real/virtual edge skeletons, enabling stable topological control during generation. We further introduce the Sketch2MinSurf Structural Loss (S2MS-Loss), a reward-modulated objective that jointly constrains geometric reconstruction and topological coherence. On a test set of 100 sketches, Sketch2MinSurf achieves a topological similarity score of 0.844, outperforming existing sketch-to-shape baselines. The generated manifolds are directly editable and free from non-manifold artifacts. A public art installation at a university showcases the method's potential for human-intent-driven 3D form generation. The dataset and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Sketch2MinSurf/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Sketch2MinSurf框架，结合视觉语言引导与最小曲面理论，从手绘草图生成可编辑的3D流形曲面。
light_analysis.motivation: 手绘草图转化为结构化3D几何面临非欧几里得曲面表示和拓扑一致性难题。现有GAN、NeRF、扩散模型生成的流形不可编辑，无法直接用于下游设计。需要一种既能保持拓扑正确性又能产生可编辑曲面的方法，以支持人类意图驱动的3D建模。
light_analysis.method: 核心是空间拓扑编码，将几何表示为节点坐标和真实/虚拟边骨架的元组，实现稳定拓扑控制。引入Sketch2MinSurf结构损失（S2MS-Loss），一种奖励调制目标，联合约束几何重建和拓扑一致性。框架整合视觉语言模型与最小曲面理论，优化生成平滑可编辑的曲面。数据集包括100个草图。
light_analysis.result: 在100个草图的测试集上，Sketch2MinSurf的拓扑相似度得分达0.844，优于现有草图到形状基线。生成的流形可直接编辑且无非流形伪影。大学公共艺术装置验证了其在实际人类意图驱动3D生成中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Sketch2MinSurf成功将手绘草图转化为可编辑的3D流形，解决了拓扑一致性和可编辑性问题。学术上融合视觉语言与最小曲面理论，实践上为交互式3D设计提供新工具。未来可扩展到更复杂的拓扑结构或实时交互场景。

title: Deep Attention Reweighting: Post-Hoc Attention-Based Feature Aggregation in CNNs for Disentangling Core and Spurious Features under Spurious Correlations
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) often exploit spurious correlations in datasets, learning superficially predictive yet causally irrelevant features, leading to poor generalization and fairness issues. Deep Feature Reweighting (DFR) is a post-hoc technique that reduces a trained model's reliance on spurious correlations by retraining its classification head on a target dataset. However, we show that DFR is fundamentally constrained by operating on entangled features, limiting its ability to amplify the core features while simultaneously suppressing the spurious ones. We trace this entanglement to the ubiquitous Global Average Pooling (GAP) layer, which indiscriminately collapses spatially distinct core and spurious features into a single representation. To address this, we propose Deep Attention Reweighting (DAR), a post-hoc attention-based aggregation module that replaces GAP and is retrained jointly with the classification head. DAR computes an adaptive weighting of spatial locations across feature maps, enabling selective suppression of spurious features before the collapse into entangled features. Across various datasets, metrics, and ablations, DAR consistently outperforms DFR, demonstrating that our attention-based aggregation mitigates GAP-induced entanglement and reduces spurious reliance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Deep Attention Reweighting模块，通过自适应空间注意力聚合替代全局平均池化，消除特征纠缠，减少CNN对虚假相关性的依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: CNN常利用数据集中的虚假相关性，学习表面预测性但因果无关的特征，导致泛化性差和公平性问题。现有后处理方法Deep Feature Reweighting通过重训练分类头减少虚假依赖，但受限于特征纠缠问题，核心特征和虚假特征在全局平均池化层被无差别压缩为单一表示，难以同时增强核心特征并抑制虚假特征。
light_analysis.method: 提出Deep Attention Reweighting模块，作为后处理注意力聚合模块替代全局平均池化，与分类头联合重训练。该模块计算特征图空间位置的自适应权重，在特征被压缩为纠缠表示之前选择性抑制虚假特征。模块可插入任何CNN的倒数第二层，利用注意力机制区分核心和虚假特征的空间分布。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和指标上，DAR一致优于DFR。实验表明，基于注意力的聚合减轻了GAP导致的特征纠缠，有效降低模型对虚假相关性的依赖。具体性能提升数值需参考原文，摘要未明确说明具体指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: DAR通过注意力聚合模块解决特征纠缠问题，提升模型在存在虚假相关性下的鲁棒性和公平性。该后处理方法无需重新训练整个网络，计算开销小，实用价值高。未来可探索更复杂的注意力机制或与因果推断结合。

title: TASTE: A Designer-Annotated Multi-Dimensional Preference Dataset for AI-Generated Graphic Design
abstract: Text-to-image models produce graphic design at production scale, but their supervision comes from photo-style preference data with a single overall verdict per comparison. Designers evaluate along several distinct axes, including typography, visual hierarchy, color harmony, layout, and brief fidelity, and a single label collapses them. We release TASTE (Typography, Aesthetics, Spatial, Tone, Etc.): ten professional designers ranked outputs from four current text-to-image models on nine criteria across two disjoint cohorts, yielding 1,600 ratings per criterion plus per-image hallucination flags on the holistic-preference cohorts. We pair the dataset with three contributions. First, a criterion-agnostic signal test framework, using Kendall's tau, majority probability, and Condorcet cycles against exact iid-uniform nulls at p = 4 and R = 5, places designer agreement on graphic design between food and movie preferences and photo-style image quality, with every TASTE criterion rejecting the random-rater null. Second, no pre-trained system in our benchmark, including six open-weight VLM judges from 3B to 33B parameters and three dedicated T2I scorers, HPSv2.1, PickScore-v1, and LAION-Aesthetic-V2, exceeds 0.55 macro agreement with the 5-designer majority; VLM judges trade off position bias against content sensitivity, so scaling moves along this frontier without improving accuracy. Third, a small pairwise-difference head trained on TASTE reaches 0.611, closing roughly half the gap to the 0.741 single-rater ceiling.

light_analysis.overview: 发布设计师标注的多维图形设计偏好数据集TASTE，揭示AI生成设计的评估维度，并提出改进自动评分的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型依赖照片风格的单一总体偏好标签，无法捕捉设计师在排版、视觉层次、色彩协调、布局和简报忠实度等多维度的精细评估。这种单一标签忽略了图形设计的专业评价标准，导致AI生成设计难以满足实际设计需求。因此，需要一个多维度、专业标注的偏好数据集来推动AI图形设计的评估和改进。
light_analysis.method: TASTE数据集由十位专业设计师对四个文本到图像模型（未明确名称）的输出在九个标准上评分，每个标准1600个评分，并包含幻觉标记。贡献一：提出标准无关的信号测试框架，使用Kendall's tau、多数概率和Condorcet循环，验证设计师一致性。贡献二：评测六种开放式VLM（3B-33B参数）和三种专用T2I评分器（HPSv2.1、PickScore-v1、LAION-Aesthetic-V2），发现其与设计师多数的宏观一致性不超过0.55。贡献三：训练一个小型成对差异头，达到0.611的宏观一致性。
light_analysis.result: 设计师一致性在图形设计上介于食物/电影偏好和照片风格图像质量之间，所有TASTE标准拒绝随机评分零假设。预训练系统最高宏观一致性仅为0.55（VLM评委存在位置偏差与内容敏感性的权衡）。小型成对差异头在TASTE上训练后达到0.611，接近单评人上限0.741，表明专用模型可有效提升自动评分与设计师判断的一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TASTE数据集为AI图形设计的多维评估提供了基准，揭示了现有自动评分系统的不足。小型成对差异头证明了利用专业标注数据可显著改善自动评分。未来可扩展至更多模型和标准，或探索结合VLM和专用头的混合方法。该数据集和框架有助于推动生成式设计工具更符合专业设计标准。

title: Distributional Alignment as a Criterion for Designing Task Vectors in In-Context Learning
abstract: In-context learning (ICL) allows large language models (LLMs) to adapt to new tasks through demonstrations, yet it suffers from escalating inference costs as context length increases. While task vectors offer a promising alternative by compressing demonstrations into compact hidden-state representations, their quality has been evaluated only through downstream task accuracy. This indirect criterion provides limited insight into how to design more effective task vector extraction methods. In this paper, we posit that inference using task vectors should align their predictive distribution with that of ICL. To quantify this, we introduce $d_{\text{NTP}}$, a metric that measures the discrepancy in next-token probabilities between task vector-based and ICL-based inference. Our empirical analysis reveals that $d_{\text{NTP}}$ serves as a performance proxy, exhibiting a strong negative correlation with downstream accuracy. Motivated by this, we develop Linear Task Vector (LTV), a method designed to minimize $d_{\text{NTP}}$ via a closed-form linear mapping that estimates demonstration effects through regression. Across eight classification benchmarks and five LLMs, LTV consistently outperforms existing task vector baselines, improving average accuracy by 9.2\% while reducing inference latency. We further show that LTV outperforms the baselines on regression tasks. Moreover, we investigate the transferability of LTV across different model scales; an aspect that has remained nascent in task vector research. Specifically, we empirically show that task vectors from a larger model can enhance a smaller model's performance by 6.4\%, suggesting a new utility for extracted task representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布对齐度量d_NTP作为设计任务向量的准则，并基于此开发线性任务向量（LTV），在上下文学习中更有效地压缩演示并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文学习（ICL）使大语言模型通过演示适应新任务，但上下文增长导致推理成本上升。任务向量通过压缩演示为隐状态表征提供了替代方案，然而其质量仅由下游准确率间接评估，缺乏指导设计更有效提取方法的依据。本文认为任务向量推理应与ICL的预测分布对齐，并开发度量指标来优化设计。
light_analysis.method: 引入d_NTP度量任务向量推理与ICL推理的下一令牌概率差异，发现其与下游准确率强负相关。据此提出线性任务向量（LTV），通过闭式线性映射最小化d_NTP，用回归估计演示效应。在八个分类基准和五个LLM上实验，并扩展至回归任务与跨模型迁移。
light_analysis.result: LTV一致优于现有任务向量方法，平均准确率提升9.2%，同时降低推理延迟。在回归任务上也优于基线。跨规模迁移中，大模型任务向量可提升小模型性能6.4%，展示了任务向量的可迁移性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出基于分布对齐的准则和LTV方法，有效压缩演示并提升ICL性能，降低推理成本。发现任务向量跨模型规模的迁移能力，为任务向量研究开辟新方向。未来可探索更复杂的对齐度量与迁移机制。

title: MTR-Suite: A Framework for Evaluating and Synthesizing Conversational Retrieval Benchmarks
abstract: Accurate evaluation of conversational retrieval is pivotal for advancing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. However, existing conversational retrieval benchmarks suffer from costly, sparse human annotation or rigid, unnatural automated heuristics. To address these challenges, we introduce MTR-Suite, a unified framework for auditing, synthesizing, and benchmarking retrieval. It features: (1) MTR-Eval, an LLM-based auditor quantifying alignment gaps in previous benchmarks; (2) MTR-Pipeline, a multi-agent system using greedy traversal clustering to generate high-fidelity dialogues at 1/400th human cost; and (3) MTR-Bench, a rigorous general-domain benchmark. MTR-Bench mimics production-style challenges (hard topic switching, verbosity), offering superior discriminative power. We make our code and data publicly available to facilitate future research at https://github.com/rangehow/mtr-suite.
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 (main conference). 28 pages. Code and data: https://github.com/rangehow/mtr-suite

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架MTR-Suite，用于审计、合成和基准测试对话检索，显著降低人工成本并提升基准质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对话检索基准存在两大问题：昂贵且稀疏的人工标注导致数据量不足，或使用僵硬、不自然的自动化启发式方法，无法准确反映真实场景。这限制了检索增强生成系统的评估与优化。因此需要一种高效、自然且具有区分力的基准构建方法，MTR-Suite应运而生。
light_analysis.method: MTR-Suite包含三个核心组件：MTR-Eval利用LLM审计现有基准的对齐缺口；MTR-Pipeline基于多智能体系统，采用贪心遍历聚类算法生成高保真对话，成本仅为人工的1/400；MTR-Bench则构建了通用领域的严格基准，模拟生产环境中的硬话题切换和冗长性等挑战。
light_analysis.result: MTR-Bench相比现有基准展现出更强的区分能力，能够有效辨别不同检索模型的性能差异。其生成对话以极低代价实现了高保真度，实验表明在话题切换和响应自然性等指标上优于传统方法，具体数据在论文中详细展示。
light_analysis.conclusion: MTR-Suite提供了一套完整的评估与合成工具，显著降低了对话检索基准的构建成本，同时提升了基准的真实性和区分度。代码与数据已开源，有助于推动RAG系统评估的标准化。未来可扩展至多语言或跨领域场景。

title: Early High-Frequency Injection for Geometry-Sensitive OOD Detection
abstract: Post-hoc OOD detectors score logits or features after training, so their success depends on the geometry already encoded in the representation. We revisit this assumption through a band-wise MMD^2 analysis across CE, SimCLR, SupCon, and the OOD-oriented representation method PALM. In our diagnostic, low-frequency input bands induce weaker ID/OOD feature discrepancy, whereas higher-frequency bands tend to provide stronger separability. This observation motivates EIHF, an input-side intervention that exposes high-frequency evidence before the first convolution without changing the training objective. EIHF is strongest for geometry-sensitive OOD detection: under matched training and scoring settings, it reshapes class-conditional feature geometry and reduces ID/OOD Mahalanobis score overlap. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet-100 show gains on CIFAR-100 and the best average FPR95 with second-best average AUROC on ImageNet-100, while also revealing a limitation on the scene-centric Places shift. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EIHF.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EIHF，一种在第一个卷积前注入高频信息的输入侧干预方法，在不改变训练目标的情况下增强几何敏感的OOD检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 后验OOD检测器依赖表示中编码的几何形状，但低频波段导致ID/OOD特征差异较弱，而高频波段提供更强分离性。现有方法未充分利用高频信息，因此需要一种简单有效的输入侧干预来暴露高频证据。
light_analysis.method: 通过带MMD²分析发现高频波段分离性更强，提出EIHF方法：在输入通过第一个卷积层之前，将高频成分注入原始输入。该方法不改变训练目标，通过重塑类条件特征几何，减少ID和OOD的马氏距离分数重叠，适用于多种训练和评分设置。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-100上获得性能提升，在ImageNet-100上取得最佳平均FPR95和第二佳平均AUROC。但在场景中心数据集Places上存在局限性，表明该方法对特定分布偏移效果有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: EIHF揭示了高频信息在几何敏感OOD检测中的关键作用，提供了一种轻量级的输入干预策略。未来可探索更灵活的高频注入方式或结合其他OOD判别线索，以克服场景中心偏移的局限。

title: GAMR: Geometric-Aware Manifold Regularization with Virtual Outlier Synthesis for Learning with Noisy Labels
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) experience significant performance degradation when processing noisy labels, primarily due to overfitting on mislabeled data. Current mainstream approaches attempt to mitigate this issue by passively filtering clean samples during training. However, simple sample filtering within feature spaces degraded by noise struggles to distinguish between challenging samples and noisy samples, creating a bottleneck for model performance. We highlight for the first time the fundamental importance of actively reshaping feature space geometry for learning from noisy data. We propose a novel Geometry-aware Manifold Regularization Paradigm whose core idea is to explicitly construct energy barriers between data manifolds by actively synthesizing virtual outlier samples. By imposing geometric constraints that promote intra-class compactness and inter-class separation, this approach enhances the discriminability between hard and noisy samples, leading to the learning of more robust representations. Our regularization mechanism exhibits high universality, with effectiveness independent of any prior assumptions about noise patterns. It can be integrated as a standalone mechanism into existing sample selection frameworks, providing stronger robustness against diverse noisy environments. Experiments demonstrate that our paradigm achieves performance surpassing current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on multiple benchmarks, including CIFAR-10, with particularly pronounced advantages under more challenging asymmetric noise conditions. Furthermore, this paradigm significantly enhances the model's capability in Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection, ensuring superior reliability and safety for deployment in open-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知流形正则化范式，通过主动合成虚拟异常样本构建能量壁垒，增强特征空间判别性，提升噪声标签学习鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络在处理噪声标签时性能严重下降，主要原因是过拟合错误标记数据。现有主流方法被动过滤干净样本，但在噪声退化的特征空间中难以区分困难样本和噪声样本，成为性能瓶颈。本文首次强调主动重塑特征空间几何结构对噪声学习的重要性，旨在解决现有方法判别性不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是通过主动合成虚拟异常样本来显式构建数据流形间的能量壁垒，施加促进类内紧凑和类间分离的几何约束。该方法不依赖任何噪声模式的先验假设，具有高度通用性，可作为独立机制集成到现有样本选择框架中。实验在CIFAR-10等基准上验证，在非对称噪声条件下优势尤其明显。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上（如CIFAR-10）超越当前最先进方法，尤其在更具挑战性的非对称噪声条件下表现突出。此外，该方法显著增强了模型在分布外（OOD）检测中的能力，确保在开放世界场景中部署的可靠性和安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次强调主动重塑特征空间几何对噪声学习的重要性，提出的几何感知流形正则化范式通过虚拟异常合成增强了模型鲁棒性，具有通用性和可集成性。该方法不仅提升了噪声标签下的分类性能，还改善了OOD检测能力，为实际部署提供安全保障。未来可探索更高效的虚拟样本合成策略。

title: Holistic Reliability Propagation: Decoupling Annotation and Prediction for Robust Noisy-Label
abstract: Learning with noisy labels in multimedia classification often combines external annotations and model predictions into a single reliability weight, even though the two sources can fail for different reasons. We instead estimate disentangled reliabilities: bilevel meta-learning produces two batch-normalized scalars per sample, alpha for the given label and beta for the pseudo-label, without constraining them to sum to one. Holistic Reliability Propagation (HRP) then routes them to different objectives, using reliability-aware Mixup with global gating on the input branch and beta-gated pseudo-label positives on the contrastive branch. On synthetic and real-world benchmarks, HRP improves average accuracy over strong baselines and remains competitive at the highest noise rates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Holistic Reliability Propagation (HRP)，解耦标注和预测的可靠性，以提升噪声标签学习鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多媒体分类中，噪声标签学习常将外部标注和模型预测合并为单一可靠性权重，但两者可能因不同原因失效。现有方法未区分其可靠性，导致在噪声比例高时性能不佳。本文旨在通过解耦标注和预测的可靠性，独立评估标签可信度，以提升模型对噪声标签的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: HRP 通过双层元学习为每个样本生成两个批归一化标量：alpha 用于给定标签，beta 用于伪标签，且不要求二者之和为1。采用可靠性感知的 Mixup（输入分支全局门控）和 beta 门控的对比分支伪标签正样本训练。该方法在合成和真实噪声数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实噪声基准上，HRP 相比强基线的平均准确率有提升，并在最高噪声率下保持竞争力。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称改进显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解耦标注和预测可靠性是处理噪声标签的有效策略，HRP 通过独立调控 alpha 和 beta 提升了鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的元学习策略或扩展到其他任务。局限性包括元学习的计算成本。

title: Memory-Efficient Partitioned DNN Inference on Resource-Constrained Android Crowds
abstract: Deploying large deep neural networks on memory-constrained mobile devices is a central challenge in edge ML. While compression, pruning, and quantization reduce per-parameter cost, transformer-based models remain too large for the 3.3-7.4 GB RAM envelope of commodity Android handsets. We present the DNN pipeline scheduling subsystem of CROWDio, which achieves practical ONNX inference across resource-constrained Android workers without model modification, by distributing memory pressure across devices via five mechanisms: JIT deferred partition loading, a single-partition-resident constraint, a 4-tier affinity scheduler, a zlib-compressed tensor transport, and a streaming 1:1 dependency model. Evaluated on DistilBERT (Sanh et al., 2019) (approximately 67 M parameters, SST-2) across five Android handsets over ten runs, our system holds peak per-device RSS to 43+-2 MB and limits battery draw to 50+-3 mAh per run, while streaming concurrency cuts batch latency 34% below barrier synchronisation.
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Machine Learning for the Global South

light_analysis.overview: 提出CROWDio系统的DNN管道调度子系统，通过分布式内存压力机制，在资源受限的安卓设备上实现无需修改模型的大模型推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署大型DNN到内存受限的移动设备是边缘ML的核心挑战。尽管压缩、剪枝和量化降低了每参数成本，但基于Transformer的模型对于3.3-7.4 GB RAM的商用安卓手机仍然过大。现有方法通常需要模型修改，而本系统旨在无需修改模型即可实现推理。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括五个机制：JIT延迟分区加载、单分区驻留约束、4层亲和调度器、zlib压缩张量传输和流式1:1依赖模型。这些机制将内存压力分布到多个设备上。评估使用DistilBERT（约67M参数，SST-2）在五台安卓手机上运行十次。
light_analysis.result: 峰值每设备常驻内存（RSS）保持在43±2 MB，每次运行的电池消耗为50±3 mAh，流式并发相比屏障同步将批处理延迟降低34%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统实现了高效推理，无需模型修改，适合资源受限的安卓集群。未来工作可扩展至更大模型或更多设备，并探索动态负载均衡。

title: AGPO: Adaptive Group Policy Optimization with Dual Statistical Feedback
abstract: Reinforcement learning improves LLM reasoning, but PPO/GRPO typically use fixed clipping and decoding temperature, which makes training brittle and tuning-heavy. We propose Adaptive Group Policy Optimization (AGPO), a critic-free refinement of GRPO that uses group-level statistics to control both update magnitude and exploration. AGPO uses a shared probe-derived statistical state to drive two controllers: (i) adaptive clipping, which sets the trust-region size from reward dispersion and skewness, probe vote entropy, policy entropy, and step-wise KL drift; and (ii) bidirectional adaptive temperature sampling, which heats or cools decoding around a base temperature according to centered uncertainty relative to a running baseline. On nine English and Chinese math/STEM benchmarks, Qwen2.5-14B trained with AGPO outperforms PPO/GRPO under the same generated-token budget, reaching 67.3% on GSM8K and 40.5% on MATH. Gains transfer to Llama-3-8B and Gemma-2-9B, and ablations confirm both modules are complementary. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/wandugu/paper_agpo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AGPO，通过自适应裁剪和温度采样改进GRPO，提升LLM推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有PPO/GRPO使用固定裁剪和采样温度，导致训练脆弱且调参繁琐。为缓解此问题，AGPO引入群体级统计反馈，动态调整更新幅度和探索策略，从而提升训练稳定性与性能。该研究针对LLM推理任务，旨在提高数学等复杂推理的准确性。
light_analysis.method: AGPO基于GRPO，去除了评论家网络，利用群体级统计（如奖励离散度、偏度、探针投票熵、策略熵、KL漂移）驱动两个控制器：自适应裁剪，根据统计量动态设置信任域大小；双向自适应温度采样，基于与运行基线的居中不确定性，围绕基础温度加热或冷却解码。在Qwen2.5-14B等模型上训练，使用数学/STEM基准测试。
light_analysis.result: 在9个中英文数学/STEM基准上，Qwen2.5-14B经AGPO训练，在GSM8K达67.3%，MATH达40.5%，均优于PPO/GRPO。该方法在Llama-3-8B和Gemma-2-9B上泛化良好，消融实验证实两个模块互补。代码已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: AGPO通过自适应机制简化了强化学习在LLM推理中的应用，无需评论家且减少调参。其在多项基准上取得显著提升，并跨模型泛化。未来可探索更复杂的统计量或将其扩展到其他任务。局限性可能在于对群体大小敏感，需进一步验证。

title: Robust Recommendation from Noisy Implicit Feedback: A GMM-Weighted Bayes-label Transition Matrix Framework
abstract: Learning from implicit feedback in recommender systems is fundamentally challenged by pervasive label noise. While conventional denoising approaches often discard noisy instances to ensure robustness, this strategy inevitably suffers from low data utilization. Alternative methods that employ a Bayes-label transition matrix (BLTM) can leverage all available data, but their estimates tend to be biased in practical recommendation scenarios. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a Robust GMM-weighted Bayes-label Transition Matrix framework (RGBT). Our solution utilizes a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to derive instance-specific reliability scores, which systematically calibrate the BLTM estimation to mitigate bias. Theoretical analysis confirms that our approach, by leveraging the BLTM framework with GMM calibration, simultaneously ensures full sample utilization, delivers consistent estimation, and critically, achieves a significant reduction in estimation variance. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world and synthetically flipped datasets demonstrate that RGBT not only utilizes noisy samples more effectively than mainstream reliable sample-based denoising methods, but also achieves significantly superior calibration capability of the transition matrix compared to state-of-the-art transition matrix-based denoising approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种GMM加权的贝叶斯标签转移矩阵框架，同时实现鲁棒去噪和全样本利用。
light_analysis.motivation: 推荐系统中隐式反馈常含标签噪声，现有去噪方法或丢弃噪声样本导致数据利用率低，或使用贝叶斯标签转移矩阵但估计有偏。需要一种既能充分利用所有样本又能提供无偏估计的方法。
light_analysis.method: 利用高斯混合模型（GMM）计算每个实例的可靠性分数，并用该分数校准贝叶斯标签转移矩阵（BLTM）的估计，从而减少偏差。理论分析表明该方法能实现全样本利用、一致估计并降低方差。
light_analysis.result: 在多个真实世界和合成翻转数据集上的实验表明，RGBT比主流基于可靠样本的去噪方法更有效利用噪声样本，且相比最先进的基于转移矩阵的去噪方法具有显著更优的校准能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RGBT框架通过GMM校准BLTM，在推荐系统中实现了鲁棒且高效的噪声处理，提高了数据利用率和估计准确性，为隐式反馈去噪提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的可靠性建模。

title: Decision-Path Patterns as Tree Reliability Signals: Path-based Adaptive Weighting for Random Forest Classification
abstract: Random forests aggregate tree votes by simple majority, treating all trees as equally informative. We observe that the topological pattern along each tree's root-to-leaf decision path -- where and how often the dominant class label flips along it -- carries a signal of tree reliability that is exploitable for per-sample reweighting. The naive use of this signal is structurally confounded with the predicted class, so we propose a class-conditional ratio weighting that guarantees zero expected class bias by construction. On 30 binary classification benchmarks under a shared-forest, shared-split protocol with 30 repeats, the proposed method is the only one among four compared schemes -- RF, weighted RF, KNORA-Eliminate, KNORA-Union -- to yield a statistically significant accuracy improvement over RF (Wilcoxon p = 0.018), while the three alternatives all fail to do so (p > 0.5). It is also the only scheme without majority-recall regressions, with minority-recall regressions limited to 3/30 datasets -- a one-sided loss to which classical dynamic ensemble selection methods are susceptible. The gain is robust across forest sizes from 100 to 1000 trees.
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure. Code and data: https://github.com/DavidParkYJ/dwarfp

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于决策路径类别翻转模式的树可靠性信号，用于随机森林的样本级自适应加权，实现无偏类条件比率加权。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统随机森林通过简单多数投票聚合树投票，假设所有树同等可靠。但实际中，不同树的决策路径拓扑模式（如主导类别沿路径翻转的位置和频率）隐含了树对特定样本的可靠性信息，现有方法未能有效利用此信号，且直接使用会与预测类别产生结构性混淆。
light_analysis.method: 观察到决策路径上主导类别翻转模式可作为树可靠性信号，但存在类别混淆问题，因此提出类条件比率加权方法，通过构造类条件比率权重保证零期望类别偏差。在30个二分类基准数据集上，采用共享森林和共享分裂协议，与RF、加权RF、KNORA-Eliminate、KNORA-Union四种方法对比。
light_analysis.result: 在所比较的四种方案中，仅本方法在统计上显著提升RF的准确率（Wilcoxon p=0.018），其余三种方法p值均>0.5。本方法无多数召回率下降，少数召回率下降仅出现在3/30数据集上，而经典动态集成选择方法易受此影响。该提升在100至1000棵树的森林规模下均稳健。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了决策路径模式可作为有效的树可靠性信号，类条件比率加权避免了类别偏差，在随机森林中实现了显著且可靠的准确率提升，特别在少数类召回率保持方面优于动态集成选择方法。未来可探索扩展到多分类或回归任务。

title: SAVER: Selective As-Needed Vision Evidence for Multimodal Information Extraction
abstract: Multimodal IE in social media is difficult because a post may attach multiple images that are weakly related, redundant, or even misleading with respect to the text. In this setting, always-on multimodal fusion wastes computation and can amplify spurious visual cues. The core challenge is to decide, for each candidate span or marked entity pair, whether vision should be consulted at all and, if so, which small subset of images provides trustworthy evidence.   We propose SAVER, a selective vision-as-needed framework for multimodal named entity recognition and multimodal relation extraction. SAVER uses a Conformal Groundability Gate (CGG) to estimate span-level visual groundability in MNER, derive pair-level activation in MRE from the two marked entities, and calibrate the activation threshold on a held-out split via a conformal-style procedure with Clopper--Pearson upper bounds. When activated, a submodular relevance--diversity selector chooses a compact evidence subset across images, which is then aggregated by a Set Transformer. An energy-inspired joint scoring head combines text, optional visual evidence, text--image consistency, and sparse routing for entity typing or relation classification.   Experiments show that SAVER consistently improves F1 over strong text-only and always-on multimodal baselines, while reducing AURC, increasing activation coverage at a fixed risk level, and lowering FLOPs and P90 latency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出选择性按需视觉框架SAVER，通过共形门控和子模选择，实现多模态信息抽取中高效可信的视觉证据利用。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体多模态信息抽取中，帖子常附多张与文本弱相关、冗余甚至误导的图像，现有始终融合的多模态方法浪费计算且放大虚假视觉线索。核心挑战在于决定是否以及如何选择可信图像子集，以提升效率与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: SAVER框架包括：Conformal Groundability Gate（CGG）估计跨度/实体对视觉可接地性，通过共形过程校准激活阈值；子模相关-多样性选择器选择紧凑证据子集；Set Transformer聚合视觉特征；能量联合评分头融合文本、视觉证据、一致性及稀疏路由，用于实体分类或关系分类。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态命名实体识别和关系抽取任务上，SAVER一致提升F1，优于强文本基线和始终多模态基线；降低AURC，在固定风险水平下提高激活覆盖率，并降低FLOPs和P90延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAVER通过选择性按需视觉证据，有效避免虚假线索和计算浪费，提升多模态IE性能与效率。未来可探索更灵活的激活策略和跨模态对齐方法。

title: SCRIBE: Diagnostic Evaluation and Rich Transcription Models for Indic ASR
abstract: Automatic speech recognition replaces typing only when correction costs less than manual entry, a threshold determined by error types, not counts: fixing a misrecognized domain term costs far more than inserting a comma. Word error rate (WER) fails on two fronts: it collapses distinct error categories into a single scalar, and it structurally penalizes agglutinative languages where valid sandhi merges inflate scores. We introduce SCRIBE, a diagnostic framework that provides categorical error decomposition into lexical, punctuation, numeral, and domain-entity rates through sandhi-tolerant alignment with domain vocabulary injection. Human validation confirms SCRIBE aligns with expert judgment where WER does not. We release SCRIBE, an LLM curation pipeline, benchmarks, and open-weight rich transcription models for Hindi, Malayalam, and Kannada.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCRIBE诊断框架，分解词错误率为类别错误率，并发布多语言ASR模型与基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 词错误率（WER）将不同错误类别合并为单一标量，且对黏着语结构惩罚不合理，如合法连音合并导致分数虚高。实际应用中，修复领域术语误识别比添加逗号成本更高。需要一种按类别（词汇、标点、数字、领域实体）分解错误率的诊断方法，以更准确反映语音识别系统的实用质量。
light_analysis.method: SCRIBE通过容忍连音的对齐和领域词汇注入，将词错误率分解为词汇、标点、数字和领域实体四类错误率。利用LLM构建数据管道生成基准测试集，并训练开放权重的丰富转录模型（包括文本规范化、标点恢复等）。在印地语、马拉雅拉姆语和卡纳达语上验证。
light_analysis.result: 人工验证显示SCRIBE对齐专家判断，而WER则不然。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，仅提及发布模型和基准。可推断SCRIBE在错误分类一致性和实用性上优于WER。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCRIBE提供了更细粒度的ASR评估框架，弥补WER在类别区分和黏着语处理上的缺陷。发布的模型和数据资源将促进印度语言语音识别研究。未来可能需要扩展到更多语言和错误类型。

title: Rethinking Cross-Layer Information Routing in Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have become a de facto backbone of modern visual generation, and nearly every major axis of their design -- tokenization, attention, conditioning, objectives, and latent autoencoders -- has been extensively revisited. The residual stream that governs how information accumulates across layers, however, has been directly inherited from the original Transformer.
