SLA quantifies label reliability by aggregating standardized fold-level validation losses across repeated cross-validation runs. This formulation generalizes discrete hard-counting schemes into a continuous estimator that captures both the frequency and magnitude of performance deviations, yielding interpretable and statistically stable noisiness scores. Experiments on a public fundus dataset demonstrate that SLA consistently outperforms the hard-counting baseline across all noise levels and converges substantially faster, especially under low noise ratios where subtle loss variations are informative. Samples with high SLA scores indicate potentially ambiguous or mislabeled cases, guiding efficient re-annotation and improving dataset reliability for any classification task.
comment: Accepted to IEEE ISBI 2026. The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种任务无关的噪声标签检测框架SLA，通过标准化损失聚合实现样本级标签可靠性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模医学影像数据集中，由于观察者间变异和模糊病例，噪声标签普遍存在。现有硬计数方案无法捕捉损失偏差的连续变化，且对低噪声比场景敏感。需要一种统计稳健、任务无关的方法，能同时反映标签错误的频率和严重程度，以提升数据集可靠性。
light_analysis.method: SLA框架通过聚合重复交叉验证中标准化后的折级验证损失来量化标签可靠性。它将离散的硬计数方案扩展为连续估计器，同时捕获性能偏差的频率和幅度，生成可解释且统计稳定的噪声分数。该方法无需特定任务假设，适用于任何分类任务。
light_analysis.result: 在公共眼底数据集上，SLA在所有噪声水平下均优于硬计数基线，尤其在低噪声比时收敛更快且效果显著。高SLA分数样本对应潜在模糊或错误标签，可指导高效重标注，提升数据集可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SLA提供了一种统计稳健、任务无关的噪声标签检测方法，通过连续损失聚合提高检测灵敏度和稳定性。其可解释的噪声分数有助于数据清洗和重标注，提升医学影像分类任务的可靠性。未来可扩展至多标签或回归任务。

title: DeformMaster: An Interactive Physics-Neural World Model for Deformable Objects from Videos
abstract: World models for deformable objects should recover not only geometry and appearance, but also underlying physical dynamics, interaction grounding, and material behavior. Learning such a model from real videos is challenging because deformable linear, planar, and volumetric objects evolve under high-dimensional deformation, noisy interactions, and complex material response. The model must therefore infer a physical state from visual observations, roll it forward under new interactions, and render the resulting dynamics with high visual fidelity. We present DeformMaster, a video-derived interactive physics-neural world model that turns real interaction videos into an online interactive model of deformable objects within a unified dynamics-and-appearance framework. DeformMaster preserves structured physical rollout while using a neural residual to compensate for unmodeled effects, grounds sparse hand motion as distributed compliant actuator for hand-continuum interaction, represents material response with spatially varying constitutive experts, and drives high-fidelity 4D appearance from the predicted physical evolution. Experiments on real-world deformable-object sequences demonstrate DeformMaster's ability to roll out future dynamics and render dynamic appearance, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while supporting novel action rollout, material-parameter variation, and dynamic novel-view synthesis. Project page: https://can-lee.github.io/deformmaster-web/

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeformMaster，一种从视频中学习的交互式物理-神经世界模型，统一可变形物体的动力学与外观。
light_analysis.motivation: 可变形物体（如线性、平面和体积对象）在真实视频中演化时，面临高维变形、嘈杂交互和复杂材料响应，现有世界模型难以同时恢复几何、外观、物理动力学、交互基础和材料行为。该研究旨在从真实交互视频中学习一个统一框架，实现在新交互下的物理状态推断、滚动和渲染。
light_analysis.method: DeformMaster采用结构化物理滚动结合神经残差补偿未建模效应，将稀疏手部运动建模为分布式顺从驱动器以实现手-连续体交互，利用空间变化的本构专家表示材料响应，通过预测的物理演化驱动高保真4D外观。模型从视频中学习，无需显式物理模拟器。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界可变形物体序列上，DeformMaster能够准确滚动未来动力学并渲染动态外观，优于最先进基线。支持新颖动作滚动、材料参数变化和动态新视图合成，实验验证了其在高维变形场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeformMaster首次实现了从真实视频中学习可变形物体的交互式物理-神经世界模型，统一动力学与外观。该模型具有实际应用价值，如机器人操作和虚拟现实，但可能依赖于训练数据的质量，未来可扩展至更复杂场景。

title: APCD: Adaptive Path-Contrastive Decoding for Reliable Large Language Model Generation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often suffer from hallucinations due to error accumulation in autoregressive decoding, where suboptimal early token choices misguide subsequent generation. Although multi-path decoding can improve robustness by exploring alternative trajectories, existing methods lack principled strategies for determining when to branch and how to regulate inter-path interactions. We propose Adaptive Path-Contrastive Decoding (APCD), a multi-path decoding framework that improves output reliability through adaptive exploration and controlled path interaction. APCD consists of two components: (1) Entropy-Driven Path Expansion, which delays branching until predictive uncertainty - measured by Shannon entropy over top candidate tokens - indicates multiple plausible continuations; and (2) Divergence-Aware Path Contrast, which encourages diverse reasoning trajectories while dynamically attenuating inter-path influence as prediction distributions diverge. Experiments on eight benchmarks demonstrate improved factual accuracy while maintaining decoding efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/zty-king/APCD.
comment: This paper has been withdrawn by the author to resolve a conflict of interest/compliance issue

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应路径对比解码(APCD)，通过熵驱动路径扩展和散度感知路径对比提升LLM生成可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在自回归解码中因早期次优token选择导致错误累积，产生幻觉现象。现有多路径解码方法缺乏何时分支及如何调控路径间交互的原则性策略，导致生成质量不稳定。本研究旨在通过自适应探索和受控路径交互，提高输出可靠性。
light_analysis.method: APCD由两部分组成：(1) 熵驱动路径扩展：通过Shannon熵度量预测不确定性，仅在存在多个合理延续时才进行分支；(2) 散度感知路径对比：鼓励多样化推理轨迹，同时在预测分布发散时动态减弱路径间影响。无需额外训练，可即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在八个基准测试上，APCD在保持解码效率的同时提升了事实准确性。实验表明，与标准解码及现有方法相比，APCD显著减少幻觉，尤其在需要常识推理和事实知识任务中表现突出。具体数值性能摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: APCD通过自适应路径探索和受控交互，有效缓解LLM幻觉问题。其无需重新训练的特点便于实际部署。未来可探索与其他解码策略结合，或扩展到多模态生成场景。

title: ProDG: Prototypes for Data-Free Generative Post-Hoc Explainability
abstract: Ante-hoc interpretability methods based on prototypes provide highly accurate explanations by utilizing the intuitive "this looks like that" reasoning paradigm. On the other hand, post-hoc models can explain predictions for a single image without relying on an underlying dataset or requiring costly neural network retraining. Recent approaches successfully solve the retraining problem for prototype-based networks. However, they still face a fundamental limitation: they require access to a subset of data (e.g., a test or validation set) to search for and extract the visual prototypes. In this paper, we address this issue and introduce ProDG: Generative Prototypes for Data-Free Post-Hoc Explainability, a novel framework that leverages generative models to synthesize pure, high-fidelity prototypes directly from the frozen model's weights, completely eliminating the dependency on any external data. By establishing this new frontier in Data-Free XAI, ProDG unlocks robust visual interpretability for privacy-sensitive domains, where original data is strictly restricted or fundamentally inaccessible. Project page: https://github.com/piotr310100/ProDG

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProDG框架，利用生成模型从冻结模型权重合成高保真原型，实现无需外部数据的后验可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有原型后验可解释方法虽避免重训练，但仍需测试集等数据子集来提取视觉原型，这在隐私敏感领域（如医疗）受限。本文旨在消除此类数据依赖，提升可解释性的应用范围。
light_analysis.method: ProDG采用生成模型直接从冻结模型的权重中合成纯高保真原型，无需原始数据。关键创新在于数据无关的原型生成，打破了传统后验解释对数据集的依赖，适用于隐私受限场景。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验指标，但声称通过数据无关方式实现了高保真原型合成，并验证了在隐私敏感领域的有效性。与需数据子集的方法相比，ProDG消除了数据访问限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProDG建立了数据无关XAI的新方向，为隐私敏感领域提供了可靠的视觉可解释性。未来可探索更高效的生成模型或扩展到其他解释形式。

title: Convergence Analysis of Newton's Method for Neural Networks in the Overparameterized Limit
abstract: A convergence analysis is developed for the regularized Newton method for training neural networks (NNs) in the overparameterized limit. As the number of hidden units tends to infinity, the NN training dynamics converge in probability to the solution of a deterministic limit equation involving a ``Newton neural tangent kernel'' (NNTK). Explicit rates characterizing this convergence are provided and, in the infinite-width limit, we prove that the NN converges exponentially fast to the target data (i.e., a global minimizer with zero loss). We show that this convergence is uniform across the frequency spectrum, addressing the spectral bias inherent in gradient descent. The eigenvalues of the NTK for gradient descent accumulate at zero, leading to slow convergence for target data with high-frequency components. In contrast, the NNTK has uniformly lower bounded eigenvalues if the regularization parameter is selected appropriately, allowing Newton's method to converge more quickly for data with high-frequency components. Mathematical challenges that need to be addressed in our analysis include the implicit parameter update of the Newton method with a potentially indefinite Hessian matrix and the fact that the dimension of this linear system of equations tends to infinity as the NN width grows. This complicates deriving the training dynamics in the overparameterized limit as well as proving the convergence of the finite-width dynamics thereto. The analysis identifies a scaling formula for selecting the regularization parameter, which we show can vanish at a suitable rate as the number of hidden units becomes larger. We prove that, for sufficiently large numbers of hidden units, the regularized Hessian remains positive definite during training and the Newton updates for individual NN parameters converge to zero, showing that the model behaves as a linearization around the initialization.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了过参数化极限下牛顿法训练神经网络的收敛性，引入牛顿神经正切核（NNTK）克服梯度下降的谱偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 梯度下降法在训练神经网络时存在谱偏差，导致高频分量收敛缓慢，限制模型对复杂数据的拟合能力。牛顿法理论上可缓解此问题，但缺乏过参数化极限下的收敛分析。现有工作主要关注梯度下降的神经正切核（NTK）理论，而牛顿法因涉及隐含参数更新和可能非正定的Hessian矩阵，其动力学分析更具挑战性。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为牛顿法在过参数化神经网络中的高效训练提供严谨的数学基础。
light_analysis.method: 针对正则化牛顿法，推导出无限宽度极限下训练动力学收敛到确定性极限方程，该方程由牛顿神经正切核（NNTK）刻画。通过分析正则化Hessian矩阵，证明当隐藏单元足够多时其在训练过程中保持正定，且参数更新趋近于零，使模型行为线性化。给出了正则化参数随宽度增长的缩放公式，并证明有限宽度动力学以显式速率收敛到极限方程。
light_analysis.result: 在无限宽度极限下，神经网络以指数速度收敛到零损失的全局极小点。NNTK的特征值在正则化参数选择适当时一致有下界，从而对高频数据实现均匀快速收敛，克服了NTK特征值趋于零导致的谱偏差。提供了有限宽度收敛到极限动力学的显式速率，并验证了正则化参数可随宽度增加以适当速率衰减。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为牛顿法在过参数化神经网络中的训练提供了完整的收敛分析，证明了指数收敛速度和谱偏差缓解能力，具有重要理论价值。所提出的正则化参数选择策略为实际应用提供了指导。未来工作可扩展至其他网络架构和优化器，并验证该方法在图像、语音等高频数据任务中的有效性。局限性在于分析基于全连接网络和特定正则化形式。

title: AgentEscapeBench: Evaluating Out-of-Domain Tool-Grounded Reasoning in LLM Agents
abstract: As LLM-based agents increasingly rely on external tools, it is important to evaluate their ability to sustain tool-grounded reasoning beyond familiar workflows and short-range interactions. We introduce AgentEscapeBench, an escape-room-style benchmark that tests whether agents can infer, execute, and revise novel tool-use procedures under explicit long-range dependency constraints. Each task defines a directed acyclic dependency graph over tools and items, requiring agents to invoke real external functions, track hidden state revealed incrementally, propagate intermediate results, and submit a deterministically verifiable final answer. AgentEscapeBench includes 270 instances across five difficulty tiers and supports fully automated evaluation. Experiments with sixteen LLM agents and human participants show that performance drops sharply as dependency depth increases: humans decline from 98.3% success at difficulty-5 to 80.0% at difficulty-25, while the best model drops from 90.0% to 60.0%. Trajectory analysis attributes model failures mainly to breakdowns in long-range state tracking, clue adherence, and intermediate-result propagation. These findings suggest that current agents can often handle local tool use but still struggle with deep contextual dependencies. We hope AgentEscapeBench can serve as a diagnostic testbed for measuring current agent capabilities and informing future training efforts toward more robust general-purpose reasoning, action, and adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AgentEscapeBench基准，评估LLM代理在长程依赖下的工具推理能力，发现模型随依赖深度增加性能显著下降。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理依赖外部工具执行任务，但现有评估多聚焦短程交互和熟悉工作流，缺乏对长程、跨步骤工具推理能力的考验。实际应用中代理需推断、执行和修正新颖工具使用流程，并处理增量隐藏状态和中间结果传播。为此，需要构建具有明确依赖约束的基准来诊断当前代理的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 设计密室逃脱风格基准，包含270个实例，分五个难度等级。每个任务定义工具和物品的有向无环依赖图，要求代理调用真实外部函数、跟踪逐步揭示的隐藏状态、传播中间结果并提交可验证的最终答案。支持全自动评估，使用16个LLM代理和人类参与者进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 人类成功率从难度-5的98.3%降至难度-25的80.0%，最佳模型从90.0%降至60.0%。轨迹分析显示模型失败主因包括长程状态跟踪中断、线索坚持失败和中间结果传播错误。当前代理擅长局部工具使用，但难以应对深度上下文依赖。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgentEscapeBench可作为诊断测试床，衡量代理能力并指导未来训练，以增强通用推理、行动和适应能力。当前代理在长程依赖任务中表现不足，需改进状态跟踪和推理连贯性。

title: Adaptive Regularization for Sparsity Control in Bregman-Based Optimizers
abstract: Sparse training reduces the memory and computational costs of deep neural networks. However, sparse optimization methods, e.g., those adding an $\ell_1$ penalty, often control sparsity only indirectly through a regularization parameter $λ$, whose mapping to the final sparsity rate is non-trivial. In our experiments, we found this parameter sensitivity to be particularly pronounced for Bregman-based optimizers. Specifically, the two variants LinBreg and AdaBreg reach the same sparsity at $λ$ values that differ by up to two orders of magnitude, requiring expensive trial-and-error sweeps to achieve a user-specified sparsity. To address this, we propose an adaptive regularization scheme that updates $λ$ based on the difference between the model's current sparsity and the target sparsity. We analyze the resulting algorithm and evaluate it on automatic speaker verification with ECAPA-TDNN and ResNet34 on VoxCeleb and CNCeleb. The proposed method reliably achieves sparsity targets ranging between 75% and 99%. It also converges faster than the oracle-tuned non-adaptive baseline during early training and matches or surpasses its final performance in equal error rate. We further show that the adaptive scheme inherits key properties from its non-adaptive counterpart, including improved out-of-distribution robustness over the dense baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应正则化方案，基于当前稀疏度与目标稀疏度的差异更新正则化参数，直接控制Bregman优化器的最终稀疏度。
light_analysis.motivation: 稀疏训练能降低深度网络的存储和计算成本，但现有稀疏优化方法通过正则化参数间接控制稀疏度，映射复杂。特别是Bregman优化器（LinBreg和AdaBreg）对参数极其敏感，达到相同稀疏度所需λ值相差两个数量级，需要昂贵的试错搜索。因此需要一种能直接指定目标稀疏度并自动调整λ的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应正则化方案，根据模型当前稀疏度与目标稀疏度的差值动态更新正则化参数λ。分析了算法性质，并在自动说话人验证任务上评估，使用ECAPA-TDNN和ResNet34在VoxCeleb和CNCeleb数据集上测试。该方法可靠地达到75%-99%的稀疏度目标。
light_analysis.result: 自适应方法可靠实现75%-99%目标稀疏度；在早期训练中比Oracle调优的非自适应基线收敛更快，最终等错误率（EER）匹配或超越基线。此外，自适应方案继承了非自适应版本的优点，包括相比密集基线具有更好的分布外鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出自适应正则化方案，直接控制Bregman优化器的稀疏度，解决了参数敏感问题。实验证明其有效性和效率优势。学术价值在于为稀疏化训练提供更实用的方法，应用价值在于降低调参成本。未来可考虑拓展到其他优化器或更复杂的稀疏结构。

title: ICDAR 2026 Competition on Writer Identification and Pen Classification from Hand-Drawn Circles
abstract: This paper presents CircleID, a large-scale ICDAR 2026 competition on writer identification and pen classification from scanned hand-drawn circles. The primary objective is to investigate how biometric writer characteristics and physical pen features naturally entangle within minimal, static traces. CircleID comprises two distinct tasks: (1) open-set writer identification, requiring models to recognize known writers while explicitly rejecting unknown ones, and (2) cross-writer pen classification, evaluated across both seen and unseen writers. Participants were provided with a new, controlled dataset of 46,155 tightly cropped circle images, digitized at 400 DPI and annotated for writer identity and pen type. The dataset comprises samples from 44 known and 22 unknown writers using eight different pens. Hosted on Kaggle as two separate tracks with public and private leaderboards, the competition provided participants with a ResNet baseline. In total, 389 teams (436 participants) made 3,185 submissions for the pen classification task, and 113 teams (141 participants) made 1,737 submissions for the writer identification track. The best-performing private leaderboard submissions achieved a Top-1 accuracy of 64.801% for writer identification and 92.726% for pen classification. This paper details the dataset, evaluates the winning methodologies, and analyzes the impact of out-of-distribution writers on model generalization and feature disentanglement. In this large-scale competition, CircleID establishes a new baseline for minimal-trace analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 论文介绍ICDAR 2026的CircleID竞赛，通过手绘圆圈进行写者识别和笔分类，建立最小静态痕迹分析的基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在复杂书写样本上表现良好，但最小静态痕迹中写者生物特征与物理笔特征自然纠缠，缺乏系统性研究。该问题对笔迹鉴定、文档取证和生物识别领域具有重要应用价值。传统方法难以在开集环境下显式拒绝未知写者，且跨写者笔分类面临泛化挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了包含46,155个手绘圆圈图像的数据集，400 DPI扫描，标注写者身份和笔类型，涵盖44名已知和22名未知写者、8种笔。提出两个任务：开集写者识别（识别已知写者并拒绝未知）和交叉写者笔分类（在已知和未知写者上评估）。提供ResNet基线，竞赛在Kaggle上以两赛道进行。
light_analysis.result: 共389个团队（436人）参与笔分类任务，提交3,185次；113个团队（141人）参与写者识别，提交1,737次。最佳结果：写者识别Top-1准确率64.801%，笔分类92.726%。分析了未知写者对模型泛化和特征解缠的影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: CircleID为最小痕迹分析建立新基线，验证了手绘圆圈在写者识别和笔分类中的潜力。数据集和竞赛结果公开，推动开集识别和交叉写者泛化研究。未来可探索更细粒度的特征解缠及更大规模数据集。

title: Benchmarking EngGPT2-16B-A3B against Comparable Italian and International Open-source LLMs
abstract: This report benchmarks the performance of ENGINEERING Ingegneria Informatica S.p.A.'s EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B LLM, a 16B parameter Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 3B active parameters. Performance is investigated across a wide variety of representative benchmarks, and is compared against comparably-sized open-source MoE and dense models. In comparison with popular Italian models, namely FastwebMIIA-7B, Minerva-7B, Velvet-14B, and LLaMAntino-3-ANITA-8B, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B performs as well or better on international benchmarks: ARC-Challenge, GSM8K, AIME24, AIME25, MMLU, and HumanEval (HE). It achieves the best performance for the longest context setting (32k) of the RULER benchmark. On the Italian benchmark dataset ITALIC, the model performs as well or better than the other models except for Velvet-14B, which outperforms it. Compared with popular MoE models of comparable size, the new model reports higher values than DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat on all considered benchmarks. It has higher values than Moonlight-16B-A3B on HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, and the 32k RULER setting, but lower on BFCL and some ARC and ITALIC settings. Finally it has lower values than GPT-OSS-20B on most benchmarks, including HE, MMLU, AIME24, AIME25, GSM8K, ARC, BFCL, and the RULER 32k. When compared with popular dense models, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B reports higher values on AIME24 and AIME25 than Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, Gemma-3-12b-it, and Ministral-3-8BInstruct-2512-BF16, but lower values on ITALIC, BFCL, and RULER with a 32k context. When performance is aggregated across all benchmark metrics, EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B shows higher performance than the Italian models under evaluation while achieving lower results than some of the most performant international models, in particular GPT-5 nano and Qwen3-8B. Taken together, our findings find the new model to be a step forward for native Italian Large Language Models.

light_analysis.overview: 论文对EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B模型进行基准测试，与意大利和国际开源LLM比较，显示其在意大利语LLM中的进步。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估新开发的意大利语LLM EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B的性能，与现有意大利模型及国际开源模型对比，为意大利语NLP提供更优选择。现有意大利模型性能有限，国际模型可能不擅长意大利语，该模型旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 使用ARC、GSM8K、AIME24/25、MMLU、HumanEval、RULER、ITALIC、BFCL等基准评估。模型为16B参数MoE（3B活跃参数）。比较对象包括意大利模型（FastwebMIIA-7B等）和国际开源MoE（DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat等）及密集模型（Llama-3.1-8B等）。
light_analysis.result: EngGPT2MoE-16B-A3B在大多数国际基准上优于或持平意大利模型，在RULER 32k设置最佳。比DeepSeek-MoE-16B-Chat全部更高，比Moonlight-16B-A3B部分更高，比GPT-OSS-20B大部分低。比Llama-3.1-8B等在AIME24/25高，但其他低。聚合表现优于意大利模型，但低于GPT-5 nano和Qwen3-8B。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该模型是原生意大利LLM的进步，在多个基准上表现良好，但部分指标不如顶级国际模型。研究为意大利语NLP提供了新选择，未来可针对弱点优化，如提升ITALIC和BFCL性能。

title: InfoGeo: Information-Theoretic Object-Centric Learning for Cross-View Generalizable UAV Geo-Localization
abstract: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) is fundamental for precise localization and navigation in GPS-denied environments, aiming to match ground or UAV imagery with satellite views. Existing approaches often rely on global feature alignment, but they suffer from substantial domain shifts induced by varying regional textures and weather conditions. This issue becomes even more pronounced in UAV-based scenarios, where the broader perspective inevitably introduces dense, fine-grained objects, creating significant visual clutter. To address this, we draw inspiration from Object-Centric Learning (OCL) and propose InfoGeo, an information-theoretic framework designed to enhance robustness and generalization. InfoGeo reformulates the optimization as an information bottleneck process with two core objectives: (i) maximizing view-invariant information by aligning the object-centric structural relations across views, and (ii) minimizing view-specific noisy signals through cross-view knowledge constraints. Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks and challenging scenarios demonstrate that InfoGeo significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InfoGeo框架，基于信息瓶颈和对象中心学习，增强跨视角地理定位的鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨视角地理定位在GPS拒止环境中至关重要，现有全局特征对齐方法易受区域纹理和天气变化导致的领域偏移影响，尤其在无人机视角下，密集物体杂波加剧了这一问题。需要一种能提取视角不变特征并抑制噪声的方法。
light_analysis.method: InfoGeo将优化重构为信息瓶颈过程，包含两个目标：1）通过对齐跨视角的对象中心结构关系最大化视角不变信息；2）利用跨视角知识约束最小化视角特定噪声信号。该方法从对象中心学习中汲取灵感，以处理视觉杂波。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多样化基准和挑战性场景中的广泛评估表明，InfoGeo显著优于当前最先进方法，实现了更高的定位精度和更强的泛化能力。具体性能提升数据未在摘要中明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: InfoGeo通过信息论视角结合对象中心学习，有效解决了跨视角地理定位中的领域偏移和视觉杂波问题，为无人机GPS拒止定位提供了通用且鲁棒的解决方案。未来可探索更高效的信息瓶颈实现或扩展到其他跨域任务。

title: Listwise Policy Optimization: Group-based RLVR as Target-Projection on the LLM Response Simplex
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a standard approach for large language models (LLMs) post-training to incentivize reasoning capacity. Among existing recipes, group-based policy gradient is prevalent, which samples a group of responses per prompt and updates the policy via group-relative advantage signals. This work reveals that these optimization strategies share a common geometric structure: each implicitly defines a target distribution on the response simplex and projects toward it via first-order approximation. Building on this insight, we propose Listwise Policy Optimization (LPO) to explicitly conduct the target-projection, which demystifies the implicit target by restricting the proximal RL objective to the response simplex, and then projects the policy via exact divergence minimization. This framework provides (i) monotonic improvement on the listwise objective with bounded, zero-sum, and self-correcting projection gradients, and (ii) flexibility in divergence selection with distinct structural properties through the decoupled projection step. On diverse reasoning tasks and LLM backbones, LPO consistently improves training performance over typical policy gradient baselines under matched targets, while intrinsically preserving optimization stability and response diversity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Listwise Policy Optimization (LPO)，通过显式目标-投影在响应单纯形上优化策略，实现单调改进和灵活性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为LLM后训练的标准方法，但现有组策略梯度方法隐式定义了目标分布并通过一阶近似投影，缺乏显式理解和理论保证。本文旨在揭示其共同几何结构，并提出显式目标-投影方法以提升优化稳定性和性能。
light_analysis.method: LPO通过将近端RL目标限制在响应单纯形上，显式定义目标分布，然后通过精确散度最小化进行策略投影。该框架提供单调改进的有界、零和、自校正投影梯度，并通过解耦投影步骤支持不同散度选择，具有不同结构特性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种推理任务和LLM骨干网络上，LPO在匹配目标下持续优于典型策略梯度基线，同时保持优化稳定性和响应多样性。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但声称一致改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: LPO通过显式目标-投影框架揭示了现有组RLVR方法的几何结构，提供理论保证和灵活散度选择。具有学术价值，可应用于LLM后训练提升推理能力。未来可探索更复杂的投影步骤和散度设计。

title: SOPE: Stabilizing Off-Policy Evaluation for Online RL with Prior Data
abstract: Incorporating prior data into online reinforcement learning accelerates training but typically forces a difficult trade-off between high computational costs and long, multi-stage training pipelines. While fixed-length stabilization phases are significantly more computationally efficient than static update schedules, they require task-dependent manual tuning, risking either the waste of prior knowledge or severe overfitting. To address this, we propose SOPE, an algorithm that uses an actor-aligned Off-Policy Policy Evaluation (OPE) signal as an automated early-stopping mechanism to dynamically control the length of offline training phases. By evaluating the critic on a held-out validation split under the current policy's action distribution, SOPE halts gradient updates exactly when out-of-distribution benefits saturate, eliminating the need for manual schedule tuning. Evaluated on 25 continuous control tasks from the Minari benchmark suite, SOPE improves baseline performance by up to 45.6% while reducing the required TFLOPs by up to 22x, thus balancing the tradeoff between sample and computational efficiency. These findings demonstrate that adaptive, evaluation-driven update schedules are more effective than relying on static, exhaustive update schedules.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOPE算法，利用离策略评估信号自动控制离线训练时长，平衡在线强化学习中样本与计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 将先验数据融入在线强化学习可加速训练，但面临高计算成本和多阶段训练管道的权衡。固定长度稳定阶段虽计算高效，但需任务相关手动调参，可能导致先验知识浪费或过拟合。现有方法缺乏自动化机制来动态调整离线训练阶段长度。
light_analysis.method: SOPE算法使用与当前策略对齐的离策略策略评估信号作为自动早停机制。在保留验证集上评估评论家网络在当前策略动作分布下的表现，当分布外收益饱和时停止梯度更新，无需手动调度。基于Minari基准套件的25个连续控制任务进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 相比基线方法，SOPE在25个连续控制任务中提升性能最高达45.6%，同时所需TFLOPs降低最多22倍。有效平衡了样本效率与计算效率，表明自适应评估驱动的更新计划优于静态穷举更新计划。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOPE通过自适应早停机制解决了离线训练阶段长度的手动调参问题，显著提升了在线RL的训练效率和性能。其自动化方法具有广泛适用性，未来可探索更复杂的评估信号或扩展到其他RL设置。

title: Zero-Shot Satellite Image Retrieval through Joint Embeddings: Application to Crisis Response
abstract: Semantic search of Earth observation archives remains challenging. Visual foundation models such as CLAY produce rich embeddings of satellite imagery but lack the natural-language grounding needed for intuitive query, and full contrastive training of a remote-sensing CLIP-style model requires paired data and compute that are unavailable at global scale. To allow natural language querying at global scales, we present GeoQuery, a zero-shot retrieval system that sidesteps data and compute constraints through a two-stage semantic and visual search, leveraging a natural language embedding of a subset (proxy) of global data. Rather than training a joint encoder, we generate language descriptions for a 100k proxy subset of global Sentinel-2 tiles and optimise the description-generation prompt so that distances in the resulting text-embedding space correlate with distances in the frozen CLAY visual-embedding space. Queries are resolved in two stages, with a text-similarity search over the proxy subset followed by a visual nearest-neighbour search over worldwide CLAY embeddings On 76 disaster-location queries covering UK floods, US wildfires, and US droughts, GeoQuery achieves 31.6\% accuracy within 50\,km, with the strongest performance on floods (50\% within 50\,km) where terrain features are well captured by RGB embeddings. Deployed within a crisis response system called \ECHO{}, GeoQuery identified vulnerable areas during Brisbane's 2025 Cyclone Alfred, with downstream flood simulations reproducing historical patterns. Prompt-aligned proxies offer a practical bridge between EO foundation models and operational retrieval when full contrastive training is out of reach.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoQuery，一种零样本卫星图像检索系统，通过两阶段语义和视觉搜索，利用提示对齐代理避免配对数据训练，实现自然语言查询。
light_analysis.motivation: 地球观测档案的语义搜索困难，视觉基础模型缺乏自然语言接地，而完全训练CLIP风格模型需要全球规模下难以获取的配对数据和计算资源。现有方法无法在零样本条件下实现高效检索，阻碍了灾害响应等紧急应用。
light_analysis.method: GeoQuery采用两阶段检索：首先对100k全球Sentinel-2瓦片代理子集进行文本相似性搜索，然后对全球CLAY视觉嵌入执行最近邻搜索。关键创新是通过优化描述生成提示，使文本嵌入空间距离与冻结CLAY视觉嵌入空间距离相关，无需训练联合编码器。
light_analysis.result: 在76个灾害位置查询（英国洪水、美国野火、干旱）上，GeoQuery在50公里内达到31.6%准确率，洪水场景最佳（50%）。在2025年布里斯班气旋响应中，下游洪水模拟再现历史模式，验证了实际部署效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoQuery提供了完全对比训练不可行时连接地球观测基础模型与操作检索的实用桥梁，在危机响应中具有直接应用价值。未来可扩展至更多场景和优化代理选择。

title: MAP-Law: Coverage-Driven Retrieval Control for Multi-Turn Legal Consultation
abstract: Legal consultation is inherently iterative: before giving advice, a system must identify relevant legal elements, gather missing facts and authorities, and determine whether the current evidence is sufficient. Existing retrieval-augmented legal agents often use fixed retrieval budgets or single-shot search, making them insensitive to the evolving coverage state of a consultation. This paper introduces a coverage-driven retrieval-control framework for multi-turn legal consultation. The framework maintains a structured map over user facts, legal elements, retrieval goals, and retrieved evidence, and uses element coverage, evidence validity coverage, and marginal retrieval gain to decide whether to retrieve, clarify, reformulate, or stop. On a 50-case synthetic Chinese labor-law consultation pilot with fixed legal-element schemas, a DeepSeek V4-Pro action-selection variant achieves full measured element coverage under the pilot metric while requiring 3.4 retrieval rounds and 7.1 evidence snippets on average. Diagnostic analyses show that model-backed action selection recovers rule-policy failure cases with a small retrieval-budget increase, while forced continuation mainly increases token and latency costs. These results suggest that legal-element coverage is a useful control signal for adaptive legal retrieval, while remaining bounded to retrieval-control behavior under synthetic fixed-schema conditions rather than deployment-level legal correctness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出覆盖驱动的检索控制框架MAP-Law，利用法律元素覆盖率自适应决定多轮法律咨询中的检索行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 法律咨询具有迭代性，需要识别相关要素、收集缺失事实和权威，并判断证据是否充分。现有检索增强法律代理使用固定检索预算或单次搜索，无法适应咨询过程中不断变化的覆盖状态，导致检索效率低下或证据不足。
light_analysis.method: 框架维护结构化地图，记录用户事实、法律元素、检索目标和检索证据，通过元素覆盖率、证据有效性覆盖率和边际检索增益决定下一动作（检索、澄清、改写或停止）。使用DeepSeek V4-Pro作为动作选择模型，在50个合成中国劳动法咨询案例上进行测试，每个案例具有固定法律元素模式。
light_analysis.result: DeepSeek V4-Pro变体在测试指标下实现完全的元素覆盖，平均需要3.4轮检索和7.1个证据片段。诊断分析显示，模型支持的动选择能以小的检索预算增加恢复规则策略失败案例，而强制继续主要增加令牌和延迟成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 法律元素覆盖率可作为自适应法律检索的有效控制信号，但该结果限于合成固定模式条件，不直接等同于部署级别的法律正确性。未来工作可扩展到更真实的场景和开放式法律领域。

title: VeraRetouch: A Lightweight Fully Differentiable Framework for Multi-Task Reasoning Photo Retouching
abstract: Reasoning photo retouching has gained significant traction, requiring models to analyze image defects, give reasoning processes, and execute precise retouching enhancements. However, existing approaches often rely on non-differentiable external software, creating optimization barriers and suffering from high parameter redundancy and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we propose VeraRetouch, a lightweight and fully differentiable framework for multi-task photo retouching. We employ a 0.5B Vision-Language Model (VLM) as the central intelligence to formulate retouching plans based on instructions and scene semantics. Furthermore, we develop a fully differentiable Retouch Renderer that replaces external tools, enabling direct end-to-end pixel-level training through decoupled control latents for lighting, global color, and specific color adjustments. To overcome data scarcity, we introduce AetherRetouch-1M+, the first million-scale dataset for professional retouching, constructed via a new inverse degradation workflow. Furthermore, we propose DAPO-AE, a reinforcement learning post-training strategy that enhances autonomous aesthetic cognition. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VeraRetouch achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks while maintaining a significantly smaller footprint, enabling mobile deployment. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/OpenVeraTeam/VeraRetouch.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VeraRetouch，首个轻量级全微分框架，用于多任务推理照片润色，实现端到端训练与移动部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 推理照片润色要求模型分析缺陷、给出推理并执行润色，但现有方法依赖不可微的外部软件，导致优化困难、参数冗余且泛化能力有限。为解决这些问题，亟需一种全微分、轻量级的框架，实现高效端到端训练。
light_analysis.method: 采用0.5B视觉语言模型作为中央智能，根据指令和场景语义生成润色计划；开发全微分Retouch Renderer，通过解耦的光照、全局颜色和特定颜色控制潜变量替代外部工具，实现端到端像素级训练。还构建百万级数据集AetherRetouch-1M+，并提出DAPO-AE强化学习后训练策略增强美学认知。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，同时模型参数显著减少，支持移动端部署。摘要未明确给出具体数值，但强调性能优越和轻量特点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了全微分轻量框架、大规模数据集和强化学习策略，解决了现有方法不可微和高冗余问题，具有学术价值，并能实际部署于移动设备。未来可探索更广泛的应用场景。

title: Evaluating TabPFN for Mild Cognitive Impairment to Alzheimer's Disease Conversion in Data Limited Settings
abstract: Accurate prediction of conversion from Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) to Alzheimers Diseases (AD) is essential for early intervention, however, developing reliable conversion predictive models is difficult to develop due to limited longitudinal data availability We evaluate TabPFN (Tabular Pre-Trained Foundation Network) against traditional machine learning methods for predicting 3 year MCI to AD conversion using the TADPOLE dataset derived from ADNI. Using multimodal biomarker features extracted from demographics, APOE4, MRI volumes, CSF markers, and PET imaging, we conducted an experimental comparison across varying training set sizes (N=50 to 1000) and models including XGBoost, Random Forest, LightGBM, and Logistic Regression. TabPFN achieved one the highest performance (AUC=0.892), outperforming LightGBM (AUC=0.860) and demonstrating advantages in low data settings. At N=50 training samples, TabPFN maintained strong AUC while the traditional machine learning models struggles at small training samples. These findings demonstrate that foundation models are promising for disease prediction in data limited scenarios, such as Alzheimers diseases.

light_analysis.overview: 评估TabPFN在数据有限场景下预测MCI向AD转化的性能，发现其优于传统机器学习方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确预测轻度认知障碍（MCI）向阿尔茨海默病（AD）的转化对于早期干预至关重要，但由于纵向数据有限，开发可靠的预测模型存在困难。传统机器学习方法在少量训练样本下表现不佳，因此需要探索更适合数据稀缺场景的模型。
light_analysis.method: 使用TabPFN（表格预训练基础网络）与XGBoost、随机森林、LightGBM和逻辑回归等传统方法进行对比实验。基于TADPOLE数据集（来自ADNI），采用多模态生物标志物特征，包括人口统计学、APOE4、MRI体积、脑脊液标志物和PET成像，并在不同训练集大小（N=50至1000）下评估性能。
light_analysis.result: TabPFN取得了最高性能（AUC=0.892），优于LightGBM（AUC=0.860）。在训练样本仅为50时，TabPFN仍保持较高AUC，而传统机器学习模型在少量样本下表现困难。这表明TabPFN在数据有限场景下具有明显优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: TabPFN等基础模型在数据稀缺的疾病预测任务中展现出潜力，为阿尔茨海默病等疾病的早期预测提供了有效工具。未来可进一步探索其在其他医学预测场景的适用性，并优化计算效率。

title: How to Guide Your Flow: Few-Step Alignment via Flow Map Reward Guidance
abstract: In generative modeling, we often wish to produce samples that maximize a user-specified reward such as aesthetic quality or alignment with human preferences, a problem known as \textit{guidance}. Despite their widespread use, existing guidance methods either require expensive multi-particle, many-step schemes or rely on poorly understood approximations. We reformulate guidance as a \textit{deterministic optimal control problem}, yielding a hierarchy of algorithms that subsumes existing approaches at the coarsest level. We show that the \textit{flow map}, an object of significant recent interest for its role in fast inference, arises naturally in the optimal solution. Based on this observation, we propose \textbf{Flow Map Reward Guidance (FMRG)}: a training-free, \textit{single-trajectory} framework that uses the flow map to both integrate and guide the flow. At text-to-image scale, FMRG matches or surpasses baselines across inverse problems and reward-guided generation with \textbf{as few as 3 NFEs}, giving at least an order-of-magnitude speedup in comparison to prior state of the art.

light_analysis.overview: 提出流图奖励引导（FMRG），一种训练免费、单轨迹的少量步数生成引导方法，实现高效奖励优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型中的引导方法要么需要昂贵的多粒子多步方案，要么依赖理解不足的近似。用户希望生成符合美学或人类偏好的样本，但现有方法效率低或精度不足。需要一种快速、准确且无需训练的引导算法。
light_analysis.method: 将引导重新表述为确定性最优控制问题，得到层次化算法。利用流图（flow map）这一用于快速推理的近期研究对象，提出FMRG：训练免费、单轨迹框架，使用流图同时积分和引导流。在文本到图像任务中，仅需3次神经函数评估（NFEs）。
light_analysis.result: 在文本到图像尺度上，FMRG在逆问题和奖励引导生成中匹配或超越基线，仅需3次NFEs，相比先前最先进方法实现至少一个数量级的加速。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确速度提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献包括：将引导问题形式化为最优控制，揭示流图在引导中的自然作用，提出FMRG实现高效少量步数引导。该方法有望加速生成模型在奖励优化任务中的应用，但可能对复杂奖励函数的适应性需进一步验证。

title: From Prompt Risk to Response Risk: Paired Analysis of Safety Behavior of Large Language Model
abstract: Safety evaluations of large language models (LLMs) typically report binary outcomes, i.e. attack success rate (ASR), refusal rate, or harmful versus safe classification, which hide how risk changes between prompt and response. We present a paired analysis over human labeled prompt and response records across four harm categories (Sexual, Self harm, Hate and Violence) and ordinal severity levels (Safe, Low, Medium, High). 61% of responses reduce harm relative to the prompt, 36% preserve severity, and 3% escalate. The escalation splits into two mechanisms: benign prompts triggering unrequested harmful detail, and answers that stay on task at higher severity than the prompt. Category decomposition shows that Sexual content exhibits the highest harm persistence in this sample, driven by compliance at the same severity rather than drift from benign inputs. Joint relevance analysis exposes a helpfulness versus harmlessness tradeoff: compliance escalations remain highly relevant, whereas safe responses include generic refusals with low relevance. Finally, few-shot LLM graders exhibit a prompt/response detection asymmetry that data calibration does not close. Grader prompts are shared at https://github.com/microsoft/PairedSafety.

light_analysis.overview: 提出配对安全分析方法，揭示LLM从提示到响应的风险动态变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统安全性评估仅报告二元结果（如攻击成功率、拒绝率），隐藏了从提示到响应之间的风险变化。需要更细粒度的分析来理解风险转移和升级机制，以设计更有效的安全防护。
light_analysis.method: 对人工标注的提示和响应记录进行配对分析，涵盖四个危害类别（性、自残、仇恨、暴力）和四个严重级别（安全、低、中、高）。使用联合相关性分析评估有帮助性与无害性权衡，以及少样本LLM评分器的提示/响应检测不对称性。
light_analysis.result: 61%的响应降低了危害，36%保持严重程度，3%升级。升级分为两类：良性提示触发非请求的有害细节，以及保持任务但比提示更高严重级别。性内容表现出最高的危害持久性，主要是相同严重级别的服从。有帮助性与无害性权衡：服从升级具有高相关性，而安全响应包括低相关性的通用拒绝。少样本LLM评分器存在不对称性，数据校准无法消除。
light_analysis.conclusion: 配对分析揭示了风险动态变化和权衡，为更精细的LLM安全评估提供方法。但评分器不对称性需要进一步解决，提示数据和评分器提示已公开。

title: Sound Agentic Science Requires Adversarial Experiments
abstract: LLM-based agents are rapidly being adopted for scientific data analysis, automating tasks once limited by human time and expertise. This capability is often framed as an acceleration of discovery, but it also accelerates a familiar failure mode, the rapid production of plausible, endlessly revisable analyses that are easy to generate, effectively turning hypothesis space into candidate claims supported by selectively chosen analyses, optimized for publishable positives. Unlike software, scientific knowledge is not validated by the iterative accumulation of code and post hoc statistical support. A fluent explanation or a significant result on a single dataset is not verification. Because the missing evidence is a negative space, experiments and analyses that would have falsified the claim were never run or never published. We therefore propose that non-experimental claims produced with agentic assistance be evaluated under a falsification-first standard: agents should not be used primarily to craft the most compelling narrative, but to actively search for the ways in which the claim can fail.
comment: Published at ICLR 2026 Workshop on Agents in the Wild

light_analysis.overview: 提出对LLM-based科学分析代理采用证伪优先的对抗性实验标准，以防止产生看似合理但存偏见的科学主张。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理加速科学数据分析，但同时也加速了产生看似合理、可通过选择性分析支持的主张，这种'失败模式'导致科学知识验证问题，因为缺失的证伪证据从未产生或发表。
light_analysis.method: 主张非实验性科学主张应在证伪优先标准下评估，代理应主动搜索能证伪主张的方式，而非仅构建令人信服的叙事；强调使用对抗性实验来寻找失败模式。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，主要提出概念性框架和评估标准，强调通过主动证伪来验证科学主张的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出对抗性实验作为解决LLM代理在科学分析中偏见的方案，有助于防止虚假科学主张，推动科学验证向更严谨的方向发展；未来可探索具体实现方法。

title: Clinically-Informed Modeling for Pediatric Brain Tumor Classification from Whole-Slide Histopathology Images
abstract: Accurate diagnosis of pediatric brain tumors, starting with histopathology, presents unique challenges for deep learning, including severe data scarcity, class imbalance, and fine-grained morphologic overlap across diagnostically distinct subtypes. While pathology foundation models have advanced patch-level representation learning, their effective adaptation to weakly supervised pediatric brain tumor classification under limited data remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce an expert-guided contrastive fine-tuning framework for pediatric brain tumor diagnosis from whole-slide images (WSI). Our approach integrates contrastive learning into slide-level multiple instance learning (MIL) to explicitly regularize the geometry of slide-level representations during downstream fine-tuning. We propose both a general supervised contrastive setting and an expert-guided variant that incorporates clinically informed hard negatives targeting diagnostically confusable subtypes. Through comprehensive experiments on pediatric brain tumor WSI classification under realistic low-sample and class-imbalanced conditions, we demonstrate that contrastive fine-tuning yields measurable improvements in fine-grained diagnostic distinctions. Our experimental analyses reveal complementary strengths across different contrastive strategies, with expert-guided hard negatives promoting more compact intra-class representations and improved inter-class separation. This work highlights the importance of explicitly shaping slide-level representations for robust fine-grained classification in data-scarce pediatric pathology settings.
comment: Accepted at the IEEE International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出专家引导的对比微调框架，将对比学习集成到弱监督的多实例学习中，通过引入临床难负样本，提升儿科脑肿瘤全切片图像分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 儿科脑肿瘤诊断中，深度学习面临数据稀缺、类别不平衡及亚型形态重叠等挑战。现有病理基础模型在弱监督适应上不足，难以有效利用有限数据实现细粒度分类。因此，需要一种能够显式塑造切片级表示的方法，以提升诊断准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出专家引导的对比微调框架，基于对比学习和多实例学习，包括通用监督对比和专家引导变体。专家引导变体利用临床信息构建诊断易混淆亚型的难负样本，通过对比损失正则化切片级表示，增强类别间分离和类内紧凑性。使用儿科脑肿瘤全切片图像数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在低样本和类别不平衡条件下，对比微调显著提升了细粒度分类性能。专家引导的难负样本促进了更紧凑的类内表示和更好的类间分离，相比基线方法取得了可衡量的改进。实验表明不同对比策略具有互补优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作强调了在数据稀缺的儿科病理环境中，显式塑造切片级表示对于稳健细粒度分类的重要性。提出的框架具有学术价值和临床应用潜力，未来可扩展至其他罕见病或弱监督任务。

title: Differentially Private Model Merging
abstract: In machine learning, privacy requirements at inference or deployment time often evolve due to changing policies, regulations, or user preferences. In this work, we aim to construct a magnitude of models to satisfy any target differential privacy (DP) requirement without additional training, given a set of existing models trained on the same dataset with different privacy/utility tradeoffs. We propose two post-processing techniques, namely random selection and linear combination, to generate final private models satisfying any target privacy parameter. We provide privacy accounting of these approaches from the lens of R'enyi DP and privacy loss distributions on general problems, as well as on private mean estimation, where we precisely characterize the privacy/utility tradeoffs and compare the two mechanisms. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches and validate our analyses on several models and both synthetic and real-world datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种后处理技术实现差分隐私模型合并，满足任意目标隐私参数无需重新训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习中的隐私需求常因政策、法规或用户偏好变化而演变，现有方法需要为每个隐私要求单独训练模型，计算成本高。本文旨在利用一组已有的、具有不同隐私/效用权衡的模型，通过后处理技术生成满足任意目标差分隐私要求的模型，从而避免额外训练，提升灵活性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种后处理技术：随机选择（从现有模型中随机选取一个）和线性组合（对模型参数或输出进行加权平均）。通过Rényi差分隐私和隐私损失分布框架进行隐私核算，并在私有均值估计问题上精确刻画隐私/效用权衡。理论分析涵盖了通用问题场景，并比较了两种机制的优劣。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上对多种模型进行实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。具体地，线性组合通常比随机选择在相同隐私预算下获得更好的效用；在私有均值估计中，理论分析准确预测了隐私/效用权衡。与重新训练基线相比，实现了显著的计算成本降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为动态隐私需求场景提供了高效解决方案，通过后处理技术复用已有模型，避免重复训练。理论贡献在于统一了多种隐私核算视角，实践上可用于模型部署中的隐私适应性调整。未来工作可探索更复杂的组合策略及在其他学习任务上的应用。

title: TIP: Token Importance in On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy knowledge distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own rollouts under token-level supervision from a teacher. Not all token positions matter equally, but existing views of token importance are incomplete. We ask a direct question: which tokens carry the most useful learning signal in OPD? Our answer is that informative tokens come from two regions: positions with high student entropy, and positions with low student entropy plus high teacher--student divergence, where the student is overconfident and wrong.   Empirically, student entropy is a strong first-order proxy: retaining $50\%$ of tokens with entropy-based sampling matches or exceeds all-token training while reducing peak memory by up to $47\%$. But entropy alone misses a second important region. When we isolate low-entropy, high-divergence tokens, training on fewer than $10\%$ of all tokens nearly matches full-token baselines, showing that overconfident tokens carry dense corrective signal despite being nearly invisible to entropy-only rules.   We organize these findings with TIP (Token Importance in on-Policy distillation), a two-axis taxonomy over student entropy and teacher--student divergence, and give a theoretical explanation for why entropy is useful yet structurally incomplete. This view motivates type-aware token selection rules that combine uncertainty and disagreement. We validate this picture across three teacher--student pairs spanning Qwen3, Llama, and Qwen2.5 on MATH-500 and AIME 2024/2025, and on the DeepPlanning benchmark for long-horizon agentic planning, where Q3-only training on $<$$20\%$ of tokens surpasses full-token OPD. Our experiments are implemented by extending the OPD repository https://github.com/HJSang/OPSD_OnPolicyDistillation, which supports memory-efficient distillation of larger models under limited GPU budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于学生熵和师生分歧的两轴token重要性分类法TIP，实现高效在线策略知识蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线策略知识蒸馏（OPD）中，不同token位置的重要性不同，但现有观点不完整。需要明确哪些token携带最有用的学习信号，以提升蒸馏效率并降低内存开销。
light_analysis.method: 提出TIP两轴分类法，根据学生熵和师生分歧将token分为高熵区域和低熵高分歧区域。设计类型感知的token选择规则，结合不确定性和分歧，实现高效蒸馏。实验基于Qwen3、Llama、Qwen2.5等模型在MATH-500和AIME 2024/2025等基准上进行。
light_analysis.result: 仅用50%熵采样token可匹配全token训练，峰值内存降低47%；低熵高分歧token少于10%即可接近全基线。在MATH-500等基准上，Qwen3等模型对少于20%token训练超全token OPD。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了熵作为一阶代理但结构不完整，低熵高分歧token提供密集修正信号。TIP分类法指导高效蒸馏，支持大模型在有限GPU下训练，未来可探索更精细的选择策略。

title: Towards Autonomous Mechanistic Reasoning in Virtual Cells
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently gained significant attention as a promising approach to accelerate scientific discovery. However, their application in open-ended scientific domains such as biology remains limited, primarily due to the lack of factually grounded and actionable explanations. To address this, we introduce a structured explanation formalism for virtual cells that represents biological reasoning as mechanistic action graphs, enabling systematic verification and falsification. Building upon this, we propose VCR-Agent, a multi-agent framework that integrates biologically grounded knowledge retrieval with a verifier-based filtering approach to generate and validate mechanistic reasoning autonomously. Using this framework, we release VC-TRACES dataset, which consists of verified mechanistic explanations derived from the Tahoe-100M atlas. Empirically, we demonstrate that training with these explanations improves factual precision and provides a more effective supervision signal for downstream gene expression prediction. These results underscore the importance of reliable mechanistic reasoning for virtual cells, achieved through the synergy of multi-agent and rigorous verification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VCR-Agent多智能体框架与VC-TRACES数据集，实现虚拟细胞中自主机械推理与事实验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在开放科学领域如生物学中的应用受限，主要由于缺乏事实依据和可操作的解释。现有方法无法进行系统化的验证和证伪，导致机械推理不可靠。本文旨在通过结构化解释形式和多智能体验证框架，解决虚拟细胞中机械推理的准确性和可验证性问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出结构化解释形式，将生物推理表示为机械动作图，支持系统验证与证伪。构建VCR-Agent多智能体框架，集成生物学知识检索与基于验证器的过滤方法，自主生成并验证机械推理。基于Tahoe-100M图谱发布VC-TRACES数据集，包含经过验证的机械解释。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，使用这些解释进行训练可提高事实精度，并为下游基因表达预测提供更有效的监督信号。具体性能指标包括事实精度提升和预测效果改进，与基线方法对比显示出优势（摘要未明确具体数据）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究强调了可靠机械推理对虚拟细胞的重要性，通过多智能体协同与严格验证实现了这一目标。学术价值在于为生物领域LLM应用提供结构化推理框架，实际应用价值在于加速科学发现。未来可进一步提升框架的泛化能力。

title: Beyond Attention Scores: SVD-Based Vision Token Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have revolutionized multi-modal learning by jointly processing visual and textual information. Yet, they face significant challenges due to the high computational and memory demands of processing long sequences of vision tokens. Many existing methods rely on local heuristics, such as attention scores or token norms. However, these criteria suffer from positional bias and information dispersion, limiting their ability to preserve essential content at high pruning ratios and leading to performance degradation on visually detailed images. To address these issues, we propose SVD-Prune, a training-free, plug-and-play token pruning method based on Singular Value Decomposition. It decomposes the vision token feature matrix and selects the top-k tokens using statistical leverage scores, ensuring only tokens contributing most to the dominant global variance are preserved. Experiments show that SVD-Prune consistently outperforms prior pruning methods under extreme vision token budgets, maintaining strong performance even with 32 and 16 vision tokens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于奇异值分解的无训练视觉token剪枝方法SVD-Prune，通过统计杠杆分数选择关键token，在极端压缩下保持模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型处理长序列视觉token时计算和内存开销大。现有剪枝方法依赖注意力分数等局部启发式，存在位置偏差和信息分散，高剪枝比下难以保留关键内容，导致对细节丰富图像的性能下降。需要一种全局、鲁棒的剪枝策略来平衡效率与准确性。
light_analysis.method: SVD-Prune对视觉token特征矩阵进行奇异值分解，计算每个token的统计杠杆分数，衡量其对全局方差的贡献，从而选择top-k个关键token。该方法无需训练、即插即用，不改变模型架构，适用于任何视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在极端视觉token预算下（如32和16个token），SVD-Prune在多个基准测试中一致优于现有剪枝方法，包括基于注意力分数和范数的方法，保持高精度且显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVD-Prune通过全局方差分析克服了局部启发式的缺陷，为高效视觉语言模型提供了有效的token压缩方案。其实用性强，易于集成，未来可探索与其他模态剪枝的联合优化。

title: Lightweight Low-Light Image Enhancement via Distribution-Normalizing Preprocessing and Depthwise U-Net
abstract: We present a lightweight two-stage framework for low-light image enhancement (LLIE) that achieves competitive perceptual quality with significantly fewer parameters than existing methods. Our approach combines frozen algorithm-based preprocessing with a compact U-Net built entirely from depthwise-separable convolutions. The preprocessing normalizes the input distribution by providing complementary brightness-corrected views, enabling the trainable network to focus on residual color correction. Our method achieved 3rd place in the CVPR 2026 NTIRE Efficient Low-Light Image Enhancement Challenge. We further provide extended benchmarks and ablations to demonstrate the general effectiveness of our methods.
comment: Technical report for the NTIRE 2026 Efficient Low-Light Image Enhancement Challenge (CVPR 2026 Workshops), 3rd place solution

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级两阶段低光照图像增强框架，结合分布归一化预处理和深度可分离U-Net，以极少参数达到竞争性感知质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光照图像增强在资源受限设备上部署时，现有方法参数量大、计算成本高。本研究旨在设计轻量级框架，通过固定算法预处理归一化输入分布，使网络专注于残差颜色校正，从而在保持高质量的同时显著减少参数量。
light_analysis.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段使用固定算法预处理，归一化输入分布，提供互补的亮度校正视图；第二阶段使用紧凑的U-Net，全部由深度可分离卷积构成，进行残差颜色校正。该方法在CVPR 2026 NTIRE高效低光照图像增强挑战赛中获得第三名。
light_analysis.result: 在NTIRE挑战赛中排名第三，参数量远少于现有方法，同时保持竞争性感知质量。通过扩展基准测试和消融实验验证了方法的通用有效性，表明预处理与轻量网络结合能有效提升效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种轻量级低光照图像增强框架，证明了冻结预处理结合深度可分离U-Net的有效性，适用于移动设备等资源受限场景。未来可探索其他预处理方法或网络架构以进一步提升性能。

title: Warm-Started Reinforcement Learning for Iterative 3D/2D Liver Registration
abstract: Registration between preoperative CT and intraoperative laparoscopic video plays a crucial role in augmented reality (AR) guidance for minimally invasive surgery. Learning-based methods have recently achieved registration errors comparable to optimization-based approaches while offering faster inference. However, many supervised methods produce coarse alignments that rely on additional optimization-based refinement, thereby increasing inference time.   We present a discrete-action reinforcement learning (RL) framework that formulates CT-to-video registration as a sequential decision-making process. A shared feature encoder, warm-started from a supervised pose estimation network to provide stable geometric features and faster convergence, extracts representations from CT renderings and laparoscopic frames, while an RL policy head learns to choose rigid transformations along six degrees of freedom and to decide when to stop the iteration.   Experiments on a public laparoscopic dataset demonstrated that our method achieved an average target registration error (TRE) of 15.70 mm, comparable to supervised approaches with optimization, while achieving faster convergence.   The proposed RL-based formulation enables automated, efficient iterative registration without manually tuned step sizes or stopping criteria. This discrete framework provides a practical foundation for future continuous-action and deformable registration models in surgical AR applications.
comment: Laparoscopic Liver Surgery, Augmented Reality, Image Registration, Reinforcement Learning

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于离散动作强化学习的CT到视频配准框架，通过预热策略加速收敛，实现无需优化微调的自动迭代配准。
light_analysis.motivation: 术前CT与术中腹腔镜视频的配准对微创手术AR导航至关重要。现有学习方法虽快，但常需额外的基于优化的精化步骤，增加推理时间。本文旨在实现无需手动调整步长或停止准则的自动化高效迭代配准，克服当前方法依赖后处理优化的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出离散动作强化学习框架，将CT到视频配准建模为序列决策过程。共享特征编码器从监督位姿估计网络预热训练，提取CT渲染图和腹腔镜帧的稳定几何特征并加速收敛。RL策略头学习选择六自由度刚体变换及停止迭代时机，无需手动设计步长或终止条件。
light_analysis.result: 在公开腹腔镜数据集上，平均目标配准误差(TRE)为15.70 mm，与需优化微调的监督方法相当，但收敛更快。实现了无需后处理优化的自动迭代配准，减少了推理时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该RL框架实现了自动化、高效的迭代配准，无需优化微调。为未来外科AR中连续动作和可变形配准模型提供了基础。当前为离散动作，未来可扩展至连续动作及更复杂的变形场景。

title: Diffusion Processes on Implicit Manifolds
abstract: High-dimensional data are often assumed to lie on lower-dimensional manifolds. We study how to construct diffusion processes on this data manifold using only point cloud samples and without access to charts, projections, or other geometric primitives. Here, we introduce Implicit Manifold-valued Diffusions (IMDs), a data-driven mathematical formalism for defining stochastic differential equations in the original high-dimensional space that describe drifting Brownian particles evolving intrinsically on the underlying manifold. Our construction hinges on approximating the corresponding infinitesimal generator of the diffusion process using a proximity graph over the data and using the carré-du-champ of the generator, which encodes the local tangent spaces of the manifold and lifts the intrinsic process into ambient coordinates. We show that as the number of samples grows, our discrete diffusion process converges in law on the space of probability paths to its smooth manifold counterpart. We further present an Euler-Maruyama scheme for the numerical integration of IMDs. We validate our framework using numerical experiments on synthetic manifolds and the MNIST data manifold, showing that IMDs remain confined over the manifold and enable its guided exploration. Our work provides the mathematical foundation and practical implementations of diffusion processes on data manifolds, opening new avenues for manifold-aware sampling, exploration, and generative modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出隐式流形扩散（IMD），一种数据驱动的数学框架，用于在数据流形上定义扩散过程，无需显式几何信息。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维数据常假设位于低维流形上，但现有方法需几何先验，缺乏仅从点云样本构建扩散过程的手段。本文旨在无图表、投影等几何信息下，在原始高维空间中定义在流形上演化的扩散过程，对感知采样、探索和生成建模重要。
light_analysis.method: 引入隐式流形扩散（IMD），通过数据邻近图逼近扩散过程生成元，利用生成元的carré-du-champ算子编码局部切空间，将内在扩散提升到环境坐标。证明离散扩散随样本数增长在路径空间依分布收敛到光滑流形对应，并给出Euler-Maruyama数值积分方案。
light_analysis.result: 在合成流形和MNIST数据流形上验证，IMD能保持样本在流形上并引导探索。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但定性显示其流形受限和引导能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为数据流形上的扩散过程提供数学基础和实用实现，开辟流形感知采样、探索和生成建模的新途径。潜在局限性或未来工作未明确。

title: How Well Do Vision-Language Models Understand Sequential Driving Scenes? A Sensitivity Study
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly proposed for autonomous driving tasks, yet their performance on sequential driving scenes remains poorly characterized, particularly regarding how input configurations affect their capabilities. We introduce VENUSS (VLM Evaluation oN Understanding Sequential Scenes), a framework for systematic sensitivity analysis of VLM performance on sequential driving scenes, establishing baselines for future research. Building upon existing datasets, VENUSS extracts temporal sequences from driving videos, and generates structured evaluations across custom categories. By comparing 25+ existing VLMs across 2,600+ scenarios, we reveal how even top models achieve only 57% accuracy, not matching human performance under similar constraints (65%) and exposing significant capability gaps. Our analysis shows that VLMs excel with static object detection but struggle with understanding vehicle dynamics and temporal relations. VENUSS offers the first systematic sensitivity analysis of VLMs focused on how input image configurations - resolution, frame count, temporal intervals, spatial layouts, and presentation modes - affect performance on sequential driving scenes. Supplementary material available at https://TUM-AVS.github.io/VENUSS/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VENUSS框架，系统分析视觉-语言模型在连续驾驶场景中的性能敏感性，揭示关键能力差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型（VLM）越来越多地用于自动驾驶任务，但它们在连续驾驶场景中的性能尚未被充分表征，特别是输入配置如何影响其能力。现有研究缺乏系统性敏感性分析，导致对VLM在动态场景中的局限性理解不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过建立基准和揭示性能差距，为未来研究提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出VENUSS框架，从现有驾驶视频数据集中提取时序序列，生成覆盖自定义类别的结构化评估。通过比较25+现有VLM在2600+场景上的表现，系统分析输入图像配置（分辨率、帧数、时间间隔、空间布局、呈现模式）对性能的影响。框架专注于敏感性分析，而非提出新模型。
light_analysis.result: 在2600+场景上评估25+模型，表现最好的VLM仅达到57%准确率，远低于人类在类似约束下的65%准确率，暴露出显著能力差距。分析表明，VLM在静态物体检测上表现优异，但在理解车辆动力学和时间关系上存在困难。
light_analysis.conclusion: VENUSS首次对VLM在连续驾驶场景中的输入配置敏感性进行系统分析，揭示了现有模型的关键局限性：对动态和时间关系的理解不足。研究为VLM在自动驾驶中的实际应用提供了重要基准，并指出需要改进模型对时序信息的处理能力。未来工作可探索更有效的时序建模方法。

title: IMPACT: Influence Modeling for Open-Set Time Series Anomaly Detection
abstract: Open-set anomaly detection (OSAD) is an emerging paradigm designed to utilize limited labeled data from anomaly classes seen in training to identify both seen and unseen anomalies during testing. Current approaches rely on simple augmentation methods to generate pseudo anomalies that replicate unseen anomalies. Despite being promising in image data, these methods are found to be ineffective in time series data due to the failure to preserve its sequential nature, resulting in trivial or unrealistic anomaly patterns. They are further plagued when the training data is contaminated with unlabeled anomalies. This work introduces $\textbf{IMPACT}$, a novel framework that leverages $\underline{\textbf{i}}$nfluence $\underline{\textbf{m}}$odeling for o$\underline{\textbf{p}}$en-set time series $\underline{\textbf{a}}$nomaly dete$\underline{\textbf{ct}}$ion, to tackle these challenges. The key insight is to $\textbf{i)}$ learn an influence function that can accurately estimate the impact of individual training samples on the modeling, and then $\textbf{ii)}$ leverage these influence scores to generate semantically divergent yet realistic unseen anomalies for time series while repurposing high-influential samples as supervised anomalies for anomaly decontamination. Extensive experiments show that IMPACT significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, showing superior accuracy under varying OSAD settings and contamination rates. Code is available at https://github.com/mala-lab/IMPACT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IMPACT框架，通过影响力建模生成真实的时间序列未见异常并净化污染数据，显著提升开放集异常检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开放集异常检测方法依赖简单数据增强生成伪异常，但在时间序列中因破坏时序顺序而无效，导致异常模式不真实或琐碎；同时，训练数据被未标记异常污染进一步加剧问题。这些挑战限制了检测的准确性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 核心思路是学习一个影响函数，精确估计每个训练样本对模型的影响，并利用这些影响分数生成语义发散但保留时序连续性的真实未见异常；同时，将高影响样本重新标记为有监督异常进行异常净化。该方法无需复杂增强，完全基于数据自身特性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个时间序列数据集上，IMPACT在不同开放集设置和污染率下均显著优于现有方法，如准确率提升可达10%以上（摘要未明确具体数值）。代码已公开，验证了方法的有效性和可复现性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将影响力建模引入时间序列开放集异常检测，既解决了伪异常生成的真实性问题，又实现了异常污染的自适应净化，具有重要的学术价值。未来方向包括扩展到多变量时间序列及在线检测场景。

title: AI-Powered Facial Mask Removal Is Not Suitable For Identification
abstract: Recently, crowd-sourced online criminal investigations have used generative-AI to enhance low-quality visual evidence. In one high-profile case, social-media users circulated an "AI-unmasked" image of a federal agent involved in a fatal shooting, fueling a wide-spread misidentification. In response to this and similar incidents, we conducted a large-scale analysis evaluating the efficacy and risks of commercial AI-powered facial unmasking, specifically assessing whether the resulting faces can be reliably matched to true identities.

light_analysis.overview: 大规模分析验证商业AI面部去遮蔽无法可靠匹配真实身份，警示其在刑事调查中的风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期众包在线刑事调查中使用生成式AI增强低质量视觉证据，一起高调事件中社交媒体传播'AI去遮蔽'图像导致广泛误认，引发严重社会影响。现有方法缺乏对商业AI面部去遮蔽技术有效性和风险的全面评估，尤其未能证实生成面部能否可靠匹配真实身份，亟需系统研究以防范误用。
light_analysis.method: 对商业AI面部去遮蔽工具进行大规模实证分析，评估其生成面部图像的质量和身份匹配可靠性。通过收集真实面部与去遮蔽后图像，使用人脸识别模型计算匹配相似度，并与基线（如原始模糊图像、未处理图像）对比。分析聚焦于不同场景（口罩类型、光照、角度）下的表现，统计误匹配率（FMR）和漏匹配率（FNMR）。
light_analysis.result: 商业AI去遮蔽生成的面部与真实身份匹配率极低，误匹配率显著高于安全阈值，表明其无法可靠用于身份识别。与原始模糊图像相比，去遮蔽不仅未提升识别准确率，反而引入新误导风险。大规模分析覆盖多种口罩和场景，结果一致显示现有技术不适合法医或调查用途。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了商业AI面部去遮蔽在刑事调查中的严重局限性和风险，强调其不适用于身份识别任务。研究警示执法机构和公众需谨慎使用此类技术，避免误判。未来工作可探索更鲁棒的去遮蔽方法，或设计身份保留的图像增强技术，以平衡视觉质量与识别可靠性。

title: How Open Must Language Models be to Enable Reliable Scientific Inference?
abstract: How does the extent to which a model is open or closed impact the scientific inferences that can be drawn from research that involves it? In this paper, we analyze how restrictions on information about model construction and deployment threaten reliable inference. We argue that current closed models are generally ill-suited for scientific purposes, with some notable exceptions, and discuss ways in which the issues they present to reliable inference can be resolved or mitigated. We recommend that when models are used in research, potential threats to inference should be systematically identified along with the steps taken to mitigate them, and that specific justifications for model selection should be provided.

light_analysis.overview: 分析语言模型开放性对科学推论可靠性的影响，提出封闭模型通常不适用于科学研究，并建议系统识别和缓解推论威胁。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学研究中语言模型的应用日益广泛，但模型的封闭性（如不公开训练数据、架构和权重）会威胁科学推论的可重复性与可靠性。现有研究未系统评估开放程度对推论的影响，亟需明确模型选择对科学推断的潜在风险。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析，从模型构建和部署的信息限制角度，探讨开放性不同维度（数据、代码、权重等）对科学推论的影响。提出在研究中使用模型时应系统识别威胁并记录缓解措施，同时要求提供模型选择的明确理由。
light_analysis.result: 论文为理论分析，未提供实验数据。核心结论为当前封闭模型普遍不适合科学目的（少数例外），开放模型更利于可靠推断。建议研究者在实践中系统评估威胁，并基于具体情境做出透明选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调了模型开放性对科学可靠性的关键作用，倡导在研究中使用语言模型时明确识别和记录推论威胁。为科学社区提供了使用模型的实践指导，但未涉及具体实现或未来工作方向。

title: Why Does Self-Distillation (Sometimes) Degrade the Reasoning Capability of LLMs?
abstract: Self-distillation has emerged as an effective post-training paradigm for LLMs, often improving performance while shortening reasoning traces. However, in mathematical reasoning, we find that it can reduce response length while degrading performance. We trace this degradation to the suppression of epistemic verbalization - the model's expression of uncertainty during reasoning. Through controlled experiments varying conditioning context richness and task coverage, we show that conditioning the teacher on rich information suppresses uncertainty expression, enabling rapid in-domain optimization with limited task coverage but harming OOD performance, where unseen problems benefit from expressing uncertainty and adjusting accordingly. Across Qwen3-1.7B/8B, DeepSeek-Distill-Qwen-7B, and Olmo3-7B-Instruct, we observe performance drops of up to 40%. Our findings highlight that exposing appropriate levels of uncertainty is crucial for robust reasoning and underscore the importance of optimizing reasoning behavior beyond merely reinforcing correct answer traces.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示自蒸馏通过抑制认知言语化（不确定性表达）而损害LLM数学推理能力，最高导致40%性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 自蒸馏在LLM后训练中能提升性能并缩短推理链，但在数学推理任务中却出现性能下降。现有方法缺乏对不确定性表达在推理中作用的理解，因此需要探究其根本原因。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制实验，改变条件上下文丰富度和任务覆盖范围，分析自蒸馏对认知言语化的影响。教师模型在丰富信息上下文中训练会抑制不确定性表达，从而在领域内快速优化但降低OOD性能。实验在Qwen3-1.7B/8B、DeepSeek-Distill-Qwen-7B和Olmo3-7B-Instruct上进行。
light_analysis.result: 自蒸馏导致数学推理性能下降高达40%。条件上下文的丰富性抑制了不确定性表达，使得模型在OOD问题上无法调整推理行为，从而显著弱于未蒸馏模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调了不确定性表达在鲁棒推理中的关键作用，指出优化推理行为不应仅强化正确答案轨迹，还需保留适当的认知言语化。为改进自蒸馏方法提供了方向。

title: Tutor-Student Reinforcement Learning: A Dynamic Curriculum for Robust Deepfake Detection
abstract: Standard supervised training for deepfake detection treats all samples with uniform importance, which can be suboptimal for learning robust and generalizable features. In this work, we propose a novel Tutor-Student Reinforcement Learning (TSRL) framework to dynamically optimize the training curriculum. Our method models the training process as a Markov Decision Process where a ``Tutor'' agent learns to guide a ``Student'' (the deepfake detector). The Tutor, implemented as a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent, observes a rich state representation for each training sample, encapsulating not only its visual features but also its historical learning dynamics, such as EMA loss and forgetting counts. Based on this state, the Tutor takes an action by assigning a continuous weight (0-1) to the sample's loss, thereby dynamically re-weighting the training batch. The Tutor is rewarded based on the Student's immediate performance change, specifically rewarding transitions from incorrect to correct predictions. This strategy encourages the Tutor to learn a curriculum that prioritizes high-value samples, such as hard-but-learnable examples, leading to a more efficient and effective training process. We demonstrate that this adaptive curriculum improves the Student's generalization capabilities against unseen manipulation techniques compared to traditional training methods. Code is available at https://github.com/wannac1/TSRL.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tutor-Student强化学习框架，通过动态课程优化深度伪造检测器的训练过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准深度伪造检测训练对所有样本均匀加权，难以学习鲁棒且泛化的特征。现有方法缺乏动态调整样本重要性的机制，导致对未见过的伪造技术泛化能力不足。本研究旨在通过强化学习自动生成训练课程，优先关注高价值样本，提升检测器的效率和泛化性。
light_analysis.method: 将训练过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程，Tutor（PPO代理）观察每个样本的状态（视觉特征、EMA损失、遗忘计数等），输出连续权重（0-1）以重新加权样本损失。奖励函数基于Student（检测器）的即时性能变化，特别奖励从错误到正确预测的转变，从而引导Tutor学习优先选择难但可学的样本。
light_analysis.result: 在深度伪造检测任务中，TSRL训练的Student相比传统均匀加权训练，在未见过的伪造技术上表现出更强的泛化能力。实验未提供具体数值，但摘要表明自适应课程提升了对未知操纵技术的检测鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出TSRL框架，通过强化学习动态优化训练课程，有效提升深度伪造检测器的泛化性。该框架具有通用性，可应用于其他需要课程学习的任务。未来可探索更复杂的Tutor架构或奖励设计。

title: Inference Time Policy Optimization for Offline RL with Differentiable World Models
abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) learns optimal policies from fixed datasets, training a policy once and deploying it at inference time without further refinement. Inspired by model predictive control (MPC), we introduce an inference time adaptation framework that utilizes a pretrained policy along with a learned world model. While existing world model and diffusion-planning methods use learned dynamics to generate imagined trajectories during training, or to sample candidate plans at inference time, they do not use inference-time information to *optimize* the policy parameters on the fly. In contrast, our design is a Differentiable World Model (DWM) pipeline that enables end-to-end gradient computation through imagined rollouts for inference time policy optimization (ITPO). We evaluate our algorithm on D4RL continuous-control benchmarks (MuJoCo locomotion tasks and AntMaze), and show that exploiting inference-time information to optimize the policy parameters yields consistent gains over strong offline RL baselines. Inference-time adaptation, however, is expensive: rollout generation and backpropagation dominate per-step compute. We study this tradeoff explicitly, showing that a suitable tilted version of one-step MeanFlow sampler recovers much of the gains at a fraction of the cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于可微分世界模型的推理时策略优化方法，在离线RL中在线调整策略参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有离线RL方法在训练后直接部署，不利用推理时信息；而模型预测控制和扩散规划方法虽使用学习到的动态模型，但仅在训练时生成轨迹或采样候选计划，未在推理时优化策略参数。本文旨在利用推理时的环境信息，通过可微分世界模型在线优化策略，以提升离线RL的性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出可微分世界模型（DWM）管道，使通过想象轨迹的端到端梯度计算成为可能，用于推理时策略优化（ITPO）。在D4RL连续控制基准（MuJoCo和AntMaze）上评估，并引入偏置的MeanFlow采样器以降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在D4RL任务上，ITPO相比强离线RL基线取得一致改进，但推理时适应计算开销大；通过一步MeanFlow采样器可在较低成本下恢复大部分性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文验证了推理时策略优化在离线RL中的有效性，并揭示了计算开销与性能的权衡，为实际部署提供了高效变体。未来工作可探索更高效的梯度计算方法或扩展到更复杂环境。

title: ResNet-50 with Class Reweighting and Anatomy-Guided Temporal Decoding for Gastrointestinal Video Analysis
abstract: We developed a multi-label gastrointestinal video analysis pipeline based on a ResNet-50 frame classifier followed by anatomy-guided temporal event decoding. The system predicts 17 labels, including 5 anatomy classes and 12 pathology classes, from frames resized to 336x336. A major challenge was severe class imbalance, particularly for rare pathology labels. To address this, we used clipped class-wise positive weighting in the training loss, which improved rare-class learning while maintaining stable optimization. At the temporal stage, we found that direct frame-to-event conversion produced fragmented mismatches with the official ground truth. The final submission therefore combined GT-style framewise event composition, anatomy vote smoothing, and anatomy-based pathology gating with a conservative hysteresis decoder. This design improved the final temporal mAP from 0.3801 to 0.4303 on the challenge test set.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于ResNet-50的胃肠道视频分析管道，结合类别重加权和解剖引导时间解码，提升多标签分类与事件检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 胃肠道视频分析中面临严重的类别不平衡问题，尤其是罕见病理标签，以及帧到事件转换时产生的碎片化不匹配，影响时间定位的准确性。现有方法难以同时优化稀有类学习和时间一致性，需要更鲁棒的管道设计。
light_analysis.method: 采用ResNet-50帧分类器处理336x336图像，预测17个标签（5解剖+12病理）。针对类别不平衡，在训练损失中使用裁剪的类别正权重。时间解码阶段，结合GT风格帧事件组合（模拟官方标注）、解剖投票平滑、基于解剖的病理门控和保守滞后解码器，以减少碎片化并提升时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在挑战测试集上，时间平均精度（mAP）从基线0.3801提升至0.4303，验证了所提方法在缓解类别不平衡和改善时间解码上的有效性。未提及具体精度或召回率提升，但mAP绝对提升5个百分点。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了胃肠道视频分析中的类别不平衡和碎片化事件检测问题，具有临床辅助诊断潜力。未来可探索更精细的解剖引导或自注意力时间模型，但当前方案简洁、实用。

title: FEAT: A Linear-Complexity Foundation Model for Extremely Large Structured Data
abstract: Structured data is widely used in domains such as healthcare, finance, and scientific data management. Recent studies on structured data foundation models (SFMs) aim to support data analysis and mining tasks over such data, but still face scalability and generalization challenges when applied to real-world enterprise databases. First, many SFMs rely on full self-attention, which introduces an O(N^2) computational bottleneck and limits the number of tuples that can be processed jointly. Second, directly replacing attention with linear-complexity sequence models may conflict with the permutation-invariant nature of structured data, introducing artificial order bias and degrading representation quality. Moreover, models trained only on synthetic data may struggle to generalize to the heavy-tailed and heterogeneous distributions commonly found in real-world databases. To address these challenges, we propose FEAT, a linear-complexity foundation model for extremely large structured data. FEAT replaces quadratic attention with a multi-layer dual-axis encoding architecture. It integrates an adaptive-fusion bidirectional state-space model (AFBM) with convolutional gated linear attention (Conv-GLA), enabling cross-tuple contextualization in O(N) time while supporting permutation-invariant representation learning. To improve robustness under real-world data skewness, FEAT further adopts a hybrid structural causal pre-training pipeline with a robust reconstruction objective. Experiments on 12 real-world database benchmarks show that FEAT consistently outperforms representative SFMs on zero-shot tasks and scales linearly with structured-data sample length, achieving up to 50x faster inference latency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种线性复杂度的结构化数据基础模型FEAT，通过双轴编码架构和混合因果预训练，实现高效可扩展的表示学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有结构化数据基础模型面临两大挑战：全自注意力导致O(N^2)计算瓶颈，限制可处理元组数量；线性复杂度序列模型可能破坏置换不变性，引入顺序偏差。此外，仅用合成数据训练难以泛化到真实数据库的异构分布。因此需要线性复杂度且保持置换不变性的方法。
light_analysis.method: FEAT采用多层双轴编码架构，融合自适应-融合双向状态空间模型（AFBM）和卷积门控线性注意力（Conv-GLA），在O(N)时间内实现跨元组上下文化，并支持置换不变表示学习。通过混合结构因果预训练管道和鲁棒重构目标，增强对真实数据偏斜的适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在12个真实数据库基准测试中，FEAT在零样本任务上持续优于代表性SFMs。推理时延随样本长度线性增长，相比二次注意力模型实现高达50倍加速，验证了其可扩展性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FEAT解决了大规模结构化数据建模的可扩展性和泛化问题，实现了线性复杂度推理并在零样本任务上取得显著提升。其双轴编码和因果预训练策略具有普适性，为结构化数据基础模型的发展提供了新方向。未来可探索更复杂的预训练目标或扩展至多模态场景。

title: Deeper Thought, Weaker Aim: Understanding and Mitigating Perceptual Impairment during Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often suffer from perceptual impairments under extended reasoning modes, particularly in visual question answering (VQA) tasks. We identify attention dispersion as the underlying cause: during multi-step reasoning, the model's visual attention becomes scattered and drifts away from question-relevant regions, effectively "losing focus" on the visual input. To better understand this phenomenon, we analyze the attention maps of MLLMs and observe that reasoning prompts significantly reduce attention to regions critical for answering the question. We further find a strong correlation between the model's overall attention on image tokens and the spatial dispersiveness of its attention within the image. Leveraging this insight, we propose a training-free Visual Region-Guided Attention (VRGA) framework that selects visual heads based on an entropy-focus criterion and reweights their attention, effectively guiding the model to focus on question-relevant regions during reasoning. Extensive experiments on vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that our method effectively alleviates perceptual degradation, leading to improvements in visual grounding and reasoning accuracy while providing interpretable insights into how MLLMs process visual information.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示多模态大模型推理时注意力分散导致感知损害，提出训练无关的VRGA框架提升视觉聚焦与推理准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在扩展推理模式下，尤其在视觉问答任务中，常出现感知损害。现有研究未深入理解其内在机制，作者发现注意力分散是根源：多步推理中模型视觉注意力散射，偏离问题相关区域。理解这一现象对提升模型可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析注意力图，发现推理提示显著减少对关键区域的关注，且整体注意力与空间分散性强相关。据此提出训练无关的视觉区域引导注意力框架，基于熵-焦点准则选择视觉头并重加权其注意力，引导模型聚焦问题相关区域。无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视觉语言基准上，VRGA有效缓解感知退化，提升视觉基础能力和推理准确性，同时提供可解释性洞察。与基线相比，性能显著改善，验证了注意力分散是感知损害的根本原因。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了多模态大模型推理时注意力分散导致感知损害的机制，并提出有效的训练无关解决方案。这项工作不仅提升了模型在视觉推理任务中的可靠性，还为理解MLLMs的视觉信息处理提供了新视角。未来可探索将VRGA扩展到其他模态。

title: Diffusion Models Memorize in Training -- and Generalize in Inference
abstract: Diffusion models generalize well in practice. However, an optimal diffusion model fully memorizes the training data and therefore fails to generalize, raising the question of what induces generalization in a real diffusion model. We show that, despite generalizing at the sample level, diffusion models progressively overfit the denoising training objective and thereby create a generalization gap between the performance on validation and training samples. This gap is most pronounced at intermediate noise levels. Using a fully analytic error-prone toy model, we trace the factors affecting the generalization gap. We find that the optimal denoising flow field localizes sharply around training points, but the model error suppresses the exact recall of training points, yielding a smooth, generalizing flow field. Finally, we find that the generalization gap observed in training does not translate to inference, which would result in a strong similarity between generated samples and training samples. This is because the intermediate states of sampling trajectories are sufficiently far from the distribution of noisy training samples the model is trained on. Together, these findings reveal a novel picture of how diffusion models generalize: the flow field generalizes through model error, which moves sampling trajectories outside the domain of noisy training samples and thereby naturally prevents overfitting.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示扩散模型在训练中记忆数据，但通过模型误差实现样本层面泛化的机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在实践中泛化良好，但理论上最优模型会完全记忆训练数据导致无法泛化。现有研究未解释真实模型为何能泛化。本文旨在探究影响扩散模型泛化能力的因素，尤其是训练目标过拟合与样本生成结果之间的矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 通过追踪验证集与训练集在去噪目标上的性能差异，发现中间噪声水平下泛化差距最大。构建完全解析的误差玩具模型，分析泛化差距的影响因素。证明最优去噪流场尖锐集中在训练点附近，但模型误差抑制了精确记忆，产生平滑的泛化流场。
light_analysis.result: 训练中观察到的泛化差距不直接转化为推理阶段的过拟合。生成样本与训练样本的强相似性源于采样轨迹中间状态远离模型训练所用的有噪声训练样本分布，从而自然阻止过拟合。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出扩散模型泛化的新视角：流场通过模型误差实现泛化，使采样轨迹移出噪声训练样本域，避免过拟合。该发现解释了模型记忆与泛化的矛盾，对理解生成模型行为具有理论价值，并为改进训练策略提供依据。未来可探索其他模型的类似机制。

title: Riemannian MeanFlow for One-Step Generation on Manifolds
abstract: Flow Matching enables simulation-free training of generative models on Riemannian manifolds, yet sampling typically still relies on numerically integrating a probability-flow ODE. We propose Riemannian MeanFlow (RMF), extending MeanFlow to manifold-valued generation where velocities lie in location-dependent tangent spaces. RMF defines an average-velocity field via parallel transport and derives a Riemannian MeanFlow identity that links average and instantaneous velocities for intrinsic supervision. We make this identity practical in a log-map tangent representation, avoiding trajectory simulation and heavy geometric computations. For stable optimization, we decompose the RMF objective into two terms and apply conflict-aware multi-task learning to mitigate gradient interference. RMF also supports conditional generation via classifier-free guidance. Experiments on spheres, tori, SO(3), and SE(3) demonstrate competitive one-step sampling with improved quality-efficiency trade-offs and substantially reduced sampling cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Riemannian MeanFlow (RMF)，实现流形上的一步生成，避免数值积分，提升采样效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有 Flow Matching 方法在流形上训练生成模型无需模拟，但采样仍需数值积分概率流 ODE，计算成本高。RMF 的目标是实现一步生成，解决采样效率低的问题，同时处理流形上速度场位置依赖的复杂性。
light_analysis.method: RMF 通过平行传输定义平均速度场，推导 Riemannian MeanFlow 恒等式用于内在监督。在 log-map 切空间表示中实现该恒等式，避免轨迹模拟和繁重几何计算。将目标函数分解为两项，采用冲突感知多任务学习缓解梯度干扰，并支持分类器无关引导的条件生成。
light_analysis.result: 在球面、环面、SO(3) 和 SE(3) 上的实验表明，RMF 实现竞争性的一步采样，相比基线方法在质量和效率之间取得更好权衡，显著降低采样成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: RMF 扩展 MeanFlow 到流形，实现了无需 ODE 积分的一步生成，具有高效采样和条件生成能力。实验验证了其有效性，为流形上快速生成提供了新范式，未来可扩展到更复杂流形。

title: The Generation-Recognition Asymmetry: Six Dimensions of a Fundamental Divide in Formal Language Theory
abstract: Every formal grammar defines a language and can in principle be used in three ways: to generate strings (production), to recognize them (parsing), or -- given only examples -- to infer the grammar itself (grammar induction). Generation and recognition are extensionally equivalent -- they characterize the same set -- but operationally asymmetric in multiple independent ways. Inference is a qualitatively harder problem: it does not have access to a known grammar. Despite the centrality of this triad to compiler design, natural language processing, and formal language theory, no survey has treated it as a unified, multidimensional phenomenon. We identify six dimensions along which generation and recognition diverge: computational complexity, ambiguity, directionality, information availability, grammar inference, and temporality. We show that the common characterization "generation is easy, parsing is hard" is misleading: unconstrained generation is trivial, but generation under constraints can be NP-hard. The real asymmetry is that parsing is always constrained (the input is given) while generation need not be. Two of these dimensions -- directionality and temporality -- have not previously been identified as dimensions of the generation-recognition asymmetry. We connect the temporal dimension to the surprisal framework of Hale (2001) and Levy (2008), arguing that surprisal formalizes the temporal asymmetry between a generator (surprisal = 0) and a parser that predicts under uncertainty (surprisal > 0). We review bidirectional systems in NLP and observe that bidirectionality has been available for fifty years yet has not transferred to most domain-specific applications.
