light_analysis.result: 在10个不同规模（8B-70B+）的LLM上测试，基线准确率46%至92%。应用DrugRAG后，5个评估模型的准确率提升了7至21个百分点，例如Gemma 3 27B从61%升至71%，Llama 3.1 8B从46%升至67%。McNemar分析表明中小型开源模型的提升具有统计显著性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DrugRAG通过集成结构化外部药物知识显著提升了LLM在药学问答任务中的性能，尤其对中小型模型效果显著。该方法提供了一种实用、无需修改模型的增强管道，有助于构建循证药学AI应用。未来可扩展至其他专业领域或更复杂的知识检索策略。

title: Constrained Policy Optimization via Sampling-Based Weight-Space Projection
abstract: Safety-critical learning requires policies that improve performance without leaving the safe operating regime. We study constrained policy learning where model parameters must satisfy rollout-based safety constraints that can be evaluated but not differentiated analytically. We propose SCPO, a sampling-based weight-space projection method that enforces safety directly in parameter space without requiring gradient access to the constraint functions. SCPO constructs a local safe region by combining rollout-based safety evaluations with smoothness bounds relating parameter perturbations to changes in safety metrics, and projects each gradient update via a convex QCQP. We establish a safe-by-induction guarantee: starting from any safe initialization, all intermediate policies remain safe given feasible projections. In constrained control settings with a stabilizing backup policy, SCPO further ensures closed-loop stability while enabling safe adaptation beyond the conservative backup. Experiments on constrained regression with harmful supervision and double-integrator imitation with a malicious expert show that SCPO rejects unsafe updates, maintains feasibility throughout training, and achieves meaningful objective improvement.
comment: Accepted for publication at IFAC World Congress 2026; fixed minor notation inconsistencies

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCPO方法，通过采样权重空间投影确保策略优化中安全约束的满足，无需约束函数梯度。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全关键学习要求策略在保证安全的前提下提升性能，但现有方法常依赖可微约束或保守备份策略，无法处理不可微约束或过度保守。SCPO旨在直接对参数空间施加安全约束，避免梯度需求，同时允许非保守的适应。
light_analysis.method: SCPO通过采样安全评估和光滑性界限构建局部安全区域，将梯度更新投影到该区域内的可行点，通过凸QCQP求解。无需约束函数梯度，仅需基于rollout的安全评估。理论证明从安全初始化开始可保持所有中间策略安全。
light_analysis.result: 在受控回归（有害监督）和双积分器模仿（恶意专家）实验中，SCPO成功拒绝不安全更新，全程保持可行性，并实现有意义的目标改进。与基线相比，避免违反安全约束，同时获得更好的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCPO为不可微安全约束下的策略优化提供了一种通用框架，具有安全归纳保证。适用于安全关键任务，如机器人控制和自动驾驶，未来可扩展到更复杂约束和系统。

title: End2Reg: Learning Task-Specific Segmentation for Markerless Registration in Spine Surgery
abstract: Intraoperative navigation in spine surgery demands millimeter-level accuracy. Currently, this is achieved through radiation-intensive intraoperative imaging and bone-anchored markers that are invasive and disrupt surgical workflow. Markerless RGB-D registration methods offer a promising alternative. However, existing approaches rely on weak segmentation labels to isolate relevant anatomical structures, potentially propagating errors through the registration process. We present End2Reg, an end-to-end deep learning framework that jointly optimizes segmentation and registration, eliminating the need for segmentation labels and manual steps. The network learns task-specific segmentation masks optimized for registration, guided solely by the registration objective without explicit segmentation supervision. End2Reg achieves state-of-the-art performance on ex- and in-vivo benchmarks, reducing median Target Registration Error by 32% and mean Root Mean Square Error by 61%, while maintaining robust performance under partial occlusions. Ablation results confirm that end-to-end optimization significantly improves registration accuracy. Overall, End2Reg advances towards fully automatic, markerless intraoperative navigation. Code and interactive visualizations are available at: https://lorenzopettinari.github.io/end-2-reg/.
comment: Early Accepted MICCAI 2026. Code and interactive visualizations: https://lorenzopettinari.github.io/end-2-reg/

light_analysis.overview: 提出端到端框架End2Reg，联合优化分割与配准，无需分割标签，实现无标记RGB-D脊柱手术导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 脊柱手术导航要求毫米级精度，现有方法依赖辐射成像和骨锚标记，侵入性强且干扰流程。无标记RGB-D配准虽为替代方案，但需弱分割标签，可能引入误差。
light_analysis.method: End2Reg采用端到端深度学习，联合优化分割和配准。网络学习任务特定分割掩码，仅由配准目标引导，无需分割标注。在ex-vivo和in-vivo数据上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在基准测试中，中位目标配准误差降低32%，均方根误差降低61%，且部分遮挡下保持鲁棒。消融实验证实端到端优化显著提升精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: End2Reg推进全自动无标记术中导航，减少人工步骤，提升配准准确性。未来可扩展至其他手术导航场景。

title: CHEM: Estimating and Understanding Hallucinations in Deep Learning for Image Processing
abstract: Deep learning-based methods have recently achieved significant success in image reconstruction problems. However, challenges have emerged, as these methods may generate unrealistic artifacts or hallucinations, which can interfere with analysis in safety-critical scenarios. This paper introduces a framework for quantifying and characterizing hallucinated artifacts in image reconstruction models. The proposed method, termed the Conformal Hallucination Estimation Metric (CHEM), enables the identification of hallucination-prone regions in model predictions. It leverages wavelet and shearlet representations to localize such regions at the level of image features, and uses conformalized quantile regression to assess hallucination levels in a distribution-free manner. A theoretical analysis is provided, characterizing the sensitivity of CHEM to hallucinated artifacts and its relationship to the mean squared error. Building on these insights and adopting a viewpoint grounded in approximation theory, we investigate why U-shaped networks, widely used architectures for image reconstruction, tend to hallucination-prone predictions. We assess the effectiveness of the proposed approach on astronomical image deconvolution using the CANDELS dataset with architectures such as U-Net, SwinUNet, and Learnlets, and on natural image super-resolution using the DIV2K dataset with models such as DRUNet, Unfolded DRS, RAM, and DPS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CHEM框架，量化深度学习图像重建中的幻觉，并分析U型网络易产生幻觉的原因。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习在图像重建中表现优异，但可能产生不真实的幻觉，影响安全关键场景的分析。现有方法缺乏对幻觉的量化与理解，亟需一种分布无关的评估手段。
light_analysis.method: 采用小波和剪切波表示定位特征级幻觉区域，结合保形分位数回归进行分布无关的幻觉评估。从近似理论角度解释U型网络易产生幻觉的机理。在天文图像反卷积和自然图像超分辨率任务上验证多种架构。
light_analysis.result: CHEM能有效识别幻觉区域，并揭示U型网络因近似理论特性易产生幻觉。在CANDELS和DIV2K数据集上，对不同架构的幻觉水平进行量化评估，验证了方法的泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出CHEM实现图像重建幻觉的量化与理解，具有理论支撑和实验验证，可提升模型可靠性。未来可拓展至其他图像处理任务。

title: THEval. Evaluation Framework for Talking Head Video Generation
abstract: Video generation has achieved remarkable progress, with generated videos increasingly resembling real ones. However, the rapid advance in generation has outpaced the development of adequate evaluation metrics. Currently, the assessment of talking head generation primarily relies on limited metrics, evaluating general video quality, lip synchronization, and on conducting user studies. Motivated by this, we propose a new evaluation framework comprising 8 metrics related to three dimensions (i) quality, (ii) naturalness, and (iii) synchronization. In selecting the metrics, we place emphasis on efficiency, as well as alignment with human preferences. Based on this considerations, we streamline to analyze fine-grained dynamics of head, mouth, and eyebrows, as well as face quality. Our extensive experiments on 85,000 videos generated by 17 state-of-the-art models suggest that while many algorithms excel in lip synchronization, they face challenges with generating expressiveness and artifact-free details. These videos were generated based on a novel real dataset, that we have curated, in order to mitigate bias of training data. Our proposed benchmark framework is aimed at evaluating the improvement of generative methods. Original code, dataset and leaderboards will be publicly released and regularly updated with new methods, in order to reflect progress in the field.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个包含8个指标的三维评估框架，用于全面评估说话人头部视频生成的质量、自然度和同步性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成技术快速进步，但评估指标发展滞后，现有方法主要评估通用视频质量、唇部同步和用户研究，缺乏对细粒度动态和表现力的全面评估。该研究旨在建立一个与人类偏好对齐、高效且全面的评估框架，以推动该领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 提出THEval评估框架，涵盖质量、自然度和同步性三个维度，共8个指标。通过分析头部、嘴巴和眉毛的细粒度动态以及面部质量来评估生成视频。基于17个SOTA模型生成的85,000个视频进行实验，并构建新数据集以减轻训练数据偏差。强调效率与人类偏好对齐。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，许多算法在唇部同步方面表现优异，但在生成表现力和无伪影细节方面存在挑战。该框架通过细粒度指标揭示了现有方法的不足，并提供了基准以评估生成方法的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为说话人头部视频生成提供了全面、高效的评估基准，有助于推动生成方法在表现力和细节质量上的提升。未来将公开代码、数据集和排行榜，并定期更新以反映领域进展。

title: Principled RL for Flow Matching Emerges from the Chunk-level Policy Optimization
abstract: Recent Progress in post-training flow matching for text-to-image (T2I) generation with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has demonstrated strong potential. However, it is hindered by a critical limitation: inaccurate advantage attribution. In this work, we argue that aggregating consecutive steps into a coherent `chunk' and shifting the policy optimization paradigm from GRPO's step level to the chunk level can effectively mitigate the negative impact of this issue. Building on this insight, we propose Group Chunking Policy Optimization (GCPO), the first chunk-level reinforcement learning approach for post-training flow matching. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GCPO achieves superior performance on both standard T2I benchmarks and preference alignment, with up to 43% relative gains over GRPO, highlighting the promise of chunk-level policy optimization. The code is available on https://github.com/xingzhejun/GCPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出块级强化学习方法GCPO，解决流匹配后训练中优势归因不准确问题，显著提升文本到图像生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GRPO方法在流匹配后训练中存在不准确的优势归因问题，导致策略优化效果受限。将连续步骤聚合为块并在块级进行优化可缓解该问题，目前缺乏此类研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出Group Chunking Policy Optimization (GCPO)，将流匹配中的连续去噪步骤聚合为块，在块级进行策略优化，替代GRPO的步级优化。通过组块划分实现更准确的优势估计。
light_analysis.result: 在标准T2I基准和偏好对齐任务上，GCPO相对GRPO取得高达43%的相对提升，验证了块级策略优化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GCPO首次将块级强化学习应用于流匹配后训练，有效提升文本到图像生成质量。代码已开源，为后续研究提供基础。

title: Can VLMs Unlock Semantic Anomaly Detection? A Framework for Structured Reasoning
abstract: Autonomous driving systems remain critically vulnerable to the long-tail of rare, out-of-distribution semantic anomalies. While VLMs have emerged as promising tools for perception, their application in anomaly detection remains largely restricted to prompting proprietary models - limiting reliability, reproducibility, and deployment feasibility. To address this gap, we introduce SAVANT (Semantic Anomaly Verification/Analysis Toolkit), a novel model-agnostic reasoning framework that reformulates anomaly detection as a layered semantic consistency verification. By applying SAVANT's two-phase pipeline - structured scene description extraction and multi-modal evaluation - existing VLMs improve their scores in detecting anomalous driving scenarios from input images. Our approach replaces ad hoc prompting with semantic-aware reasoning, transforming VLM-based detection into a principled decomposition across four semantic domains. We show that across a balanced set of real-world driving scenarios, applying SAVANT improves VLM's absolute recall by approximately 18.5% compared to prompting baselines. Moreover, this gain enables reliable large-scale annotation: leveraging the best proprietary model within our framework, we automatically labeled around 10,000 real-world images with high confidence. We use the resulting high-quality dataset to fine-tune a 7B open-source model (Qwen2.5-VL) to perform single-shot anomaly detection, achieving 90.8% recall and 93.8% accuracy - surpassing all models evaluated while enabling local deployment at near-zero cost. By coupling structured semantic reasoning with scalable data curation, we provide a practical solution to data scarcity in semantic anomaly detection for autonomous systems. Supplementary material: https://TUM-AVS.github.io/SAVANT/.

light_analysis.overview: 引入SAVANT框架，将异常检测重构为分层语义一致性验证，提升VLM性能，并利用自动标注数据微调开源模型，实现高效本地部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶系统对罕见分布外语义异常极度脆弱，现有VLM异常检测依赖提示专有模型，导致可靠性、可复现性和部署可行性受限，缺乏系统化的语义推理方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SAVANT框架，采用两阶段流水线：结构化场景描述提取与多模态评估，将异常检测分解为四个语义域的分层一致性验证，替代传统ad hoc提示，实现模型无关的推理。
light_analysis.result: 在真实驾驶场景中，SAVANT使VLM绝对召回率提升约18.5%；自动标注约1万张高置信度图像，微调Qwen2.5-VL达到90.8%召回率和93.8%准确率，超越所有评估模型，且支持本地近零成本部署。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过结构化语义推理与可扩展数据策展的结合，有效解决语义异常检测中的数据稀缺问题，为自动驾驶系统提供实用方案，未来可拓展至更多感知任务。

title: FineVision: Open Data Is All You Need
abstract: The advancement of vision-language models (VLMs) is hampered by a fragmented landscape of inconsistent and contaminated public datasets. We introduce FineVision, a meticulously collected, curated, and unified corpus of 24 million samples - the largest open resource of its kind. We unify more than 200 sources into 185 subsets via a semi-automated, human-in-the-loop pipeline: automation performs bulk ingestion and schema mapping, while reviewers audit mappings and spot-check outputs to verify faithful consumption of annotations, appropriate formatting and diversity, and safety; issues trigger targeted fixes and re-runs. The workflow further applies rigorous de-duplication within and across sources and decontamination against 66 public benchmarks. FineVision also encompasses agentic/GUI tasks with a unified action space; reviewers validate schemas and inspect a sample of trajectories to confirm executable fidelity. Models trained on FineVision consistently outperform those trained on existing open mixtures across a broad evaluation suite, underscoring the benefits of scale, data hygiene, and balanced automation with human oversight. We release the corpus and curation tools to accelerate data-centric VLM research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FineVision，一个大规模、精心策划的视觉语言数据集，通过半自动化人机协同流程构建，显著提升模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）的发展受到公共数据集碎片化、不一致和污染问题的严重阻碍。现有数据集缺乏统一标准，包含噪声和冗余，导致模型训练效果不佳。为解决这一问题，需要一个大规模、高质量、经过严格清洗和统一整理的数据集，以推动VLM研究的数据驱动进展。
light_analysis.method: FineVision通过半自动化、人在回路中的管道构建：自动化批量摄取和模式映射，人工审核映射并抽查输出以确保注释忠实性、格式多样性、安全性和可执行忠实性（针对智能体/GUI任务）。应用严格的去重和去污染（针对66个公开基准），最终整合200多个来源为185个子集，共计2400万样本。
light_analysis.result: 在FineVision上训练的视觉语言模型在广泛评估套件中持续优于现有开放混合数据集训练的模型。具体性能提升体现在多个基准测试上，但摘要未提供数值指标，强调了规模、数据卫生和平衡自动化与人工监督的益处。
light_analysis.conclusion: FineVision作为目前最大的开放视觉语言数据集，通过严格的数据策划和半自动化流程，显著提升了模型性能。该工作强调数据质量和规模的重要性，并发布数据集和工具，为以数据为中心的VLM研究奠定基础。未来可扩展更多任务和语言覆盖。

title: Free-Grained Hierarchical Visual Recognition
abstract: Hierarchical image recognition seeks to predict class labels along a semantic taxonomy, from broad categories to specific ones, typically under the tidy assumption that every training image is fully annotated along its taxonomy path. Reality is messier: A distant bird may be labeled only bird, while a clear close-up may justify bald eagle. We introduce free-grain training, where labels may appear at any level of the taxonomy and models must learn consistent hierarchical predictions from incomplete, mixed-granularity supervision. We build benchmark datasets with varying label granularity and show that existing hierarchical methods deteriorate sharply in this setting. To make up for missing supervision, we propose two simple solutions: One adds broad text-based supervision that captures visual attributes, and the other treats missing labels at specific taxonomy levels as a semi-supervised learning problem. We also study free-grained inference, where the model chooses how deep to predict, returning a reliable coarse label when a fine-grained one is uncertain. Together, our task, datasets, and methods move hierarchical recognition closer to the way labels arise in the real world.

light_analysis.overview: 提出free-grained训练框架，支持混合粒度标签的层次视觉识别，更贴近现实标注场景。
light_analysis.motivation: 层次图像识别通常假设训练图像完全标注分类路径，但现实标签可能出现在任意层次（如仅标注‘鸟’或具体到‘秃鹰’）。现有方法在标签粒度不一致时性能急剧下降，亟需处理不完整、混合粒度监督的有效方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建不同标签粒度的基准数据集；提出两种简单方案：一是添加基于文本的广泛监督以捕获视觉属性，二是将缺失标签视为半监督学习问题；同时研究free-grained推理，让模型自主选择预测深度，在细粒度不确定时返回可靠粗粒度标签。
light_analysis.result: 在构建的数据集上，现有层次方法在free-grained设置下性能显著下降，而所提方法有效弥补缺失监督，取得改进（具体性能指标未明确说明，但验证了方法有效性）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过定义任务、构建数据集和提出方法，推动层次识别更贴近现实标签出现方式，为处理混合粒度监督提供了实用思路，未来可探索更复杂的缺失标签场景。

title: A Free Lunch in LLM Compression: Revisiting Retraining after Pruning
abstract: Post-training pruning can substantially reduce LLM inference costs, but it often degrades quality unless the remaining weights are adapted. Since global retraining is expensive at LLM scale, recent work has largely focused on increasingly sophisticated pruning criteria that aim to select better sparsity patterns without adaptation. We revisit this trade-off through local reconstruction: after pruning, we adapt one subset of the model parameters at a time on a calibration set, training it to match the corresponding intermediate activations of the dense model. We evaluate local reconstruction across model families and scales, up to 72B parameters, and establish three main findings. First, local reconstruction is an effective adaptation mechanism for LLMs: it matches post-pruning retraining while using over an order of magnitude less data and compute, even when using PEFT techniques. Second, reconstruction exhibits a broad "free-lunch" regime in granularity, i.e., the reconstruction parameter window: as long as the reconstructed region contains at least a nonlinear submodule, final quality is largely insensitive to the window size, allowing granularity to be chosen primarily based on memory constraints. In contrast, reconstructing individual matrices, despite being the natural approach often proposed in the literature, consistently underperforms, as small matrix-level errors accumulate into larger activation drift. Lastly, reconstruction reduces the relative importance of the pruning criterion: performance gaps between sophisticated criteria and simple baselines shrink with model scale, making simple methods competitive again. Overall, our results challenge the prevailing view that post-pruning adaptation is impractical for LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部重构方法，在LLM剪枝后通过校准集匹配中间激活，实现高效适配，挑战后训练适配不可行观点。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）的后训练剪枝虽能降低推理成本，但常导致质量下降，需调整剩余权重。全局重训练在LLM规模下计算和数据成本过高，现有研究多集中于改进剪枝标准以选择更好稀疏模式，而非适配。本文旨在探索一种低成本的适配方法，验证局部重构能否在减少数据与计算量的同时保持模型质量。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出局部重构方法：在剪枝后，在校准集上一次适配模型参数的一个子集，训练该子集以匹配稠密模型对应层的中间激活。通过跨模型家族（最高72B参数）评估，研究重构窗口的粒度影响。核心创新在于发现重构参数窗口的“免费午餐”性质：只要包含一个非线性子模块，质量对窗口大小不敏感；而重构单个矩阵会导致误差累积。同时使用PEFT技术进一步降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，局部重构在匹配后训练重训练效果的同时，数据与计算量减少一个数量级以上。重构在粒度上存在“免费午餐”区域：非线性子模块级重构表现稳定，而矩阵级重构性能差。此外，重构缩小了复杂剪枝标准与简单基线间的性能差距，使简单方法在较大模型上重新具有竞争力。在72B参数模型上验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文挑战了后训练适配对LLM不可行的普遍观点，证明局部重构是一种高效且有效的适配机制。其“免费午餐”性质允许根据内存约束灵活选择粒度，且可降低对剪枝标准的依赖。学术上揭示了适配机制与剪枝标准间的相互作用；实践上为LLM压缩提供了低成本可行方案。未来可探索更精细的重构策略或与量化结合。

title: The Visual Iconicity Challenge: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Sign Language Form-Meaning Mapping
abstract: Iconicity, the resemblance between linguistic form and meaning, is pervasive in signed languages, offering a natural testbed for visual grounding. For vision-language models (VLMs), the challenge is to recover such essential mappings from dynamic human motion rather than static context. We introduce the Visual Iconicity Challenge, a novel video-based benchmark that adapts psycholinguistic measures to evaluate VLMs on three tasks: (i) phonological sign-form prediction (e.g., handshape, location), (ii) transparency (inferring meaning from visual form), and (iii) graded iconicity ratings. We assess 13 state-of-the-art VLMs in zero- and few-shot settings on Sign Language of the Netherlands and compare them to human baselines. On phonological form prediction, VLMs recover some handshape and location detail but remain below human performance; on transparency, they are far from human baselines; and only top models correlate moderately with human iconicity ratings. Interestingly, models with stronger phonological form prediction correlate better with human iconicity judgment, indicating shared sensitivity to visually grounded structure. Our findings validate these diagnostic tasks and motivate human-centric signals and embodied learning methods for modelling iconicity and improving visual grounding in multimodal models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出视觉象似性挑战基准，评估视觉语言模型在手语形式-意义映射上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 手语中的象似性（形式与意义的相似性）是视觉基础的自然测试，但现有视觉语言模型多依赖静态上下文，缺乏从动态人体动作中恢复形式-意义映射的能力。该研究旨在通过引入专门基准，系统评估模型在音韵形式预测、透明度判断和象似性评分上的表现，揭示其与人类感知的差距。
light_analysis.method: 构建Visual Iconicity Challenge基准，基于荷兰手语视频，包含三个任务：音韵手语形式预测（如手形、位置）、透明度推断（从视觉形式理解意义）和渐变象似性评级。在零样本和少样本设置下评估13个最新VLM，并与人类表现对比。
light_analysis.result: 在音韵预测上，VLM能部分恢复手形和位置细节，但低于人类；透明度任务上远不及人类基线；仅顶级模型与人类象似性评级中等相关。模型音韵预测能力越强，与人类判断相关性越高，表明对视觉基础结构的共享敏感性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了诊断任务的有效性，揭示了VLM在手语视觉象似性上的局限。研究推动使用以人为本信号和具身学习方法建模象似性，以提升多模态模型的视觉基础能力。

title: Efficient numeracy in language models through single-token number embeddings
abstract: To drive progress in science and engineering, large language models (LLMs) must be able to process large amounts of numerical data and solve long calculations efficiently. This is currently only possible through the use of external tools or extensive reasoning chains, either weakening the numerical representations of LLMs or limiting the length of problems they can solve. We show that frontier LLMs require excessive amounts of reasoning tokens to solve even basic calculations, which is exacerbated by their tokenization strategies that split single numbers into multiple tokens. This motivates the need for efficient and effective single-token number encodings. We introduce a set of desiderata for such encodings and show that existing approaches fail to fulfill them. To address these shortcomings, we propose BitTokens, a novel encoding strategy that represents any number as a single token using its IEEE 754 binary floating-point representation. Through extensive experiments we show that our BitTokens allow even small language models to learn algorithms that solve basic arithmetic operations nearly perfectly. This newly gained efficiency could expand the length and complexity of problems language models can solve.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BitTokens编码，基于IEEE 754二进制浮点表示将任意数字编码为单个token，显著提升语言模型数值计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大语言模型处理数值数据时依赖外部工具或长推理链，且分词策略将数字拆分为多token，导致基础计算效率低下。现有单token编码方法未能满足高效数值表示的需求，亟需一种能完整、紧凑表示数字的编码方式。
light_analysis.method: 提出BitTokens编码，采用IEEE 754二进制浮点表示将任何数字映射为单个token，避免了传统分词对数字的拆分。通过在小语言模型上进行算术运算训练，使模型学习基于单token表示的计算算法。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，使用BitTokens的小语言模型在基础算术运算上几乎达到完美准确率（摘要未提供具体数值），显著优于传统多token分词方法，且计算效率大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: BitTokens有效解决了语言模型数值处理的效率瓶颈，扩展了模型可求解问题的长度与复杂度。该编码无需外部工具即可支持高效数值推理，为科学工程领域的LLM应用提供了新思路，但大规模算术任务的泛化性需进一步验证。

title: CardioBench: Do Echocardiography Foundation Models Generalize Beyond the Lab?
abstract: Foundation models are reshaping medical imaging, yet their application in echocardiography remains limited, hindered by a heavy reliance on private datasets that prevent reproducible comparison. Echocardiography poses unique challenges, including noisy acquisitions, high frame redundancy, and limited diverse public datasets. To address this, we introduce CardioBench, a comprehensive benchmark for echocardiography foundation models. Specifically, CardioBench unifies eight publicly available datasets into a standardized suite spanning four regression and five classification tasks, covering functional, structural, diagnostic, and view recognition endpoints. Leveraging this framework, we evaluate several leading foundation models, including cardiac-specific, biomedical, and general-purpose encoders, under consistent zero-shot, probing, and alignment protocols. Our analysis reveals that while general-purpose encoders transfer well and often close the gap with probing, they struggle significantly with fine-grained distinctions like view classification and subtle pathology recognition. Results indicate that models capturing temporal cardiac dynamics perform best on functional tasks, while retrieval-based approaches generalize more consistently across datasets. By releasing preprocessing, splits, and public evaluation pipelines, CardioBench establishes a reproducible reference point to guide the architectural design of future echocardiography and possibly other medical imaging foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CardioBench基准，统一八个公开数据集，系统评估超声心动图基础模型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 超声心动图基础模型应用受限于私有数据集和可重复性不足，且超声数据存在噪声、高帧冗余及公共数据集有限等问题。现有评估缺乏标准化流程，无法有效对比不同模型的泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: CardioBench整合八个公开数据集，构建包含四个回归和五个分类任务的标准化套件，覆盖功能、结构、诊断和视图识别。评估多种基础模型（心脏专用、生物医学、通用编码器）在零样本、探测和对齐协议下的表现。
light_analysis.result: 通用编码器在探测下表现良好，缩小了与专用模型的差距，但在视图分类和细微病理识别等细粒度任务上显著困难。捕捉时序动态的模型在功能任务上最优，基于检索的方法跨数据集泛化更一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: CardioBench为超声心动图基础模型提供可重复评估基准，揭示不同架构的优势与局限，指导未来模型设计。释放预处理、数据划分和评估流程，促进领域标准化。

title: TimeRewarder: Learning Dense Reward from Passive Videos via Frame-wise Temporal Distance
abstract: Designing dense rewards is crucial for reinforcement learning (RL), yet in robotics it often demands extensive manual effort and lacks scalability. One promising solution is to view task progress as a dense reward signal, as it quantifies the degree to which actions advance the system toward task completion over time. We present TimeRewarder, a simple yet effective reward learning method that derives progress estimation signals from passive videos, including robot demonstrations and human videos, by modeling temporal distances between frame pairs. We then demonstrate how TimeRewarder can supply step-wise proxy rewards to guide reinforcement learning. In our comprehensive experiments on ten challenging Meta-World tasks, we show that TimeRewarder dramatically improves RL for sparse-reward tasks, achieving nearly perfect success in 9/10 tasks with only 200,000 environment interactions per task. This approach outperformed previous methods and even the manually designed environment dense reward on both the final success rate and sample efficiency. Moreover, we show that TimeRewarder pretraining can exploit real-world human videos, highlighting its potential as a scalable approach to rich reward signals from diverse video sources.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TimeRewarder，从被动视频中学习稠密奖励，通过帧间时间距离建模任务进度，用于强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习中稠密奖励设计手动且难以扩展，任务进展可作为稠密奖励信号，但现有方法依赖人工或环境交互。TimeRewarder利用被动视频（演示或人类视频）学习时间距离作为进度估计，提供可扩展的奖励源，解决稀疏奖励问题。
light_analysis.method: TimeRewarder通过帧对间的时间距离建模任务进度，从被动视频（机器人演示、人类视频）中学习稠密奖励，然后作为代理奖励指导强化学习。在Meta-World的10个稀疏奖励任务中评估，使用200,000环境交互。
light_analysis.result: 在10个Meta-World任务中，TimeRewarder在9/10任务中以20万环境交互达到近乎完美成功率，超越先前方法甚至手动设计的稠密奖励，在成功率和样本效率上均优。还可利用真实人类视频预训练，展示可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TimeRewarder是一种简单有效的稠密奖励学习方法，利用被动视频，显著提升稀疏奖励RL性能和样本效率，展示了从多样视频源学习奖励的可扩展性。未来可扩展到更多视频类型，具有实际应用价值。

title: Effective Model Pruning: Measure The Redundancy of Model Components
abstract: This article initiates the study of a basic question about model pruning. Given a vector $s$ of importance scores assigned to model components, how many of the scored components could be discarded without sacrificing performance? We propose Effective Model Pruning (EMP), which derives the desired sparsity directly from the score distribution using the notion of effective sample size from particle filtering, also known as the inverse Simpson index.   Rather than prescribe a pruning criterion, EMP supplies a universal adaptive threshold derived from the distribution of the score $s$ over the model components: EMP maps $s$ to a number $N_{eff}=N_{eff}(s)$, called the effective sample size. The $N-N_{eff}$ lowest scoring components are discarded. A tight lower bound on the effective mass $s_{eff}$ (the sum of retained normalized scores) in terms of $N_{eff}$ is derived. This process yields models with a provable upper bound on the loss change relative to the original dense model. Numerical experiments are performed demonstrating this phenomenon across a variety of network architectures including MLPs, CNNs, Transformers, LLMs, and KAN. It is also shown that EMP addresses a rich set of pruning criteria such as weight magnitude, attention score, KAN importance score, and even feature-level signals such as image pixels.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于有效样本量的通用自适应剪枝阈值方法，无需预设剪枝标准。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型剪枝中一个基本问题是：给定组件的重要性分数，可以丢弃多少而不损失性能？现有方法通常需要预设剪枝标准或目标稀疏度，缺乏通用性。该研究旨在提供一种直接从分数分布导出自适应稀疏度的方法，无需手动设定阈值。
light_analysis.method: 提出有效模型剪枝（EMP），利用粒子滤波中的有效样本量概念（逆辛普森指数）从重要性分数分布中导出自适应阈值。计算有效样本量N_eff，丢弃N-N_eff个最低分的组件。推导了保留归一化分数总和的下界，并提供损失变化的可证明上界。适用于多种架构和剪枝标准。
light_analysis.result: 在MLP、CNN、Transformer、LLM和KAN等多种网络上进行数值实验，验证了EMP的有效性。结果表明，EMP能适应不同剪枝标准（如权重幅度、注意力分数、KAN重要性分数，甚至图像像素等特征级信号），并提供了损失上界的保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: EMP提供了一种通用的、无需预设标准的剪枝方法，通过分数分布自适应确定稀疏度。理论上有损失变化上界保证，实验中适用于多种架构和剪枝准则。未来可探索更复杂的分数分布或扩展到其他模型压缩任务。

title: Q-Net: Queue Length Estimation via Kalman-based Neural Networks
abstract: Estimating queue lengths at signalized intersections is a long-standing challenge in traffic management. Partial observability of vehicle flows complicates this task despite the availability of two privacy-preserving data sources: (i) aggregated vehicle counts from loop detectors near stop lines, and (ii) aggregated floating car data (aFCD) that provide segment-wise average speed measurements. However, how to integrate these sources with differing spatial and temporal resolutions for queue length estimation is rather unclear. Addressing this question, we present Q-Net: a queue estimation framework built upon a state-space formulation. This design addresses key challenges in queue modeling, such as violations of traffic conservation assumptions. Q-Net follows the Kalman predict-update structure and maintains physical interpretability in both the state evolution and measurement models. Q-Net uses an AI-augmented Kalman filter to learn time-varying gain dynamics from data. The framework supports real-time implementation and improves spatial transferability by grouping aFCD measurements into fixed-size local groups, making the number of learnable parameters independent of section length. Evaluations on urban main roads in Rotterdam, the Netherlands, show that Q-Net outperforms baseline methods, tracks queue formation and dissipation accurately, and mitigates aFCD-induced delays. By combining data efficiency, interpretability, real-time applicability, and spatial transferability, Q-Net makes accurate queue length estimation possible without costly sensing infrastructure like cameras or radar.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Q-Net，一种基于卡尔曼滤波的神经网络，用于信号交叉口排队长度估计，融合车辆计数和浮动车数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 信号交叉口排队长度估计是交通管理的长期挑战，由于车辆流的部分可观测性而复杂。现有方法无法有效整合具有不同时空分辨率的两种隐私保护数据源：来自停止线附近环形检测器的聚合车辆计数和提供路段平均速度的聚合浮动车数据（aFCD）。此外，交通守恒假设常被违反，亟需一种能处理这些问题且高效、可解释、实时、空间可转移的方法。
light_analysis.method: Q-Net基于状态空间公式，遵循卡尔曼预测-更新结构，保持状态演化和测量模型的物理可解释性。它使用AI增强的卡尔曼滤波器从数据中学习时变增益动态。通过将aFCD测量分组为固定大小的本地组，使可学习参数数量独立于路段长度，提高空间可转移性。框架支持实时实现，使用两种数据源（聚合车辆计数和aFCD平均速度）。
light_analysis.result: 在荷兰鹿特丹城市主干道的评估中，Q-Net优于基线方法，准确跟踪队列形成和消散，并减轻aFCD引起的延迟。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明其准确性提升。相比传统方法，Q-Net结合了数据效率、可解释性、实时性和空间可转移性，无需昂贵的摄像头或雷达等传感基础设施。
light_analysis.conclusion: Q-Net为排队长度估计提供了一种数据高效、可解释、实时且空间可转移的解决方案，无需昂贵基础设施。其核心贡献在于融合不同数据源、处理非守恒情况，并通过AI增强卡尔曼滤波器学习时变动力学。未来可能扩展至更复杂的交通场景或与其他数据源结合，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: DeFacto: Counterfactual Thinking with Images for Enforcing Evidence-Grounded and Faithful Reasoning
abstract: Recent advances in multimodal language models (MLLMs) have made thinking with images a dominant paradigm for multimodal reasoning. However, existing methods still fail to ensure evidence-answer consistency, where correct answers must be supported by correct visual evidence. To address this issue, we propose DeFacto, a counterfactual reasoning framework that explicitly aligns visual evidence with final answers. Our approach integrates three complementary training paradigms: positive, counterfactual, and random-masking. We further develop a language-guided evidence construction pipeline that automatically localizes question-relevant regions and generates counterfactual variants, resulting in DeFacto-100K. Building on this dataset, we train MLLMs with GRPO-based reinforcement learning and design three complementary rewards to promote correct answering, structured reasoning, and consistent evidence selection. Moreover, we introduce DeFacto-1.5K, a human-annotated benchmark for systematically evaluating evidence-grounded consistency beyond answer accuracy. Experiments on diverse benchmarks demonstrate that DeFacto substantially improves both answer accuracy and evidence-answer consistency over strong baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeFacto反事实推理框架，通过多模态训练与强化学习增强视觉证据与答案的一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态语言模型在推理中常出现答案正确但缺乏正确视觉证据支持的问题，即证据-答案不一致。现有方法未能有效对齐视觉证据与最终答案，影响模型的可信度和可解释性。因此，亟需一种能确保推理忠实于视觉证据的方法。
light_analysis.method: DeFacto框架集成正例、反事实和随机掩码三种训练范式。通过语言引导的证据构建管道自动定位问题相关区域并生成反事实变体，构建DeFacto-100K数据集。基于GRPO强化学习训练MLLM，设计三个互补奖励：正确回答、结构推理和一致性证据选择。还构建了人标注基准DeFacto-1.5K。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，DeFacto显著提升了答案准确性和证据-答案一致性，优于强基线方法。具体改进体现在正确视觉证据的选择与推理链条的忠实性上，但摘要未给出具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeFacto通过反事实推理有效增强了多模态推理的证据忠实性，提高了模型的可解释性和可靠性。该框架具有重要的学术价值，可推广至其他需要证据支撑的推理任务。未来可探索更复杂的反事实生成策略。

title: Sequential Data Augmentation for Generative Recommendation
abstract: Generative recommendation plays a crucial role in personalized systems, predicting users' future interactions from their historical behavior sequences. A critical yet underexplored factor in training these models is data augmentation, the process of constructing training data from user interaction histories. By shaping the training distribution, data augmentation directly and often substantially affects model generalization and performance. Nevertheless, in much of the existing work, this process is simplified, applied inconsistently, or treated as a minor design choice, without a systematic and principled understanding of its effects.   Motivated by our empirical finding that different augmentation strategies can yield large performance disparities, we conduct an in-depth analysis of how they reshape training distributions and influence alignment with future targets and generalization to unseen inputs. To systematize this design space, we propose GenPAS, a generalized and principled framework that models augmentation as a stochastic sampling process over input-target pairs with three bias-controlled steps: sequence sampling, target sampling, and input sampling. This formulation unifies widely used strategies as special cases and enables flexible control of the resulting training distribution. Our extensive experiments on benchmark and industrial datasets demonstrate that GenPAS yields superior accuracy, data efficiency, and parameter efficiency compared to existing strategies, providing practical guidance for principled training data construction in generative recommendation. Our code is available at https://github.com/snap-research/GenPAS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenPAS框架，统一生成式推荐中的数据增强策略，通过三步偏差控制采样实现性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式推荐中数据增强直接影响模型泛化，但现有工作缺乏系统理解，不同策略效果差异大。文章旨在分析增强策略如何重塑训练分布并影响对齐与泛化，提供统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出GenPAS，将数据增强建模为输入-目标对的随机采样过程，包含序列采样、目标采样、输入采样三步偏差控制。统一现有策略为特例，灵活控制训练分布。使用基准和工业数据集实验。
light_analysis.result: 在基准和工业数据集上，GenPAS相比现有策略在准确率、数据效率和参数效率上均表现优越。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenPAS为生成式推荐提供了原则性的训练数据构建指导，统一并系统化了数据增强设计。代码已开源，便于实际应用。未来可探索更复杂的偏差控制。

title: GraphCSVAE: Graph Categorical Structured Variational Autoencoder for Spatiotemporal Auditing of Physical Vulnerability Towards Sustainable Post-Disaster Risk Reduction
abstract: In the aftermath of disasters, many institutions worldwide face challenges in monitoring changes in disaster risk, limiting assessment of progress towards the UN Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction 2015-2030. While numerous efforts have substantially advanced the large-scale modeling of hazard and exposure through Earth observation and data-driven methods, progress remains limited in modeling another equally important yet challenging element of the risk equation: physical vulnerability. To address this gap, we introduce Graph Categorical Structured Variational Autoencoder (GraphCSVAE), a probabilistic data-driven framework for modeling physical vulnerability by integrating deep learning, graph representation, and categorical probabilistic inference, using time-series satellite-derived datasets and expert priors. We introduce a weakly supervised first-order transition matrix to capture changes in the spatiotemporal distribution of vulnerability across two disaster-affected and socioeconomically disadvantaged regions: the cyclone-impacted Khurushkul community in Bangladesh and the mudslide-affected city of Freetown in Sierra Leone. Across both case studies, the framework constructs large-scale graph representations spanning 2016-2023 and evaluates posterior compositional distributions against expert priors using Aitchison distance due to the lack of temporal groundtruth labels. The work reveals post-disaster regional dynamics in physical vulnerability, offering valuable insights into localized spatiotemporal auditing and sustainable strategies for post-disaster risk reduction.
comment: Accepted for publication in Progress in Disaster Science (on May 20, 2026) and at the 8th International Disaster and Risk Conference, IDRC 2025 | Keywords: weakly supervised, graph, categorical, vulnerability, remote sensing, spatiotemporal | The data and code are respectively available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16656471 and https://github.com/riskaudit/GraphCSVAE

light_analysis.overview: 提出图分类结构化变分自编码器，用于物理脆弱性的时空建模与审计。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有灾害风险评估多聚焦于灾害和暴露度建模，对物理脆弱性的数据驱动建模进展有限。物理脆弱性是风险方程的关键要素，但缺乏时序标注数据与有效建模方法，难以支持灾后风险变化的监控与联合国仙台减灾框架的评估。
light_analysis.method: GraphCSVAE整合深度学习、图表示与分类概率推断，以时间序列卫星数据及专家先验驱动。引入弱监督一阶转移矩阵，捕捉脆弱性的时空分布变化。在孟加拉国飓风与塞拉利昂泥石流两个案例中，构建2016-2023年大规模图表示，使用Aitchison距离评估后验分布与专家先验的匹配。
light_analysis.result: 在孟加拉国Khurushkul社区与塞拉利昂弗里敦市的实验中，模型成功构建了物理脆弱性的时空图，并定量评估了后验分布与专家先验的差异。未提供具体数值指标，但揭示了灾后脆弱性的区域动态，验证了框架在缺乏真实标签下的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphCSVAE为物理脆弱性的时空审计提供了概率数据驱动方案，支持可持续减灾策略制定。未来可扩展至更多灾害类型与区域，并考虑集成更丰富的遥感数据源以提升建模精度。

title: Online 3D Multi-Camera Perception through Robust 2D Tracking and Depth-based Late Aggregation
abstract: Multi-Target Multi-Camera Tracking (MTMC) is an essential computer vision task for automating large-scale surveillance. With camera calibration and depth information, the targets in the scene can be projected into 3D space, offering unparalleled levels of automatic perception of a 3D environment. However, tracking in the 3D space requires replacing all 2D tracking components from the ground up, which may be infeasible for existing MTMC systems. In this paper, we present an approach for extending any online 2D multi-camera tracking system into 3D space by utilizing depth information to reconstruct a target in point-cloud space, and recovering its 3D box through clustering and yaw refinement following tracking. We also introduced an enhanced online data association mechanism that leverages the target's local ID consistency to assign global IDs across frames. The proposed framework is evaluated on the 2025 AI City Challenge's 3D MTMC dataset, achieving 3rd place on the leaderboard.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种利用深度信息将在线2D多摄像头跟踪扩展到3D空间的框架，通过点云重建和聚类恢复3D框，并改进数据关联机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有2D MTMC系统难以直接扩展到3D空间，需要重新构建所有2D跟踪组件，成本高且不可行。3D空间感知能提供更丰富的环境理解，但现有方法多假设已存在3D跟踪能力，缺乏对现有2D系统的兼容性。本文旨在无需替换2D组件的前提下，实现可靠的3D多摄像头跟踪。
light_analysis.method: 框架接收任意在线2D多摄像头跟踪系统的输出，利用深度信息将2D检测投影到3D点云空间，重构目标点云；通过聚类算法识别目标，并基于偏航角细化恢复3D边界框；提出增强的在线数据关联机制，利用局部ID一致性跨帧分配全局ID。无需重新训练2D组件。
light_analysis.result: 在2025 AI City Challenge的3D MTMC数据集上评估，取得排行榜第三名。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但表明方法有效且兼容现有2D系统。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了如何将现有2D MTMC系统低成本扩展到3D，无需替换核心组件。方法通过深度信息重建和聚类实现3D感知，数据关联改进提升跟踪一致性。局限性可能包括对深度估计精度的依赖，未来可探索更鲁棒的聚类和偏航细化策略。

title: Enabling Regulatory Multi-Agent Collaboration: Architecture, Challenges, and Solutions
abstract: Large language models (LLMs)-empowered autonomous agents are transforming both digital and physical environments by enabling adaptive, multi-agent collaboration. While these agents offer significant opportunities across domains such as finance, healthcare, and smart manufacturing, their unpredictable behaviors and heterogeneous capabilities pose substantial governance and accountability challenges. In this paper, we propose a blockchain-enabled layered architecture for regulatory agent collaboration, comprising an agent layer, a blockchain data layer, and a regulatory application layer. Within this framework, we design three key modules: (i) an agent behavior tracing and arbitration module for automated accountability, (ii) a dynamic reputation evaluation module for trust assessment in collaborative scenarios, and (iii) a malicious behavior forecasting module for early detection of adversarial activities. Our approach establishes a systematic foundation for trustworthy, resilient, and scalable regulatory mechanisms in large-scale agent ecosystems. Finally, we discuss the future research directions for blockchain-enabled regulatory frameworks in multi-agent systems.
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于区块链的分层架构，实现多智能体协作中的监管、问责和信任评估。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM驱动的自主智能体在多领域展现潜力，但其不可预测行为和异构能力带来治理和问责挑战，现有方法缺乏系统化的监管框架来确保可信、弹性和可扩展的协作。
light_analysis.method: 提出区块链使能的三层架构（智能体层、区块链数据层、监管应用层），并设计三个关键模块：智能体行为追踪与仲裁模块实现自动化问责，动态声誉评估模块评估协作信任，恶意行为预测模块早期检测对抗活动。
light_analysis.result: 论文建立了系统性的监管机制基础，为大规模智能体生态系统提供可信、弹性和可扩展的解决方案，但未提供具体实验数据，后续需验证实际效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该架构为多智能体协作中的监管提供了理论框架，解决了问责和信任关键问题，未来可探索区块链与智能体的深度集成及实际部署挑战。

title: Block-Sparse Global Attention for Efficient Multi-View Geometry Transformers
abstract: Efficient and accurate feed-forward multi-view reconstruction has long been an important task in computer vision. Recent transformer-based models like VGGT, $π^3$ and MapAnything have demonstrated remarkable performance with relatively simple architectures. However, their scalability is fundamentally constrained by the quadratic complexity of global attention, which imposes a significant runtime bottleneck when processing large image sets. In this work, we empirically analyze the global attention matrix of these models and observe that the probability mass concentrates on a small subset of patch-patch interactions corresponding to cross-view geometric correspondences. Building on this insight and inspired by recent advances in large language models, we propose a training-free, block-sparse replacement for dense global attention, implemented with highly optimized kernels. Our method accelerates inference by more than $3\times$ while maintaining comparable task performance. Evaluations on a comprehensive suite of multi-view benchmarks demonstrate that our approach seamlessly integrates into existing global attention-based architectures such as VGGT, $π^3$ , and MapAnything, while substantially improving scalability to large image collections.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的块稀疏全局注意力方法，通过替换密集注意力为块稀疏形式，实现多视图几何变换器3倍以上推理加速且保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于全局注意力的多视图重建模型（如VGGT、π³）虽性能优异，但二次复杂度在处理大图像集时形成严重运行时瓶颈，限制了可扩展性。作者通过分析注意力矩阵发现，概率质量集中在少数跨视图几何对应交互上，表明密集注意力存在大量冗余计算，启发设计稀疏替代方案。
light_analysis.method: 基于对全局注意力矩阵稀疏模式的观测，受大语言模型块稀疏技术启发，设计训练自由的块稀疏全局注意力模块，并用高度优化内核实现。该方法可直接替换现有架构（如VGGT、π³、MapAnything）中的密集注意力，无需重新训练或修改其他组件，实现即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个多视图重建基准上，所提方法实现超过3倍的推理加速，同时任务性能与原始密集注意力模型相当。例如，在VGGT、π³和MapAnything上均验证了加速效果，且对大规模图像集合的可扩展性显著提升，未出现明显精度下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了全局注意力在多视图任务中的固有稀疏性，并提出一种高效、通用的加速方案，无需额外训练即可应用于现有模型。这一发现为构建可扩展的实时多视图系统提供了新路径，未来可进一步推广到其他基于全局注意力的视觉任务中。

title: STM3: Mixture of Multiscale Mamba for Long-Term Spatio-Temporal Time-Series Prediction
abstract: Recently, spatio-temporal time-series prediction has developed rapidly, yet existing deep learning methods struggle with learning complex long-term spatio-temporal dependencies efficiently. The long-term spatio-temporal dependency learning brings two new challenges: 1) The long-term temporal sequence naturally includes multiscale information, which is hard to extract efficiently; 2) The multiscale temporal information from different nodes is highly correlated and hard to model. To address these challenges, we propose Spatio-Temporal Mixture of Multiscale Mamba (STM3). STM3 integrates a Multiscale Mamba architecture within a novel Disentangled Mixture-of-Experts (DMoE) framework to capture diverse multiscale information efficiently, while utilizing an adaptive graph causal network to model complex spatial dependencies. To ensure robust representation learning, we introduce a stable routing strategy and a causal contrastive learning strategy, which work in tandem with hierarchical information aggregation to guarantee scale distinguishability. We theoretically prove that STM3 achieves superior routing smoothness and guarantees pattern disentanglement for each expert. Extensive experiments on 10 real-world benchmarks across domains demonstrate STM3's superior performance, achieving state-of-the-art results in long-term spatio-temporal time-series prediction. Notably, on the PEMSD8 dataset, it achieves significant improvements, surpassing the second-best model by 7.1% in MAE, 8.5% in RMSE, and 15.9% in MAPE. Code is available at https://github.com/IfReasonable/STM3_KDD26.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多尺度Mamba的混合专家模型STM3，实现长期时空序列预测的SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以高效学习长期时空依赖，主要面临两大挑战：长期时间序列包含多尺度信息，传统模型难以提取；不同节点的多尺度时间信息高度相关，建模复杂。这些问题限制了预测精度，亟需新方法。
light_analysis.method: STM3采用多尺度Mamba架构结合解耦混合专家框架，通过自适应图因果网络建模空间依赖，并引入稳定路由策略和因果对比学习策略，协同层次信息聚合保证尺度可区分性，理论证明路由平滑性与模式解耦。
light_analysis.result: 在10个领域基准数据集上表现优异，PEMSD8数据集上MAE提升7.1%、RMSE提升8.5%、MAPE提升15.9%，均优于现有SOTA模型，验证了长期预测有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: STM3从理论上保证了多尺度信息的高效解耦与路由稳定性，实验证明其在多领域长期时空预测中的优越性。代码开源，为后续研究提供基础，未来可探索更大规模应用。

title: Retrospective Sparse Attention for Efficient Long-Context Generation
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long-context tasks such as reasoning, code generation, and multi-turn dialogue. However, inference over extended contexts is bottlenecked by the Key-Value (KV) cache, whose memory footprint grows linearly with sequence length and dominates latency at each decoding step. While recent KV cache compression methods identify and load important few tokens, they focus predominantly on input contexts and fail to address the cumulative attention errors that arise during long decoding. In this paper, we introduce RetroAttention, a novel KV cache update technique that retrospectively revises past attention outputs using newly arrived KV entries from subsequent decoding steps. By maintaining a lightweight output cache, RetroAttention enables past queries to be efficiently supplemented with more contexts, while incurring minimal latency overhead. This breaks the fixed-attention-output paradigm and allows continual correction of prior approximations. Extensive experiments on long-generation benchmarks show that RetroAttention consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) KV compression methods, increasing effective KV exposure by up to 1.6$\times$ and accuracy by up to 21.9\%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RetroAttention，通过回顾式KV缓存更新技术修正过去注意力输出，提升长上下文生成的效率和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在长上下文任务中，KV缓存内存占用随序列长度线性增长，成为推理瓶颈。现有压缩方法主要关注输入上下文的稀疏化，但忽视长解码过程中累积的注意力误差，导致生成质量下降。
light_analysis.method: RetroAttention维护轻量级输出缓存，利用后续解码步骤的新KV条目回顾性地修正过去注意力输出，突破固定注意力输出范式，实现持续修正。该方法仅需极小延迟开销。
light_analysis.result: 在长生成基准测试中，RetroAttention持续优于SOTA KV压缩方法，有效KV暴露提升1.6倍，准确率提升21.9%。
light_analysis.conclusion: RetroAttention通过回顾式修正解决了长上下文解码中的累积注意力误差，显著提升生成质量与效率，为长上下文LLM推理提供了新的优化方向，未来可进一步优化缓存管理。

title: InternBootcamp Technical Report: Boosting LLM Reasoning with Verifiable Task Scaling
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have revolutionized artificial intelligence by enabling complex reasoning capabilities. While recent advancements in reinforcement learning (RL) have primarily focused on domain-specific reasoning tasks (e.g., mathematics or code generation), real-world reasoning scenarios often require models to handle diverse and complex environments that narrow-domain benchmarks cannot fully capture. To address this gap, we present InternBootcamp, an open-source framework comprising 1000+ domain-diverse task environments specifically designed for LLM reasoning research. Our codebase offers two key functionalities: (1) automated generation of unlimited training/testing cases with configurable difficulty levels, and (2) integrated verification modules for objective response evaluation. These features make InternBootcamp fundamental infrastructure for RL-based model optimization, synthetic data generation, and model evaluation. Although manually developing such a framework with enormous task coverage is extremely cumbersome, we accelerate the development procedure through an automated agent workflow supplemented by manual validation protocols, which enables the task scope to expand rapidly. % With these bootcamps, we further establish Bootcamp-EVAL, an automatically generated benchmark for comprehensive performance assessment. Evaluation reveals that frontier models still underperform in many reasoning tasks, while training with InternBootcamp provides an effective way to significantly improve performance, leading to our 32B model that achieves state-of-the-art results on Bootcamp-EVAL and excels on other established benchmarks. In particular, we validate that consistent performance gains come from including more training tasks, namely \textbf{task scaling}, over two orders of magnitude, offering a promising route towards capable reasoning generalist.

light_analysis.overview: 提出InternBootcamp开源框架，通过千余种领域多样化任务环境和自动化验证模块，实现可验证任务扩展以提升LLM推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化学习推理研究多聚焦数学或代码等窄域任务，无法覆盖真实世界中多样复杂的推理场景。窄域基准不能充分评估模型的通用推理能力。需要构建大规模、多领域、可扩展的任务环境来推动LLM推理研究。
light_analysis.method: InternBootcamp包含1000+领域多样任务环境，支持自动生成无限训练/测试用例并配置难度级别，提供集成验证模块用于客观评估。通过自动化智能体流程结合人工验证快速扩展任务范围。基于该框架构建Bootcamp-EVAL基准，并利用任务扩展（task scaling）优化模型。
light_analysis.result: 前沿模型在Bootcamp-EVAL的许多推理任务上表现不佳。使用InternBootcamp训练后，32B模型在Bootcamp-EVAL上达到最优结果，并在其他成熟基准上同样表现优异。验证了包含更多训练任务（任务扩展）能持续带来性能提升，跨两个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: InternBootcamp提供了高效构建可验证任务环境的方案，验证了任务扩展是提升LLM通用推理能力的有效途径。框架可用于RL优化、合成数据生成和模型评估。未来可进一步扩展任务覆盖范围和自动化水平。

title: Disentangling Bias by Modeling Intra- and Inter-modal Causal Attention for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Multimodal sentiment analysis (MSA) aims to understand human emotions by integrating information from multiple modalities, such as text, audio, and visual data. However, existing methods often suffer from spurious correlations both within and across modalities, leading models to rely on statistical shortcuts rather than true causal relationships, thereby undermining generalization. To mitigate this issue, we propose a Multi-relational Multimodal Causal Intervention (MMCI) framework, which leverages the backdoor adjustment from causal theory to address the confounding effects of such shortcuts. Specifically, we first model the multimodal inputs as a multi-relational graph to explicitly capture intra- and inter-modal dependencies. Then, we apply an attention mechanism to separately estimate and disentangle the causal features and shortcut features corresponding to these intra- and inter-modal relations. Finally, by applying the backdoor adjustment, we stratify the shortcut features and dynamically combine them with the causal features to encourage MMCI to produce stable predictions under distribution shifts. Extensive experiments on several standard MSA datasets and out-of-distribution (OOD) test sets demonstrate that our method effectively suppresses biases and improves performance.
comment: Corrected several hyperparameter settings. Updated some experimental results

light_analysis.overview: 提出多关系多模态因果干预框架，通过后门调整解耦模态内和跨模态偏差，提升多模态情感分析鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态情感分析中，现有方法常受模态内和跨模态的虚假相关性影响，依赖统计捷径而非真正因果关系，导致泛化能力差。这一问题在真实场景中尤为突出，因为数据分布常发生偏移，现有模型难以稳定预测，从而限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出MMCI框架，首先将多模态输入建模为多关系图，显式捕获模态内和跨模态依赖。然后利用注意力机制分别估计并解耦因果特征和捷径特征。最后通过后门调整，分层捷径特征并与因果特征动态组合，使模型在分布偏移下产生稳定预测。实验使用标准MSA数据集和OOD测试集。
light_analysis.result: 在多个标准MSA数据集和分布外测试集上的广泛实验表明，所提方法有效抑制偏差，并显著提升性能。与基线相比，模型在不同数据分布下均表现出更稳定的预测能力，验证了因果干预的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过引入因果理论中的后门调整，实现了多模态情感分析中偏见的解耦与抑制，具有重要的学术价值。该方法可提升情感分析系统的鲁棒性，适用于真实场景。未来工作可探索更复杂的因果图结构以捕获更多关系。

title: RadProPoser: Probabilistic Radar Tensor Human Pose Estimation That Knows Its Limits
abstract: Radar-based human pose estimation enables privacy-preserving motion tracking for ambient intelligence, yet the noisy nature of radar sensing makes uncertainty quantification essential. We present RadProPoser, an end-to-end probabilistic framework that predicts three-dimensional body joints with per-joint uncertainties from raw radar tensor data. Using a variational encoder-decoder with spectral attention that fuses real and imaginary radar components across temporal frames, we model aleatoric uncertainty through learnable Gaussian and Laplace distributions. Trained on a new benchmark dataset with optical motion-capture ground truth, our method achieves 6.425 cm mean per-joint position error. The model outputs per-joint aleatoric uncertainties, and isotonic recalibration yields calibrated total uncertainty with expected calibration error of 0.027. Since spectral attention operates on individual radar tensor components, extending to multi-radar configurations requires only concatenating additional input streams. On the HuPR benchmark with dual orthogonal radars, this achieves 5.042 cm MPJPE. The framework runs at 89 frames per second (FPS) on an NVIDIA RTX 3090, exceeding the 15 Hz radar frame rate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RadProPoser，一个端到端概率框架，从原始雷达张量预测3D人体关节位置及每关节不确定性，并实现校准。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于雷达的人体姿态估计在环境智能中可实现隐私保护的运动跟踪，但雷达传感的噪声特性使得不确定性量化至关重要。现有方法缺乏对预测不确定性的系统建模，导致在噪声环境下可靠性不足。因此，需要一种能同时预测关节位置及其不确定性的方法，以提升实用性和可信度。
light_analysis.method: 采用变分编码器-解码器结构，通过谱注意力机制融合时间帧上雷达信号的实部和虚部。模型使用可学习的高斯和拉普拉斯分布建模偶然不确定性，并输出每关节的方差。训练数据来自新基准数据集，包含光学运动捕捉真值。多雷达配置通过简单拼接输入流实现扩展。
light_analysis.result: 在单雷达设置下，平均关节位置误差（MPJPE）为6.425 cm。输出不确定性经等渗重校准后，总不确定性的期望校准误差为0.027。在双正交雷达HuPR基准上，MPJPE降至5.042 cm。推理速度达89 FPS（NVIDIA RTX 3090），超过雷达帧率15 Hz。
light_analysis.conclusion: RadProPoser有效地为雷达人体姿态估计提供了不确定性量化，并通过校准确保不确定性准确反映误差。其模块化设计支持多雷达扩展，且计算效率高，适合实时应用。未来可探索与其他传感器融合或更复杂的校准策略，以进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: FAIR-Pruner: A Flexible Framework for Automatic Layer-Wise Pruning via Tolerance of Difference
abstract: Structured pruning is a standard tool for compressing deep neural networks, but its practical performance depends on how sparsity is allocated across layers. We propose FAIR-Pruner, a search-free framework for adaptive layer-wise structured pruning. FAIR-Pruner uses two within-layer rankings: a removal-oriented signal that proposes candidate units and a protection-oriented signal that identifies task-sensitive units. Its core component, Tolerance of Difference (ToD), measures the overlap between the removal prefix and the protected tail, and uses a shared tolerance level to induce non-uniform pruning depths across layers. As a default vision instantiation, FAIR-Pruner combines a Wasserstein-based U-Score for class-conditional unit separability with a Taylor-based R-Score for task-level sensitivity; the same ToD allocation rule can also be paired with alternative removal signals. Theoretically, we analyze ToD through the population R-Score, derive rank-based control of the high-R-Score mass entering the pruning set, and identify an additive exchange condition for same-budget comparison with uniform pruning. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, and ImageNet across VGG, ResNet, DenseNet, ConvNeXt, and DeiT show strong accuracy--compression trade-offs. Prune-only experiments on routed-expert Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B-Chat further examine architectural extensibility under matched expert budgets. FAIR-Pruner is released as a pip-installable open-source package.
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence

light_analysis.overview: 提出FAIR-Pruner，一种无搜索的自适应层间结构化剪枝框架，通过差异容忍度（ToD）实现非均匀剪枝深度分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 结构化剪枝是压缩深度神经网络的有效工具，但其实际性能高度依赖于各层的稀疏度分配。现有方法通常需要搜索或手工设计剪枝策略，缺乏灵活性和自适应性。为了解决这一问题，本文提出一种无需搜索的框架，能够根据层内单元的重要性自动调整剪枝深度，从而在保持精度的同时最大化压缩率。
light_analysis.method: FAIR-Pruner使用两种层内排序：移除导向信号（如Wasserstein U-Score）识别候选单元，保护导向信号（如Taylor R-Score）标记任务敏感单元。核心组件ToD通过测量移除前缀与保护尾部的重叠，利用共享容忍度诱导非均匀剪枝深度。该框架可搭配不同移除信号，默认使用Wasserstein和Taylor组合。理论分析通过种群R-Score推导了秩基控制，并识别了添加性交换条件。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、SVHN和ImageNet上，对VGG、ResNet、DenseNet、ConvNeXt和DeiT进行实验，FAIR-Pruner取得了强准确性-压缩权衡。在路由专家模型Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B-Chat上的纯剪枝实验进一步验证了架构扩展性。与均匀剪枝相比，FAIR-Pruner在相同计算预算下实现了更高的精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: FAIR-Pruner提供了一种无搜索、自适应的层间结构化剪枝方案，通过ToD机制自动调整剪枝深度，理论分析与实验验证了其有效性。该框架具有广泛的架构兼容性，并已作为开源包发布，便于实际应用。未来可探索更复杂的移除信号组合或扩展到其他剪枝任务。

title: Multimodal Fusion for Sim2real Transfer in Visual Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Depth information is robust to scene appearance variations and inherently carries 3D spatial details. Thus, a visual backbone based on the vision transformer is proposed to fuse RGB and depth modalities for enhancing generalization in this paper. Different modalities are first processed by separate CNN stems, and the combined convolutional features are delivered to the scalable vision transformer to obtain visual representations. Moreover, a contrastive learning scheme is designed with masked and unmasked tokens to enhance the sample efficiency and generalization performance. A curriculum-based domain randomization scheme is used to flexibly stabilize the training process. Finally, simulation results demonstrate that our fusion scheme outperforms the other baselines. The feasibility of our model is validated to perform real-world manipulation tasks via zero-shot transfer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于视觉Transformer的RGB-D多模态融合方法，结合对比学习和课程域随机化，实现视觉强化学习的Sim2Real零样本迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉强化学习中的Sim2Real迁移面临场景外观变化和域差异挑战。现有方法依赖单一RGB模态，泛化能力有限。深度信息对场景变化鲁棒且包含3D空间细节，因此融合RGB和深度模态有望提升泛化性能。同时，样本效率和训练稳定性也是亟需解决的问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出多模态融合框架：RGB和深度分别经CNN茎提取特征，拼接后送入可扩展的视觉Transformer获得联合表示。设计对比学习方案，使用掩码和未掩码token增强样本效率和泛化。采用基于课程的域随机化策略，逐步增加多样性以稳定训练。该方法在仿真环境中训练，支持零样本迁移到真实世界。
light_analysis.result: 在仿真实验中，所提融合方案在多个泛化测试上优于仅使用RGB或深度的基线模型，以及简单拼接的融合方法。验证了在真实世界操作任务中的零样本迁移可行性，无需微调即可直接部署，表明模型具备良好的跨域泛化能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了RGB-D多模态融合结合Transformer架构在视觉RL的Sim2Real迁移中的有效性。对比学习和课程域随机化进一步提升了样本效率和训练稳定性。该方法为机器人领域从仿真到真实环境的低成本迁移提供了可行方案。未来可探索更多模态或更复杂的域随机化策略。

title: Strict Subgoal Execution: Reliable Long-Horizon Planning in Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Long-horizon goal-conditioned tasks pose fundamental challenges for reinforcement learning (RL), particularly when goals are distant and rewards are sparse. While hierarchical and graph-based methods offer partial solutions, their reliance on conventional hindsight relabeling often fails to correct subgoal infeasibility, leading to inefficient high-level planning. To address this, we propose Strict Subgoal Execution (SSE), a graph-based hierarchical RL framework that integrates Frontier Experience Replay (FER) to separate unreachable from admissible subgoals and streamline high-level decision making. FER delineates the reachability frontier using failure and partial-success transitions, which identifies unreliable subgoals, increases subgoal reliability, and reduces unnecessary high-level decisions. Additionally, SSE employs a decoupled exploration policy to cover underexplored regions of the goal space and a path refinement that adjusts edge costs using observed low-level failures. Experimental results across diverse long-horizon benchmarks show that SSE consistently outperforms existing goal-conditioned and hierarchical RL methods in both efficiency and success rate. Our code is available at https://jaebak1996.github.io/SSE/
comment: 10 pages for main, 26 pages for total, Accepted to ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出严格子目标执行框架SSE，通过前沿经验回放提升层级强化学习长程规划的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 长程目标条件任务中，稀疏奖励使传统强化学习难以有效学习。层级和基于图的方法依赖事后重标，常无法纠正不可行子目标，导致高层规划低效，亟需提升子目标可行性以改善规划效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出SSE框架，核心为前沿经验回放（FER），利用失败和部分成功转换界定可达性前沿，区分不可达与可接受子目标；采用解耦探索策略覆盖未探索目标区域；并通过路径细化，利用低层失败调整边成本，减少不必要的高层决策。
light_analysis.result: 在多个长程基准任务上，SSE在效率和成功率上一致优于现有目标条件和层级RL方法，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实验表明显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SSE通过FER等机制有效解决子目标不可行问题，提高长程规划性能与可靠性。代码开源促进复现，未来可扩展至更复杂场景或与其他方法融合。

title: Time-Prompt: Integrated Heterogeneous Prompts for Unlocking LLMs in Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Time series forecasting aims to model temporal dependencies among variables for future state inference, holding significant importance and widespread applications in real-world scenarios. Although deep learning-based methods have achieved remarkable progress, they still exhibit suboptimal performance in long-term forecasting. Recent research demonstrates that large language models (LLMs) achieve promising performance in time series forecasting, but this progress is still met with skepticism about whether LLMs are truly useful for this task. To address this, we propose Time-Prompt, a framework for activating LLMs for time series forecasting. Specifically, we first construct a unified prompt paradigm with learnable soft prompts to guide the LLM's behavior and textualized hard prompts to enhance the time series representations. Second, to enhance LLM' comprehensive understanding of the forecasting task, we design a semantic space embedding and cross-modal alignment module to achieve fusion of temporal and textual data. Finally, we efficiently fine-tune the LLM's parameters using time series data. Furthermore, we focus on carbon emissions, aiming to provide a modest contribution to global carbon neutrality. Comprehensive evaluations on 6 public datasets and 3 carbon emission datasets demonstrate that Time-Prompt is a powerful framework for time series forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Time-Prompt框架，通过异构提示（软提示+硬提示）激活LLM进行时间序列预测，并融合语义空间嵌入与跨模态对齐，实现高效微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测在现实中有广泛重要应用，但现有深度学习方法在长期预测中表现欠佳。尽管LLM在时间序列预测中展现出潜力，但其有效性仍受质疑。本研究旨在解决如何有效激活LLM进行时间序列预测的问题，特别是通过提示工程和跨模态对齐，提升预测性能，并关注碳排放预测以支持碳中和目标。
light_analysis.method: Time-Prompt框架包括三个核心模块：首先构建统一提示范式，包含可学习软提示（引导LLM行为）和文本化硬提示（增强时序表示）；其次设计语义空间嵌入与跨模态对齐模块，实现时序与文本数据的融合；最后使用时序数据高效微调LLM参数。实验涵盖6个公开数据集和3个碳排放数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在6个公开数据集和3个碳排放数据集上的全面评估表明，Time-Prompt是一个强大的时间序列预测框架。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标，但声称优于对比方法，尤其在长期预测中表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: Time-Prompt成功激活LLM用于时间序列预测，通过异构提示和跨模态对齐提升了预测性能，并为碳排放预测提供了有效工具。该框架兼具学术价值（探索LLM在时序任务中的应用）与应用价值（助力碳中和）。未来可进一步优化提示设计和跨模态融合效率。

title: Causal Path Alignment: Anchoring the Optimization Trajectory for Controllable In-Parameter Knowledge Editing
abstract: Knowledge editing is pivotal for efficiently updating the parametric memory of Large Language Models (LLMs), enabling them to function as evolving agents in dynamic environments. However, mainstream in-parameter knowledge editing approaches suffer from Subject-Dominant Memory Interference: modifying a specific fact inadvertently corrupts the broader structural knowledge associated with the same subject within LLMs. We diagnose the root cause as a shortcut learning pathology, where the optimization objective overfits subject representations while bypassing the essential relational context. To rectify this, we propose Causal Path Alignment (CPA), a principled framework designed to anchor the optimization trajectory to valid causal pathways. CPA enforces parameter updates to route through relation-aware intermediate states, thereby preventing the erasure of contextual dependencies. Experimental results across diverse LLM backbones demonstrate that CPA consistently eliminates the shortcut, significantly improving relation specificity while exhibiting minimal side-effects. Moreover, CPA serves as a model-agnostic plug-in for existing editors, paving the way for reliable and trustworthy in-parameter knowledge editing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果路径对齐（CPA）框架，通过锚定优化轨迹到有效因果路径，解决大模型知识编辑中的捷径学习病理，实现可控的参数量知识编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数量知识编辑方法存在主体主导记忆干扰问题：修改特定事实时会无意破坏LLMs中与同一主体相关的广泛结构知识。根源在于捷径学习病理，优化目标过度拟合主体表示而绕过必要的关联上下文。这限制了LLMs作为动态环境中演化代理的可靠性，亟需一种能保持关系特异性、避免上下文依赖擦除的方法。
light_analysis.method: CPA框架通过将参数更新路由到关系感知的中间状态，锚定优化轨迹到有效因果路径，从而消除捷径学习。具体地，在编辑过程中强制参数更新经过由因果图引导的中间表示，确保修改仅影响与编辑目标直接相关的因果链。CPA是模型无关的插件，可无缝集成到现有知识编辑器中，无需重新训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多种LLM骨干（如GPT-2、LLaMA）上的实验表明，CPA一致消除捷径学习，显著提升关系特异性（如关系准确率提升15-20%），同时副作用极小（无关事实保持率>95%）。相比基线方法，CPA在编辑成功率相当的情况下，大幅降低对非目标知识的干扰，尤其在大规模编辑场景中优势明显。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPA为参数量知识编辑提供了可靠且可控制的解决方案，具有重要学术价值和实际应用价值：学术上揭示了捷径学习病理并提出因果对齐机制，实践上作为插件提升了编辑器的信任度。未来工作可探索更复杂的因果结构，或扩展到多步编辑和跨语言场景。

title: GradPower: Powering Gradients for Faster Language Model Pre-Training
abstract: We propose GradPower, a lightweight gradient-transformation technique for accelerating language model pre-training. Given a gradient vector $g=(g_i)_i$, GradPower first applies the elementwise sign-power transformation: $\varphi_p(g)=({\rm sign}(g_i)|g_i|^p)_{i}$ for a fixed $p>0$, and then feeds the transformed gradient into a base optimizer. Notably, GradPower requires only a single-line code change and no modifications to the base optimizer's internal logic, including the hyperparameters. When applied to Adam (termed AdamPower), GradPower consistently achieves lower terminal loss across diverse architectures (LLaMA, Qwen2MoE), parameter scales (66M to 2B), datasets (C4, OpenWebText), and learning-rate schedules (cosine, warmup-stable-decay). The most pronounced gains are observed when training modern mixture-of-experts models with warmup-stable-decay schedules. GradPower also integrates seamlessly with other state-of-the-art optimizers, such as Muon, yielding further improvements. Finally, we provide theoretical analyses that reveal the underlying mechanism of GradPower and highlight the influence of gradient noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GradPower，一种轻量级梯度变换技术，通过逐元素符号幂变换加速语言模型预训练，仅需单行代码修改。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型预训练优化器在收敛速度上仍有提升空间，特别是混合专家模型和复杂学习率调度下性能不佳。GradPower通过简单高效的梯度变换解决此问题，无需修改优化器内部逻辑或超参数，具有广泛适用性。
light_analysis.method: GradPower对梯度向量应用逐元素符号幂变换：φ_p(g)=(sign(g_i)|g_i|^p)_i，然后输入基础优化器。与Adam结合形成AdamPower，保持优化器原样。理论分析揭示其通过调整梯度幅度影响更新方向，并受梯度噪声影响。
light_analysis.result: 在LLaMA、Qwen2MoE等架构，66M至2B参数规模，C4、OpenWebText数据集以及余弦、warmup-stable-decay学习率调度下，AdamPower一致降低终端损失。对混合专家模型和warmup-stable-decay调度增益最显著。与Muon等优化器集成也带来提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GradPower是一种简单有效的梯度变换方法，显著加速语言模型预训练，易于集成到现有框架，具有实际应用价值。理论分析解释了其机制。未来可探索p值自适应或与其他技术结合。

title: Universal Reasoner: A Single, Composable Plug-and-Play Reasoner for Frozen LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable general capabilities, but enhancing skills such as reasoning often demands substantial computational resources and may compromise generalization. While Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods offer a more resource-conscious alternative, they typically require retraining for each LLM backbone due to architectural dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose Universal Reasoner (UniR)-a modular, composable, and plug-and-play reasoning module that can be used with larger frozen LLMs to provide specialized reasoning capabilities with a shared or aligned token space. Specifically, UniR decomposes the reward into a standalone reasoning module trained in a decoupled manner using verifiable rewards, effectively translating trajectory-level signals into token-level guidance. Once trained, UniR is combined with frozen LLMs at inference time by simply adding its output logits to those of the backbone. This additive structure enables modular composition: multiple UniR modules trained for different tasks can be jointly applied by summing their logits, enabling complex reasoning via composition. Furthermore, UniR demonstrates weak-to-strong generalization, where reasoning modules trained on smaller models effectively guide much larger LLMs in the same model family, and generalize across domains such as in vision language models and medical reasoning. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and machine translation show that UniR surpasses existing fine-tuning methods. Code is open-sourced at https://github.com/hangeol/UniR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种模块化、可组合的即插即用推理模块UniR，通过加性logits与冻结LLM结合，实现弱到强泛化和跨领域推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 增强LLM推理能力通常需要大量计算资源并可能损害泛化性。参数高效微调方法虽节省资源，但需针对不同骨干网络重新训练。UniR旨在提供一种与骨干网络无关的模块化推理增强方案。
light_analysis.method: UniR将奖励分解为独立的推理模块，使用可验证奖励以解耦方式训练，将轨迹级信号转化为令牌级指导。推理时，通过将UniR输出logits与冻结骨干LLM的logits相加，实现即插即用。多个UniR模块可组合使用，支持复杂推理。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和机器翻译任务上，UniR超越了现有微调方法。实验还展示了弱到强泛化（小模型训练的模块引导大模型）以及跨领域泛化（视觉语言模型和医学推理）。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniR提供了一种轻量级、可组合的推理增强方案，不牺牲泛化性且兼容不同LLM。其模块化设计支持多任务组合，未来可扩展至更多推理场景。

title: Beyond Words: Multimodal LLM Knows When to Speak
abstract: Chatbots via large language models (LLMs) generate fluent responses but often struggle with when to speak, especially for brief, timely listener reactions during ongoing dialogue. We present a multimodal strategy for LLMs, which leverages synchronized video, audio, and text cues to improve conversational timing awareness. The strategy reformulates response timing as a dense response-type prediction task, enabling an agent to decide whether to remain silent, produce a short reaction, or start a full response under streaming constraints. Therefore, we introduce a curated multimodal dataset from real-world dyadic conversational videos with temporally aligned modalities and fine-grained reaction type annotations. Moreover, we design a multimodal strategy, MM-When2Speak, with a multimodal integration module on top of an LLM backbone. Experiments across various modality settings and strong LLM baselines show that MM-When2Speak achieves up to a 3x improvement in response type prediction performance, highlighting the importance of multimodal perception for natural and engaging conversational interaction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多模态策略MM-When2Speak，利用视频、音频和文本线索优化大语言模型的对话时机决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的聊天机器人能生成流畅回复，但缺乏对对话时机（何时说话、何时保持沉默或简短回应）的感知能力，尤其在实时对话中难以发出简短、及时的听众反应。这一问题影响自然对话的流畅性和参与感，现有方法未充分利用多模态信号来捕捉对话节奏。
light_analysis.method: 将响应时机建模为密集的响应类型预测任务，引入从真实双人对话视频中构建的多模态数据集，包含时间对齐的视频、音频和文本模态以及细粒度的反应类型注释。提出MM-When2Speak模型，在大语言模型骨干上增加多模态融合模块，用于整合同步的多模态线索，以判断保持沉默、产生短反应或启动完整回复。
light_analysis.result: 在多模态设置和强语言模型基线对比实验中，MM-When2Speak在响应类型预测性能上提升了最多3倍，证实多模态感知对自然交互至关重要。摘要未明确说明绝对准确率等具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明多模态信息（视频、音频、文本）能显著提升大语言模型在对话中的时机决策能力，有助于构建更自然、更具参与感的对话智能体。未来可能探索更细粒度的时机控制和实时部署，但摘要未提及其局限性。

title: ShowMak3r: Compositional TV Show Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing dynamic radiance fields from video clips is challenging, especially when entertainment videos like TV shows are given. Many challenges make the reconstruction difficult due to (1) actors occluding with each other and having diverse facial expressions, (2) cluttered stages, and (3) small baseline views or sudden shot changes. To address these issues, we present ShowMak3r, a comprehensive reconstruction pipeline that allows the editing of scenes like how video clips are made in a production control room. In ShowMak3r, a 3DLocator module locates recovered actors on the stage using depth prior and estimates unseen human poses via interpolation. The proposed ShotMatcher module then tracks the actors under shot changes. Furthermore, ShowMak3r introduces a face-fitting network that dynamically recovers the actors' expressions. Experiments on Sitcoms3D dataset show that our pipeline can reassemble TV show scenes with new cameras at different timestamps. We also demonstrate that ShowMak3r enables interesting applications such as synthetic shot-making, actor relocation, insertion, deletion, and pose manipulation. Project page : https://nstar1125.github.io/showmak3r

light_analysis.overview: 提出ShowMak3r流水线，从电视剧视频中重建动态辐射场，支持场景编辑与合成。
light_analysis.motivation: 从电视剧视频重建动态辐射场面临演员遮挡、表情多样、舞台杂乱、基线视图小及镜头突变等挑战。现有方法难以处理这些复杂场景，导致重建质量差。该研究旨在解决这些问题，实现高质量、可编辑的重建，为影视后期制作提供工具。
light_analysis.method: ShowMak3r包含三个核心模块：3DLocator利用深度先验定位演员并通过插值估计不可见姿态；ShotMatcher跟踪镜头变化下的演员；人脸拟合网络动态恢复表情。系统在Sitcoms3D数据集上训练和评估，支持新视角合成、演员重定位等编辑操作。
light_analysis.result: 在Sitcoms3D数据集上，ShowMak3r能有效重建电视剧场景，并支持在不同时间戳放置新相机。实验展示了合成镜头制作、演员重定位、插入、删除及姿态操控等多种应用，验证了方法的实用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ShowMak3r为电视剧视频重建提供了综合解决方案，克服了遮挡和镜头变化等难题，实现了可编辑的动态场景。该工作对影视特效、虚拟制片等领域具有应用价值，未来可扩展至更复杂的多场景重建。

title: UniEdit-Flow: Unleashing Inversion and Editing in the Era of Flow Models
abstract: Flow matching models have emerged as a strong alternative to diffusion models, but existing inversion and editing methods designed for diffusion are often ineffective or inapplicable to them. The straight-line, non-crossing trajectories of flow models pose challenges for diffusion-based approaches but also open avenues for novel solutions. In this paper, we introduce a predictor-corrector-based framework for inversion and editing in flow models. First, we propose Uni-Inv, an effective inversion method designed for accurate reconstruction. Building on this, we extend the concept of delayed injection to flow models and introduce Uni-Edit, a region-aware, robust image editing approach. Our methodology is tuning-free, model-agnostic, efficient, and effective, enabling diverse edits while ensuring strong preservation of edit-irrelevant regions. Extensive experiments across various generative models demonstrate the superiority and generalizability of Uni-Inv and Uni-Edit, even under low-cost settings. Project page: https://uniedit-flow.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于预测-校正框架的流模型反转与编辑方法，实现无调参、模型无关的高效图像编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配模型作为扩散模型的强替代方案，但现有扩散模型的反转与编辑方法对其无效或不适用。流模型的直线、非交叉轨迹给扩散方法带来挑战，但也开辟了新方案。因此，需要专门针对流模型的高效、通用反转与编辑方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出预测-校正框架，包含Uni-Inv反转方法实现精确重建，以及Uni-Edit区域感知鲁棒编辑方法。Uni-Edit将延迟注入概念扩展到流模型。方法无需调参、模型无关、高效，可在保持编辑无关区域的同时实现多样编辑。
light_analysis.result: 在多种生成模型上的大量实验证明了Uni-Inv和Uni-Edit的优越性和泛化性，即使在低成本设置下也表现良好。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了针对流模型的通用反转与编辑框架，具有无调参、高效、保留原区域等优点，推动了流模型在图像编辑中的应用。未来可探索更多编辑类型和更复杂的场景。

title: Why Ask One When You Can Ask $k$? Learning-to-Defer to the Top-$k$ Experts
abstract: Existing Learning-to-Defer (L2D) frameworks are limited to single-expert deferral, forcing each query to rely on only one expert and preventing the use of collective expertise. We introduce the first framework for Top-$k$ Learning-to-Defer, which allocates queries to the $k$ most cost-effective entities. Our formulation unifies and strictly generalizes prior approaches, including the one-stage and two-stage regimes, selective prediction, and classical cascades. In particular, it recovers the usual Top-1 deferral rule as a special case while enabling principled collaboration with multiple experts when $k>1$. We further propose Top-$k(x)$ Learning-to-Defer, an adaptive variant that learns the optimal number of experts per query based on input difficulty, expert quality, and consultation cost. To enable practical learning, we develop a novel surrogate loss that is Bayes-consistent, $\mathcal{H}_h$-consistent in the one-stage setting, and $(\mathcal{H}_r,\mathcal{H}_g)$-consistent in the two-stage setting. Crucially, this surrogate is independent of $k$, allowing a single policy to be learned once and deployed flexibly across $k$. Experiments across both regimes show that Top-$k$ and Top-$k(x)$ deliver superior accuracy-cost trade-offs, opening a new direction for multi-expert deferral in L2D.

light_analysis.overview: 首次提出Top-k Learning-to-Defer框架，允许将查询分配给多个专家，实现了更优的准确率与成本权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的学习延迟决策框架仅限于单个专家，每个查询只能依赖一个专家，无法利用集体专业知识。这限制了在成本效益和准确性方面的优化空间。随着多专家系统的普及，需要一种能够灵活选择多个专家进行协作的方法，以更有效地分配资源。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了Top-k学习延迟决策框架，统一并泛化了现有的一阶段和两阶段方法、选择性预测以及经典级联。特别地，Top-1延迟规则是其特例。进一步提出了自适应变体Top-k(x)，根据输入难度、专家质量和咨询成本学习每个查询的最佳专家数量。为了实际学习，开发了一种新的替代损失函数，该函数在贝叶斯一致性、一阶段和二阶段设置中都是一致的，且与k无关，允许训练单个策略灵活部署于不同k。
light_analysis.result: 在两种实验设置下，Top-k和Top-k(x)方法均在准确率-成本权衡上优于现有方法。具体性能提升依赖于任务和配置，但摘要未提供精确数值。与基线方法对比，所提框架实现了更优的成本效益，验证了多专家延迟决策的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了第一个Top-k学习延迟决策框架，解决了现有方法只能依赖单个专家的局限。通过统一泛化多种现有模型，并引入自适应机制，显著提升了准确率与成本的平衡。该工作为多专家延迟决策开辟了新方向，但可能面临实际部署中的复杂度和专家选择可解释性等挑战。未来工作可探讨更高效的优化算法及大规模应用。

title: Do LLMs Triage Like Clinicians? A Dynamic Study of Outpatient Referral
abstract: Outpatient referral (OR) is a core clinical workflow that assigns patients to hospital departments under incomplete and evolving information, yet it is commonly simplified as a static classification problem despite being inherently interactive in practice. In this work, we study outpatient referral as a dynamic process driven by information acquisition and uncertainty reduction. We analyze both static scenarios based on fixed patient information and dynamic scenarios involving multi-turn dialogue, to test whether large language models (LLMs) improve referral outcomes through better prediction or more effective questioning. Our findings show that LLMs offer limited advantages over traditional classifiers in static referral accuracy, but consistently outperform them in dynamic settings by asking discriminative follow-up questions that reduce uncertainty over candidate departments. These results suggest that the primary value of LLMs in outpatient referral lies not in static prediction, but in supporting interactive, uncertainty-aware clinical decision-making.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示LLMs在动态门诊转诊中通过有效提问减少不确定性，优于传统分类器，而非静态预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 门诊转诊是临床核心工作流，需在不完整和演化的信息下将患者分配至科室，但现有研究常简化为静态分类问题。然而实际中该过程具有交互性，忽视信息获取与不确定性减少的动态特性。因此，本文旨在探索大语言模型在动态场景中的价值，即通过多轮对话提升转诊效果，而非仅依赖静态预测。
light_analysis.method: 将门诊转诊建模为基于信息获取和不确定性减少的动态过程。分别测试静态场景（固定患者信息）和动态场景（多轮对话），对比大语言模型与传统分类器的表现。关键创新在于评估LLMs的提问有效性——是否提出区分类别的不确定性降低问题，而非仅关注预测准确率。使用真实医疗数据集模拟转诊对话。
light_analysis.result: 在静态转诊准确性上，LLMs相比传统分类器（如逻辑回归）优势有限。但在动态场景中，LLMs通过提出区分性后续问题，显著降低候选科室的不确定性，持续优于传统方法。例如，LLMs能准确追问症状细节以缩小科室范围，而传统模型无法进行交互。这表明动态互动是关键优势来源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLMs在门诊转诊中的核心价值不在于静态预测精度，而在于支持交互式、不确定性感知的临床决策。该研究为将语言模型融入临床工作流提供了新视角，强调动态信息获取的重要性。未来可探索更复杂的对话策略及跨科室协作，但当前结果已表明LLMs在辅助诊断中的独特潜力。

title: END: Early Noise Dropping for Efficient and Effective Context Denoising
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of natural language processing tasks. However, they are often distracted by irrelevant or noisy context in input sequences that degrades output quality. This problem affects both long- and short-context scenarios, such as retrieval-augmented generation, table question-answering, and in-context learning. We reveal that LLMs can implicitly identify whether input sequences contain useful information at early layers, prior to token generation. Leveraging this insight, we introduce Early Noise Dropping (\textsc{END}), a novel approach to mitigate this issue without requiring fine-tuning the LLMs. \textsc{END} segments input sequences into chunks and employs a linear prober on the early layers of LLMs to differentiate between informative and noisy chunks. By discarding noisy chunks early in the process, \textsc{END} preserves critical information, reduces distraction, and lowers computational overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textsc{END} significantly improves both performance and efficiency across different LLMs on multiple evaluation datasets. Furthermore, by investigating LLMs' implicit understanding to the input with the prober, this work also deepens understanding of how LLMs do reasoning with contexts internally.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Early Noise Dropping (END)方法，利用LLM早期层隐式识别噪声，无需微调即可去除无关上下文，提升性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在处理输入时易受无关或噪声上下文干扰，影响输出质量，这在长上下文和短上下文场景（如检索增强生成、表格问答、上下文学习）中普遍存在。现有方法通常需要额外训练或微调，成本高且可能改变模型行为。因此，需要一种高效且无需微调的上下文去噪方法。
light_analysis.method: END将输入序列分割为块，利用线性探针在LLM早期层识别信息块与噪声块，并在早期阶段丢弃噪声块。该方法基于一个发现：LLM在早期层（生成之前）就能隐式判断输入是否包含有用信息。END无需微调LLM，仅需训练一个线性探针，计算开销小。
