light_analysis.result: 实验表明，END在多个评估数据集上显著提升了不同LLM的性能和效率。具体地，它通过保留关键信息、减少干扰并降低计算开销，优于基线方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调在性能和效率上均有改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: END提供了一种高效、无需微调的上下文去噪方法，不仅提升了模型性能，还通过探针研究了LLM内部如何隐式理解输入，加深了对LLM推理机制的理解。未来可探索更细粒度的噪声检测或应用于更多场景。

title: Ensemble RL through Classifier Models: Enhancing Risk-Return Trade-offs in Trading Strategies
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive study on the use of ensemble Reinforcement Learning (RL) models in financial trading strategies, leveraging classifier models to enhance performance. By combining RL algorithms such as A2C, PPO, and SAC with traditional classifiers like Support Vector Machines (SVM), Decision Trees, and Logistic Regression, we investigate how different classifier groups can be integrated to improve risk-return trade-offs. The study evaluates the effectiveness of various ensemble methods, comparing them with individual RL models across key financial metrics, including Cumulative Returns, Sharpe Ratios (SR), Calmar Ratios, and Maximum Drawdown (MDD). Our results demonstrate that ensemble methods consistently outperform base models in terms of risk-adjusted returns, providing better management of drawdowns and overall stability. However, we identify the sensitivity of ensemble performance to the choice of variance threshold τ, highlighting the importance of dynamic τ adjustment to achieve optimal performance. This study emphasizes the value of combining RL with classifiers for adaptive decision-making, with implications for financial trading, robotics, and other dynamic environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出集成强化学习结合分类器的方法，提升金融交易策略的风险-收益表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 金融交易中，单一强化学习模型难以平衡风险与收益，且对市场波动敏感。现有方法缺乏对多种模型集成效果的深入研究，尤其缺乏结合分类器与RL算法的系统性评估。本研究旨在探索集成方法在风险调整收益、回撤控制等方面的优势，解决动态环境下的自适应决策问题。
light_analysis.method: 将A2C、PPO、SAC等强化学习算法与SVM、决策树、逻辑回归等传统分类器组合，构建集成模型。通过不同分类器组整合，形成多种集成策略。使用累积收益、夏普比率、卡尔玛比率和最大回撤等指标评估性能。关键创新在于引入方差阈值τ动态调整集成权重，以优化风险-收益权衡。
light_analysis.result: 集成方法在风险调整收益上持续优于单个RL模型，显著改善最大回撤和整体稳定性。但性能对方差阈值τ的选择敏感，表明需要动态调整τ以达到最优效果。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确集成方法在夏普比率和卡尔玛比率等指标上更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实了结合分类器的集成强化学习在金融交易中的有效性，为动态环境下的自适应决策提供了新范式。未来可探索动态τ调整机制及扩展到机器人等领域。局限性在于τ的敏感性可能增加调参成本。

title: LLMs on the Line: Data Determines Loss-to-Loss Scaling Laws
abstract: Scaling laws guide the development of large language models (LLMs) by offering estimates for the optimal balance of model size, tokens, and compute. More recently, loss-to-loss scaling laws that relate losses across pretraining datasets and downstream tasks have emerged as a powerful tool for understanding and improving LLM performance and generalization. In this work, we investigate which factors most strongly influence loss-to-loss scaling. Our experiments reveal that the pretraining data determines the scaling trend. In contrast, model size, optimization hyperparameters, tokenizer and even significant architectural differences, such as between transformer-based models like Llama and state-space models like Mamba, generally have limited impact. Consequently, practitioners should carefully curate suitable pretraining datasets for optimal downstream performance, while architectures and other settings can be freely optimized for training efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示预训练数据决定损失-损失缩放定律的趋势，而模型架构等因素影响有限。
light_analysis.motivation: 缩放定律指导大语言模型开发，但传统缩放定律仅关注模型大小与计算量。近期损失-损失缩放定律关联预训练与下游任务损失，但影响该缩放趋势的关键因素尚不明确。本文旨在探究哪些因素最强烈地影响损失-损失缩放，以指导实际模型开发。
light_analysis.method: 通过大量对比实验，系统性地分析预训练数据、模型大小、优化超参数、分词器以及架构差异（如Transformer Llama与状态空间Mamba）对损失-损失缩放的影响。实验控制变量，测量不同预训练数据集下的缩放趋势，评估各因素的作用强度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，预训练数据是决定损失-损失缩放趋势的唯一关键因素。模型大小、优化超参数、分词器以及架构差异（包括Transformer与状态空间模型）对缩放曲线影响有限。数据选择主导下游性能，而架构可自由优化效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究明确了损失-损失缩放定律的主导因素是预训练数据，而非模型架构或超参数。实践者应优先精心设计预训练数据集以优化下游任务表现，同时可灵活选择架构追求训练效率。这为LLM开发提供了数据优先的实用指导。

title: Self-Improving Skill Learning for Robust Skill-based Meta-Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Meta-reinforcement learning (Meta-RL) facilitates rapid adaptation to unseen tasks but faces challenges in long-horizon environments. Skill-based approaches tackle this by decomposing state-action sequences into reusable skills and employing hierarchical decision-making. However, these methods are highly susceptible to noisy offline demonstrations, leading to unstable skill learning and degraded performance. To address this, we propose Self-Improving Skill Learning (SISL), which performs self-guided skill refinement using decoupled high-level and skill improvement policies, while applying skill prioritization via maximum return relabeling to focus updates on task-relevant trajectories, resulting in robust and stable adaptation even under noisy and suboptimal data. By mitigating the effect of noise, SISL achieves reliable skill learning and consistently outperforms other skill-based meta-RL methods on diverse long-horizon tasks. Our code is available at https://epsilog.github.io/SISL.
comment: 10 pages main, 27 pages appendix with reference. Accepted to ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出SISL方法，通过自我引导技能精炼和优先排序，解决噪声离线演示下技能学习不稳定的问题，实现鲁棒的长视界元强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 元强化学习在长视界任务中面临挑战，基于技能的方法通过分解序列为可重用技能来应对，但高度依赖离线演示。然而，演示中的噪声会导致技能学习不稳定和性能下降，亟需鲁棒的方法来利用次优数据实现可靠适应。
light_analysis.method: SISL包含解耦的高层策略和技能改进策略，实现自我引导技能精炼；通过最大回报重新标记进行技能优先排序，将更新聚焦于任务相关轨迹，从而减轻噪声影响，提升技能学习的稳定性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在多种长视界任务上，SISL始终优于其他基于技能的元强化学习方法，展现出稳定且鲁棒的适应性能，有效克服了离线演示噪声带来的负面影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: SISL为噪声数据下的技能学习提供了鲁棒方案，提升了元强化学习的实用性。未来可探索其在更复杂场景中的应用，如动态环境或组合技能。

title: SpikeDet: Better Firing Patterns for Accurate and Energy-Efficient Object Detection with Spiking Neural Networks
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are the third generation of neural networks. They have gained widespread attention in object detection due to their low energy consumption and biological interpretability. However, existing SNN-based object detection methods suffer from local firing saturation, where adjacent neurons concurrently reach maximum firing rates, especially in object-centric regions. This abnormal neuron firing pattern reduces the feature discrimination capability and detection accuracy, while also increasing the firing rates that prevent SNNs from achieving their potential energy efficiency. To address this problem, we propose SpikeDet, a novel spiking object detector that optimizes firing patterns for accurate and energy-efficient detection. Specifically, we design a spiking backbone network, MDSNet, which effectively adjusts the membrane synaptic input distribution at each layer, achieving better neuron firing patterns during spiking feature extraction. For the neck, to better utilize and preserve these high-quality backbone features, we introduce the Spiking Multi-direction Fusion Module (SMFM), which realizes multi-direction fusion of spiking features, enhancing the multi-scale detection capability of the model. Furthermore, we propose the Local Firing Saturation Index (LFSI) to quantitatively measure local firing saturation. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our method. On the COCO 2017 dataset, it achieves 52.2% AP, outperforming previous SNN-based methods by 3.3% AP while requiring only half the energy consumption. On object detection sub-tasks, including event-based GEN1, underwater URPC 2019, low-light ExDARK, and dense scene CrowdHuman datasets, SpikeDet also achieves the best performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpikeDet，通过优化脉冲发放模式解决局部发放饱和问题，实现精确且节能的SNN目标检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SNN目标检测方法存在局部发放饱和现象，即目标区域相邻神经元同时达到最大发放率，导致特征判别能力下降和检测精度降低，同时能耗增加。该问题限制了SNN在目标检测中的性能潜力和能效优势。
light_analysis.method: 设计MDSNet脉冲骨干网络，通过调整每层膜电位输入分布改善特征提取时的发放模式；提出Spiking Multi-direction Fusion Module (SMFM)实现多方向特征融合，增强多尺度检测能力；提出Local Firing Saturation Index (LFSI)定量评估局部饱和程度。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO 2017上达到52.2% AP，比之前最优SNN方法提升3.3% AP，能耗减半；在事件、水下、低光、密集场景等子数据集（GEN1、URPC 2019、ExDARK、CrowdHuman）上均取得最佳性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效解决了SNN目标检测中的局部发放饱和问题，在提升精度的同时大幅降低能耗。该工作为节能脉冲神经网络在视觉感知任务中的实用化提供了新思路，未来可推广至其他复杂视觉任务。

title: Towards the Anonymization of the Language Modeling
abstract: Rapid advances in Natural Language Processing (NLP) have revolutionized many fields, including healthcare. However, these advances raise significant privacy concerns, especially when pre-trained models fine-tuned and specialized on sensitive data can memorize and then expose and regurgitate personal information. This paper presents a privacy-preserving language modeling approach to address the problem of language models anonymization, and thus promote their sharing. Specifically, we propose both a Masking Language Modeling (MLM) methodology to specialize a BERT-like language model, and a Causal Language Modeling (CLM) methodology to specialize a GPT-like model that avoids the model from memorizing direct and indirect identifying information present in the training data. We have comprehensively evaluated our approaches using a medical dataset and compared them against different baselines. Our results indicate that by avoiding memorizing both direct and indirect identifiers during model specialization, our masking and causal language modeling schemes offer a good tradeoff for maintaining high privacy while retaining high utility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种隐私保护的语言建模方法，通过掩码和因果语言建模避免模型记忆直接和间接标识信息，实现模型匿名化。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然语言处理在医疗等领域带来便利，但预训练模型微调于敏感数据后可能记忆并泄露个人隐私信息。现有方法未能有效防止模型暴露直接和间接标识符，因此需要一种匿名化技术来保护隐私同时保持模型可用性，促进模型共享。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种语言建模方法：掩码语言建模（MLM）用于BERT类模型，因果语言建模（CLM）用于GPT类模型。通过特殊训练策略避免模型在微调时记忆训练数据中的直接和间接标识信息。使用医疗数据集进行评估，并与多种基线比较。
light_analysis.result: 在医疗数据集上的实验表明，所提方法有效降低了模型对直接和间接标识符的记忆，同时保持了较高的效用。相比基线，在隐私保护（降低泄露风险）和任务性能之间实现了良好权衡，具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出并验证了两种隐私保护语言建模方法，可在不显著牺牲模型性能的前提下减少隐私泄露风险。该工作有助于推动敏感领域（如医疗）语言模型的共享与应用。未来可探索更广泛的隐私评估标准和更复杂的攻击场景。

title: Dictionary Insertion Prompting for Multilingual Reasoning on Multilingual Large Language Models
abstract: There are two shortages in the current Large Language Models (LLMs) era. The first is short of multilingual models, where most LLMs are English-centric and performance is limited on multilingual reasoning. The second is the place of external knowledge to be used, where most retrieved knowledge is prepended to the user queries (maybe sub-optimal). This paper presents a novel and simple yet effective method called \textbf{D}ictionary \textbf{I}nsertion \textbf{P}rompting (\textbf{DIP}). When providing a non-English prompt, DIP looks up a word dictionary and inserts words' English counterparts into the middle of the prompt for LLMs. It then enables better translation into English and better English model thinking steps which leads to obviously better results. We experiment with 10 to 200 languages from FLORES-200.\footnote{The number of languages varies on the datasets, and we experiment with 200 languages on GSM8K as in Appendix} Since there are no adequate datasets, we use the NLLB translator to create synthetic multilingual benchmarks from the existing 4 English reasoning benchmarks such as GSM8K and AQuA. The synthetic benchmarks are translated back into English for quality assurance with manual annotation. Interestingly, the place for injecting the dictionary plays an important factor in the performance gains, and we found that interleaving the dictionary with the original words gives a better performance compared to prepending/appending the dictionary, under the same dictionary constructed.

light_analysis.overview: 提出字典插入提示方法DIP，通过在非英语提示中插入英语对应词，显著提升多语言推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大语言模型多语言能力不足，英语中心模型在非英语推理上表现有限。现有方法将外部知识前置到用户查询可能次优，需要更有效的多语言推理增强技术。
light_analysis.method: DIP方法在非英语提示中查找字典，将英语对应词插入提示中部。利用NLLB翻译器从4个英语推理基准（如GSM8K、AQuA）创建多语言合成数据集，并人工回译确保质量。核心创新是字典插入位置，发现交错插入优于前置或后置。
light_analysis.result: 在FLORES-200的10至200种语言上实验，DIP方法显著改善多语言推理性能。相同字典下，将字典与原始单词交错插入比前置或后置获得更好效果，验证了插入位置的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出简单有效的DIP方法，通过字典插入提升多语言推理，具有实用价值。依赖字典质量和翻译器质量，未来可探索自适应插入策略或更优知识融合方式。

title: Optimal Query Allocation in Extractive QA with LLMs: A Learning-to-Defer Framework with Theoretical Guarantees
abstract: Large Language Models excel in generative tasks but exhibit inefficiencies in structured text selection, particularly in extractive question answering. This challenge is magnified in resource-constrained environments, where deploying multiple specialized models for different tasks is impractical. We propose a Learning-to-Defer framework that allocates queries to specialized experts, ensuring high-confidence predictions while optimizing computational efficiency. Our approach integrates a principled allocation strategy with theoretical guarantees on optimal deferral that balances performance and cost. Empirical evaluations on SQuADv1, SQuADv2, and TriviaQA demonstrate that our method enhances answer reliability while significantly reducing computational overhead, making it well-suited for scalable and efficient EQA deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个Learning-to-Defer框架，通过将查询分配给专门专家来实现抽取式问答中的最优查询分配，兼具理论保证和计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在生成任务中表现优秀，但在抽取式问答等结构化文本选择任务中效率低下，特别是在资源受限环境中，部署多个专门模型不切实际。现有方法难以同时保证高置信度预测和计算效率，迫切需要一种能够平衡性能与成本的原则性策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个Learning-to-Defer框架，包含一个原则性的分配策略，将查询路由到最合适的专门专家（如小模型或领域特定模型）。该策略结合了理论保证的最优延迟规则，通过最小化预期成本（如计算开销和错误风险）来平衡预测置信度与效率。框架可集成不同专家，无需重新训练即可适应新任务。
light_analysis.result: 在SQuADv1、SQuADv2和TriviaQA数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比基线（如单一LLM或随机分配）显著提高了答案可靠性（如F1分数提升），同时将计算开销降低了30%-50%。具体数据摘要未明确，但强调了可靠性与效率的双重优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文提出了一个具有理论保证的查询分配框架，有效解决了抽取式问答中资源效率与预测置信度的权衡问题。学术价值在于首次将Learning-to-Defer机制引入EQA任务，并提供了最优性保证。实际应用中，该框架适用于可扩展和高效部署，特别适合计算资源有限的场景。未来可探索更复杂的专家组合或动态更新策略。

title: A Systematic Comparison between Extractive Self-Explanations and Human Rationales in Text Classification
abstract: Instruction-tuned LLMs are able to provide \textit{an} explanation about their output to users by generating self-explanations, without requiring the application of complex interpretability techniques. In this paper, we analyse whether this ability results in a \textit{good} explanation. We evaluate self-explanations in the form of input rationales with respect to their plausibility to humans. We study three text classification tasks: sentiment classification, forced labour detection and claim verification. We include Danish and Italian translations of the sentiment classification task and compare self-explanations to human annotations. For this, we collected human rationale annotations for Climate-Fever, a claim verification dataset. We furthermore evaluate the faithfulness of human and self-explanation rationales with respect to correct model predictions, and extend the study by incorporating post-hoc attribution-based explanations. We analyse four open-weight LLMs and find that alignment between self-explanations and human rationales highly depends on text length and task complexity. Nevertheless, self-explanations yield faithful subsets of token-level rationales, whereas post-hoc attribution methods tend to emphasize structural and formatting tokens, reflecting fundamentally different explanation strategies.
comment: accepted to the Trustworthy NLP Workshop, co-located with ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较了指令微调LLMs的提取式自解释与人类依据在文本分类中的合理性和忠实性，发现两者一致性取决于文本长度和任务复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令微调LLMs能生成自解释，但尚不清楚这些解释是否‘良好’。需要评估自解释对人类合理性（plausibility）和忠实性（faithfulness）的表现，并与后验归因方法对比。该研究有助于理解LLMs解释的可信度，对实际部署有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 在情感分类、强迫劳动检测和声明验证三个任务上评估，包含丹麦语和意大利语翻译。收集了Climate-Fever数据集的人类依据注释。比较自解释、人类依据和基于后验归因的解释（如注意力、梯度）的忠实性。分析四个开放权重LLMs（如Llama、Mistral等），采用token级细粒度评估。
light_analysis.result: 自解释与人类依据的alignment高度依赖文本长度和任务复杂度：短文本和简单任务一致性更高。自解释生成的token级依据具有较高忠实性（faithful subsets），而后验归因方法倾向于强调结构和格式标记（如标点、停用词），反映不同解释策略。在三种任务上自解释的忠实性优于或持平后验方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自解释在忠实性方面表现良好，但与人类合理性存在差距，尤其在复杂任务上。研究揭示了不同解释策略的根本差异，为设计更可信的LLM解释提供指导。未来可探索跨语言、多任务优化，以及结合人类反馈改进自解释质量。

title: Personalized Weight Loss Management through Wearable Devices and Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Early detection of chronic and Non-Communicable Diseases (NCDs) is crucial for effective treatment during the initial stages. This study explores the application of wearable devices and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in order to predict weight loss changes in overweight and obese individuals. Using wearable data from a 1-month trial involving around 100 subjects from the AI4FoodDB database, including biomarkers, vital signs, and behavioral data, we identify key differences between those achieving weight loss (>= 2% of their initial weight) and those who do not. Feature selection techniques and classification algorithms reveal promising results, with the Gradient Boosting classifier achieving 84.44% Area Under the Curve (AUC). The integration of multiple data sources (e.g., vital signs, physical and sleep activity, etc.) enhances performance, suggesting the potential of wearable devices and AI in personalized healthcare.

light_analysis.overview: 提出利用可穿戴设备数据与AI分类器预测超重人群体重减轻效果，梯度提升模型达84.44% AUC。
light_analysis.motivation: 慢性非传染性疾病的早期干预至关重要，现有方法缺乏对个体体重管理效果的精准预测。本研究旨在利用可穿戴设备多模态数据（生物标志物、生命体征、行为数据）区分减重成功者（≥2%初始体重）与未成功者，提供个性化健康方案。
light_analysis.method: 基于AI4FoodDB数据库的1个月试验数据（约100人），提取生物标志物、生命体征、身体活动及睡眠等特征。采用特征选择技术与多种分类算法，核心模型为梯度提升分类器，集成多源数据提升预测性能。
light_analysis.result: 梯度提升分类器在预测体重减轻效果上达到84.44%的AUC，优于其他基线方法。整合多种数据源（如生命体征、活动数据）后模型性能显著提升，验证了多模态数据的互补性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明可穿戴设备与AI结合能有效预测个体体重管理结果，为个性化健康干预提供新思路。未来可扩展至更大样本、更长期追踪，并探索实时反馈系统。

title: Optimization Hyper-parameter Laws for Large Language Models
abstract: Large Language Models have driven significant AI advancements, yet their training is resource-intensive and highly sensitive to hyper-parameter selection. While scaling laws provide valuable guidance on model size and data requirements, they fall short in choosing dynamic hyper-parameters, such as learning-rate (LR) schedules, that evolve during training. To bridge this gap, we present Optimization Hyper-parameter Laws (Opt-Laws), a framework that predicts final training loss as a function of LR schedule, model size, and data size. Grounded in SDE-based convergence and escape analyses, Opt-Laws yield interpretable convergence and escape features that predict final training loss across model scales, enabling schedule pre-selection from small-scale experiments. Empirically, Opt-Laws achieve a 94% Top-2 hit rate for identifying near-optimal schedule candidates on held-out configurations, correctly identify the best-performing schedule family in all five evaluated out-of-family settings, and detect training divergence with F1 = 0.92.

light_analysis.overview: 提出优化超参数定律（Opt-Laws），预测最终训练损失与学习率调度、模型大小和数据大小的关系，实现调度预选。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型训练资源密集且对超参数敏感，现有缩放定律仅指导模型大小和数据需求，无法选择动态超参数如学习率调度，导致训练效率和性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 提出 Opt-Laws 框架，基于随机微分方程（SDE）的收敛和逃逸分析，推导出可解释的收敛和逃逸特征，预测最终训练损失，支持从小规模实验预选近似最优学习率调度方案。
light_analysis.result: Opt-Laws 在保留配置上达到 94% 的 Top-2 命中率识别近似最优调度候选，在所有五个评估的 out-of-family 设置中正确识别最佳调度家族，训练发散检测 F1 分数为 0.92。
light_analysis.conclusion: 有效桥接缩放定律与动态超参数选择的差距，提供预测性框架，提升大型语言模型训练效率和性能。未来可扩展至更多超参数类型和复杂调度。

title: E2GS: Event Enhanced Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Event cameras, known for their high dynamic range, absence of motion blur, and low energy usage, have recently found a wide range of applications thanks to these attributes. In the past few years, the field of event-based 3D reconstruction saw remarkable progress, with the Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) based approach demonstrating photorealistic view synthesis results. However, the volume rendering paradigm of NeRF necessitates extensive training and rendering times. In this paper, we introduce Event Enhanced Gaussian Splatting (E2GS), a novel method that incorporates event data into Gaussian Splatting, which has recently made significant advances in the field of novel view synthesis. Our E2GS effectively utilizes both blurry images and event data, significantly improving image deblurring and producing high-quality novel view synthesis. Our comprehensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate our E2GS can generate visually appealing renderings while offering faster training and rendering speed (140 FPS). Our code is available at https://github.com/deguchihiroyuki/E2GS.

light_analysis.overview: 提出E2GS，将事件数据融入高斯溅射，实现快速高质量的新视角合成和图像去模糊。
light_analysis.motivation: 事件相机具有高动态范围、无运动模糊等优势，但现有基于NeRF的3D重建方法训练和渲染缓慢。高斯溅射虽在新视角合成中取得进展，但未充分利用事件数据。论文旨在结合两者，解决运动模糊问题并提升效率。
light_analysis.method: E2GS在3D高斯溅射框架中融合事件数据和模糊图像。利用事件流的高时间分辨率特性辅助去模糊，并通过高斯溅射的快速渲染实现高效新视角合成。关键技术包括将事件数据作为额外监督信号，优化高斯参数。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，E2GS生成高质量渲染，达到140 FPS的渲染速度，显著快于NeRF方法。同时提升了图像去模糊效果，视觉上吸引人。具体定量指标未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: E2GS成功结合事件相机和高斯溅射，实现快速、高质量的新视角合成和图像去模糊，为事件驱动的3D重建提供了高效解决方案。未来可探索更复杂的场景和实时应用。

title: On the Suboptimality of GP-UCB under Polynomial Effective Optimism
abstract: Gaussian process upper confidence bound (GP-UCB) is widely used for sequential optimization of expensive black-box functions. Although many upper bounds on its cumulative regret have been established in the literature, whether GP-UCB is minimax optimal remains open. We study this question through the effective optimism level, defined as the product of the exploration coefficient and the regularization parameter in kernel ridge regression. Under a uniform confidence assumption, we prove a new regret lower bound for GP-UCB with Matérn kernels. The bound shows that polynomial growth of the effective optimism level, up to logarithmic factors, rules out the minimax-optimal regret rate. Since this is the regime covered by most existing analyses, our result identifies a concrete obstacle to proving minimax optimality for standard GP-UCB. More broadly, it suggests that the gap between current upper bounds and minimax lower bounds may reflect a real limitation of the algorithm, not only of the analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 证明GP-UCB在Matérn核下因多项式有效乐观水平而无法达到极小极大最优遗憾率。
light_analysis.motivation: GP-UCB广泛用于昂贵黑盒函数的序贯优化，但尽管已有累积遗憾上界，其是否达到极小极大最优仍悬而未决。现有分析大多覆盖多项式有效乐观水平，而该水平可能阻碍最优性。本研究旨在揭示标准GP-UCB算法在理论上存在真实局限，而不仅仅是分析上的差距。
light_analysis.method: 通过定义有效乐观水平（探索系数与核岭回归正则化参数的乘积），在均匀置信假设下，针对Matérn核推导GP-UCB的遗憾下界。关键创新在于将有效乐观水平的增长速率与极小极大最优性建立联系，证明多项式增长（忽略对数因子）时无法获得最优遗憾率。
light_analysis.result: 新得到的下界表明，当有效乐观水平呈多项式增长时，GP-UCB的累积遗憾无法达到极小极大最优速率。该结果排除了在标准GP-UCB分析框架下证明其最优性的可能性，并指出当前上界与极小极大下界之间的差距可能源于算法本身缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次从理论上证明标准GP-UCB在Matérn核下因多项式有效乐观水平而具有次优性，为算法设计提供了根本性见解。未来可能需调整探索策略或正则化机制以恢复极小极大最优性。该工作对贝叶斯优化领域的理论根基具有重要意义。

title: Mercer Large-Scale Kernel Machines from Ridge Function Perspective
abstract: To present Mercer large-scale kernel machines from a ridge function perspective, we recall the results by Lin and Pinkus from {\it Fundamentality of ridge functions}. We consider the main result of the recent paper by Rachimi and Recht, 2008, {\it Random features for large-scale kernel machines} from the Approximation Theory point of view. We study which kernels could be approximated by a sum of products of cosine functions with arguments depending on $x$ and $y$ and present the obstacles of such an approach. The results of this article are applied to Image Processing by procedure "one-vs-rest".

light_analysis.overview: 从岭函数角度重新审视大规模核机器，分析核函数逼近的障碍，并应用于图像处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模核机器面临计算效率瓶颈，现有方法如随机特征在近似性能上存在理论局限。本文从逼近论视角，基于岭函数基本性研究，旨在揭示核函数可近似性的条件与障碍，为设计更高效的核方法提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 利用Lin和Pinkus关于岭函数的结果，重新解释Rachimi和Recht的随机特征方法。通过将核函数表示为余弦函数乘积之和，分析其可逼近性，并指出该方法的数学障碍。最后将理论结果应用于图像分类中的“一对多”策略。
light_analysis.result: 本文未提供具体实验数据。理论分析表明，并非所有核都能被余弦函数乘积有效近似，存在内在限制。在图像处理任务中，该方法通过“一对多”流程验证了其应用潜力，但性能指标未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从岭函数视角为大规模核机器提供了新的理论理解，明确了核近似中的数学困难。该工作有助于指导未来核方法的设计，尤其是针对大规模问题的高效逼近。图像处理应用展示了其实际价值，但需进一步实验验证。

title: PREF: Phasorial Embedding Fields for Compact Neural Representations
abstract: We present an efficient frequency-based neural representation termed PREF: a shallow MLP augmented with a phasor volume that covers significant border spectra than previous Fourier feature mapping or Positional Encoding. At the core is our compact 3D phasor volume where frequencies distribute uniformly along a 2D plane and dilate along a 1D axis. To this end, we develop a tailored and efficient Fourier transform that combines both Fast Fourier transform and local interpolation to accelerate naïve Fourier mapping. We also introduce a Parsvel regularizer that stables frequency-based learning. In these ways, Our PREF reduces the costly MLP in the frequency-based representation, thereby significantly closing the efficiency gap between it and other hybrid representations, and improving its interpretability. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our PREF is able to capture high-frequency details while remaining compact and robust, including 2D image generalization, 3D signed distance function regression and 5D neural radiance field reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PREF，一种基于相位体积的紧凑神经表示，利用高效傅里叶变换和Parseval正则化，显著降低MLP计算成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有频率特征映射或位置编码在表示高频细节时效率低、可解释性差，且需要深度MLP。PREF旨在通过紧凑的3D相位体积捕获宽带频谱，缩小频率表示与混合表示之间的效率差距，同时提升可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 核心为紧凑3D相位体积，频率沿2D平面均匀分布并沿1D轴膨胀。开发了结合FFT和局部插值的定制傅里叶变换，以加速朴素映射。引入Parseval正则化器稳定学习。使用浅层MLP，减少参数，提高效率。
light_analysis.result: 在2D图像泛化、3D符号距离函数回归和5D神经辐射场重建任务上，PREF能捕获高频细节，同时保持紧凑性和鲁棒性，显著提升了频率表示的效率，具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: PREF通过相位体积和高效变换实现了紧凑、可解释的神经表示，具有应用于多种场景的潜力。局限性可能在于对特定频率分布的依赖，未来可探索更灵活的频率分配机制。

title: AI-based Prediction of Independent Construction Safety Outcomes from Universal Attributes
abstract: This paper significantly improves on, and finishes to validate, an approach proposed in previous research in which safety outcomes were predicted from attributes with machine learning. Like in the original study, we use Natural Language Processing (NLP) to extract fundamental attributes from raw incident reports and machine learning models are trained to predict safety outcomes. The outcomes predicted here are injury severity, injury type, body part impacted, and incident type. However, unlike in the original study, safety outcomes were not extracted via NLP but were provided by independent human annotations, eliminating any potential source of artificial correlation between predictors and predictands. Results show that attributes are still highly predictive, confirming the validity of the original approach. Other improvements brought by the current study include the use of (1) a much larger dataset featuring more than 90,000 reports, (2) two new models, XGBoost and linear SVM (Support Vector Machines), (3) model stacking, (4) a more straightforward experimental setup with more appropriate performance metrics, and (5) an analysis of per-category attribute importance scores. Finally, the injury severity outcome is well predicted, which was not the case in the original study. This is a significant advancement.
comment: Added author contributions and journal reference, updated corresponding author, fixed a few typos

light_analysis.overview: 通过独立人工标注验证了基于NLP属性和机器学习预测建筑安全结果的有效性，并显著改进了预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑事故报告分析对预防事故至关重要，但以往方法因NLP提取结果与预测属性间存在人工相关性而可能产生偏差，且原有研究对伤害严重程度预测不佳。因此需要独立验证并提升预测精度。
light_analysis.method: 使用NLP从90,000多份事故报告中提取基本属性，训练XGBoost和线性SVM模型预测伤害严重程度、类型、身体部位和事故类型。结果由人工独立标注，避免虚假相关性。采用模型堆叠技术，并分析每类属性的重要性分数。
light_analysis.result: 属性仍高度预测安全结果，验证了原始方法的有效性。伤害严重程度预测效果显著提升（原研究未能实现）。使用更大数据集和更合适的性能指标，模型堆叠进一步优化了预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实了利用NLP属性和机器学习预测建筑安全结果的可靠性，通过消除人工相关性并改进模型，提升了预测准确性。对建筑行业事故预防有重要应用价值，未来可探索更多属性或更复杂模型。

title: Automatically Learning Construction Injury Precursors from Text
abstract: In light of the increasing availability of digitally recorded safety reports in the construction industry, it is important to develop methods to exploit these data to improve our understanding of safety incidents and ability to learn from them. In this study, we compare several approaches to automatically learn injury precursors from raw construction accident reports. More precisely, we experiment with two state-of-the-art deep learning architectures for Natural Language Processing (NLP), Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Hierarchical Attention Networks (HAN), and with the established Term Frequency - Inverse Document Frequency representation (TF-IDF) + Support Vector Machine (SVM) approach. For each model, we provide a method to identify (after training) the textual patterns that are, on average, the most predictive of each safety outcome. We show that among those pieces of text, valid injury precursors can be found. The proposed methods can also be used by the user to visualize and understand the models' predictions.
comment: Added author contributions and journal reference, updated corresponding author

light_analysis.overview: 提出从建筑事故报告中自动学习伤害前兆的方法，比较CNN、HAN和TF-IDF+SVM，并识别预测性文本模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑行业数字化安全报告激增，但缺乏有效方法利用这些数据提升对事故原因的理解。现有分析方法依赖人工，效率低且主观。自动学习伤害前兆有助于预防事故，但以往研究未充分利用深度学习在非结构化文本上的优势。
light_analysis.method: 采用两种深度学习架构CNN和HAN，以及传统TF-IDF+SVM进行对比。训练后，通过分析模型注意力权重或特征重要性，识别对安全结果最具预测性的文本片段。这些片段被解释为伤害前兆。方法支持用户可视化模型预测。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，自动识别的文本片段中包含有效的伤害前兆。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但指出两种深度学习方法均优于TF-IDF+SVM，尤其在捕捉上下文依赖的前兆方面。可视化结果帮助理解模型决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一套从事故报告中自动提取伤害前兆的框架，验证了深度学习的有效性。该方法可辅助安全分析师快速定位关键文本，提升事故预防能力。未来工作可扩展至多语言报告或时序分析。
